Name: Getty Images
Description: Getty Images (NYSE: GETY) is a preeminent global visual content creator and marketplace that offers a full range of content solutions to meet the needs of any customer around the globe, no matter their size. Through its Getty Images, iStock and Unsplash brands, websites and APIs, Getty Images serves customers in almost every country in the world and is the first-place people turn to discover, purchase and share powerful visual content from the world’s best photographers and videographers. Getty Images works with over 583,000 content creators and more than 350 content partners to deliver this powerful and comprehensive content. Each year Getty Images covers more than 160,000 news, sport and entertainment events providing depth and breadth of coverage that is unmatched. Getty Images maintains one of the largest and best privately-owned photographic archives in the world with millions of images dating back to the beginning of photography. Through its best-in-class creative library and Custom Content solutions, Getty Images helps customers elevate their creativity and entire end‑to‑end creative process to find the right visual for any need. With the adoption and distribution of generative AI technologies and tools trained on permissioned content that include indemnification and perpetual, worldwide usage rights, Getty Images and iStock customers can use text to image generation to ideate and create commercially safe compelling visuals, further expanding Getty Images capabilities to deliver exactly what customers are looking for. For company news and announcements, visit our Newsroom (https://newsroom.gettyimages.com/).

Name: Professional Photographers of America
Description:
Professional Photographers of America (PPA) is a non-profit organization founded back in 1868. Our mission is to create a vibrant community of successful professional photographers by offering education, resources, and upholding industry standards of excellence. As trends, technology, and the consumer landscape changes, PPA remains committed to serving 35,0000+ members across 70+ countries. At PPA, our goal is to empower our members to build sustainable, profitable businesses while elevating their photography skills.

We do this by offering competition, certification, and degrees as the pathway for photographers to refine their craft and stand out to clients. Our members stay ahead of the curve with benefits like Professional Photographer magazine, a vast online educational library, curriculums, a variety of year-round workshops, and our annual conference, Imaging USA. To safeguard our members’ businesses, we offer equipment insurance, malpractice coverage, and the indemnification trust, assisting hundreds every year. PPA champions copyright protection of intellectual property and is a strong advocate for photographer rights on Capitol Hill.

We are guided by our Board of Directors and our work is made possible by an incredible network of volunteers, committee members, and our members. Explore the resources, tools, and supportive community PPA provides to help photographers flourish. Join at PPA.com.

Name: Magnum Photos
Description:
Magnum Photos is a collective of acclaimed, independent photographers who share an ongoing commitment to documenting world events, people, places, daily life and culture.

Founded in 1947, Magnum Photos has been telling stories of the past, defining the present, and shaping the future through photography for over 75 years, united by its values of uncompromising excellence, truth, respect and independence.
 
Magnum Photos provides commissioning services and image licensing to a global client base of media platforms, publishers, cultural institutions, brands and advertising agencies.

The Magnum Photos archive is a living library with regularly updated content from all over the world. It counts 600,000 digital images and a print archive of 1 million photographs.

www.instagram.com/magnumphotos
www.facebook.com/MagnumPhotos
www.twitter.com/MagnumPhotos
https://www.tiktok.com/@magnumphotos?lang=en
www.pinterest.com/magnumphotos

Name: Leica Camera Ltd
Description:
International manufacturer of handcrafted and precision photographic and sport optics equipment, Leica Camera AG has been taking its discerning clientele on a journey of connoisseurship for 100 years.

Designed with a passion for perfection, Leica products are appreciated throughout the world by photography and sport optics enthusiasts who demand the finest quality, precision and reliability.

Leica Camera AG's corporate headquarters are located in Wetzlar, Germany, with subsidiaries in the UK, France, Japan, Singapore, Switzerland, South Korea, Italy and the USA and distributors in other areas of the world. Internationally and in the UK, Leica products are only available at Leica company flagship stores, boutiques and from a limited number of authorised partners.

A destination for the authentic Leica experience, Leica Camera's UK facilities include the Leica Store London Mayfair, Leica Store London Harrods, Leica Online Store UK, Akademie and Customer Care. Leica Camera's London operations take photographers on a memorable journey, capturing the next decisive moment.

Learn with the Leica Akademie: store.leica-camera.com/uk/en/akademie/home

Name: Hasselblad
Description:
Founded in 1941, Hasselblad is the leading manufacturer of medium format cameras and lenses. 

Headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden, where the cameras are handmade, Hasselblad is a global brand with offices in New York, London, Tokyo, Paris, Copenhagen and Hamburg with distributors throughout the world.

Hasselblad cameras are renowned for their iconic ergonomic design, uncompromising image quality, Swedish craftsmanship and high performance. 

Hasselblad cameras have captured some of the world’s most iconic images – including the first landing on the moon – and helped shape the way we look at the world through genuine photographic artistry. 

Trusted by NASA and used by the greatest photographers in the world, Hasselblad continues to create products with uncompromising image quality that inspire.

Facebook: www.facebook.com/Hasselblad
Twitter: www.twitter.com/Hasselblad
Instagram: www.instagram.com/hasselblad

Name: World Press Photo
Description:
World Press Photo is an independent non-profit organization that champions the power of photojournalism and documentary photography to deepen understanding of the world’s complexities, promote dialogue, and inspire action. Founded in the Netherlands in 1955, our annual contest and thematic exhibitions reach millions of people in over 80 locations worldwide each year, and our online work reaches millions more. 

We showcase compelling stories to create space for reflection in times of urgency. Amid a fast-changing media landscape influenced by censorship, misinformation, and threats to press freedom, we promote standards of accuracy, authenticity, visual excellence, while ensuring diverse perspectives are represented. Our education programs support photographers in reaching these standards, and help the public explore the profound societal impact of photography.

We are thankful for the support of our funders, particularly our strategic partners the Dutch Postcode Lottery, PwC, and FUJIFILM Corporation.

View our community guidelines: https://www.worldpressphoto.org/about-us/social-media-moderation-guidelines

Name: International Center of Photography
Description: The International Center of Photography (ICP) is the world’s leading institution dedicated to photography and visual culture. Through our exhibitions, educational programs, and community outreach, we offer an open forum for dialogue about the role images play in our culture. Since our founding, we have presented more than 700 exhibitions and offered thousands of classes, providing instruction at every level. ICP is a center where photographers and artists, students and scholars can create and interpret the world of the image within our comprehensive educational facilities and archive.

Name: Association of Photographers
Description:
Protect  -  Promote  -  Inspire

The Association of Photographers was first formed in 1968 as the Association of Fashion and Advertising Photographers and is one of the most prestigious professional photographers' associations in the world.

The AOP's aims remain the same today as they were nearly 50 years ago: To promote and protect the worth and standing of its members, to vigorously defend, educate and lobby for the interests and rights of all photographers, especially in the commercial photographic industry.

Membership is open to:
Professional Photographers, Assistants, Agents and Students.

Our members' clients include:
advertising agencies, design groups, corporate sector companies, publishing houses and music publishers.

Our members' work is:
published worldwide in magazines, newspapers, books and advertising campaigns. Many members produce work as fine art, sold and collected through traditional galleries and online.

The Association brings professional photographers together and provides a sense of community that is simply unavailable anywhere else. We promote the highest levels of achievement and we lobby for our members' interests at all levels.

Name: You+Baby Studio
Description: A leading MENA family photo studio offering maternity, newborn, and family photography. We absolutely love what we do! Our goal as a studio is to capture precious images of your family that you will cherish for a lifetime.

Name: Polaroid
Description: We’re Polaroid: the original home of analog instant photography. Over our 82-year journey we’ve been called everything: The Impossible Project, Polaroid Originals, and now Polaroid; the brand where it all began. We create beautiful tools to bring people together in human and meaningful ways. In a world that’s more disconnected than ever, there’s never been a better time to appreciate what’s in front of you. We create beautiful, life-enriching tools to ground you in the here and now. We exist to help you see everyday moments, to pause them, and to relive them in something you can hold in your hand and turn to forever. Join us.

Name: Phase One
Description:
Phase One is a global leader in digital imaging technology, providing unrivaled imaging quality for a wide range of applications including professional photography, heritage digitization, industrial inspections, aerial mapping, security, and space.   

For more than three decades, Phase One has developed core imaging technologies and a range of digital cameras and imaging modules, setting new standards for image quality in terms of resolution, dynamic range, color fidelity, and geometric accuracy.  

Based in Copenhagen, Denmark, Phase One has regional offices strategically located in Denver, Tokyo, Saku, Shanghai and Hong Kong.  

Supported by a global sales network, the company nurtures long-term relationships with customers, technology partners, and distributors worldwide, often acting as digital imaging partner to customers with unique requirements. This passion for service ensures Phase One continually exceeds expectations and drives the imaging industry forward.  

We deliver Imaging Beyond Imagination.  

www.phaseone.com

Name: Wundrous
Description: Wundrous is a travel and design social media brand with 35,000 followers focused on visual content, centred around Instagram, Facebook, Twitter and Pinterest. We have a very loyal following and high engagement. Please visit our website to contact us about advertising and sponsored campaign opportunities.

Name: VSCO
Description: VSCO is a community-driven platform that equips photographers to expand creatively and professionally.  With a suite of creative tools and a network for connecting with other creatives and businesses, VSCO empowers photographers to develop their unique visions and be seen by the world.

Name: 500px
Description: 500px is the premier online community and social network for aspiring and practicing photographers. Millions of creatives from 195 countries come to 500px to discover and share incredible photos, gain global exposure, and get paid for their work and skills.

Name: Adorama
Description:
We are so much more than just a camera store… we've become the #1 place for all content-creators, photographers, vloggers and anything you can imagine to help you capture, enjoy and share life’s moments on your platform or with your friends and family. We are always striving to grow and love to hear feedback from our loyal patrons and the otherwise curious; drop us a line, like or comment!

Located in New York City, Adorama is the affordable photography, electronics, video and camera store. We carry a large selection of camera equipment and have the best prices in the NYC area. Whether you're a professional photographer or just starting out, our helpful and knowledgeable salespeople will help select the right studio gear, lighting, tripods and camera equipment just for you.

Name: Lifetouch
Description:
At Lifetouch, our purpose is to help families capture life's memories.

For more than 80 years, Lifetouch has been the professional photography company of choice for schools and families. Headquartered in Eden Prairie, MN., the enterprise is organized around four primary business lines operating in local communities across North America.

Built on the tradition of “Picture Day”, Lifetouch captures smiling faces from preschool through high school graduation, as well as sports, special events, seniors, and yearbooks. Additional photography services are offered through JCPenney Portraits by Lifetouch, helping families capture special milestones nationwide.

Lifetouch is also proud to be a part of the Shutterfly family of brands.

Name: Art + Commerce
Description:
About Art + Commerce
 
Art + Commerce was founded in the early 1980s to represent preeminent image makers working in a range of creative disciplines. The agency has evolved into a global organization representing over 60 photographers, directors, stylists, hair and make-up artists, creative directors, an illustrator, a set designer and important estates and foundations. The company is engaged with the long-term aspirations and practical needs of its artists and is committed to playing a positive role in the cultural understanding of image making.

Name: Godox Photo Equipment Co Ltd
Description:
Founded in 1993 as a high-tech manufacturing facility specializing in lighting and audio equipment, Godox has now become a lighting equipment expert and innovator of gears for photographers, videographers, filmmakers and more. Driven by the mission of offering great lighting and audio solutions, Godox has been always pushing the boundaries of technology, and constantly bringing professional products to the industries.

With over 1000 highly qualified staffs and 4 manufacturing facilities, factories covering more than 30,000 square meters, including an electronic products assembling center, a plastic injection and tooling center, a hardware processing center, a fabric accessory assembling center. Godox runs a diverse businesses profile with main product categories in photography, broadcasting, cinematography and videography, and audio industry. Through open collaboration and innovation, we establish industry partnerships worldwide, which would allow people to share great moments with our professional lighting and audio gears anywhere in the world.

Godox benefits from creative talent pool in R&D, Design, Sales and Management teams for sustained success. Drawing on these resources, we are able to keep developing more and more professional and creative products every year to keep up to date with the market. Godox will further ramp up investment into innovation, taking innovation to the next level and constantly delivering value to the industry and society at large. We will continue working to provide products combining advanced technology with dynamic designs.

Name: Photography News
Description:
Photography News is a fast growing daily news source for everyone who has an interest in photography, from professional to amateur photographers, from digital to film photography enthusiasts, or from photographic equipment makers to art galleries.

Its mission is to help connect today's photographers, photography related markets and photo enthusiasts to the information that matters:

- The latest news in photojournalism, documentary, fashion, editorial, travel, wildlife, architectural photography, etc.
- News and schedules for worldwide photographic education and workshop opportunities
- Current events
-  Show info, stories and reviews of photo galleries, museums and exhibits around the world
- International photography contests
- Awesome giveaways
- Art fairs and markets
- Opinions
- Legal issues
- Editorials
- Product recommendations
- Best photographic shooting locations around the globe
- Travel planning information for visiting photographers
- Profiles of photographers
- Photography industries
- International accomplishments
- Photography-related links
- Equipment reviews (cameras, lenses, etc.)
- Photography book and movie reviews
- Software reviews

Name: iStock
Description:
iStock is an online resource for original royalty-free stock content at the right price, including photos, illustrations, vectors, videos and audio tracks.

At iStock, we’re working together to put craft first and bring you the very best stock content so that you can use it to do your very best work. We’re obsessed with beautifully crafted content and have millions of handpicked stock photos, illustrations, vectors, videos and audio tracks. As our community has grown, so has our library – not just in size, but also in breadth and originality – so that there really is something for everyone. iStock frees creatives everywhere to create beautiful communications on a budget.

More than half of our content comes from artists exclusive to iStock and we have over 170 dedicated creatives reviewing every piece of content that comes into the iStock library to meet legal and creative standards. Our legal guarantee keeps you protected, ensuring that every file you purchase from iStock is safe to use, and if you’re part of a large organization, our corporate accounts offer flexible purchasing and invoicing options. 

We are the web’s original resource for crowd sourced royalty-free stock images, media and design elements. And more than ten years later, we still offer the best content at the right price. 

That’s it, in a creative nutshell.

Name: Freelance Photograper
Description: Www.TylerBowmanPhotography.Com

Name: Capture One
Description:
Born out of a passion for photography, Capture One provides photographers with the tools to easily collaborate with clients and creatives and achieve the highest quality photograph, bringing their visions to life. 

Our powerful photo editing software is built on more than twenty-five years of technical expertise. Today, we offer the fastest tethered shooting in the industry, an intuitive and efficient workflow, unparalleled image quality with support for over 600 camera and lens profiles, true-to-life color processing, and precise editing and collaborative tools.

Based in Denmark and Greece, our passionate team from around the world challenge each other daily to make sure we answer the needs of our community. 
At Capture One, we believe in creating an inclusive work culture with people who are representative of the diverse community we serve. We follow the Scandinavian mindset of giving our teams full trust to run with ideas while keeping each other accountable and ensuring that customer benefit is at the heart of everything we do. 

We are on a journey to become the most efficient ecosystem of creative and collaborative tools with a flexible photography workflow seamlessly spanning across multiple devices, letting you work from anywhere and with anyone. Our love of imaging translates into empowering our ever-growing community of over 260,000 photographers across the globe to show the world.

Name: Les Rencontres de la photographie, Arles
Description:
Créées en 1970, les Rencontres photographiques d'Arles, festival sans pareil du monde photographique, ont fêté en 2023 leur 54ème édition. 
Plus de quarante expositions y sont présentées chaque année durant la période estivale dans des lieux historiques de la ville d'Arles. Pendant la semaine d’inauguration, des soirées de projections sont proposées au Théâtre Antique. Des débats et conférences, des lectures de portfolios permettent de confronter les divers courants de la photographie. Sont également organisés des actions pédagogiques en milieu scolaire et des stages photographiques dispensés par des photographes de renom à destination d’un public amateur ou professionnel de l'image. 

Les Rencontres d’Arles ont accueilli 145 000 visiteurs en 2023. Elles bénéficient d’un vif engouement largement relayé par la presse française et internationale.

Name: Photoshooto
Description: Bringing revolutionary change for photography industry in the virtual world. In next 3 years there are no physical studios can exists.

Name: Alamy
Description: Alamy is the world’s most interesting content marketplace accessible to all types of marketers and storytellers. With diverse visuals from a community of talented contributors, we provide access to an unmatched global perspective and local flavor from every corner of the world. Our library is vast yet niche, with hundreds of millions of high-quality images, illustrations, vectors, and videos that are easy to discover and ready to use for any need across platforms. And with flexible licensing and simple, built-in solutions, we make every project as easy as Alamy.

Name: Fotografía eCommerce
Description: Fotografía eCommerce ofrece el servicio de fotografiar los productos de su tienda online. Comprendemos la importancia que tienen las fotografías en los negocios de comercio electrónico, ya que es el medio por el que el cliente ve el producto antes de comprarlo, y al igual que una mala fotografía puede desanimarle a realizar su compra, una buena le impulsará a efectuarla.

Name: Beige Media
Description: Beige Media is an on-demand video production platform delivering premium content creation and video advertising solutions nationwide. Founded in Los Angeles in 2017, we've expanded across the United States, empowering corporate brands with innovative storytelling and high-quality visual experiences.

Name: EyeEm
Description:
EyeEm is a global marketplace for premium stock photography. The platform is powered by its patented, AI based computer vision software that automatically analyses the content of an image, and fuelled by a global network of photographers, telling real stories from around the world. 

EyeEm’s Personalised Aesthetics Search allows brands to find on brand visuals quickly and reliably. With millions of creative photographers contributing to EyeEm, the Berlin-based company is home to some of the world’s greatest images.

EyeEm was founded in 2011 and has offices in Berlin and New York.

Name: ImagesBazaar
Description:
ImagesBazaar provides creative professionals all over the globe with an imperative resource for searching, purchasing and downloading Indian images. 
India's diversity and complexity can be witnessed through its people, traditions and values associated with distinctive regional customs, habits, lifestyle and festivals. our images and videos reflect the innate expressions of deep-rooted feelings of individuals through which spring their day-to-day actions. Indians believe in sharing happiness and sorrow as a community. While doing so, there are unique mannerisms and expressions which are captured in our extensive library of creative imagery.

In visual communication, a product or service meant for a particular audience has better chances of success if it carries a face that viewers can relate to. With India emerging as a leading market for an ever-increasing range of products and services, there has been a huge surge in demand for creative images and videos with Indian faces. From contemporary concepts and ideas to the broadest range of categories depicting Indians in virtually all walks of life, age groups and expressions - you will find it all here!

Name: The Photographers' Gallery London
Description:
At The Photographers' Gallery we explore how photography is connecting, captivating and radically changing the world we live in. 

In the heart of central London, on the border of Soho and Oxford Street, the Gallery is home for the next generation of photography – from experts to novices and the photo-curious; artists and students; locals, tourists and passers-by; and an enthusiastic and committed team.

Through our in-person and online programme – from exhibitions, talks, lates and workshops, to courses, tours, an archive, and more – we aim to inspire conversation and collaboration, and explore the beauty, complexity and future of photography. There’s even an outdoor exhibition in Soho Photography Quarter to see day or night, just outside the Gallery.

Name: The Society of Photographers
Description:
The Fastest Growing Worldwide Association for Professional Photographers.

When there is such a choice of representative organisations out there you may ask yourself, why The Society of Photographers?

To us the answer is very simple. If you are a newcomer to the industry or considering a career change then we offer the most comprehensive range  of educational seminars by inspirational speakers… backed by our 'Mentor Me' programme leading to qualifications.

Name: ILFORD Imaging
Description:
ILFORD is a leading player in the development and manufacture of photo quality media for professional inkjet printing.

The ILFORD brand has been synonymous with professional quality photographic material for many years and continues to move from strength to strength in the digital imaging age. The range of brands available has been developed in line with the requirements of the individual markets and the products have been designed accordingly.
Unternehmensübersicht
Founded in 1879, ILFORD is a leading player in the development and production of photo quality media for the professional inkjet printing market.
Our worldwide digital imaging businesses, includes R&D and operations based in Europe, with additional sales offices and logistics now also found in Asia and the Oceania region.
By building on over 140 years of photographic knowledge and expertise, ILFORD has developed a range of inkjet media to suit and exceed their customers needs.

The ILFORD GALERIE Prestige range includes media that has the look and feel of a traditional photograph. The GALERIE Prestige Fine Art range was specifically designed with the artisan printer and photographer in mind.

Today, ILFORD is one of the worlds famous brands, recognized for the highest quality and producing award winning products.

Visit our website for more information - www.ilford.com

Name: EFTI Centro Internacional de Fotografía y Cine
Description:
EFTI was born as a school in 1987 with the only purpose of teaching photography and promoting all the activities related with it.

EFTI is located on Fuenterrabía Street, Madrid. Its 2,500 sq metres are entirely dedicated to photography. Our purpose has always been to create a living space where teaching combines with exhibitions and numerous activities related to the photographic image. Our facilities include three labs, five sets, five lecture rooms, four digital labs, and a library holding more than 2,000 volumes on photography, art, and image.  

Our experience during these years has placed EFTI as one of the most prestigious Photography Centres in Europe. Currently our Masters Programme is considered to be the best course among Spanish-speaking countries. We have had more than 8,000 students from 50 different countries enrolled in our different programmes. 

Institutions such as the National Museum Queen Sofía, Grupo Recoletos, International News Agency EFE, the Spanish Ministry of Education and Culture, and other official organisms have trusted EFTI for the formation of their teaching staff.

Our teachers are and have been some of the best professionals in the medium: photographers, artists and experts in image analysis. All of them have an extended professional career, with international exhibitions that prove their knowledge and experience. In some cases we can talk of more than 30 years of dedication to photography and a demonstrated teaching capacity.

Name: Hotorevie
Description: Photography

Name: Beige Video and Photo
Description: Beige is an on-demand video production platform delivering premium content creation and video advertising solutions nationwide. Founded in Los Angeles in 2017, we've expanded across the United States, empowering corporate brands with innovative storytelling and high-quality visual experiences.

Name: DxO Labs
Description:
Over the past 20 years, DxO Labs has established itself as one of the most innovative French companies in the field of digital photography and image processing. The company designs and markets advanced photo editing software for both amateur and professional photographers. Its solutions, based on deep expertise in optical science, provide the most powerful correction and processing tools available.

DxO Labs’ know-how stems from close collaboration between its engineers and leading research laboratories in applied mathematics. The company has always relied on the excellence and unmatched expertise of its teams: world-class researchers specializing in image processing and AI / Deep Learning.

Today, DxO Labs is behind numerous innovations. Among them is the automatic correction of optical flaws in digital cameras, based on lab-calibrated analysis of camera bodies and lenses. DxO Labs has also developed the most advanced noise reduction and RAW development tools on the market—such as DxO DeepPRIME—as well as the most powerful optical correction algorithms. With its deep expertise, DxO aims to make the best imaging technologies accessible to all photographers.

DxO Labs’ history is marked by major innovations—like those that have enabled over 400 million devices featuring DxO technologies to capture images of exceptional quality. Or its image processing software, arguably the most awarded in the world!

Discover DxO Labs’ software!
Software made by photographers, for photographers.

DxO PhotoLab

DxO PureRAW

Nik Collection

DxO FilmPack

DxO ViewPoint

Name: Kodakit
Description:
Kodakit connects global clients with quality photographers & creatives at scale. Our on-demand service has changed the way businesses and photographers connect – addressing the global, high-volume needs of the travel, food, product, and real-estate markets.
 
As a fresh, fast-growing company backed by a legacy brand that photographers trust, we have big plans to soon expand into more innovative visual solutions (hint: video, 360, and drone – to name a few). Currently, Kodakit has photographers in 60 countries, and over 900 cities, and our network of creatives is still expanding. Major metropolitan regions covered include New York, San Francisco, London, Hong Kong, Singapore and Delhi, among others. 

For more information, visit www.kodakit.com

Name: Leica Camera North America
Description:
Passion for creating perfect pictures. 
Leica represents a union of craftsmanship, design and experience. It is a beautiful collision of art and engineering, and the future of form and functionality. Leica Camera is an internationally operating, premium-segment manufacturer of cameras and sport optics products. The legendary status of the Leica brand is founded on a long tradition of excellence in the supreme quality and performance of cameras and lenses, and the iconic images that artists and photojournalists everywhere captured with them.

Name: Fotografia Independiente
Description:
Fotografia de eventos sociales, artisticos y empresariales en general. 
Ilumincacion de estudio, equipos digitales. 
Fotografia de estudio. 
Fotografia en exteriores.

Name: Iris Galerie
Description:
Iris Galerie offers the unique experience of revealing the beauty of our eyes through a unique macro photography process.

As a couple, family or solo, our customers can discover their eyes as they have never seen them before and immortalize them through a wide range of formats and finishes from 49 euros.

Iris Galerie offers its clients an artistic, community-based experience full of surprises that appeals to everyone.

Iris Galerie has more than 50 galleries opened in just 1 year and a considerable expansion plan for 2023/2024 internationally.

Description:
VsnapU is Organising the Photography Industry .
We are Startup from IIM Bangalore and seed funded . 
Its a Tech Based Platform for freelance photographer Videographers, Food stylist and Cinematographer . We are operational in about 100 Cities and 28 Countries.

We also have a unique product called Holiday Photography . We provide professional photoshoot at Tourist Destinations Across the Globe . So this becomes activity and life time memory for people on Holiday

Name: Portraits For Patriots
Description:
Portraits For Patriots is an 100% volunteer-powered national 501(c)(3) non-profit organization exclusively serving our service members, spouses and Gold Star dependents as they make their way from military service to the work force.  Coast-to-coast, we empower those who have honorably-served our nation to feel confident in their personal brand during their civilian transition. When your mission ends, ours begins.

Through our nationwide network of volunteer photographers, Portraits For Patriots provides thousands of portfolio-quality "headshot" images each year that showcase the strength and determination of our transitioning service members, spouses and Gold Star families, free of charge. To date, we have provided well over $2,000,000.00 in portfolio images to our American patriots.

#patriotsnotpolitics

Donate Via PayPal:
https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=N967XRAXF4MA6
We are incorporated as a nonprofit corporation in Colorado and are powered by a growing network of volunteer photographers and studios nationwide, and at US military installations abroad. Portraits For Patriots is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization.

We are available to assist organizations with planning a successful headshot event and can deploy mobile studios for most situations—Event fees help us sustain our program.

If you are professional photographer and would like to enlist as a #Portraiteer, we'll sign you up!

If you need a headshot, please head over to our web site, fill out the contact form and we will get you a referral to the closest volunteer. https://www.portraitsforpatriots.org/

Name: Aperture

Established in 1952 to advance “creative thinking, significantly expressed in words and photographs,” Aperture champions photography’s vital role in nurturing curiosity and encouraging a more just, tolerant society.

Soho Photo offers its members the unique opportunity of being a part of a diverse community of fellow photographers and personal growth as a fine-art photographer. The gallery also offers workshops, lectures and other programming open to the public.

Our head office and central warehouse are in Gothenburg, Sweden, covering logistics, product management, marketing, finance, and IT. Welcome to Corporate Photography, where we specialize in delivering exceptional corporate photography services. We believe that strong visual communication is essential for businesses to thrive in today's competitive landscape. Our team of skilled photographers is dedicated to capturing the essence of your brand, helping you elevate your corporate image and stand out from the crowd.

With an artistic eye and a keen understanding of the corporate world, we create compelling visual narratives that align with your brand's values and objectives. Whether it's executive headshots, team photos, office interiors, or event coverage, we meticulously craft each image to reflect professionalism, authenticity, and success.

At Corporate Photography, we pride ourselves on our attention to detail, prompt delivery, and outstanding customer service. We collaborate closely with our clients, ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our goal is to not only meet but exceed your expectations, providing you with visually captivating photographs that make a lasting impact.

Join numerous satisfied clients who have entrusted us with their corporate photography needs. Let us help you unlock the power of visual storytelling and showcase your business in its best light. Contact us today to discuss how we can collaborate and bring your corporate vision to life.

Through simple yet evocative images, B-Frost reflects a deep appreciation for the beauty and fragility of these remote environments.

Name: Blend Images
Description:
Blend Images is the world's leading multiethnic commercial stock agency. Founded by a consortium of the most talented and respected photographers within stock photography, and managed by key industry veterans, Blend Images has established itself as the premiere destination for ethnically diverse business and lifestyle imagery.

We strive to understand the needs of marketing to diverse communities. Through extensive market research and creative intelligence, we create vibrant, culturally relevant imagery for the marketplace, capturing the real-life essence of a variety of ethnic groups - imagery that has graced the cover of TIME and other high profile commercial and editorial usages.

Our exclusive niche focus on ethnically diverse imagery speaks directly to clients' needs. We offer a unique rights-managed collection, a premium royalty-free collection, and a brand new royalty-free value collection (BOOST!), all guaranteeing the exacting standards and high quality that exemplify Blend Images. For any comments on our offerings, specific needs or other suggestions, please communicate with us at info@blendimages.com.

Name: Bay Photo
Description:
Quality. Service. Innovation.

Bay Photo Lab is a growing, cutting-edge company with a 40 year history of innovative photographic printing and photofinishing services. Located in Scotts Valley, California, nestled in the coastal redwoods slightly North of Santa Cruz, we provide photographers with the highest quality printing on many different substrates. We are a state of the art, technology-oriented company, that is committed to providing world class products and customer support. We have kept that promise by changing and adapting with the photo industry. We pride ourselves on our custom quality printing and fast delivery. Perfect every time.

Name: Westend61 GmbH
Description:
Westend61. Home of European stock photography.

Westend61 is Europe’s leading brand of premium lifestyle stock photography. With an impressive network of about 500 international photographers and more than 100 distributors we provide picture buyers all over the world with exceptional, creative and fresh
imagery.
Since 2003, we focus on lifestyle images with high relevance for advertising, corporate and editorial customers. Moreover, our collection holds exciting travel, nature and food photography,
too. But most important: We concentrate on a European visual language which is authentic, unique in the market, essential for our customers, and highly usable. 
Our contemporary and creative imagery is produced in co-operation with experienced ArtDirectors and is highly curated by professionals. We licence about 350,000 images as of today and our clients can enjoy not only extensive service but also flexible pricing.

Description: MarioTestino+ is based in London, under the direction of world-renowned photographer, creative director, art collector and collaborator: Mario Testino.

Name: Packshot.com
Description:
Packshot.com was the first independent studios to streamline the product photography process for the advertising industry. Over thirty years later, we’re now the largest original imagery producer in Europe. 

Stills and videos. Above-the-line and below-the-line. For advertising, marketing, design, PR, editorial and direct to major retailers, brands and OEMs. 

We offer photography and video that engages the consumer and promotes the brand. Creative, to brief, exquisitely shot and post produced - it’s the heart of where we started and key to what we do. From tiny jewellery and electronics items to cars and busses, from one thing beautifully to thousands quickly.
	
Facilities in London, Birmingham, Amsterdam, Berlin Dusseldorf Dublin 
and Mumbai offer studio spaces suited to any kind of production. From OOH campaigns, to social media engagement from TVCs to experiential PR across all physical and digital media.

Packshot.com’s fashion division Fashot.com shoots everything from invisible ghost mannequins, to high end fashion campaigns. Across Europe Fashot.com’s studios produce millions of images every year for hungry ecommerce heavyweights to exclusive luxury labels. No other studios offer such a well-honed ecommerce workflow structure. These systems are supported leading creatives giving a 360-degree content solution from the packshot to the campaign.

Name: Anderson Hopkins
Description:
Established in 1999, Anderson Hopkins is a mid-sized agency that represents artists and produces photo, video, and film shoots worldwide. As a full service company, we work with clients to create cost effective solutions while maintaining creative integrity. 

Managing shoots, either in studio or on location, staff producers arrange everything necessary to ensure the successful execution of the client’s project and expectations. Continually reaching out to new clients and vendors, Anderson Hopkins stays current with producers and production services offering the highest quality final product the client can achieve within their budget.

Name: CAVAD | CBU Photography
Description: CAVAD’s Photography Program at California Baptist University in Riverside, California explores the practice and theory of photography via technical understandings and methodological explorations of the photography medium as applied to commercial, fine art, and social practice. Through the introduction of narrative, conceptual development, and Christian worldview - students will acquire a unique stylistic aesthetic and photographic voice leading to a professional portfolio.

Name: Atomo Management
Description:
A brand by MA+Group

Atomo Management is an international artists management and creative content agency with offices in Milan. The agency represents Creative Directors, Photographers, Directors and Stylists.

Atomo Management provides a full range of services to its artists and clients on both editorial and advertising projects for print and film.

Name: Office Curator

Name: Oodio
Description:
OODIO is where craft meets scale; where technology learns to feel human, and with love and care.
For more than fifteen years, we have helped photographers, studios, and agencies reclaim time, elevate quality, and deliver work that carries emotion. Editing for us is not just processing files. It is care. It is craftsmanship. It is love poured into pixels by real people supported by intelligent systems.
Our hybrid Human plus AI workflow brings speed, accuracy, and consistent output. Our Magic Touch adds feeling, texture, and soul so every image looks intentional, elegantly corrected, and print-ready.
From RAW files to albums in hand, we work with the precision of a production house and the heart of an artist. We are trusted by more than 250 clients across the world, and we have crafted more than 10 million images. We are the silent engine behind creatives who want to grow while keeping true to their art.
Whether you are delivering your first wedding or managing more than forty events a year, OODIO gives you the backbone to move faster, deliver better, and build a reputation that stands tall.
What We Offer
 • Human + AI Editing Workflows
 • Culling and Color Correction
 • Magic Touch Retouch and Local Refinements
 • Album Design and Visual Story Layouts
 • Premium Fine Art Albums
 • Consistent 7-9 Day Turnaround
 • Dedicated Editor Teams and Smooth Onboarding


What We Believe
 Craft matters.
 People matter.
 Care matters most.
 Good post-production is delivered.
 Great post-production is loved into existence.
 From color to craft, from pixels to print,
 This is OODIO.

Lifetouch

For nearly 80 years, Lifetouch has been committed to building strong relationships, loyalty that lasts a lifetime, and memories that last forever.

A Getty Images é a fonte de conteúdo visual mais confiável e estimada do mundo, com mais de 534 milhões de ativos (fotos e vídeos) disponíveis nos sites líderes do setor, www.gettyimages.com.br e www.istock.com.br. O site da Getty Images atende clientes criativos, de negócios e de mídia em quase 200 países e é o primeiro lugar que as pessoas descobrem, compram e compartilham conteúdo poderoso dos melhores fotógrafos e videógrafos do mundo. A Getty Images trabalha com mais de 527.000 contribuidores e centenas de parceiros de imagem para fornecer uma cobertura abrangente de mais de 160.000 eventos de notícias, esporte e entretenimento, imagens criativas impactantes para comunicar qualquer conceito comercial e o arquivo digital mais profundo do mundo de fotografia histórica.
 
Visite a Getty Images em www.gettyimages.com.br para saber mais sobre como a empresa está promovendo o papel exclusivo de imagens estáticas e móveis na comunicação e nos negócios, além de permitir que idéias criativas ganhem vida. Para notícias e anúncios da empresa, visite nosso http://press.gettyimages.com e, para as histórias e inspiração por trás de nosso conteúdo, visite https://creativeinsights.gettyimages.com/ptbr/. Encontre a Getty Images no Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn e faça o download do aplicativo Getty Images, onde você pode explorar, salvar e compartilhar as melhores imagens do mundo.

Name: AAMS - Advanced Aerial Mapping Services Ltd
Description:
Advanced Aerial Mapping Services Ltd. (AAMS) is the leading aerial surveying and mapping company. AAMS was established in 2016 and since then we have been delivering quality aerial survey, mapping and photogrammetry services to our clients in England, Saudi Arabia, the Middle East as well as in other parts of the world.

Using the latest airborne data acquisition and processing technologies, we offer high-accuracy aerial imagery, lidar data, oblique imagery, Thermal Imagery and derived products that meet common national and international mapping standards. Besides utilising the most current technology, we have highly trained and professional staff who have a wealth of experience in the aerial survey industry and this ensures project scope and schedule adherence. The company have some strong collaborations with most of the distinctive globally known providers who are notably remarkable in their respective fields which allows us to ensure that we provide 100% client satisfaction with our exceptional services. Moreover, AAMS can undertake aerial surveys and photogrammetry projects of any size anywhere in the world.

Name: Lifetouch Church Directories and Portraits
Description:
We’re more than a church directory company - we are your partner in growth. Our family photography events, user-friendly connection tools, and programs to help you raise funds make it easy to connect, which makes it easier for you to grow.

At Lifetouch, we understand the power of connections and know that connected families are more likely to volunteer their time, energy and resources toward achieving you shared mission.

FAMILY PHOTOGRAPHY

► We capture memories to last a lifetime.

► Your families will love the opportunity to tell their story through photography. They will cherish their portraits for years to come. 

► Our professional photographers provide variety, on-trend posing, and styles to suit young and old alike.

CONNECTION TOOLS

► Select our classic program for a more traditional look - designed to capture your milestones and memories.   Or, meet the next generation of directories with our Community Connect book - it's updateable and designed to grow with you over time.  

► Our Mobile Directory makes it easy to connect on-the-go with contact information just a tap away.  

► Have a Church Management System?  We make it easy to upload images directly to each profile.


PROUD TO BE PART OF THE SHUTTERFLY FAMILY

Learn more: https://www.churchdirectories.lifetouch.com/

Name: GradImages
Description:
GradImages is the world’s largest commencement photography business, capturing the accomplishments of over 1.7 million graduates each year through GradTrak, our unique image-management software system designed exclusively for commencement ceremonies.

Commencement Photography is our specialty, and each of our professional photographers are trained to capture the optimal images of the graduates without disrupting the decorum of the commencement ceremony. Our customized GradTrak system allows us to quickly identify each individual image, and present those images directly to each graduate to view, share and purchase. The final products are produced in a professional photo lab, and delivered expediently with a satisfaction guarantee.

Our clients include the largest universities and high schools across the United States and Canada. We have been photographing commencements for more than 30 years, and we fully appreciate that each of our photos captures a cherished milestone in the lives of graduating students and their families.

Name: Label Photographie
Description:
Depuis 2020, Label Photographie construit une communauté de photographes professionnels engagés dans la valorisation de leur profession. Sélectionnés pour leur savoir-faire et leur expérience, nos membres bénéficient d'un ensemble de services les accompagnant dans le développement de leur activité avec pertinence.

Notre but principal est de faciliter la prise de contact directe entre les photographes et leurs clients, en nous assurant de la cohérence entre l’offre des premiers et les besoins des seconds. Chaque profil de photographe présent sur notre site a ainsi été pensé comme une vraie vitrine de son savoir-faire et une porte d'entrée directe vers son activité.

Nous nous engageons également dans la promotion de la profession de photographe à travers des partenariats proactifs (FFPMI, Lumys, PICTO... ), la rédaction d’articles inspirants ou encore des prises de position médiatiques engagées. Notre objectif principal est donc de renouer le contact entre les photographes et leurs clients avec éthique, qualité et pertinence.

Name: Headshot Crew
Description:
Whether you're a photographer aiming to refine your portrait and headshot skills or a professional seeking a compelling business headshot, the Headshot Crew is your dedicated partner.

Founded by the world-renowned photographer Peter Hurley, we passionately believe that everyone deserves to present their absolute best self. Our mission is to empower photographers through our coaching program, one-on-one coaching, portfolio reviews, and global live workshops covering both the technical aspects and the business behind headshot photography.

If you're eager to elevate your personal branding, visit our website to discover a vast network of highly trained headshot photographers. Find the perfect match for your needs in your local area, ensuring you showcase your best self.

For photographers looking to enhance their skills and join a thriving network, seize the opportunity and sign up today. The Headshot Crew is committed to cultivating excellence in headshot photography.

Name: Photography By K
Description:
Dear all Photography By K and In Focus Properties clients, friends and family…This fantastic journey wouldn’t have been possible without you! However, after sincere thought and consideration, I’ve decided to set my sights on new goals and am closing my photography business.

As many of you know, Jason and I moved to Florida last year. At that time, I made the cognizant decision to focus solely on real estate photography and run this northwest Ohio ship remotely from Florida.  My heart is heavy as I sadly announce that the time has come to once again refocus my efforts here in my new home…and wherever that journey may lead, I want to make sure I’m giving it 100% of my attention, care and love.  

From the bottom of my heart – Thank you!  Without you, I would have never been able to realize the dream of owning my own business, watching it grow and evolve, and turning that dream into a full-time job.  Even though this chapter is ending, I plan to continue writing my story by doing what I love.  Life’s too short to do it any other way!

Name: Creo
Description:
Creo initiates and organises events and programming across three key strands: photography, film and contemporary art. Established in 2007 as World Photography Organisation, Creo has since grown in scope, furthering its mission of developing meaningful opportunities for creatives and expanding the reach of its cultural activities. Today, its flagship projects include the Sony World Photography Awards, PHOTOFAIRS Shanghai, Photo London and the Sony Future Filmmaker Awards.

Working in partnership with Angus Montgomery Arts, Creo provides support across the group’s ventures, helping to deliver some of the world’s leading art fairs. These include member fairs in The Art Assembly, an affiliation of major international art fairs with a particular focus on the Asia Pacific region.

Creo derives from the Latin ‘creare’: to make, bring forth; in turn related to ‘crescere’: to arise, grow. It is this ethos that sits at the heart of Creo and its activities – the drive to create, to spark ideas, and to encourage growth. Translating directly to ‘I create’, in this spirit Creo sets out to empower and give agency to creative voices.

Name: Réponses Photo
Description: Réponses Photo est un magazine français mensuel qui accompagne tous les photographes, qu’ils soient amateurs ou professionnels, pour bâtir leurs projets photographiques, nourrir leur inspiration, développer leur culture de l’image, publier leur travail et les aider à choisir leurs équipements.

Name: Impossible Camera GmbH
Description:
Thanks for taking an interest in The Impossible Project. As of September 2017, Impossible now operates as Polaroid Originals. You can find out more about us over at the Polaroid Originals profile.

https://www.linkedin.com/company/18247533/

INSTANT PHOTOGRAPHY. REINVENTED.

Impossible makes fresh instant film for classic Polaroid cameras - we’re the only people in the world that still do so. We do it because we believe in making real, unique photos that develop in the palm of your hand. In May 2016 we launched the I-1, our first instant camera, which reinvents instant photography for the digital age. 

Achieving the impossible is built into our DNA, and has been ever since we rescued the last Polaroid factory in 2008, days before it closed down. By now we’ve transformed from a hopeful startup into a dynamic international company with offices in Berlin, New York and Beijing. We couldn’t have done it without persistence, creative thinking and attention to detail - qualities we look for in every new member of our team. We invite the brightest and best to apply with us, as we embark on our exciting next phase, introducing even more innovative cameras and films that show the world what makes instant photography so special, and meaningful, now more than ever.

Name: Palm Springs Photo Festival
Description:
The Palm Springs Photo Festival is an intense week-long event for professional, emerging and serious advanced amateur photographers. In it's 5th year, the festival is dedicated to providing a rich program intended to inspire, educate and instill or reignite passion for the art and commerce of photography. Connect 2010 provides an opportunity to meet top photographers, curators, art directors, editors, gallery directors, ad agency creatives, educators and industry leaders in the spectacular desert environment of Palm Springs, California. Portfolio reviews, workshops with legendary photographers, cutting-edge seminars/symposiums and evening presentations by world famous image-makers. 

The Workshop Program offers 18 intense, remarkable classes with world-renown working photographers and educators. Most are three full days plus a 4th day morning session, beginning on March 29, 2010. Students spend three 1/2 days listening, learning, shooting and comparing notes. Instructors will work one on one with students, demonstrate his or her methods, explore his or her own work and students' work. We also offer one-day workshops during the week, including specialized lighting instruction and portfolio organization and presentation classes.

A company who has a deep passion for photography and interior design combined with the affection for travel and adventure inspired the character of the Gray Malin brand founded in 2009. 

The photographer and founder of Gray Malin Enterprises enforces his artistic ideals as the company’s Creative Director. Gray’s unparalleled expertise and vision has been the driving force behind his many works of art and remains the backbone of the brand.  A brand that promises to ensure everyday can be a getaway, an adventure, and a journey with Gray Malin.

Name: Photography Workshop Series
Description:
The Location Lighting Fashion Photography Workshop in Los Angeles will take your photography career to the next level. Taught by Celebrity Fashion Photographer Kevin Michael Schmitz, this revolutionary Workshop Series has had incredible success in this past year. 
The Workshop is based upon the "Portfolio - In - Day" concept where you will not only learn advanced location lighting techniques, but you will have the opportunity to photograph a commercially marketable fashion photography portfolio in a day. Sponsored by ProFoto and Samys Camera, you will have access to over $100,000 worth of high location lighting equipment. We will be working agency represented fashion models, celebrity hair and makeup artists, and top fashion stylists. We have completely over the top wardrobe styling and you will have an incredible indoor and outdoor location to photograph an editorial style fashion story.

This stylishly urbane and innovative modular environment is the proud achievement of Dubai based professional photographer, Maha Nasra Edde. 8th Street Studios fuses industrial-chic style to a fully versatile, comfortable and practical facility. A creative, flexible and inspirational community workspace in which to bring your projects and events to life.

Multi-functional, the studios can serve as a photographic and film production facility with drive in studio; corporate or private exhibition space; boutique event venue; or conducive meeting point for collaborations between industry professionals.

8th Street Studios also offers its clients a wide selection of photographic equipment which includes Profoto Lighting Rental.

Name: Best Photography Awards
Description:
The Best Photography Awards is an international photography competition. 
Our mission
What does it mean to you to be the best? Being open to something new, striving for self-improvement, winning gold medals? Only you know this unusual formula and this is your unique path! This unique path of each of us is real life and creativity!

The mission of the BEST PHOTOGRAPHY AWARDS is to recognize, reward and present talented, BEST photographers from around the world and introduce them to the creative community around the world.

In our competition, we do not limit the number of images submitted by each individual photographer. You can also submit the same photo to any number of categories. Your photos will be rated individually by an esteemed panel of international judges, including: famous photographers, collectors, gallery owners, magazine editors and others.

Description:
EXTRA è la storia di una riconversione industriale degli spazi nel centro storico di Livorno in gravitat di arte e di fotografia. Dismessi i vecchi macchinari per la stampa, i locali, interamente ristrutturati, diventano luogo inclusivo di aggregazione e socializzazione sulla fotografia e sulle arti visive. Galleria espositiva, salotto di conversazione, laboratorio di idee, aula per corsi e workshop, sala posa.

Un open space, in tutti i sensi, dove l’incontro tra artisti e amanti dell’arte, vuol favorire il miglioramento dei rapporti tra esseri umani, arricchendone l’educazione all’immagine con lo scambio di esperienze e di conoscenze. Un punto di riferimento della diffusione e della valorizzazione dei contatti tramite condivisione e sinergie. 

Pensare a cooperazioni tra artisti, per natura prevalentemente individualisti, è di per se’ un fatto fuori dal comune, insolito, non usuale, extra-ordinario appunto.

EXTRA FACTORY promuove le arti visive a 360° affiancando gli artisti per una migliore esposizione in mostra, curando la progettazione dei contenuti, l’idea della comunicazione e la promozione cartacea e digitale. EXTRA collabora, inoltre, a progetti formativi dedicati a temi fondamentali dell’immagine e della fotografia attraverso corsi, workshop e consigli, anche attraverso la pubblicazione di libri, fanzine e cataloghi d’arte.

Name: New York Photo Festival
Description:
Photography, one of the most important visual media of our lives, has been surprisingly uncelebrated, particularly in the United States. New York City, home to the most influential commercial and fine art photography community, has lacked—until now—a large-scale event dedicated to photography. 

The inaugural New York Photo Festival (May 14–May 18, 2008) delivered a dynamic, high-quality event in what is arguably the photographic capital of the world. This event celebrated both contemporary photography and the creative, inspirational talents of the people who produce this work. 

The New York Photo Festival takes place in DUMBO, an off-the-beaten-track, but easily accessible neighborhood on the Brooklyn waterfront between the Brooklyn and Manhattan Bridges.

Instagram : @NewYorkPhotoFestival
Twitter : @NYPHotoFestival
Tumblr : http://newyorkphotofestival.tumblr.com/

Name: CatchLight
Description:
CatchLight is a nonprofit media organization that leverages the power of visual storytelling to inform, connect, and transform communities. 

Our programs:

• The CatchLight Global Fellowship supports industry-leading visual storytellers who want to generate audience engagement and community impact through inventive distribution methods.

• CatchLight Local is a collaborative model for visual journalism that is advancing trust and representation in local media. The program includes the CatchLight Local Fellowship, which establishes full-time visual journalism positions with local news outlets, and the CatchLight Local Visual Desk, which provides local newsrooms with a suite of shared services, training and tools to engage readers with enhanced visual reporting.

• The CatchLight Visual Storytelling Summit is an annual event in San Francisco that gathers leaders in art, media, journalism, technology, and philanthropy for an immersive day of conversation and community. www.catchlight.io/summit

• The Night of Photojournalism is a traveling visual media showcase where participants discover new perspectives on vital issues through photography from across the globe.

• The Focal Point conversation series features a leader in the visual field who has broken barriers, defied norms, blazed trails, and shown the power of photography to inform and connect audiences.

Name: Collectif Fetart
Description:
ENCOURAGER, SOUTENIR, RÉVÉLER.

Fetart est le créateur et directeur artistique de Circulation(s), le festival de la jeune photographie européenne. Il est composé de 6 commissaires indépendantes spécialistes de la photographie émergente. Toutes sont animées par des convictions et une vision communes: un engagement et un soutien en faveur des jeunes photographes, l’intérêt d’explorer la nouvelle scène artistique européenne, et une volonté de renouveler les formes de monstration.

Fetart s’appuie également sur une équipe permanente et rassemble une communauté de bénévoles passionné.e.s aux champs d’expertises étendus.
L'engagement du collectif Fetart reste d’émouvoir mais aussi de révéler et de concerner autour de thématiques fortes et engagées.

Association loi 1901 reconnue d’intérêt général, le collectif Fetart encourage depuis 2005 les photographes émergents et la diversité photographique à travers des expositions et événements singuliers. Tremplin pour les artistes et révélateur de tendances, il a organisé plus de 40 expositions et présenté plus de 500 artistes en France et à l’international reflétant l’ébullition artistique contemporaine européenne. 

Fetart s’affirme aujourd’hui avec son expertise comme une référence incontournable de la scène culturelle française. Il organise entre autres Circulation(s), le festival de la jeune photographie européenne, et Les Rencontres Photographiques du 10e.  

Véritable pôle prospectif et innovant, le collectif accompagne également des organisations et structures partenaires sur leurs projets liés à la création photographique avec LE LAB (comme la co-création du Prix Caritas Photo Sociale et C'EST EXTRA).

●
Régine Hatchondo est la présidente de l’association depuis le 6 février 2020. Elle succède à Jérôme Kholer (2018 – 2019) et à Marion Hislen – fondatrice de l’association (2006 – 2018).

Name: FFPMI
Description:
Depuis 1946, la FFPMI (Fédération Française de la Photographie et des Métiers de l’Image) est l’organisation professionnelle qui assure la défense et la promotion des professions des métiers de l’image, représentative auprès des pouvoirs publics.

Nos 4 missions sont les suivantes :

RASSEMBLER 
Rassembler les professionnels de l’image débutants ou confirmés autour de moments conviviaux dans le but de consolider et de développer les liens entre les acteurs de la profession.

PROMOUVOIR 
Faire connaître et reconnaître le métier de photographe artisan auprès des photographes, du grand public et des médias.

DEFENDRE 
Défendre la profession pour pérenniser et développer les métiers de l’image.

INFORMER
Faire évoluer le métier par la professionnalisation, la formation et l'innovation.

Que vous soyez photographe de portrait, de mariage, culinaire, de mode, reporter ou encore vidéaste, nous sommes à vos cotés pour vous aider à progresser et faire croitre votre activité.

Nos délégations en régions accueillent chacun d'entre vous pour un accompagnement régulier au travers des rencontres, formations concours, diplômes qui vous seront proposés.

Notre fédération nationale travaille grâce à plusieurs commissions pour porter haut les couleurs de notre profession et faire valoir nos droits auprès des hautes instances de l'état.

Name: Piel de Foto
Description:
Revista de Fotografia Documental de distribución gratuita en Barcelona y alrededores. 

Somos un colectivo de imagen documental formado por un polifacético equipo de fotoperiodistas y profesionales de diversos ámbitos con una pasión común. En el 2009 nos unimos para explorar con libertad e independencia un fotoperiodismo que, en los medios convencionales anunciaba su muerte, en pleno boom de la fotografía documental. 

Detectamos un vacío dentro del panorama fotográfico nacional. No había ninguna revista de corte documental o fotoperiodístico, con puro reportaje, para emergentes con talento. Y con el espíritu irreverente que nos caracteriza decidimos crear un periódico que además debía ser gratuito. Un medio independiente centrado en la fotografía documental de gente como nosotros.Nuestra idea es que sirva de escaparate y trampolín, al tiempo que luchamos por recuperar la dignidad de la fotografía en el tradicional formato de un periódico, el tabloide. 

En definitiva, tener una revista decente que degustar con un buen café de pura fotografía... Documental!

Name: Randholm Photography
Description:
Photographing structural spaces requires an approach that is not all that different to portraiture. You need to establish rapport with the space. Look at it. Take it in. And light it to make it look its best.

I am very meticulous about composition, perspective and lighting. A careful and thoughtful approach to photography is a prerequisite for premium results, as is slow food to culinary expression. When creating an image, I employ light painting techniques and advanced post-processing work flows to introduce light in key areas with the objective to render both indoor and outdoor spaces in the very best way. The result is an effective balance of natural and artistically crafted light that will draw in the eye and hence the viewer.

All my gear consists of professional grade equipment, including high resolution, full frame camera sensors, an assortment of flashes and powerful portable strobes and a complete range of high-end lenses, including tilt-shift lenses. These are indispensable specialist tools for architectural and interior design photography, as they offer unparalleled compositional possibilities and maximum perspective control.

I am also a licensed drone pilot and registered operator with full liability insurance. For aerial images and video, I use a 4k DJI drone with a 1” Hasselblad sensor. 

Prior to my career in photography, I have had a long and solid background with leading roles in manufacturing and international education and management consulting for blue-chip companies. I have lived in southern Spain since 1994, and I speak fluent Spanish, English and Swedish.

Name: LifePics Inc
Description:
Simply the Best Online Imaging Solution! 

Life is a series of moments, and each moment is as unique as the people in our lives. Pictures allow us to capture any moment from a specific perspective, freezing time and immortalizing our fondest memories in a photograph. Through our pictures, we can travel back into our lives, reliving moments and sharing memories with those we love. Life is a journey, and pictures make it eternal. 

Founded in the fall of 2000, LifePics is a white label online imaging solutions provider headquartered at the base of the Rocky Mountain foothills in Boulder, Colorado. LifePics merges the retail photo and technology industries, combining the convenience of the Internet and mobile applications with the trusted relationship between local photofinishers and their customers.
To put it simply, we bridge the gap between digital image files and tangible, personalized printed products.
LifePics partners with independent camera stores, large retail chains, and photofinishers of all sizes, and provides the technology and marketing expertise to offer their customers a superior online digital photofinishing service, driving orders to retailers around the world.
LifePics was acquired by Taylor Corporation in August of 2012, making it part of one the most successful privately held commercial printing companies in the United States. As the photo industry and the commercial printing worlds collide to create a dynamic $50B personalization industry, LifePics continues to leverage technology platforms and hone in on our commitment to provide advanced technologies and user-friendly solutions, as well as share our deep understanding of photo, stationery, commercial printing, personalization, manufacturing, order routing, archiving, and sophisticated marketing capabilities with our partners. During this time of great change and opportunity, LifePics is the industry leader in creative growth strategies.

Name: School voor Fotografie
Description:
Fotograferen is kijken, vormgeven en accenten leggen met licht en schaduw. Dat kan pas als je weet wat je doet. Het is ook het verschil tussen kiekjes maken en fotograferen. Want fotografie is een vak.

Daarom is er de School voor Fotografie in Breda en Utrecht. Voor de beginner, om de eerste stap te zetten in de basisopleiding en voor de toekomstige professional in de 1-jarige fotografieopleiding.

Vanuit een beroepsmatige visie leidt de School voor Fotografie je op tot professioneel fotograaf. Theorie en praktijk gaan hand in hand tijdens onze lessen, waarbij persoonlijke begeleiding hoog in het vaandel staat.

Je gaat aan de slag in de studio en op locatie, maakt portretten, reportages en reclamefoto’s. Technische vakken worden afgewisseld met kunstgeschiedenis, beeldcommunicatie en creatief denken. Professionele docenten, met jarenlange praktijkervaring, brengen je de kneepjes van de fotografie bij. Je wordt opgeleid tot een compleet fotograaf.

Name: Hotel Essence Photography
Description:
Hotel Essence Photography – capturing the essence of luxury and historic hotels worldwide.

At Hotel Essence Photography, we specialise in creating superb, enticing images that communicate the authentic essence of a hotel. We believe every hotel has a unique story to be told.

Hoteliers put their heart and soul into their properties and they strive for  their hotels to be portrayed in the very best light, so that potential guests can fully appreciate each property’s unique values and personality.
 
WHAT DO WE DO?

Founded by award-winning hotel photographer Michelle Chaplow, our company was built around the concept of “essence”. It’s the essence that forms a hotel’s unique identity—the heart of its narrative.

The mission of Hotel Essence Photography is to capture the essence of luxury and historic hotels: shooting luxury hotels, historic hotels and resorts worldwide: creating inspiring, revenue-generating images. 

WHY SHOUD YOU WORK WITH US?

In order to convey the story of a hotel in images, you need to show visual details that capture this very essence of the property.

With years of expertise in architectural photography, exteriors, interiors, environmental portraits of hotel staff, local experiences and excursions, and geo-identifiers (the small things that remind guests exactly where in the world the hotel is located), our breadth of experience is second to none.

Our team brings together lighting specialists, art directors and stylists, digital editors and journalists, to achieve exactly the right look, feel and message about a property. The Essence team offers a unique service carrying out luxury hotel photography commissions around the globe. 

As seasoned professionals, your hotel photography assignments are safe in our hands, from the initial concept to the final high-quality images.

Name: ADRIEN GUITARD STUDIO
Description:
Diplômé de l’École Nationale Supérieure d’Architecture de Marseille, je suis architecte et photographe d’architecture.

J'ai commencé la photographie au début de mes 16 ans et je me suis tourné tout naturellement vers la photographie d'architecture durant mon cursus universitaire. 

Je me suis vite rendu compte que ma formation d'architecte était un atout majeur dans la maîtrise de la composition, de la lumière, des lignes et des formes afin de réaliser une photo d'architecture de qualité. Depuis, j'ai décidé de devenir photographe professionnel et j’applique les compétences acquises lors de ce cursus à la photographie d’architecture

Aujourd'hui je suis photographe indépendant, travaillant principalement dans le sud de la France mais également Europe.

J'interviens auprès d'architectes, d'architectes d'intérieur, dans l'hôtellerie, pour le compte de maîtres d'ouvrage, agents immobiliers, centres commerciaux, magasins, restaurants, lieux de réception ou encore dans le cadre de suivi de chantier.

MA VISION

Ma démarche photographique consiste avant tout à respecter l'œuvre et la vision de l'architecte, tout en y apportant un regard nouveau. L'objectif étant de mettre en valeur chaque projet à travers des clichés soigneusement composés et retouchés. J'essaie de créer des images qui attirent le regard, qui utilisent un langage graphique simple et qui décrivent au mieux les espaces créés et ma formation d'architecte apporte une réelle valeur ajoutée sur cet aspect.

La gestion de l'image que je propose met l'accent sur une esthétique graphique, des couleurs douces mais contrstée, en prenant soin de toujours veiller à une composition équilibrée, en travaillant les images sur plusieurs plans, en jouant avec les lignes de force, les matières, la lumière...

La lumière par ailleurs joue un rôle particulièrement important dans mes photographies et je travaille principalement avec la lumière naturelle pour retranscrire la plus belle ambiance du bâtiment.
