Name: Dupli
Description:
Dupli Ltd. is the leading provider of fine art and photographic print equipment, consumables, and media in the UK. With a rich history dating back to 1847 through its origins with Tetenal, Dupli has been a cornerstone of the UK’s creative community for over thirty years. The company's unwavering commitment to excellence is a hallmark of our brand, reflected not only in our high-quality products but also in the tailored support services we offer.
Dupli began as Tetenal UK in 1989, specialising in bespoke printing solutions. Following a management buy-out in 2019, the company became Dupli in 2023, embracing a new identity while maintaining its legacy of innovation and customer service. Today, Dupli continues to support both seasoned professionals and passionate enthusiasts, providing them with the tools, knowledge, and support needed to achieve their creative goals.
Official suppliers of industry-leading brands, including Kodak, Epson, DNP, Noritsu, Fujifilm, Jobo, Harman, Kenro, Ilford, Savage, Hahnemühle, Spectrajet, Pinnacle, Foma, Instax, Lion and the new Dupli Essentials range.

Name: PhMuseum
Description:
PhMuseum is a curated platform dedicated to contemporary photography. Since 2012 we have been focused to find innovative ways to display photography, engage, educate, and connect. Thanks to this approach we have been pioneering online exhibition, with the first one launched in 2013, and online education, launched in 2017.

PhMuseum is well known for its program of grants, which offers €30,000 in cash prizes every year, the opportunity to exhibit at international photography festivals, be featured in publications and on recognised magazines such as Vogue Italia. Max Pinckers, Diana Markosian, Tomas Van Houtryve, and Laura El-Tantawy are among the winners of the past editions, while Martin Parr (Magnum Photos), Kathy Ryan (New York Times), Roger Ballen (Photographer), and Sarah Leen (National Geographic) among the former jurors.

Today we are a community of 51,000 photographers reached by more than 600,000 visitors per year. Our mission is to discover, support and promote photographers, working as an innovative talent incubator. Every year we present the work of around 120 photographers in our News section - and invite more than 60 to exhibit in our online exhibitions. We also feature 400 photographers on our Instagram and Facebook accounts while many photo editors, curators, and gallerists browse our Stories section every week to discover new projects or get in touch with us for recommendation at the moment of searching for works and photographers.

In 2020, while everybody was eventually moving online, we approached the off-line opening the PhMuseum Lab in Bologna. Our online experience has thought us that there cannot be one without the other and the Lab will become our hub for many new initiatives. In 2021, we launched the PhMuseum Days, an international photography festival whose first edition gathered 4,000 people in Bologna over a weekend of exhibitions, round tables, workshops, portfolio reviews, book fair and more.

Name: RJ Wedding Films
Description:
The Beauty of Rj Wedding Films approach is that you don’t just look at the images – you feel them.Our aim isn’t to merely create an enduring record of your wedding, it’s  to capture those exquisite and memorable ‘blink-and-you’ll-miss-them’ moments.

The subtle intake of breath when you see each other for the first time, the touched glances between your dearest friends, swept away by emotion as you say your vows, the post-ceremony bear hugs that say ‘You did it!’. These are the moments that will stick with you forever, that you will be able to relive again, each time you excitedly leaf through your wedding album.

Weddings get us far too excited and the best part is when people ask us if we’re guests at the party.

We promise to make you feel super relaxed, laugh your heart out and have the most beautiful wedding photos to keep for generations.

Name: PhotoVoice
Description:
PhotoVoice’s vision is for a world in which no one is denied the opportunity to speak out and be heard.

PhotoVoice’s mission is to build skills within underrepresented communities using innovative participatory photography and digital storytelling methods so that they have the opportunity to represent themselves and create tools for advocacy and communications to achieve positive social change.

Working in partnerships with other charities, NGOs and community organisations PhotoVoice designs and delivers tailor-made participatory photography, digital storytelling and self-advocacy projects for socially excluded groups. Our pioneering approach brings together the arts, media, development and social change agendas to work with hard-to-reach groups on projects that give voice, build skills, provide platforms for advocacy and work towards sustainable change.

Photography is a highly flexible tool that crosses cultural and linguistic barriers and can be adapted to all abilities. Its power lies in its dual role as an art form and a means to record facts. It provides an accessible way to define realities, communicate perspectives and raise awareness of important social and global issues. Its low cost and ease of dissemination encourage sharing and increase the potential to generate dialogue and discussion.

So let AJ, Belinda & our amazing team of professionals be your trusted partners to capture you in the best light so you look & feel fabulous! Let's ensure you're photography and films are telling the right story about you

Sincerely

AJ & Belinda

Name: Citrique Fotografía Publicitaria
Description:
Historia de Citrique
La idea de Citrique Fotografía surge alrededor de 1997 enmedio de un viaje a Francia. Es ahí donde nace la visión de crear un estudio enfocado a la creación de fotografía profesional para fines comerciales.
La manifestación de las diferentes expresiones artísticas emergen primero en forma de admiración, y luego se convirtieron en fuente de inspiración de lo que años mas tarde diera pie al surgimiento de Citrique Fotografía como una alternativa de excelencia para la producción de imágenes fijas y de vídeo.

Bases académicas.
Egresado de la facultad de arquitectura, nuestro fundador Mauricio Alanis incursionó en artes plásticas y visuales que conformaron las bases académicas de los primeros proyectos de Citrique.
Profundizando en el terreno de la fotografía, Alanis se enrola en diferentes programas de especialización, hasta culminar en su aplicación para Certified Master Photographer por la academia de Professional Photographers of America.
Para 2007, PPA le otorga el grado máximo de certificación, siendo hasta el término de 2019 el único estudio fotográfico en México en ostentar este grado.

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 

Citrique is a professional photography studio, specialized in
- Executive and Business Portrait Photography
- Architectural
- Aerial 
- Food and still photography
- Commercial and industrial Photography
Among many other specialized fields, Citrique is headed by Master Photographer, PPA Certified, Liaison Grade artist Mauricio Alanis, who has been featured in many art books and publications. Proud holder of over 50 industry awards, and co-founder at @cincodemayo design and branding studio.
Alanis work as a photographer goes back to the film photography era, circa 1982 when his photography career began to take shape, as a result of co-working with lead photographers of that time.

Name: HEMERIA
Description:
Hemeria est une alternative à l'édition traditionnelle de livres photo qui permet aux photographes d'accéder à une qualité exceptionnelle dans la production de leurs livres ainsi qu'à une meilleure rémunération de leur travail. 

Pour se faire, nous avons imaginé et construit un écosystème vertueux afin d'assurer la réussite des projets artistiques que nous défendons. Il s'articule autour du financement des projets, de leur conception (éditoriale, graphique), de leur production et de leur diffusion en France et à l'étranger (librairie et galerie d'art en ligne).

Hemeria s’appuie sur les outils du web et du e-commerce pour continuer à mettre à disposition du marché des livres produits pour la plupart en France et dont la qualité d’impression est unanimement saluée par tous ses clients.  

Notre expertise dans le domaine du traitement des images et des process d'impression et notre diffusion en ligne et en librairies à l'international offrent deux atouts majeurs pour sublimer le travail artistique qui nous est confié et le faire partager auprès du plus grand nombre.

Nous avons la conviction que le livre reste un objet sacré, durable, qu'il est une trace vivante de la mémoire et de la connaissance, universelle. Et que l'image photographique a le pouvoir de révéler le monde.

Hemeria accompagne également les institutions publiques ou privées et les entreprises dans la réalisation de leurs projets éditoriaux quand ceux-ci sont conçus autour de la photographie. Elle est alors force de proposition pour les mettre en lien avec le travail le plus adapté aux messages qu'ils souhaitent véhiculer.

Imprimeur, éditeur, libraire, galerie d'art… un esprit particulier de la création.

Description:
UK Models have been helping thousands of aspiring models since 2003. Thousands of models have found their personal identity, paths to success, and skills in adaptability through UK Models. Devoted to the wellbeing of the aspiring model, the company offers personalized mentoring and career building services. Saturated with outstanding reviews, UK Models has a reputation of creating a comfortable environment for clients to explore their own intentions, drive, and worries with the help of an experienced professional.

First and foremost, UK Models believes in honesty, myth-busting, and preparation. If an aspiring model arrives without experience or knowledge of the field, the company is sure to explain the most taxing elements of modelling so that the client may enter the industry with wisdom. 

UK Models serves as the vital connection in the industry that most aspiring models do not start with. Upon entry, a client has an in-depth discussion with a mentor about their aspirations and inspiration for starting such a career. Together, they construct the client’s brand and map out optimal areas of modeling. The client also has the opportunity to have their hair and makeup done for a professional photoshoot. They leave the very first session with UK Models with the beginnings of a strong modeling portfolio and new insight.

UK Models emphasize confidence in place of perfection. Looking to mentor clients of any age, the company’s first goal is to instill self-assurance that can withstand a challenging profession. With a website full of resources for parents of young aspiring models, blogs on industry experiences and advice for open calls, and plenty of statistics and reality reminders, all clients with UK Models are ensured a successful career. With fourteen years of mentoring and branding experience, UK Models is an unparalleled leader in the modeling world.

Name: CALAMITA/À project
Description:
CALAMITA/À is a tool for investigating the contemporary Vajont and the topic of catastrophes in general. The project is edited by Gianpaolo Arena (architect, photographer and editor of Landscape Stories magazine) and Marina Caneve (architect, photographer and specialiazing at ECAL/KABK).
Camilla Boemio (contemporary art critic and curator), Niccolò Fano (director of Materia and curator Gallery) and Roberta Agnese (architect, PhD candidate and teaching assistant ) are collaborating with us editing exclusive interviews.
CALAMITA/À platform is a big team of photographers, artists, urbanists, geologists, musicians and writers. 
CALAMITA/À is a no-profit project and, with a lot of efforts, we have been working for more than 2 years. We started this adventure without funds and without supports in 2013 and we are planning to continue to work in the future. 

What interested us considerably was how the perception of the tragedy and the mutation of the territory has changed. Now, after two years from the launch of CALAMITA/À, the contents on our online platform are multiple. From the beginning, we have chosen to show on-going Vajont site specific projects on our website, asking the authors to work in relatively long periods of time.  The main interest is in fact to build an evolving project and to create a collective and shared vision. 
For the same reason in 2014 we created the Collateral section and the one dedicated to thematic Interviews strongly declined towards current geopolitics, with some insights on topics such as disasters and calamities, transformations both territorial and urban, dynamic identities, climatic changes, the global market, architecture, the tourism industry, ecologic issues, migration and social marginality and minorities. All these topics are related to Vajont tragedy and for us they are important matherial to share with the authors.

Name: Karsten Socher Fotografie
Description:
Karsten Socher Fotografie – authentische Bilder, klare Haltung, fotografisches Handwerk

Ich bin Fotografenmeister und Bildjournalist mit über 30 Jahren Berufserfahrung – zuhause in Kassel, im Einsatz in ganz Deutschland. Als Fotograf arbeite ich an der Schnittstelle zwischen Reportage und Inszenierung: Ich beobachte, begleite, dokumentiere – mit dem Blick fürs Wesentliche und dem Gespür für Menschen, Situationen und Atmosphäre.

Mein Schwerpunkt liegt auf der authentischen Fotografie für Unternehmen, Redaktionen und private Auftraggeber. Ob Pressekonferenz oder Hochzeit, Theaterbühne oder Tagung: Ich arbeite konzentriert, unauffällig, strukturiert – und finde Motive, die andere übersehen.

 Mein Leistungsspektrum im Überblick:

 Reportagen von Veranstaltungen, Messen & Tagungen
 Presse- & Theaterfotografie für Redaktionen & Kulturbetriebe
 Businessporträts & Imagefotografie für Unternehmen
 Hochzeitsreportagen & private Feiern
 Architekturfotografie, Drohnenaufnahmen & 360°-Panoramen

Mein Stil ist dokumentarisch, klar und schnörkellos – mit Liebe zum Detail, aber ohne inszenierte Effekthascherei. Ich arbeite mit professionellem Equipment (digital & analog, Drohne, Studio-Setup, mobiler Bildbearbeitung), bin schnell einsatzbereit, zuverlässig im Ablauf und transparent in der Kommunikation.

Was meine Auftraggeber schätzen, ist die Kombination aus Erfahrung, Haltung und technischem Know-how. Ich verstehe mich als visueller Chronist, als Handwerker mit Kamera – nicht als Künstler im Elfenbeinturm.

 Für Redaktionen: Mobile Bildübertragung, Auswahl vor Ort, FTP-Upload.
 Für Unternehmen: Bildkonzepte, einheitlicher Auftritt, Porträts mit Persönlichkeit.
 Für Privatkunden: Reportagen mit Feingefühl – stilvoll, unaufdringlich, zeitlos.

 Portfolio & mehr: https://www.ks-fotografie.net, https://pressefotograf-kassel.de
 Aktuelle Arbeiten: instagram.com/karstensocher
 Direktkontakt: 0171 / 28 75 775

Name: The Culinary Camera
Description:
Hi, I’m Denise Brady, I've had an interest in, and a knack for photography since a young age.

Food has always been a passion of mine. I love cooking it, eating it, and photographing it! To me, food means family. It represents togetherness, fun and laughter, happiness, and joy. It’s a recollection of being a young child in the kitchen with my great-grandmother, eating raw pastry as we baked the most delicious cakes together. These strong formative memories have gone a long way in shaping the person I am today. 

These days it’s me in the kitchen with my own grandchildren, sharing my love and passion for food, and introducing them to the joys of the family kitchen - and of eating fantastic food with the ones you love the most. 

My other passion is photography, and I’m very fortunate that some years ago I was able to turn my hobby into a business. I love what I do, and it shows both in my enthusiasm for my work, and the results I achieve.

You first eat with your eyes (Apicius) said this more than 2000 years ago and human nature hasn't changed much since. We know you've seen images of food that looks so appetizing and enticing you could virtually taste it. It made your stomach rumble, and you wanted to eat it. And your clientele is no different.

Eye-catching professional images will show them your food in magnificent detail. That, in turn, encourages then to book a visit to your establishment so they can sample it.

They'll show their friends and family. Everyone checks a restaurant's social media pages before they book these days - and nothing gets social media likes and shares like great food images! We'll show your food at its best and you'll get to use the images on your website, menus, your paid advertising and all your social media pages.

If you're feeling tempted, you'll be even more tempted when you see what we can do and so will your customers. Give me a call or send me an email and let's chat about how we can work together.

Name: Martin Schoeller, LLC
Description:
Martin Schoeller (German, b. 1968) is an award-winning portrait photographer and director renowned for extreme-close up portraits. Familiar faces are treated with the same levels of scrutiny as the un-famous. The unknown and the too-well-known meet on a level platform that enables comparison, where a viewer’s existing notions of celebrity, value, and honesty are challenged. Growing up in Germany, he was deeply influenced by August Sander’s countless portraits of the poor, the working class, and the bourgeoisie, as well as by Bernd and Hilla Becher, who spawned a school known as the Becher-Schüler. Schoeller’s close-up portraits emphasize, in equal measure, the facial features, both studied and unstudied, of his subjects— world leaders and indigenous groups, movie stars and the homeless, athletes and artists—leveling them in an inherently democratic fashion.

Schoeller worked as an assistant to Annie Leibovitz from 1993 to 1996. He advanced as a freelance photographer, producing portraits of people he met on the street. The work gained recognition for its strong visual impact and since 1998, his work has appeared in Rolling Stone, National Geographic, TIME, GQ, Esquire, Entertainment Weekly, and The New York Times Magazine, among other publications. Schoeller joined Richard Avedon as a contributing portrait photographer at The New Yorker in 1999, where he continues to produce award-winning images. His portraits are exhibited and collected internationally, including in several solo exhibitions in Europe and the United States and are included in the permanent collection of the National Portrait Gallery, Smithsonian Institution, Washington, D.C. He studied at Lette Verein in Berlin and lives in works in New York City.

Name: Anne Thomas - Storytelling Photographer & Trainer
Description:
You’d expect a personal branding photographer to tell you that the key to connection is through imagery. 

THAT’S TRUE. 
TO A POINT.

The problem is, we are inundated with stunning imagery. 
It’s all around us. 
We’ve almost become numbed to it. 

So if it’s not imagery alone - what is it?

IT’S THE STORY THAT YOU CHOOSE TO SHARE WITH THAT IMAGE.

 It’s what I call YOUR CONVERSION STORY. 

I’m Anne, a personal branding photographer AND storytelling traine to fellow photographers and small business owners - and my role in YOUR business journey is to help you connect with your next client on a REAL human level. 


AND I DO THAT THROUGH STORIES.


And for some - that’s through imagery - and for others, it’s through unpacking your own story to see where it fits into your client’s story.



WHY IS CONNECTION SO IMPORTANT TO A SMALL BUSINESS OWNER?



To work with you is an investment - and nobody’s ready to invest UNLESS they are  sure that you’re worth investing in. 

And that only happens when that complex muscle, called the brain, tells them it’s safe to do so.
That you’re not a risk. 

And this is where your conversion story comes in.



WHAT IS A CONVERSION STORY?



It’s a story or stories that, when you share them, your next client has that moment of ‘Wow! It’s like she’s talking to me!’

AND THAT DOESN’T HAPPEN BY ACCIDENT.

It happens because we’ve worked on YOUR story, your client’s story and then together, we’ve joined the dots to find where YOU fit into your client’s story. 

Until that happens - you’re sharing THE WRONG STORIES.

And whilst you’re sharing the wrong stories - you’re a risk. 



BUT I'VE PUT IT ALL IN FINDING THE STORIES

My online course that does just that - helps you find the stories and emotions sitting behind them - and then I give you a story template that you can use over and over again for your marketing.

COPY & PASTE THIS LINK FOR MORE INFO 
https://anne-thomas.mykajabi.com/pl/2148256481

Description:
VII Academy is a program of The VII Foundation. The VII Foundation is made up of its educational programs (VII Academy, VII Community, and VII Insider), as well as the foundation's long-form, visual journalism projects, and the recently acquired VII Photo.  

The academy provides tuition-free courses in visual journalism to practitioners in the Majority World and underrepresented communities in G20 countries. VII Academy is democratizing the information narrative and giving communities the tools to narrate their own stories in regions where media education is poorly resourced.
 
In the last four years, VII Academy has trained over 1,000 people from 100 countries in nine languages. To date, approximately 51% are women, and 43% are men (the remainder identify as genderqueer/nonbinary or prefer not to say). This training is done either online or in person on our own campuses or at partners' venues based on geographical needs.

Name: Henri Boer Fotografie
Description:
Uw bouwproject in beeld:
Afhankelijk van het doel van de afbeelding maak ik voor u die unieke foto waar u naar op zoek bent. Hierbij houd ik rekening met de wensen van u als klant maar daarnaast laat ik me graag verrassen door de mogelijkheden van het moment.  
Bouwwerkzaamheden vastleggen in diverse stadia van de bouw, of het nu gaat om een afgerond project, het gehele verhaal of het feestelijke moment tijdens de opening van een project. Het spel van licht, schaduw en lijnen blijft mij altijd fascineren. Continue kijken met een open blik en me laten verrassen door het moment of de situatie om voor u die speciale afbeelding te kunnen vastleggen.  
Voor mij is fotografie een natuurlijk proces waardoor ik ongedwongen, unieke beelden maak. Door het moment te benutten en gedwongen situaties waar mogelijk te vermijden verras ik mijn klanten met hoogwaardige afbeeldingen die minimaal aan hun verwachtingen voldoen of vaak zelfs overtreffen.

Hoogtefotografie:
Als fotograaf maak ik graag gebruik van hoogtefotografie. Bent u op zoek naar verrassend perspectief van uw object? Dan zijn de mogelijkheden met hoogtefotografie oneindig. Stelt u zich maar eens voor wat er gebeurt als een gebouw, een brug of welk object dan ook kan worden gefotografeerd op een hoogte van twee of bijvoorbeeld acht meter. U begrijpt het al, het perspectief verandert volledig en mijn klanten zijn dan ook bijzonder verrast door deze nieuwe blik op hun projecten.   

Communicatie - uw beeld bepaald: 
Uw communicatie-uitingen stijgen in waarde als u ze voorziet van professionele beelden van uw objecten. U kunt de afbeeldingen gebruiken op uw website, uw brochure, uw bouwdoeken of welke toepassing dan ook. Ik zorg ervoor dat u de juiste unieke beelden voorhanden hebt. 

Wilt u meer weten over het vastleggen van uw project? 
Neem dan contact op met Henri Boer Fotografie, dé fotograaf voor bouwend Nederland.

Name: Visionary Photography Workshops
Description:
Experience My Instruction Method: Hands-On Learning for Personalized Growth. My approach prioritizes your personal goals and the direction you want to take with your craft. I believe that hands-on learning is more effective than traditional lecture-based teaching, which is why I employ this approach in both my onsite workshops and classroom offerings.
In my classroom, I offer a “learn by doing” experience using Lightroom, Photoshop, Topaz Studio, TK Luminosity Masking, and other software programs. I provide sample files and images for you to work with, and guide you through the software process step by step. This allows you to gain practical skills and knowledge that you can apply in real-life situations. You will also receive take-home workbooks to continue practicing at your leisure, and you can always reach out to me for further clarification.
My onsite photography workshops are designed to help you improve your craft and achieve your personal goals. Whether you choose a single or multiple-day class, you will have my undivided attention. I won’t be shooting alongside you, but instead will focus on providing personalized guidance and feedback to help you grow as a photographer. Prior to every workshop, I will interview you to assess your needs and skills, ensuring a successful experience.
My Instruction Method is ideal for photographers of all levels, whether you are a beginner or an experienced professional. By prioritizing your personal goals and providing hands-on learning opportunities, I can help you take your photography to the next level. Whether you are interested in landscape photography, portrait photography, wildlife photography, or any other type of photography, my workshops can provide you with the tools and knowledge you need to achieve your creative vision.
In conclusion, if you’re looking for a personalized, hands-on approach to learning photography, look no further than My Instruction Method.

History

Established in 2009. Invision Studio (formerly 360 Virtual Visions) was founded in 2009 with a vision of providing a revolutionary solution for visually marketing properties and businesses. 

When CEO Jason Sievert first created Invision Studio, he went on a mission with one goal, to find a way to deliver a more immersive experience to the online viewing process for real estate properties and listings, venues, restaurants, hotels, clubs, lounges, and more. 

360 Degree Tours we're nearly unknown and extremely primitive at the time, but they were able to grab a hold of that small market and set off to create some of the most breathtaking high-definition walkthrough-style 360 virtual tours on the planet today. They then introduced architectural Photography and 3D Matterport Tours to the mix and aerial drone photography. 

Invision Studio continues to innovate by creating stunning 3D tours, great interior photography and exterior photographs, and amazing drone aerial photography and drone aerial video. They’ve recently moved into the VR field and continue to search out new way to create innovation within the market.

Name: Gazmurifoto | Architektur-Fotografie, Freiburg
Description:
Ich erstelle professionelle fotografische Reportagen für Architekturstudios und -büros, Organisationen, Unternehmen, Bauherren, Immobilien und Makler.

Als Architekt weiß ich, dass ein Architekturprojekt hunderte von Entscheidungen erfordert, von der ersten Idee im Entwurf bis zu den letzten Details am Ende der Ausführung.

Wenn Sie einen Architekturfotografen suchen, der in der Lage ist, auf eine dieser Entscheidungen zu reagieren und den Wert Ihres architektonischen Werkes mit hochwertigen Fotografien auszudrücken, lade ich Sie ein, meine Seite zu besuchen, uns kennenzulernen und zusammenzuarbeiten.

Wie nähern Sie sich der fotografischen Reportage über Architektur?


Ich nähere mich der fotografischen Reportage der Architektur unter Berücksichtigung des vollständigen Verständnisses der vom Architekten konzipierten Arbeit und sammle in einem analytischen Blick die 5 wesentlichen Maßstäbe eines Projekts:

1. Der Kontext, in dem die räumlichen und geometrischen Beziehungen der natürlichen Umgebung und des städtischen Gefüges hergestellt werden.

2. Die Hülle des Projekts, die durch ihre Fassaden und Außenelemente materialisiert wird.

3. Die physische und tragende Struktur, die dem Gebäude Stabilität verleiht.

4. Die Verteilung der Räumlichkeit und der inneren Artikulationen, die seine Nutzungen und Bestimmungsorte definieren.

5. Die konstruktiven und ästhetischen Details, die das Gebäude schließlich bewohnbar und als einzigartiges Werk erkennbar machen.

Indem ich diese 5 narrativen Skalen durchgehe, erzähle ich die Geschichte des Projekts und beantworte so die wesentlichen Fragen, um eine gute architektonische Fotoreportage zu erstellen: Was, Wer, Wo, Wann, Warum und Wie.

Name: FotoFestival Naarden
Description:
FotoFestival Naarden

A biannual photo-festival organized in springtime within the walls of the medieval fortified town of Naarden. 
Beautiful historic locations provide room to the multiple expositions and workshops.
The next edition of this unique photographic experience is in 2021
At this moment the board and the curators are working full force on the new edition of this unique festival.

Since the discovery of photography, sometime in the first half of the 19th century into the present day some 175 years later, photography has changed in many ways. In the way we we capture the light, on glas with collodion and film developed in a dark room, to images caught on a light sensitive sensor developed by a computer. Also our way of thinking about photography from documentary to journalism and conceptual art. Fotofestival Naarden likes to share photography with a wide range of collectors and image lovers in all it's aspects.
This year the head curators of the festival examine the fascination of professional photographers, its broad spectrum and its impact on today's society, both local and global. The photography is like no other, imagining the stories that keep us busy , make us happy or distress us and can make us realize how important photography is to our daily lives.

Name: Michael Thorn Photography | Multi Award Winning | Brand | Events | Headshots

Business owners, I understand. I'm here to help.

You provide amazing products and services, your customers love what you do. You're busy spinning all the plates to get things done and you're even keeping up with posting brilliant content, sharing your news with the world. But something's not working.

There is a fantastic story to be told about your business, your brand, your journey. Your real story goes beyond 'what' you do. It begins with you, your team, why you do your amazing thing and how you make a difference. Your real story differentiates you from others and speaks the language your ideal customer understands. 

Now we're thinking about our story. We're excited to share why we do what we do and how we do it. But we still need to grab our audience's attention, stop them scrolling by and show them our what, how, and why. And we'd love to be able to do this in a consistent manner across all our communication formats and platforms. 

# How would it feel to have a bank of bespoke, on-brand images that show your story, your values and how you make a difference?

# How much easier would it be to post content knowing that you have a bank of 'ready to go' professional images created for your brand and with your ideal customer in mind.

# What would your ideal customers think and feel when they see your content, your story aligned with quality images that elevate your brand, setting you apart.

 Hi! My name's Michael. I'm a Specialist Brand Photographer. 

I've worked across a wide range of sectors in different roles. It's always been about the people, the story, the 'why'.

Alongside my career, photography has been a lifelong creative passion. It's now my business. And my business is about you. 

Collaborating, bringing clarity and creativity, I plan your photoshoot around your story, brand and ideal customer persona. Your portfolio of images is designed to free up your time, elevate your brand and boost business.

Get in touch. Let's talk. Let's do this!

Our self-use photo booths revolutionize the process of portrait photography, simplifying what was once tedious and time-consuming. By doing so, we’re improving professional representation, social mobility, opportunity, and security across industries.

What sets Iris apart is our singular focus on headshot photography, powered by robust software and advanced administrative controls. Our solutions support a wide range of needs, from standard headshots to badging, security, and government-issued identification.

With Iris, organizations can reduce administrative overhead, enhance professional representation, and elevate their brand reputation—all while providing a seamless and simple photo experience for everyone.

Name: L'EUROPE VUE DU CIEL Sàrl.
Description:
Créée en 1999, l’Europe Vue du Ciel réalise toute l’année des photo aériennes obliques, des orthophotos, de la télédétection, des surveillances aériennes et de l’aéro magnétisme. 
Basés sur l’aérodrome de Chambley (Grand Est), nous intervenons couramment sur toute la France, en Europe, Dom-Tom et en Amérique du Nord. En 25 ans nos équipes ont réalisé plus de 2 millions de photos sur 24.000 communes dans 15 pays en effectuant plus de 9.200 heures de vol : 35 fois le tour de la terre en équivalent de kilomètres parcourus.
Nos clients sont implantés dans de multiples secteurs : industries de l’énergie, BTP, presse, communication, collectivités de toutes tailles de la commune de 500 habitants à l’Etat Français. 
Nous intervenons tant pour des photos de communication (ex : l’illustration d’une collection de 200 timbres pour La Poste) que pour des vues techniques impliquant une très grande précision comme la réalisation d’une orthophoto sur 1000 KM2 avec une définition d’un pixel pour 5cm aux normes P.C.R.S., ou encore des orthophotos avec une définition d’un pixel pour 1cm sur 3.300 sites industriels répartis sur toute la France.
Notre organisation est entièrement orientée vers la souplesse, la réactivité, l’innovation et des prestations au plus proche des attentes de nos clients. Nous utilisons tous types de vecteurs (avion, ULM, hélicoptère, drone), En 2016 nous avons développé Green Observer : un avion léger de nouvelle génération spécialement adapté à la photographie aérienne. Rapide (200 Km/H) il intègre un capteur photogrammétrique Phase One 100 Millions de pixels, une plateforme de stabilisation et un système FMS dédié aux acquisitions aériennes. Véritable rupture technologique, il travaille jusqu’à 15 fois plus vite qu’un drone, divise le plus souvent les coûts d’acquisition par deux pour nos clients, et génère de 3 à 10 fois moins de rejets carbone qu’un avion traditionnel : www.green-observer.com .

Name: Now I Lay Me Down to Sleep
Description:
NILMDTS offers the gift of healing, hope and honor to parents experiencing the death of a baby through the overwhelming power of remembrance portraits. Professional-level photographers volunteer their time to conduct an intimate portrait session, capturing the only moments parents spend with their babies. Parents are gifted with delicately retouched heirloom black and white portraits free of charge.

These priceless images serve as an important step in the healing recovery for bereaved families. NILMDTS remembrance photography validates the existence and presence of these precious babies by honoring their legacy.

NILMDTS recruits, trains, and mobilizes professional quality photographers around the world.  Through NILMDTS, medical personnel are given a meaningful option to offer bereaved parents by creating remembrance portraiture for their babies.

Through further engagement in the organization, such as the NILMDTS Remembrance Walk and online support, families become a part of a compassionate and supportive community.  Parents gain a sense of inclusiveness, alleviating the alienation and perception of being alone in their pregnancy or infant loss journey.

Name: PhotoIreland
Description:
PhotoIreland is an organisation dedicated to stimulating a critical dialogue around Photography and Visual Culture in Ireland, promoting internationally the work of artists in and from Ireland. In 2010, we launched Ireland’s first international Photography festival: PhotoIreland Festival. We programmed Ireland’s first Book & Magazine Fair in 2011, dedicated to Photography. It was the germ of the PhotoIreland Foundation Collection, which now includes over 2500 photobooks and artworks from around the world. In 2013, we opened The Library Project: an eclectic Art bookshop with a productive gallery programme, hosting our collection of specialised photobooks as a resource library for all its members.

Our portfolio of activities includes educational elements like the Critical Academy, with seminars and research projects; publishing projects like the TLP Editions and the triennial project promoting Irish talent – New Irish Works; events like the HALFTONE print fair in November, and the Arts residency How To Flatten a Mountain, a project hosted in Cow House Studios, Wexford, that culminates with an exhibition of the work produced during the residency at Rathfarnham Castle, Dublin.

Stay in touch: Subscribe, follow, tweet, and participate. You can get in touch by email at info@photoireland.org

Der bund professioneller portraitfotografen - kurz bpp - ist eine der mitgliederstärksten Berufsinitiativen professioneller Fotograf:innen im Bereich Portrait-, People- und Hochzeitsfotografie - ein starkes Netzwerk in der Branche in Deutschland, der Schweiz, Österreich und den Niederlanden.

Der bpp hat sich zur Aufgabe gemacht, ...
- für Berufs-Portraitfotograf:innen da zu sein und Hilfestellung zu geben, da, wo es notwendig ist.
- die Qualität und wirtschaftliche Entwicklung in der professionellen Portrait- und Peoplefotografie zu fördern.
- das Image der professionellen Portraitfotografie zu stärken und die Fotografie jedes einzelnen Mitglieds nachhaltig auf ein qualitativ hochwertiges Niveau zu heben.
- eine politische Stimme für unsere Kunst zu erheben.
- für eine professionelle Weiterbildung zu sorgen und euch durch Workshops und Webinare up-to-date zu halten bzgl. neuester Trends und Entwicklungen.
- eine einmalige Informations- und Networking-Plattform zu schaffen für einen ehrlichen und respektvollen Meinungsaustausch. 
- mit Wettbewerben und Zertifizierungen die eigene Weiterentwicklung voranzutreiben und
- großartige Bildergebnisse zu würdigen und zu feiern.

Ferner bieten wir unseren Mitgliedern...
- ein eigenes, geschlossenes Facebook-Forum
- Unterstützung bei der eigenen Presse- und Öffentlichkeitsarbeit
- einen direkten „Draht“ in die bpp Geschäftsstelle bei allen Sorgen & Nöten
- Rechtsberatung durch den bpp-Justiziar
- einen regelmäßigen bpp-Newsletter mit brandaktuellen Infos
- attraktive Preisvorteile beim Einkauf von Equipment & Dienstleistungen

Interessierte Berufs-Portraitfotograf:innen können Mitglied im bpp werden, indem sie sich bewerben. Alle wichtigen Infos dazu befinden sich auf der Webseite des bpp unter der Rubrik MITGLIEDSCHAFT.

Name: Prix Pictet
Description:
The Prix Pictet is the world’s leading award for photography and sustainability. It was founded in 2008 by the Pictet Group with the goal of harnessing the power of photography to draw global attention to the critical issue of sustainability.
 
Entry to the award is strictly by nomination. The Prix Pictet maintains a network of over 350 nominators, including critics, curators, and other specialists in photography. Since the award’s inception, more than 5,600 photographers have been nominated.
 
For each cycle, 100,000 CHF is awarded to the photographer who, in the opinion of the independent jury, has produced a series of work that is both artistically outstanding and presents a compelling narrative related to the current cycle’s theme.
 
To date, there have been ten cycles of the award, each with its own theme highlighting a particular facet of sustainability. The previous winners are Benoît Aquin (Water), Nadav Kander (Earth), Mitch Epstein (Growth), Luc Delahaye (Power), Michael Schmidt (Consumption), Valérie Belin (Disorder), Richard Mosse (Space), Joana Choumali (Hope), Sally Mann (Fire) and Gauri Gill (Human).
 
Since 2008, the ten cycles of the Prix Pictet have toured internationally with visitor numbers of over 1 million.

Name: Irina Photographe - Evénements - Portraits - Famille - Lifestyle
Description:
Irina Photographe -  Evénements - Portraits - Famille - Lifestyle.

Je suis photographe …

Avant de m’investir avec passion dans la photographie, j’ai été pendant plusieurs années mannequin et actrice, ce fut une période extraordinaire qui m’a naturellement amené de l’autre côté de l’objectif et je peux dire que cela m’aide beaucoup à comprendre et à travailler avec mes modèles.

J’adore la photographie, cette magie où une émotion, un instant pourront être transmis à chacun, à jamais …

Avant tout, je cherche à entrer en contact avec mon modèle, avec confiance et complicité, une séance photos c’est un échange.

Quand le lien est tissé, il devient alors possible de surligner la beauté naturelle du moment et de mon modèle.

Chaque personne est unique, chaque moment est précieux … quand le photographe et son modèle coopèrent en harmonie, les résultats sont étonnants !

La photographie, c’est aussi de la relaxation, de la méditation où l’on cherche à ressentir le moment présent.

Faisons ce beau travail ensemble …

Name: Retouch League Ltd.
Description:
Why We Exist?

Retouch League was created to make visible what has long been invisible:
The retouching layer of photography, the final, decisive space where images become what the world ultimately sees.

Retouching has long been the invisible part of photography - essential, but rarely respected as a profession with its own standards and accountability.

As AI rapidly enters creative workflows, our mission has expanded.
Not to oppose innovation.
Not to slow progress.
But to ensure that human craft, ethics, and authorship do not quietly disappear as systems get faster.

Today, images can be produced before understanding form.
 Results can appear without lived process.
 Standards can shift without anyone clearly holding responsibility.

We believe:
Craft without protection disappears.
Technology without ethics destroys industries.
Progress without people is not progress.

Retouch League is building an ecosystem that:
Makes retouching visible as a profession - not an afterthought
Establishes shared standards in an AI-augmented creative world
Restores authorship, accountability, and psychological ownership to image-making

Brings retouchers, photographers, studios, educators, and creatives into open dialogue about what is acceptable, responsible, and human

Our first initiative is Retoucher of the Year - a global competition across 50+ countries designed to spotlight real skill, judgment, and decision-making.

Because visibility is the foundation of value.
And standards cannot exist without recognition.

Alongside this, we are developing:
A global retoucher database with skill-based verification
An education platform rooted in real industry workflows

A collaborative professional network focused on ethical, transparent use of emerging technologies, Impostor syndrome, loss of confidence, and creative instability did not begin with AI - Impostor syndrome, loss of confidence, and creative instability did not begin with AI - but AI amplifies them.

Name: Toni Vilches Fotografia
Description:
Contacto: 
+34 629 300 963 
tonivilches@tonivilches.comoni Vilches (London, 1976)

Durante casi 25 años la fotografía ha ejercido en mí una forma de canalizar mis sentimientos hacia el mundo que nos rodea. Opinar gráficamente sobre un hecho, una persona, una situación o un lugar es una posibilidad que me enriquece personalmente. Observar y transmitir lo que piensa la gente, su estado de ánimos e impulsos vitales focalizan mi propósito fotográfico y es por eso que el factor humano domina parte de mi obra. La expresividad y la emoción, tan por el lector como por el protagonista, son los dos ingredientes que siempre considero necesarios para poder crear una fotografía. Así pues, si una fotografía consigue despertar al lector un sentimiento, sea del cariz que sea, yo habré conseguido mi propósito.

Cuando recibo un encargo, siempre miro de buscar el método que me dé el resultado que cumpla con las exigencias del cliente. Por este motivo la comunicación y la confianza son las vías que más tengo en cuenta para conseguir este propósito. Entiendo que la única manera de avanzar es afrontar los nuevos encargos con ganas de aprender y los que se repiten con el reto de hacer todavía mejor el trabajo hecho.

Considero muy importante dejar la propia impronta en cada imagen y encargo así como la manera que tengo de entender la fotografía; una imagen cuidada, clara, sencilla y entendedora pero con carga informativa. Mi intención es transmitir una forma de ver la vida con la fotografía. Una fotografía que ya hace muchos años que forma parte de mi propia vida.

Vivo en Girona, un lugar pequeño y agradable donde mi familia se encuentra a gusto. Desde esta ciudad viajo y cubro encargos para publicaciones y clientes dentro y fuera de casa que no han hecho más que enriquecer mi manera de ver todo el que nos rodea.

Name: RonLouis Photos
Description:
The world we live in is full of countless stories to be captured in photographs. People, places, things, and events are more than just words. They are subjects that need to be told through images and then shared with the rest of humanity. Photography is my drive, medium, and passion; so I would love to share your story. Together we can create and tell your photo narrative.

"I photograph to tell the world's countless stories..." 

I started my photography business in 2016. It grew out of my interior design business. I started by creating a photo stock library for my design projects. My goal was to provide a one-stop and shop experience for my clients. I wanted to provide fine art to match their beautiful interiors. As I began to grow my business I began to offer other services. Today I provide photo stock to Adobe Images and I am a Getty Image Contributor; I also provide services for event photography, headshots, and several other photographic opportunities; and I am available for commissioned assignments and work. My business continues to evolve with the needs of my clients.

I am a National Geographic published photographer, interior designer, and blogger living and working in New York City. I have been fortunate to have traveled to various places around the world. Photographing these places has given me a connection to humanity and our planet.  I love the beauty of architecture, design. I enjoy experiencing different activities, foods + cultures. Life for me is about truly living and pursuing my dreams.  I am happy to be a global citizen and I am passionate about sharing our diverse, wonderful, and complex world through the visual medium of photography. I am passionate about using photography to tell your and the world's stories.

"My camera is an extension of my heart" and it is my intention to cause you to feel and react to that precious moment frozen in time in a photograph.

Name: France PhotoBook
Description:
Pour France PhotoBook il s’agit de valoriser et de défendre auprès des professionnels, amateurs et collectionneurs de livres, la diversité et la spécificité françaises en matière d’édition photo. Particulièrement riche et diversifiée en France, la production de livres de photographie est aujourd’hui un marché essentiel à la création et à la diffusion de la photographie.

Alors que l’on célèbre cinquante années de photographie française avec le livre éponyme de l’historien Michel Poivert (Éditions Textuel), depuis près d’un demi siècle l’édition française contribue activement, elle aussi, à l’émergence des auteurs et à la reconnaissance de leurs propositions photographiques.

France PhotoBook est une association ouverte à tout éditeur de livres de photographie dont le siège social est situé en France et produisant au moins trois titres par an. Elle vise à valoriser et à sauvegarder un écosystème aussi riche que fragile, en préservant une expertise singulière et en encourageant la prise en compte d’un secteur devenu incontournable dans le champ de la création photographique contemporaine

Les éditeurs membres de France PhotoBook :
Actes Sud, André Frère Éditions, Arnaud Bizalion Éditeur, Atelier EXB, Contrejour, Editions Bessard, Filigranes, Fisheye, Hartpon, Lamaindonne, Le Bec en l’air, Les Editions de Juillet, Light Motiv, Loco, Maison CF, Poetry Wanted, RVB Books, Sun Sun, Textuel, The Eyes Publishing, Trans Photographic Press.

Name: Creators Network
Description:
Resource Magazine is a quarterly publication dedicated to the subculture of the photo production industry. It explores all facets of the business, from the mundane to the illustrious, through interviews, photographs, and articles. It is available for anyone who passes through any of the major photo studios in New York City. It's FREE; no monetary issues keeping our potential readers at bay.

With this thriving industry of photo production professionals and their alluring sub-culture, there is much to write about. Until now, you and me and that photo assistant over there had never seen a publication for us! We make it, produce it, build it, style it, and shoot it...now we ARE it!

Resource Magazine is distributed freely in major photo studios and industry related locations throughout New York City in three of the boroughs: Manhattan, Brooklyn, and Queens. Everyone involved in the industry passes through studios at some point, many do so daily. Resource's distribution gives the targeted audience an opportunity to pick up a copy and flip through it while on a shoot. they can even take it home, still free of charge, and read it more thoroughly at their leisure and then share the Resource experience with others. This outreach of the magazine gives way to more exposure of the pages covered with articles, photographs, and, potentially, your ad.

There are 20,000 copies distributed to over 100 studios, labs, equipment rental and prop rental locations. that should be plenty of reading material for the estimated 4,000 potential readers walking through the stuio's doors each day. Numbers indicate that within every month there are 100,000 potential readers from studio traffic, adding up to about 300,000 per quarterly issue. this number only encompasses those walking in and out of our distribution areas, surely there will be many more who will get to flip through the pages at home.

Resource's distribution gives the targeted audience an opportunity to pick up a copy and flip through it while on a shoot. they can even take it home, still free of charge, and read it more thoroughly at their leisure and then share the Resource experience with others. This outreach of the magazine gives way to more exposure of the pages covered with articles, photographs, and, potentially, your ad.

There are 20,000 copies distributed to over 100 studios, labs, equipment rental and prop rental locations. that should be plenty of reading material for the estimated 4,000 potential readers walking through the stuio's doors each day. Numbers indicate that within every month there are 100,000 potential readers from studio traffic, adding up to about 300,000 per quarterly issue. this number only encompasses those walking in and out of our distribution areas, surely there will be many more who will get to flip through the pages at home.

Name: National Press Photographers Association (NPPA)
Description: The National Press Photographers Association (NPPA) is an American professional association made up of still photographers, television videographers, editors, and students in the journalism field. Founded in 1946, the organization is based in at the Grady College of Journalism and Mass Communication at the University of Georgia. The NPPA places emphasis on photojournalism, or journalism that presents a story through the use of photographs or moving pictures. The NPPA holds annual competitions as well as several quarterly contests, seminars, and workshops designed to stimulate personal growth in its members. It utilizes a mentor program which offers its members the opportunity to establish a relationship with a veteran NPPA member and learn from them. The organization also offers a critique service, a job bank, an online discussion board, and various member benefits.

Name: Dreambooks
Description:
Um novo conceito nasce em 2006 com o lançamento da marca Dreambooks, reinventando a forma de se fazer álbuns digitais no mercado mundial.
A impressão de álbuns digitais iniciou-se em 2001, no entanto apenas em 2006 foi criada a marca Dreambooks, com o objectivo de se distinguir das restantes marcas.

Em 2007, foi a primeira marca Europeia com uma aplicação online para a elaboração de álbuns digitais, objectos personalizados e impressão de fotos.

Em 2009, implementa um novo software com mais funcionalidades a nível do utilizador, backoffice para os aderentes, tracking de encomendas, notificações automáticas, novos métodos de pagamento, importação directa de fotos das redes sociais (Facebook, Picasa, Flickr, etc), partilha dos projectos nas redes sociais (apenas disponível na versão online), entre muitos outros desenvolvimentos.
Este software está disponível na versão download (multi-plataforma) e na versão online.
Está também em desenvolvimento uma aplicação mobile, da qual poderá usufruir em breve.

É também em 2009 que a Dreambooks consolida a posição de liderança em Portugal no que toca à produção e venda de álbuns digitais amadores, atingindo os 250 mil álbuns digitais vendidos.

Actualmente, a Dreambooks tem uma carteira de milhares de clientes na vertente consumo e já está presente em mais de 1000 lojas de fotografia profissional em Portugal e em várias cadeias de lojas multi-especialistas.

Name: Park Cameras
Description:
Park Cameras is a specialist photographic retailer with stores in London and Sussex as well as a strong online camera store presence. Family-run since 1971 and now employee owned, the focus of the business is to provide a wide range of photographic goods at low prices and, moreover, unrivalled customer service. With its head office in Burgess Hill and a second flagship store in Central London, the business now employs over 70 staff. With well over 1 million sales in its 50+ years and a strong ambition to become the first choice photographic retailer for the whole of the UK, it aims for significant growth in a tough retail environment.

Roots of the business date back to 1971, set up with the same ethos as now and the same reason for existence and continued success – a passion for photography and friendly and award-winning customer service. Expansion over the decades ultimately led to the most radical of change in 2008; investing for the future with a purpose-designed-and-built building, combining one of the largest photographic stores in the world with training facilities, a photographic studio, head offices, our contact centre and warehouse. 
In late 2013, the business opened in central London, with the aim to become the best camera store in London, with the most passionate and friendly staff, the widest range of stock in London and all available to try before you buy at constantly price-monitored low internet pricing.

A friendly, dedicated B2B team for both the photo and video market currently services the needs of Police Forces, Schools, Universities, broadcast video companies, professional photographers and a range of other businesses.

Park Cameras’ passion for the complete experience doesn’t end there; with an extensive selection of services from photography training; buying and selling second hand cameras at the best prices; photo printing services; sensor cleaning and much more – pop in to store or give us a call.

Description:
𝗔𝗹𝗹𝗲 𝗵𝗮𝗯𝗲𝗻 𝗱𝗶𝗲𝘀𝗲𝘀 𝘂𝗻𝗯𝗲𝘇𝗮𝗵𝗹𝗯𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗚𝗲𝘀𝗰𝗵𝗲𝗻𝗸, 𝗱𝗼𝗰𝗵 𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗵𝗲 𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗱𝗲𝗰𝗸𝗲𝗻 𝗲𝘀 𝗻𝗶𝗲.

Was ich damit meine:

 Jeder Mensch ist ein Individuum
 Jeder Mensch hat eine Persönlichkeit
 Jeder Mensch hat Charisma

Doch manche erkennen es nicht (oder erst sehr spät).

Fakt ist aber: 𝗗𝘂 𝗯𝗶𝘀𝘁 𝗲𝗶𝗻𝘇𝗶𝗴𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗶𝗴. 𝗜𝗰𝗵 𝗮𝘂𝗰𝗵.

Mein Name ist Alexander Fischer und als freischaffender Fotograf und Fotokünstler mit den Schwerpunkten 𝗖𝗼𝗿𝗽𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗣𝗵𝗼𝘁𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆, 𝗔𝗿𝘁 𝘂𝗻𝗱 𝗠𝗼𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 helfe ich Menschen dabei, ihre Einzigartigkeit ins rechte Licht zu rücken, so dass...

 Dein Unternehmen und Deine Marke bestmöglich repräsentiert wird, 

 Kunden auf Dich aufmerksam werden

 und schließlich Dein Umsatz steigt.

Denn wer sich auf seiner Website, auf Social Media oder auch in Printmedien optimal präsentieren will, benötigt moderne und hochwertige Bilder.

Zweitklassige Fotos kratzen an Deinem Image und schrecken potenzielle Neukunden ab.

Meine Bildsprache: Jung, frisch, modern und authentisch.

Ich fotografiere zumeist mit natürlicher Beleuchtung. Das bringt im wahrsten Sinne des Wortes Licht in das Unternehmen und in seine Beziehung zu Kunden, Partnern und Mitarbeitern.

Alexander Fischer - Photo & Motion

Daarnaast geven we veel aandacht aan militair erfgoed, de recente militaire geschiedenis en de defensie-industrie.
Daarnaast besteden we veel aandacht aan het bewaren van het militaire erfgoed van Nederland. Dit erfgoed is niet alleen zichtbaar in historische locaties zoals de bunkers en militaire begraafplaatsen, maar ook in de verzamelingen van oude legervoertuigen en de (mobilisatie)complexen uit de Koude Oorlog.

Name: Shan Benson Studio
Description:
As an AAPI, I’ve always believed that inclusion and equality bring together diverse cultures and backgrounds. We, together, are responsible, to be honest about how beauty is represented and the impact of the industry on our environment and those living in it.

I specialize in beauty, cosmetics, and skincare photography. I am a friendly and casual professional as a photographer/director. I shoot models of all cultures, ages, and skin textures and it’s important for me to set a stress-free environment to bring out the best from everyone involved! I’m a firm believer in cooperation for excellence and know that getting the best result is often a collaboration between the client, models, stylists, artists, and myself. 

Preparation and planning are my secret superpowers. My transparency in all aspects of pre-production put everyone at ease, and I would have it no other way! Clear communication and openness about expectations go a long way in aligning with my client’s goals and is essential to my process.

I believe that as a beauty photographer, I have a responsibility to create and capture real and authentic images that are refreshingly honest and relatable to the viewers. The right message can be empowering, which is what I seek to accomplish with my work. I am working with various brands that are environmentally conscious and sustainability in the beauty industry is something I strive to see.

Past and current clients include Milani Cosmetics, Skin Medica, Shea Moisture, Livetinted, About Face Cosmetics by Halsey, Westman Atelier, Huda Beauty, Black Moon Cosmetics, Rodan + Fields, EM Cosmetics, Rye Beauty, Mernone Skin Care, Mindbodygreen, Elisa Johnson, Stitch Fix, Gap INC. Name: Resilience Food Stories
Description:
Resilience Food Stories is a storytelling platform by photographer Ruud Sies and creative producer Hanneke van Hintum in partnership with Koppert. 
A Journey through the World of Resilient Agriculture.
Traveling from region to region in search of stories from and about farmers and growers with inspiring and hopeful stories.

Resilience Food Stories shares with you the astonishment and admiration of the creators concerning the developments and possibilities of sustainable agriculture and horticulture. It shows that only sustainable agriculture and horticulture that make use of natural principles can make food production worldwide healthier, safer, more productive and more resilient. The complex worldwide subject of food production becomes a matter of real people and their exciting and hopeful stories, which are extraordinary, inspiring, instructive, moving, funny and auspicious.

Photographer Ruud Sies and creative producer Hanneke van Hintum practice long-term documentary projects.
You are invited to join us on this Journey through the World of Resilient Agriculture by following the website http://www.resiliencefoodstories.com and subscribe to the newsletter.

Name: International Press Association
Description:
IPA is a 20 year old organization and completely web based for close to 15 years and has become a respected, credible and legitimate media outlet that receives millions of page views each year.  IPA independent staff members are primarily international photographers and journalists of all skill levels.

IPA publishes their members photographs and articles on their main site and this member content also appears on the members IPA professional portfolio on the site.  IPA has become known for not only its interesting and informative site content, but for supporting the thousands of members past and current who have achieved credibility and exposure by being part of IPA and publishing their articles and photos on the site.   

IPA is a firm believer that one of the best methods of teaching professional skills is by actually having the members learn how to gain the access and then do the work and publish the articles and photos from those assignments on the site.   “Do The Work”,  has become the IPA mantra and their member support blog has informative articles that help the members do just that.

IPA maintains groups on many of the leading social networking sites including Facbook, MySpace, Twitter, YouTube and others and encourage all of their social networking fans and friends to enter their photos in this contest.
