Name: Maison de la Photographie
Description:
La Maison de la Photographie, lieu de rencontre autour de l’art visuel, accueille tout au long de l’année des expositions, des débats, des événements, et se veut être un véritable support pour la diffusion artistique sur le territoire et la création régionale.

Ainsi, au delà des ateliers développés auprès du public jeune et en milieu scolaire, la Maison de la Photographie présente régulièrement les travaux d’artistes contemporains, confie des commandes à des jeunes photographes, développe une programmation de projections et de rencontres, et participe aux grands moments culturels de la Région, comme Lille3000 ou la Capitale Régionale de la Culture.

Par ailleurs, la Maison organise le Festival Transphotographiques, qui depuis 10 ans propose une sélection thématique de plus de soixante expositions pendant un mois sur l’Euro-région.

Les Transphotographiques ont pris une part reconnue dans le paysage photographique international et veulent confirmer ce rendez-vous comme un moment incontournable de découverte et de dialogue, qui valorise le territoire, à la fois en présentant les travaux de ses artistes et aussi en accueillant les plus grands noms de la photographie contemporaine.

Name: The Studio Dubai
Description:
We capture the moments that matter to you.

How do we do this? By delivering outstanding customer service through our values led culture. We believe in creating happiness in the workplace and our values of passion, creativity, teamwork and a positive attitude resonate in everything we do. People drive our business.

Our energetic, determined and professional team of photographers, videographers, editors and bookers are all dedicated to meet our customers’ needs. 

Collectively we cover four specialist photography and videography divisions: Corporate, Events, Family & Wedding. We are based in Al Quoz, inside the beautiful Courtyard, right next to The Lime Tree Café & just around the corner from Tom & Serg.

We guarantee your experience at The Studio will be a memorable one!

Name: Nuovo Artistic Photography
Description: In the dim red light of the darkroom, we embarked on a journey that would take us to the furthest corners of photography. While many contemporaries chased a vision of the human form that was highly sexualized, we envisioned a style that amplified the natural language of the body and provided a transformative experience to its subjects. In an act of defiance, we confidently rejected the status quo surrounding nude photography and irrevocably carved out space for a style denoted by a kind of finesse, discretion and elegance never before seen - a concept we dubbed Nuovo.

Name: POLKA
Description:
Polka est un magazine trimestriel lancé en 2007 par Alain Genestar. Récits, reportages, enquêtes, rencontres, tendances, art… Polka fait partie de cette nouvelle génération de magazines qui prend le temps de l’analyse pour donner du sens à l’information. Vendu en kiosques et dans les librairies spécialisées en France comme à l’international, Polka produit également de nombreux articles sur son site www.polkamagazine.com

Située au cœur du Marais, à Paris, Polka est aussi une galerie fondée en 2007 par Adélie de Ipanema et Edouard Genestar. Ouverte au public du mardi au samedi, la galerie Polka a un programme annuel de plus de dix expositions axées sur la valorisation du médium photographique. Elle expose de nombreux artistes, parmi les plus belles signatures de la photographie (Marc Riboud, Sebastião Salgado, William Klein, Joel Meyerowitz, Steve McCurry, Claude Nori…) et participe aux grandes foires internationales (Paris Photo New York, Art Basel Miami Beach, Paris Photo).

En 2019, Polka lance la Factory Polka, un concept store entièrement dédié à la photo où s'organisent des expositions, des rencontres avec les artistes, des signatures, des workshops en liaison avec de nombreux partenaires... La Factory Polka propose aussi au public une sélection de livres de photographie et d'objets collector.

Name: Think Tank Photo
Description: Think Tank Photo is a group of designers and professional photographers focused on studying how photographers work, and developing inventive new carrying solutions to meet their needs. By focusing on “speed” and “accessibility,” we prepare photographers to Be Ready “Before The Moment,” allowing them to document those historic moments that reflect their personal visions and artistic talents. For some companies, it is only about the product. For us, it is more: It is about supporting photographers doing their job. If we can design products that help photographers travel easier, take pictures faster, and organize their gear more efficiently, then we will have accomplished something beyond the bags themselves.

Name: Mathieu Rivrin • Photographe de Bretagne
Description:
Photographe professionnel de 31ans, j’ai une forte attirance pour les paysages naturels ou avec un petit élément humain. Je cherche des lumières particulières ce qui impose de se lever tôt le matin et de se coucher tard le soir pour assister aux levers et couchers de soleil, souvent synonymes de couleurs intenses dans le ciel.

En Février 2016, lors de la tempête Ruzica, un vol en hélicoptère au-dessus du Finistère et de ses phares a été le début d'une belle aventure avec des images de phares qui ont fait le tour des journaux à travers le monde. De ces images et ce moment est né une envie de photographier et partager ces phénomènes climatiques extrêmes et notamment ceux de l’océan en furie depuis la mer au plus près des vagues, la terre ou les airs.
Télépilote professionnel déclaré DGAC, la vidéo complète mon travail avec des prises de vue aériennes ou des timelapses.

Name: Studio Aurora
Description: Based in Los Angeles, California, Studio Aurora is a visual collective founded in 2025 by three seasoned photographers with a shared passion for storytelling through the lens. We specialize in artistic photography, public relations visuals, and creative marketing imagery that capture emotion, intention, and the spirit of the modern world.

Name: NOVELLA
Description: "Novella - Crafting Timeless Tales of Luxury Weddings  Elevate your special day with our bespoke wedding photography services. Every moment, a masterpiece; every celebration, an enchanting narrative. Join us on a journey where we turn dreams into visual poetry. #NovellaLuxuryWeddings #TimelessElegance #LuxuryEvents"

Name: Fotoempresas Photo Studio SL
Description: We offer a product photography and post productions service for any company or ecommerce online retailer. We pride ourselves in having the skills, the people and the facilities to provide a high quality images. With the optimization of time and resources we are offering some of the cheapest prices that they are currently in the professional field without losing any quality.

Name: Governo do Estado do Rio Grande do Sul
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: LRP - LITTLE RED PANDA STUDIO
Description:
LRP is a leading fashion e-Commerce studio generating digital imagery and video content for world-class fashion brands. We pride ourselves on being a bold and adaptable team of digital content creators who, through close collaboration, can accurately portray our clients' individual needs.

Our attention to detail, coupled with our comprehensive list of services results in imagery that is both versatile and unique to every brand that comes to us. The LRP team have extensive knowledge of both worlds -  digital content creation and fashion. This helps us to identify upcoming trends, allowing us to create insightful photography and videography content that is always ahead of the curve.

For LRP E-commerce is an art form. We take great care to craft each shoot, paying particular care with lighting, composition and art direction. We treat each shoot as a way to create the best content possible. 

We like to offer our clients end to end solutions across image creation and output allowing for cross platform synergy between e-commerce, social media and creative departments. That's why our methods are grounded within our principle of critical understanding that each and every image is an essential component of our client’s sales success.

We are based in the heart of Hackney, East London, where we are surrounded by fashion houses, creative, design and architect firms. Our studios are set safely within a secure commercial complex with a beautiful victorian facade remaining from its previous life as a ceramics factory. 

We specialise in all disciplines of still life and apparel formats including on-model, invisible mannequin, flat-styled and creative. If you need e-Commerce photography, model or product photography, packshot photography or videography, we would love to hear from you.

Name: Fotop
Description:
Fotop connects professional photographers to event attendees to record unique perspectives of the most incredible moments of their lives.

In a multilingual platform, photographers have full control to sell their photos straight to event participants. Using facial recognition, bib number identification or galleries, now is possible to sell images from events that wasn't previously.

Name: FG+SG | ARCHITECTURAL PHOTOGRAPHY
Description:
Fernando Guerra has been a pioneer in the way architecture is photographed and divulged. 22 years ago, he opened studio FG+SG together with his brother, and both are responsible in large part for the diffusion of Portuguese contemporary architecture in the last 22 years. 

Fernando Guerra is an architectural photographer. His training, however, is as an architect. His gaze is divided between two distinct modes of constructing the world. Given this fact, he is in a prime position to personify the metamorphosis of the field of photography that will lead the practice of creating images to eventually identify itself, in part, with the field of architecture. 

Fernando Guerra's work is regularly published in various national and international publications, in magazines such as Casabella, Wallpaper*, Dwell, Icon, Domus, A + U, among many others. FG+SG collaborates with various Portuguese architects such as Álvaro Siza, Carlos Castanheira, Manuel Mateus, Manuel Graça Dias, Gonçalo Byrne, ARX Portugal, João Luís Carrilho da Graça, Promontório Arquitectos, as well as international architects such as Márcio Kogan, Isay Weifeld, Arthur Casas, Zaha Hadid, Pei Cobb Freed & Partners, among others.

The website ultimasreportagens.com has become the starting point for consulting contemporary portuguese architecture with more than six hundred online features, as well as special articles and publications.

Name: SmugMug
Description:
We're building a better world through the power of photography. And shaping the future of photography online by powering the business of photography. SmugMug, an Awesome company, is a leading global photography platform, helping passionate photographers protect, share, and sell their photos. We provide the essential tools that photographers need to grow their skillset, their following, and their profits.

Join us and see where we go next: https://www.smugmug.com/careers. Follow us for product announcements and photography tips and tricks from expert photographers.

Name: CLM Agency
Description:
CLM represents a community of the most inspiring, respected and innovative emerging and established artists working today. We are driven by creative excellence, working closely with all our artists to inspire and build their unique vision and practice. Our passion and approach ensures we always strive to push the creative boundaries without compromise.

CLM is part of Great Bowery. They have reimagined the traditional agency approach by uniting a diverse range of globally recognized luxury image-makers with creative strategists to offer clients end to end service from project inception to full scale execution. Across our entire collective, services include creative, artist representation, image licensing, and distribution strategy. Founded in 2015 with headquarters in New York City and London, our clients are comprised of the world’s most iconic companies spanning fashion, beauty, Web3, technology, and more. 

Brandsthat are part of Great Bowery are B&A, Bowie, CLM, Gallery Stock,Granted, GBI, Lookbooks, M.A.P, Streeters, Trunk Archive, and Wenzel & Co.

IG @clmagency 
Part of @greatbowery

ldn@clm-agency.com
nyc@clm-agency.com

Name: PhotoSì
Description:
Printing emotions is our passion.

Life is made up of emotions and our goal is to turn them into unique objects that enchant the world. 
Which ones? Prints, PhotoBooks, Wall Prints, Calendars and many other Gadgets to customise with your own photos.
How? With a super easy-to-use app and website.

PhotoSì S.p.A. is an Italian company that has been in the photo printing business since 1973 and now operates worldwide. We were the first to sense the potential of the transition from analogue to digital photography back in 2006 and made the most of it, by creating our website photosi.com for the online sale of photographic products. 

We strongly focus on technological development: we have a state-of-the-art infrastructure and only proprietary software, created and maintained by a team of 40 experienced developers.

In 2012 we launched Europe's first photo printing app, which today has more than 5 million downloads. 

In 2021 we were voted Italy's Best E-commerce by the German Institute of Quality (ITQF).

Our headquarters are in Riccione but we have 180 employees worldwide, from Germany to Japan, working in the following departments: Purchasing, Accounting, B2B, Management Control and Business Intelligence, Customer Service, Digital Business, Digital Product, HR, IT, Logistics, Marketing, Production, Product Development.

We believe in mutual trust, we strive for continuous improvement and we are driven by our passion for what we do: seeing is believing!

Name: Photographers Direct
Description:
Photographers Direct is a photographic portal to help picture buyers and researchers find suitable stock photos for any media. With more than 2 million images and more than 5,000 photographers worldwide, Photographers Direct can help you find any image, or any photographer for assignment work, anywhere. 

Photographic areas covered: stock photography photos images picture research assignments assignment photographers photographer photo image picture advertising aerial agriculture animal annual report reports architectural architecture art artist aviation award winning beauty business catalogue catalog catalogues catalogs corporate digital documentary editorial educational engineering environmental issues event events family life fashion fine art food drink garden gardens glamour HDRI HDR headshot headshots health fitness horse equestrian industrial interior interiors landscape lifestyle lingerie swimwear macro magazine magazines marine life medical model models music nature news packshot packshots panoramic passport photo people pet pets photojournalism politics portrait portraits PR public relations product products real estate property relationships religion reportage royalty school schools science shopping special f/x sport sports still life stock studio tabletop theatre time lapse travel underwater video wedding weddings wildlife winter sports photo search engine photo agencies, photo agency search, photographer portfolios, designer, designers, photographic portfolios, digital images, digital photos, stock picture sites.

Name: Bella Baby Photography
Description:
Bella Baby is the face of hospital baby portraiture. We bring experienced, professional photographers into the hospital to capture your baby's first photograph with a natural, artistic style. We believe that babies look the most beautiful when being held in their parents' arms or cuddled in one of their own baby blankets. Bella Baby captures this beauty by using only "real things"...natural window light, professional photographers and professional grade SLR digital cameras.

Newborns aren't the only subject we love to photograph... we love to capture all of the milestones of family life. Using a photojournalistic style approach to photography, we capture your baby learning to stand, your 5-year old riding his bike with no training wheels, and your teenager's last photograph before she becomes an adult. 

We look forward to working with you and to capturing photographs that show the "real" beauty of your family.

Name: Fotografia Krzysztof Kania
Description: Fotografia biznesowa

Name: Streeters
Description:
Streeters is a leading global artist management agency representing talent in the fields of fashion and beauty. Founded in London in 1988, and opening an office in NY a few years later, Streeters has cultivated a community of artists and agents who focus on the disciplines of image making, styling, hair, makeup, set design, casting, choreography, creative direction, and multi-media amongst others.

Beyond day-to-day management and representation, Streeters works with their artists and clients on projects of all types including brand and product development, public relations, social media strategy, brand ambassadorships, digital partnerships, image licensing, exhibitions, events, and book publishing. 

Streeters is part of Great Bowery. They have reimagined the traditional agency approach by uniting a diverse range of globally recognized luxury image-makers with creative strategists to offer clients end to end service from project inception to full scale execution. Across the entire collective, their services include creative, artist representation, image licensing, and distribution strategy. Founded in 2015 with headquarters in New York City and London, their clients are comprised of the world’s most iconic companies spanning fashion, beauty, Web3, technology, and more. Brandsthat are part of Great Bowery are B&A, CLM, Gallery Stock,Granted, GBI, Lookbooks, M.A.P, Streeters, Trunk Archive, and Wenzel & Co.

Name: Things by Jackson
Description: Art & photography of Stuart Jackson.

Name: Manfrotto Imagine More
Description: Manfrotto is the world leader in the design and production of professional products for photography and videography, renowned for its high-quality and innovative photo & video tripods, heads and accessories, lighting equipment and camera bags. The company was founded in 1972 based on Lino Manfrotto’s experience and his mission to support and simplify the work of reporters, photographers and videographers. The Imagine More line adds to this historical mission the idea of fuelling the enthusiasm of amateur photographers and supporting the surge of independent content creators. Part of the UK-based Vitec Group since 1989, the company has become a worldwide presence.

Name: Keith Moss Photography.
Description:
WHO AM I?

I’m Keith Moss, a self-taught professional photographer, and mentor with an international reputation. I have run a successful photography business for 35 years, mentoring amateurs and professional photographers for the last 12 years. I am also experienced in all formats of photography, digital and film.   

WHAT DO I DO?

I help you achieve your full potential as a photographer through one to one photography workshops and online mentoring. 

WHAT CAN I DO FOR YOU?

I assess your needs, create the right environment for you to learn, help you to develop and achieve your full potential by guiding you on a one to one basis. 

WHAT CAN YOU EXPECT FROM ME?
 
I teach in simple language, showing you rather than teaching through text. I know each persons needs are different, therefore I work with you at your level patiently helping you to grow and develop as a photographer.  

I’ll give you the confidence, help find your direction and give you all the tools and know-how to achieve your goals. 

WHAT TO DO NOW?

If you are serious about photography, please give me a call so we can discuss your needs with no obligation. + 44 (0) 7454 286 443  or feel free to email me. keith@keithmoss.co.uk

website: http://keithmossphotography.co.uk
Location: saltburn by the Sea, North Yorkshire

Name: Sphirea Plus
Description:
At Sphirea Plus, we believe in the power of photography to freeze time, preserve memories, and tell stories that resonate for a lifetime. Whether you’re celebrating a joyous occasion, embarking on a new chapter of your life, or simply savoring the beauty of the everyday, we are here to capture those moments with skill, passion, and creativity.

Our team of dedicated photographers is committed to providing you with an exceptional experience from start to finish. We pride ourselves on our attention to detail, our personalized approach, and our unwavering commitment to exceeding your expectations. When you choose Sphirea Plus Photography, you can trust that your memories are in capable hands.

Name: Lomography
Description:
The Lomographic Society is a globally active organization dedicated to experimental and creative analogue photography. Originally established in 1992 by a group of offbeat students as an arts movement, but fuelled by fiery passion and burning curiosity, the society soon grew into an international venture. 

Our snapshots are characterized by vibrant colours, shadowy vignette, surprise effects and pure spontaneity. We have over a million creative members across the world and invite you to let loose, ignite your inspiration and to catapult your shots around the globe through our online platform. Whether you’re a complete novice or a seasoned pro, everyone can harness the photographic power to create something incredible. 

Our extensive Lomographic analogue family includes many innovative products, such as our Sprocket Rocket, Diana Mini, La Sardina, the Petzval 55 Art Lens and a wide range of instant cameras. We also boast an ever-growing line-up of film in many different formats, having most recently launched the LomoChrome Metropolis – the first new color negative film in over 5 years! 

We’re dedicated to generating all the photographic tools you need to start your analogue journey - and our first lesson? Don't think – just shoot!

Name: Pexels
Description:
Oh hi. We are Pexels. And we're on a mission to show the world as it is. 

Our contributors mean the world to us so if you have an eye for , stick around for monthly challenges, meetup announcements, the occasional ISO joke and exciting campaigns you can get involved. 

Or are you looking for that little extra something to bring your ideas to life? Check out pexels.com for a huge library of photos and videos to get the ball rolling. All of our content is carefully hand-selected by our curation team and searchable in 28 languages. 

Or maybe you want to access our library without leaving the app or website? Our API is trusted by over 10,000 developers to do just that for you.

We're founded in Berlin but our team is spread around the world. Pexels is also now part of the Canva family.

Name: pocstock
Description:
pocstock is a global content company that creates and curates culturally inclusive stock images, content, and data featuring people of color for businesses and artificial intelligence platforms.
 
We partner with businesses of all sizes to ensure they have the right images, insights, and data to be inclusive of everyone.

Name: 123RF.com
Description: 123RF empowers businesses and creators with real freedom to produce, scale, and elevate their visual storytelling. Trusted by over 12 million users across 150 countries, we provide access to more than 231 million photos, videos, vectors, audio tracks, and fonts. Enhanced by next-generation AI tools that simplify and accelerate content creation. As a global creative ecosystem, we help brands and teams create with speed, clarity, and confidence.

Name: IMAGO
Description:
We are IMAGO.
IMAGO is a global visual content provider with a wide range of images and videos from News, Sports, Entertainment, Archives and Creative. Our international partner network delivers content daily, from the latest events worldwide to an extensive selection of archive material. In our webshop, content can be licensed with one click, and larger projects can be implemented with our enterprise solutions.

Name: Nikon Club Italia
Description: Benvenuti nella più grande community Nikonista  indipendente dedicata al marchio Nikon e a tutti i Nikonisti: Nikon Club Italia, nata nell'anno 2004 da un gruppo di appassionati e possessori di Materiale Nikon. Il nostro obiettivo è quello di approfondire e condividere la nostra passione  per la fotografia e in particolare per Nikon all'interno delle nostre sezioni. Siamo una community non ufficiale e indipendente, svincolata da qualunque realtà commerciale e quindi senza fini di lucro, le nostra attività non sono correllate alle azioni ufficiali di Nikon Corporation rappresentata in italia da Nital Spa.

Name: Michele Bellman Studio
Description:
I am a Professional Photographer, working out of my stunning natural light studio at Stansted House, photographing bumps, babies & families - I shoot a select few weddings per year too!

My photography is filled with natural soft light and a gentle colour palette. My images are simple yet timeless.

My studio is spacious and comfortable. My sessions are a chance for parents to relax, and enjoy the experience whilst I capture heartfelt moments between you and your little people.

Michele x

Name: SweetEscape
Description:
SweetEscape is an AI-driven photography platform that offers photoshoots for any occasion in over 500 cities in 100 countries globally for both consumer and businesses. With tens of thousands of photographers under our network, we empower the photographer community by providing an end-to-end infrastructure including post- production for the photographers to pursue their passion while addressing the rising demand for quality visual content to consumers and businesses.

Our mission is to empower the photographers’ community while providing consumers with affordable access to quality photos anywhere around the world. We capture all occasions such honeymoons, family trips, bridal showers, birthdays, graduations and other special moments. For businesses we make it easy and affordable to shoot products, food, property, fashion and more. We service regional and global clients alike. We are able to do this by providing photographers a platform to peruse their passion. From booking jobs, invoicing, post-production and delivery, SweetEscape is taking the mundane work out of making a living as a photographer and truly allowing them to practice their craft while sharing their passion with the world

For vacancies, go to: sweetescape.com/careers
Contact us at: hireme@sweetescape.com

Name: SHOWstudio
Description:
SHOWstudio is an award-winning fashion website, founded and directed by Nick Knight, that has consistently pushed the boundaries of communicating fashion online.

Established in November 2000, SHOWstudio’s innovative and ground-breaking projects have defined the manner in which fashion is presented via the Internet. SHOWstudio has pioneered fashion film and is now recognised as the leading force behind this new medium, offering a unique platform to nurture and encourage fashion to engage with moving image in the digital age.

Working with the latest technology SHOWstudio broadcasts live from catwalk shows and fashion shoots, allowing an international audience instant and unparalleled access to the previously closed world of high fashion. Inspired by the inherent generosity of the verb 'to show', SHOWstudio opens up the studio of designers and artists, allowing everyone to not only witness the creative process, but to respond and contribute creatively, documenting, communicating and evaluating the results.

SHOWstudio collaborates with some of the most influential and acclaimed figures of contemporary fashion, including John Galliano, Kate Moss, Rick Owens, Comme des Garçons and Alexander McQueen. Alongside these established names, SHOWstudio has also supported and nurtured emerging talent, including Giles Deacon, Gareth Pugh, Rodarte and Mary Katrantzou, offering exciting new designers an important global showcase for creative expression. SHOWstudio has also worked with pop culture icons and creatives from the world of art, music and film including Tracey Emin, Björk, Brad Pitt and Lady Gaga.

Since its inception, SHOWstudio has worked with the world’s most sought-after filmmakers, writers and cultural figures to create visionary online content, exploring every facet of fashion through moving image, illustration, photography and the written word.

Constantly changing, consistently innovating, SHOWstudio delivers fashion, live, as it happens.

Name: Autoentrepreneur
Description:
Après 5 ans d’études dans le domaine des arts graphiques, j’ai construit mon expérience en tant que graphiste, ce qui m’a permis d’acquérir une bonne maîtrise dans la création et la gestion des projets.

Passionnée par la photographie et les tendances je choisis aujourd’hui de me diriger dans le domaine de l’événementiel pour élaborer avec le client un univers qui lui ressemble.

Graphiste et photographe freelance mes compétences vont de la création à la prise de vue. Prestations Papeterie (faire-part, livret de messe, plan de table, marque table, menu, remerciement...) et Photo (préparation de la mariée, cérémonies, photos de couple et de groupe, du lieux et de la décoration des tables).

N'hésitez pas à faire appel à moi pour la réalisation de vos projets ou l'accompagnement de vos clients, que ce soit pour du conseil ou de la création.


J'ai récemment mis en ligne ma boutique de ventes de mes photographies. Un large choix de photos, formats et supports...www.anaisbertrand.com/boutique

Name: Saal Digital
Description:
As a leading provider of premium photo products in Europe, Saal Digital is dedicated to both supporting professional photographers in showcasing their creativity and growing their businesses as well as offering premium photo products to hobby photographers and quality-oriented end consumers. We offer an extensive range of high-quality, customizable photo products—produced with the utmost care and precision—at competitive prices.

Our dedicated Photographer Area provides specialized tools and resources tailored to the needs of professionals. With fast production times, direct-to-customer shipping, and flexible solutions, we help photographers deliver a unique experience to their clients. In addition, our innovative online gallery and shop system "Saal Photo Portal" enables photographers (such as school, kindergarden or wedding photographers) to present, sell, and distribute their work worldwide in a highly convenient way.

Headquartered in Röttenbach, Germany, with additional offices throughout Europe, we deliver to over 25 countries across Europe, the UK, and the USA.

At Saal Digital, we are proud of our multicultural and diverse team, grounded in values of integrity, fairness, and responsibility. Our public ESG commitments underscore our drive to reduce our environmental footprint and foster meaningful relationships with our community.

Find out more:

- Saal Photo Portal: https://www.saal-digital.de/saal-photo-portal/

Description: Chaque été, de juin à septembre, le village breton de La Gacilly transforme ses jardins, venelles et ruelles en galeries naturelles dédiées à la photographie. En famille ou entre amis, le Festival Photo La Gacilly permet de découvrir gratuitement, en grand format et en plein air, les grands noms de la photographie autant que la jeune création.

A leading global commercial photography studio that delivers captivating high-quality e-commerce imagery and videography for fashion, accessories and lifestyle brands.

Name: Kick It To Me Photography
Description: Sue McKay is the individual behind the Kick It To Me brand. As Kick It To Me Photography, Sue provides clients with compelling imagery of significant events and people. Think international sporting action and associated personalities, public figures, major functions, award ceremonies... you get the picture. For images that stand out from the crowd and make people stare in a good way, Kick It To Me (Sue McKay).

Name: LensCulture
Description:
LensCulture is one of the largest destinations for curated, contemporary photography from around the world. We are committed to discovering and promoting the best of the global photography community, continually seeking new work from every continent and from diverse points of view: documentary, fine art, photojournalism, street photography, conceptual, portrait, landscape, and more. 

Our mission is simple: expose the best in contemporary photography to the largest audience possible. We believe talented photographers deserve access to exposure that can lead to valuable, career-building opportunities.

The Guardian named LensCulture “One of the most authoritative and wide-ranging sites”. 

The Independent described LensCulture as “A definitive resource for anyone who wants to keep up with the latest trends and debates in contemporary photography.”

Name: Adored Boudoir Photography
Description: A full service boudoir portrait studio specializing in women. We are an all female staff with experience in posing, lighting and providing women to make them look and feel their best. How will the empowering experience of boudoir change the direction of your life?

Name: DepositPhotos
Description:
DepositPhotos by VistaPrint is a global creative platform offering over 300 million royalty-free images, videos, and music files—designed to help businesses, creators, and brands bring their ideas to life.

Founded in 2009, DepositPhotos has grown into one of the world’s leading stock content marketplaces, trusted by over 40 million users. In 2021, we joined the VistaPrint family, becoming part of a broader ecosystem that brings together world-class design, marketing, and print solutions.

Today, we continue to deliver the trusted experience our customers have relied on for over a decade, while swiftly adapting to global creative shifts, technological innovation, and the needs of a fast-moving world:
 A massive library of 300M+ licensed assets
 AI-powered tools for smarter search and seamless content editing
 Flexible plans for individuals, teams, and enterprises
 API access, enterprise-level solutions, and custom support
 Expanded capabilities through VistaPrint’s design and marketing network

Together with VistaCreate and 99designs by VistaPrint, we’re on a mission to build a more connected creative ecosystem—enabling you to go from idea to impact faster, smarter, and more effortlessly than ever.

Name: Fotografía Profesional
Description: Considero mi site como un espacio de primera aproximación a mis trabajos y por ende a mi persona. Son trabajos realizados a lo largo del tiempo para diferentes empresas. Paralelamente, una vez a la semana, las fotografías de caracter personales que voy realizando las subo en Faceboock: Martín Franchi - Fotografías

Name: ASMP: The American Society of Media Photographers
Description: The American Society of Media Photographers (ASMP) is the premier trade association for photographers who create images primarily for publication. Founded in 1944, ASMP is the leader in promoting photographers’ rights, providing education in better business practices, producing business publications for photographers, and helping to connect art buyers with professional photographers. ASMP has 39 chapters across the country and its members include many of the world’s foremost photographers.

Name: Smashbox Studios
Description:
Founded in 1990 by Dean and Davis Factor, great grandsons of acclaimed Hollywood makeup artist Max Factor, Smashbox is known throughout the industry as a hub for world-class photographers and directors to shoot important content for major magazines, ad campaigns, music & entertainment projects and brand visuals. 

In 1996, Dean and Davis launched Smashbox Cosmetics, the leading global beauty brand.

Name: FliqaIndia
Description:
FliqaIndia is one of India’s leading creative-tech platforms, offering high-quality photography, videography, and end-to-end content production services across the country. Since 2019, we have been transforming how individuals, couples, and brands capture and preserve their most important moments. Our network of verified photographers, cinematographers, editors, and creative partners helps us deliver consistent quality at scale.

We combine creativity with technology to ensure a seamless experience—from booking and planning to shoot execution, delivery, and support. With thousands of successful projects completed, FliqaIndia has become a trusted name for weddings, corporate productions, lifestyle content, product shoots, and digital storytelling.

Our Services Include:
• Wedding Photography & Cinematic Videography
• Pre-Wedding Shoots & Lifestyle Storytelling
• Corporate Films, Event Coverage & Commercial Ads
• Product Shoots, Branding Content & Social Media Creatives
• Short-form Reels, Promotional Videos & Graphic Design
• Nationwide Network of Verified Creative Professionals

What Makes Us Different:
• Strong creative partner network across India
• Standardised workflow and transparent processes
• Tech-enabled project tracking and timely delivery
• Curated talent pool to match every budget and style
• Reliable customer support and consistent quality output

Our Vision:
To redefine India’s creative ecosystem by making professional photography, videography, and content production accessible, efficient, and technology-driven.

Our Mission:
To empower individuals and brands by crafting meaningful visuals and unforgettable moments, while building one of India’s most trusted creative networks.

FliqaIndia continues to grow with a commitment to innovation, storytelling, and customer satisfaction—capturing memories and creating moments that last a lifetime.

Description: Sami Noiri Photography produces high impact editorial, brand campaign, and special assignment work - still and video.

Name: Garage Studio
Description:
At Garage Studio, we redefine what a creative space can be. Based in Dubai, we proudly offer exclusive studios, production services, and creative solutions tailored for global brands, professionals, and creators.

 Our Studios

Rain Studio – A one-of-a-kind setup for cinematic water effects, perfect for fashion, music videos, and artistic campaigns.

Underwater Studio – A creative space that blends water and light for bold, immersive visuals.

Podcast Studio – Fully equipped for professional podcast recording, with high-quality audio and video setups.

Rental Studio – Flexible photography and videography studio space, designed to adapt to your creative needs.

 Production & Creative Services

Photography & Videography – From portraits and commercials to cinematic campaigns.

Video Production & Post-Production – Concept to polished delivery, including editing and sound.

Event Coverage – Capturing the energy of corporate, lifestyle, and entertainment events.

Creative Direction & Styling – Turning ideas into brand-aligned storytelling.

 Location & Permit Services

Navigating UAE’s filming permits can be complex — we simplify it. Our team secures government and private permissions, ensuring smooth productions at unique locations.

 Let’s connect and create unforgettable visuals.

Name: PIER59 Studios
Description:
PIER59 Studios is the ultimate playground for creators, storytellers, and visionaries.

As the largest multimedia production complex in NYC, we offer cutting-edge Virtual Production, customizable studio spaces, and a luxurious venue. For 3 decades, we’ve partnered with the world’s most iconic brands to craft bold campaigns, immersive events, and unforgettable moments.

What We Offer:
 • Studios: Eleven flexible, column-free spaces with daylight and blackout options.
 • Virtual Production: The largest LED stage in the Northeast, complete with real-time CGI, Unreal Engine integration, and immersive lighting.
 • Events: Over 110,000 sq. ft. of adaptable space for activations, galas, and brand launches, featuring Hudson River views.
 • Hospitality: Studio Café with Tuscan-inspired dishes, curated catering, and a stunning outdoor deck for relaxing or networking.
 • Full-Service Production: From pre-concept to post-production, including equipment rentals, technical crew, and talent sourcing.

Step into a world where innovation and creativity collide. 
Let’s make something extraordinary.

Name: MAC Group
Description:
31 years ago, MAC Group started as a boutique marketing, sales and distribution group focusing on professional photographers. As the image creation industry has evolved, so has MAC Group, growing their photographic product offerings while expanding into film and video, content creation and audio. 

Today, MAC Group is one of the leading companies of its kind in the world, with renowned brands offering products that enhance the lives of passionate content creators and storytellers at every experience level from students to the highest echelons of working professionals. 

MAC Group’s mission is to provide photographers, filmmakers, content creators, students and educators with the finest tools available to help them bring their vision to life.

MAC Group is an incredibly passionate and entrepreneurial company with a three-point focus:

Our Marketing Group builds brands for our partners and creates ongoing messaging for their varied consumer targets across every possible communication channel. 
 
Our Sales Group focuses on reseller channels and online marketplaces as well as educational institutions and organizations.
 
Our Distribution Group handles all aspects of customer service, finance, warehousing shipping as well as servicing every product we sell.

MAC Group is proud to represent highly-respected, market-leading brands and companies who are committed to providing the very best tools and technologies to demanding consumers. Each category and brand team operates as an independent company within MAC Group, leveraging all of MAC Group's marketing, sales, logistical and developmental expertise as well as the global relationships, distribution opportunities and cross-category synergies that we are able to provide. 

MAC Group has offices in the U.S., Europe and China.

MAC Group believes innovation is seeing what everybody sees, but thinking what nobody thinks.

Name: ZUMA Press
Description:
ZUMA \'zü-mä\ n 1 : a really amazing picture agency 2 : Mayan for new day, solution, new vision 3 : Scott Mc Kiernan's loveable black lab. 

Started in the early 1990s by photojournalists for photojournalists - not shareholders or billionaires - ZUMA Press is now the world's largest independent press agency and wire service. 

ZUMA Press, produces award-winning news, sports and entertainment content and represents some of the greatest photojournalists, media groups, newspapers and picture agencies around the globe. ZUMA's staff of 50+ represents over 3,000 photographers worldwide and over 60 of the world's best picture agencies spanning the planet, as well as over 100 newspapers and the daily feed and archive of 33 publishing giants. ZUMA's photographers have won numerous awards, including the Pulitzer, World Press, BOP and POYi. ZUMA features a diverse library of over 12 million original pictures online, with upwards of 10,000 new images posted daily. Get the full picture. Get ZUMA. 

Scott Mc Kiernan, CEO/Founder of ZUMA, created the first downloadable editorial picture Website in 1992. As a B-to-B Internet pioneer in digital-image transmission--even before Net usage became widespread--ZUMA soon became a leader. 

Founded in 1993 and incorporated in 1995, ZUMA Press remains independent and photographer-owned. ZUMA is headquartered in San Clemente, California, with major bureaus in Hollywood, London and New York, as well as other locations worldwide.

Name: Photobooth Supply Co
Description:
Photobooth Supply Co. is reinventing the idea of photobooths with open spaces, marketing tools, and elegant aesthetics that allow you to thrive. You might be a business looking to expand your marketing through data collection and social outreach. You might be an individual looking for a chance to establish a brand and chase the American dream of entrepreneurship. Photobooth Supply Co. can help you do it all with hardware and solutions 

The iconic Salsa photobooth brings a suite of tools for existing businesses. If you’re looking to expand your marketing efforts, you’ll be able to deploy a booth at a trade show and gather the email addresses of hundreds of smiling guests. Rather than being stuck with a business email or attempting to cold email a list, you can deliver a personalized message into the inbox of every passerby. If you’ve got a retail location, you can design a permanently installed booth with easy followup emails that suggest a visit to clients, survey capture, real-time brand engagement and more. Salsa provides brand engagement and social content at the highest level. 

Salsa is a perfect fit for someone beginning their journey of business ownership. Unlike a franchise, you don’t owe Photobooth Supply Co. any of your profits or success. This means that when you’re advertising any of the Salsa exclusive features instant uploads to an online live gallery, you’re keeping the money that each booking generates.

Name: Lifetouch Portrait Studios
Description:
For more than 80 years, Lifetouch has been the professional photography company of choice for schools and families. Headquartered in Eden Prairie, MN., the enterprise is organized around four primary business units operating in local communities across North America.

Built on the tradition of “Picture Day”, Lifetouch captures smiling faces from preschool through high school graduation, as well as sports, special events, seniors and yearbooks; and also serves customers in JCPenney Portrait Studios and Church communities.

Lifetouch is also proud to be a part of the Shutterfly family of brands.

Name: Pixlr Online AI Photo Editor
Description: Pixlr.com is an AI-powered photo editing and graphic design suite used by more than 10 million users from around the world. Initially offering a web-based platform for basic photo editing, it quickly gained popularity due to its user-friendly interface and accessible features. Explore a world where your imagination has no limits, and every creative artwork is a possibility.

Name: ASMP: The American Society of Media Photographers
Description: The American Society of Media Photographers (ASMP) is the premier trade association for photographers who create images primarily for publication. Founded in 1944, ASMP is the leader in promoting photographers’ rights, providing education in better business practices, producing business publications for photographers, and helping to connect art buyers with professional photographers. ASMP has 39 chapters across the country and its members include many of the world’s foremost photographers.

Name: Hallmark Institute of Photography
Description:
Hallmark Institute of Photography is a photography school that provides a real world approach to a professional photographic education, where training is completed within ten months. Our objective is to successfully educate and graduate professional photographers with the technical, artistic and business skills necessary for success. Upon completion of our program, graduates can expect to open their own photographic business or fill entry-level employment positions in the diverse and competitive marketplace of today's professional imaging industry. To fulfill our goals, we use only the most up-to-date technology, highly experienced and qualified staff, and a logical and realistic set of standards and processes, providing each of our students the tools they need to succeed.

Hallmark Institute of Photography is a dynamic community sustained by a passion for learning and sharing. We offer a stimulating, rigorous program in professional photography and imaging arts in an environment where creative energy flows, new ideas are developed and talent emerges.

Instructors create learning experiences that foster intellectual curiosity and imagination grounded in disciplined study. Students find their individual voice through open discussion, independent thought, hands on learning, respectful dissent, and the pursuit of continuous challenges.

Name: GuruShots
Description:
GuruShots is reinventing the way people interact with their photos, making it more exciting and rewarding.

How does it work?
Start your journey in GuruShots as a Newbie and take part in daily photo challenges that place your photos against others taken by people from all over the world. Work your way up from Newbie to Guru status by receiving peer votes, points and achievements. By submitting your photos and voting for other people’s photos that you like, you receive instant feedback and huge exposure from millions of photography fans worldwide.

 It’s fun, social and helps improve photo-taking skills
 Challenge Yourself; Stay motivated!

Name: Nikon  France
Description:
« Au cœur de l'image. » Voilà le défi que Nikon ose relever.

Chaque être humain appréhende le monde différemment : joie, tristesse, émerveillement, espoir... et il existe tant d'autres sensibilités encore. Grâce à l'image, nous pouvons capter ces élans du cœur pour les exposer avec force à la face du monde. L'image nous présente le monde sous un tout nouveau jour et, par là même, elle peut influer sur nos vies. Les images ont ainsi le pouvoir inouï d'inspirer l'esprit humain. Pour Nikon, l'image est le seul support qui possède le potentiel requis pour exprimer toute la richesse des émotions. Notre souhait le plus cher est de continuer à explorer ce potentiel. Chez Nikon, nous cherchons précisément à développer nos sensibilités. C'est un processus essentiel qui confère une nouvelle valeur à l'image, et notre secret pour vous donner l'envie de suivre les élans de votre cœur.

A multi-functional spaces that offers diversified exhibiting areas, a rich exhibition program, movies projections, lectures and other educational activities. FORMA also hosts a specialized bookshop and a Print Room, which offers fine art photography prints for sale.

Name: Photo London
Description:
Photo London is the leading fair for celebrating the past, present, and future of Photography.  
 
Created to give London an international photography event befitting the city’s status as a global cultural capital, Photo London has established itself as a world-class photography fair and as a catalyst for London’s dynamic photography community.  
 
Based in the grand surroundings of Somerset House in London’s West End, Photo London takes over the entire site every May to bring together many of the world’s leading galleries, dealers, artists, curators, and collectors, as well as providing a platform for emerging galleries and artists pushing the boundary of the medium.  
 
Each edition of the Fair sees a unique Public Programme including special exhibitions and installations; and several Awards announced, headlined by the Photo London Master of Photography Award. 
  
Beyond the Fair, Photo London regularly hosts Pre-Fair Talks with major institutions, auction houses, galleries and the burgeoning creative communities in the East End and South London, presenting a series of year-round Satellite Events. 
   
Photo London is produced by Candlestar, an internationally renowned cultural consultancy with an outstanding reputation within the field of photography and the arts. Candlestar produces the Prix Pictet on behalf of the Pictet Group.

Name: TRUNK ARCHIVE
Description:
Trunk Archive is a full service image licensing agency representing the most engaging and sought after contemporary photographers.

Providing a unique, intelligent and forward-thinking alternative to the traditional resources for existing imagery, the agency also serves as a creative partner by offering complimentary image research and visual strategy consultation.

With an extensive network and formalized partnerships in the entertainment, publishing and fashion industries, Trunk Archive is uniquely positioned to offer clients unprecedented, comprehensive support.

The archive contains approximately 1M images covering fashion, celebrity, beauty, lifestyle, still life, design, architecture and travel. Hundreds of new images are added to the archive each week as the agency continues its mission to make extraordinary and in many cases previously unseen art available to clients.

Trunk Archive is part of Great Bowery. They have reimagined the traditional agency approach by uniting a diverse range of globally recognized luxury image-makers with creative strategists to offer clients end to end service from project inception to full scale execution. Across the entire collective, their services include creative, artist representation, image licensing, and distribution strategy. Founded in 2015 with headquarters in New York City and London, their clients are comprised of the world’s most iconic companies spanning fashion, beauty, Web3, technology, and more. 

Brandsthat are part of Great Bowery are B&A, Bowie, CLM, Gallery Stock,Granted, GB3 (innovation), GBI, Lookbooks, M.A.P, Streeters, and Trunk Archive.

Name: Dreamstime
Description:
Dreamstime is a distinguished leader in stock photography and a major supplier of high quality digital images at unbelievable prices. All stock images available are provided by Dreamstime community's photographers, shot on film or digital and approved by our editors. Structured on categories and subcategories, the database is renewed with thousands of fresh images and titles on a daily basis.

Dreamstime provides imagery to an infinite gamut of clients in the creative market from independent customers in the private sector to Fortune 500 companies (including the world's largest advertising agencies, national and international magazines, film and television production companies).

Name: Agence VU'
Description:
Since it was founded in 1986, VU’ has consistently defended auteur photography while avoiding passing fads and never compromising in its ethical and aesthetic choices. VU’ has always set a very high standard of quality in its quest to identify, reveal and represent the best contemporary photographers without excluding any style or field of activity, and by innovating and developing new forms of communication through photography. 

Ranging from short news reports to in-depth investigations published in the national and international press, the designing of exhibitions to the coproduction of web documentaries and innovative multimedia projects, from formal works to personal stories published by leading publishing houses, VU’ Agency is at the service of institutions and companies with a hundred photographers whose works are regularly exhibited, published and awarded the most prestigious international prizes. The team at VU’, who work in close collaboration with the photographers on a daily basis, show exemplary loyalty and commit to each project with passion, inventiveness and attention to detail. 

VU’ is also a laboratory constantly experimenting with new approaches in photography and reflecting on the role of photography in the world of images, information, communication, and culture.

SuperStock’s collection includes Royalty Free (RF), Rights Managed (RM) and Subscription stock images for every need and budget with subjects covering lifestyle, business, industry, architecture, food, animals, medical, travel and culture.

Name: FUJIFILM CANADA INC.
Description:
Beginning in 1934 as Japan's pioneering photographic film maker, Fujifilm has leveraged its imaging and information technology to become a global presence in healthcare, graphic arts, optical devices, highly functional materials and other high-tech areas.

At Fujifilm, we are continuously innovating — creating new technologies, products, and services that inspire and excite people everywhere. We take an open and flexible attitude to innovation, combining our own original technology with human resources, expertise, and technology from around the world. Through this powerful synergy, we rapidly and nimbly develop new solutions that address the true needs of our global customers.

We have an open, fair and clear workplace culture allowing us to discern objective facts in a sincere and straightforward manner, make rational decisions, and continuously take on challenges. With this corporate culture, we are consistently creating new value and exercising pioneering leadership.

Did you know that Fujifilm developed the world’s first digital camera? In 1988 at the Photokina trade fair in Germany, Fujifilm announced the FUJIX DS-1P, the world’s first camera to save data to a semiconductor memory card. Jump ahead almost 30 years, in 2016, we celebrated our 5th Anniversary of our X-Series line of Prosumer Digital Cameras revolutionizing the digital camera market. The Instax line of Consumer Products has brought excitement and fun back to developing photos again - especially for young teenagers and millennials. 

FUJIFILM Canada's head office is located in Mississauga, ON, Canada. This office includes Finance, Operations, Sales and Marketing functions for the Canadian market. The Canadian office markets and provides services for a broad spectrum of industries including digital and instant film photographic products; industrial segments including photofinishing products, data storage, electronic materials and graphic arts products and services.

Name: Instituto Português de Fotografia
Description:
Fundado em 1968, o IPF foi a primeira escola de fotografia em Portugal. 

Nasceu como resposta à necessidade de compreender as práticas empíricas dos fotógrafos e ao facto de não haver em Portugal nenhuma instituição onde esses conhecimentos pudessem ser adquiridos de forma sistematizada. Desde esse ano, em Lisboa, e desde 2000, no Porto, o IPF tem vindo a recriar a forma de ensinar fotografia. A oferta de formação do Instituto é periodicamente avaliada para dar resposta às necessidades, atuais e futuras, do mercado.

O IPQ reconheceu o IPF como Organismo de Normalização Sectorial para a Fotografia que lhe dá competência para a elaboração de normas portuguesas originais e tradução de normas ISO. Também a Direção-Geral do Emprego e das Relações de Trabalho (DGERT) certificou o IPF como Entidade Formadora.

A nossa Visão: Ensinar a expressar cada forma de olhar

A nossa Missão: Promover a Fotografia através da Formação, Actividade Cultural e Prestação de serviços a Amadores, Profissionais, Empresas e Sociedade em geral, baseando-se numa cultura organizacional que promove o Sentido de Comunidade, Criatividade, Inovação e Crescimento Pessoal e Profissional dos colaboradores.

Name: Hedrich Blessing Photographers
Description:
Hedrich Blessing is the preeminent photography studio serving the architectural, design, construction, furniture and related building product manufacturing communities.

Our services include: on location and studio assignments, stock photography sales, fine art prints and studio rental.  

We are located just one mile west of the Merchandise Mart in Chicago, on the corner of Kinzie and Peoria.

State of the art and competitively priced, Hedrich Blessing has been creatively articulating our clients' vision since 1929. 


ORIGINAL ASSIGNMENTS

We are happy to provide a quote for original photographic assignments. 


STOCK PHOTOGRAPHY

Hedrich Blessing's library contains an extensive collection of architectural and interior photography from 1980 to the present; including images of urban views, university campuses, museums, theaters, civic institutions, industry, aerial views, public parks, and much more.

FINE ART PRINTS

Most images on our website are available as fine art prints, produced by our digital artists and available in a variety of sizes.

TRAVELING EXHIBITION

Building Images: Seventy Years of Photography at Hedrich Blessing has been on tour since 2003. The exhibition contains eighty images from Hedrich Blessing photographers exemplifying their refined vision of architecture and design.

Please visit The Guest Curator online for information about viewing and/or hosting the exhibition.

Name: Chris Burkard Studio
Description:
About Chris:

Chris Burkard is an accomplished explorer, photographer, creative director, speaker, and author. Traveling throughout the year to pursue the farthest expanses of Earth, Burkard works to capture stories that inspire humans to consider their relationship with nature, while promoting the preservation of wild places everywhere.

Layered by outdoor, travel, adventure, surf, and lifestyle subjects, Burkard is known for images that are punctuated by untamed, powerful landscapes. Through social media chris strives to share his vision of wild places with millions of people, and to inspire them to explore for themselves.

His visionary perspective has earned him opportunities to work on global, prominent campaigns with Fortune 500 clients, speak on the TED stage, design product lines, educate, and publish a growing collection of books. Along with his team, Burkard is based out of his production studio and art gallery in the Central Coast of California.

At the age of 30, Burkard has established himself as a global presence and influencer. He is happiest with his wife Breanne raising their two sons Jeremiah and Forrest in his hometown of Pismo Beach, California

Name: CGI Backgrounds
Description:
www.CGIBackgrounds.com - We can take you anywhere.

A picture may be worth a thousand words, but there’s definitely ONE word in the creative industry powerful enough to make people sit up and take notice: EVOLVE. That one word created our company.

We work in an industry that reinvents itself every day. That’s why when technology starts to break down barriers of how things used to be done, and how things can be done with leading edge technology, the smart ones harness the power and ride it to the top. That’s exactly what our clients are doing.

Welcome to CGIBackgrounds.com, the World’s Largest Library of digital photographic environments. Founded in 2004, CGIBackgrounds.com is an entire site of world-class photography for the creative industry.

Whether your budget won’t allow for the shoot that you want, or your shoot got rained out, or you’re just looking to build the sweetest comps that will show your talent - this is your automotive background wonderland.

Whatever you’re looking for in backgrounds, we have it. The right place and the right angle is waiting for you to strip or render in your vehicle. And if you’re in the mood to create your own fantasy world or backdrop, you can do that too by mixing and matching different elements and backgrounds. You can render or strip vehicles into our backgrounds with substantial time and savings over traditional methods. 

From advertising agencies, design firms, rendering studios, web agencies, manufacturer design groups and marketing companies, our clients represent the world.

Specialties: Global professional automotive and landscape photographer network providing high-resolution location photography. Continually updated, and option for location specific shoots. Instant access to medium resolution comp downloads and same day custom search results.

Name: Sipa Press
Description:
Créée en 1973 par Göksin Sipahioglu, figure visionnaire du photojournalisme, Sipa Press est aujourd'hui l’une des principales agences de presse photo dans le monde.

Sipa Press couvre l’ensemble de l’actualité mondiale grâce à une rédaction basée à Paris, un réseau mondial de plus de 1 000 correspondants et des accords de distribution exclusifs avec de nombreuses agences étrangères dont Associated Press, Shutterstock, News Syndication, Caters, TT News, Wenn, Hollandse Hoogte, Isopix et Newscom. Sipa Press diffuse ainsi quotidiennement plus de 12 000 photos à destination des plus grands médias internationaux : presse quotidienne et magazine, télévision ou Internet. 
Du sujet clé en main aux images inédites, des enjeux de sociétés aux scoops du moment, Sipa Press est toujours à l'avant-garde visuelle de l'information. 
L'agence exploite un fonds d'archives incontournable de plus de 20 millions de photos régulièrement sollicité pour des rétrospectives, des expositions ou l'édition de livres. 
Par sa maîtrise de la chaîne de l'image et de la communication, Sipa Press réalise également des productions institutionnelles ou « corporate » de grande ampleur et conçoit des grands projets d'exposition ou globaux comme « Les Chemins de l'Ecole », actuellement en tournée internationale. 
Reprise en 2013 par des professionnels de la photo de presse, l'agence a consolidé son actionnariat et s'est donnée les moyens d'une nouvelle expansion.

Name: CEWE France
Description:
Créé en Allemagne en 1961, CEWE est un groupe entrepreneurial et innovant, leader européen de l’impression photo (livres photo, décorations murales, calendriers, tirages photo, cartes…). CEWE compte aujourd’hui plus de 4 000 salariés dans 21 pays et imprime dans ses 14 laboratoires européens. La marque est reconnue pour ses valeurs historiques : fiable, passionnée, humaine et responsable, ainsi que pour la qualité de ses produits et services.
 
Soucieux de son impact, CEWE développe une ambitieuse politique environnementale: tous les papiers d’impression du LIVRE PHOTO CEWE sont certifiés FSC (FSC-C101851), certains produits proposent l’utilisation de papier recyclé, et les émissions carbone de l’ensemble des produits CEWE sont compensées, notamment par un projet de reforestation.
 
En 2025, CEWE confirme son leadership en remportant trois prix aux TIPA World Awards, dont «Meilleur Service Photo» pour la 8e année consécutive, récompensant l’excellence de notre calendrier mural Fineline, le LIVRE PHOTO CEWE à double page panoramique, et notre technologie de mise en page intelligente basée sur l’IA. Ces distinctions valorisent notre engagement constant pour l’innovation et la qualité, au service de vos plus beaux souvenirs. 

Merci pour votre confiance !

Plus d’informations sur: www.cewe.fr

Name: Gump
Description:
Gump is all about empowering creators with technology. 

Our mission is to infuse our world with more creativity, passion and memories. In 2 years, our platform has already supported over 11,000 photographers and 500,000 end users, transferring more than 20 million photos across 1,700 cities in Southeast Asia. 
 
While we began as a utility tool to solve real problems in photographers’ workflow, we are now the largest active photographer community in the whole of Southeast Asia (Vietnam and Indonesia, in particular), strategically-positioned in the new creator economy that is now worth over US$104 billion. 
 
Photos on our platform are exclusive assets that have tremendous value to various marketers, brands and corporations. They could unlock important value for the traditional stock photography market which typically lacks Asian faces, candid (non-staged) images and an efficient mechanism for acquiring model consents. 

Our photos are also the seeds to rights to NFTs or different forms of generative art. These have been validated through our recent successful partnerships with some of the biggest stock photography companies in the world. 
 
In our second year of business amid the pandemic, we are on track to surpass US$ 1 million in revenue in 2022. We are excited by the opportunities as we work towards our next phase on creator discovery and monetization. We are also tapping into web3 applications to create meaningful impact for our next-gen community.

Name: Phooto Brasil
Description:
Com o progresso das câmeras digitais e dos smartphones, capturamos hoje mais fotos do que nunca. Mas afinal, o que fazemos com estas fotos? Além de compartilharmos nas redes sociais, e ocasionalmente olharmos no nosso celular, será que estamos de fato eternizando nossos melhores momentos?
A Phooto nasceu há 12 anos, com o objetivo de auxiliar as pessoas a preservarem e compartilharem seus momentos, de forma real e envolvente.
Compartilhar, é sentar-se junto a família e amigos para relembrar momentos inesquecíveis como, seu casamento, o nascimento do seu filho e/ou a viagem de férias especial. É ter uma foto revelada com cuidado ou um Fotolivro com a melhor qualidade para olhar e se emocionar. É exibir na sua parede um incrível quadro. É presentear quem amamos de maneira simples e afetuosa. 
A qualidade dos nossos produtos está acima de qualquer outra no mercado, com preços acessíveis e um atendimento diferenciado, onde nos conduziram a ser o maior site de fotos do Brasil.
Já fazemos parte da vida de mais de 3 milhões de clientes que confiaram a nós os seus momentos mais valiosos. Convidamos você a eternizar os seus momentos também. 

Visite o nosso site e os outros diversos produtos ofertados!

Name: FOTO FACTORY FOTOGRAFIA  srl - Studio Fotografico
Description:
LA BELLEZZA E’ LA NOSTRA MISSIONE
Trasformiamo ogni Prodotto in Oggetto del Desiderio
per sviluppare il Business delle Aziende.


STILL LIFE: IL PRODOTTO NON BASTA
Non è sufficiente avere un buon prodotto e le luci giuste, serve la competenza dell’occhio umano che vede.
Nel nostro settore esistono, come altrove, persone che sanno vedere e altre che non sanno nemmeno guardare.
Gli occhi per guardare li hanno tutti, gli occhi per vedere richiedono sensibilità, affinità e corrispondenza con gli obiettivi del cliente.

FOTOGRAFIA: QUESTIONE DI VISIONE
La fotografia è una visione.
Dipende dal punto di vista e dalla sensibilità creativa dell’occhio di chi guarda.
Racconta la storia dell’OGGETTO guardato, ritratto e mostrato.
Il VALORE del PRODOTTO si esprime attraverso la luce particolare che lo Studio Fotografico professionale riesce a irradiare sull’oggetto fotografato.

TI MOSTRIAMO I PRODOTTI COME LI VEDRANNO I TUOI CLIENTI
La fotografia ha bisogno di tempo, perché quando si fa uno scatto bisogna pensare a molte variabili, da come mettere le luci, al punto di vista in cui si posiziona con la macchina fotografica.
Ti proponiamo degli scatti per farti vedere il tuo prodotto in modo diverso: come lo potrebbe vedere il tuo cliente.

PRODOTTI COME STAR
Quando realizziamo SCATTI AMBIENTATI creiamo micro-narrazioni in cui il prodotto diventa il soggetto di una scena, stimolando la curiosità dei consumatori e degli acquirenti.
Scarpe al centro di un flusso di emozioni.
Zainetti che raccontano viaggi.
Macchine per il caffè che ci introducono in ambienti dove, da un momento all’altro, accadrà qualcosa.
Spesso non ci sono persone, ma la presenza umana è il sottile profumo che emana dall’aspettativa creata in questi scenari.
Cosa sta per succedere?
Soprattutto: chi sarà l’eroe di questa storia?

Per assaggiare il gusto della creatività e sperimentare i vantaggi - in termini di tempo e denaro - delle soluzioni che proponiamo, contattaci
+39 041 268 94 51
+39 334 16 47 555

Name: Suprema s.r.l
Description:
Suprema rendering and animation ( studio che si occupa di rendering per architettura fondato nel 1998 ) che, attraverso l’uso sapiente e innovativo della grafica 3D, costruisce immagini dallo straordinario valore impressivo. 
Con cura, attenzione e professionalità raccontiamo al mondo il prodotto dei nostri clienti. La filosofia che ci distingue è un'idea in movimento volta alla realtà contemporanea e contaminata dagli infiniti linguaggi che l'attraversano. 
Noi di Suprema abbiamo sviluppato nel corso di anni di lavoro tecniche innovative abbinate alla storia della fotografia industriale, la sintesi di questa ricerca ci ha condotto a realizzare immagini che coniugano qualità delle produzioni e riduzione dei costi. 
Offriamo ai nostri clienti servizi nell'ambito della produzione di immagini destinate alla stampa di cataloghi e più in generale ad attività di marketing sul prodotto. Dedichiamo ai nostri clienti un servizio di rendering fotorealistico di altissima qualità che chiamiamo virtual set, per l'attenzione e la cura che dedichiamo alla progettazione, alla composizione della scena, alla fotografia e alla elaborazione finale dell'immagine. 
Al fianco dei nostri clienti siamo un partner affidabile che garantisce tempi di consegna certi e rapidi. 
Attraverso il nostro team composto da architetti, stylist, visionari, modellatori 3d ed esperti di rendering possiamo sviluppare una mole di lavoro anche importante con la garanzia della nostra qualità. Le immagini prodotte sono ad altissima definizione e sono pronte per essere inviate agli addetti della pre stampa. Il 3D ci permette di superare i limiti fisici delle costruzioni in set, liberando la creatività su nuovi orizzonti spaziali e quindi progettuali.

Name: BFF - Berufsverband Freie Fotografen und Filmgestalter e.V.
Description:
WER IST DER BFF?		
Der BFF – Berufsverband Freie Fotografen und Filmgestalter e.V. – steht für höchste Qualität in den Bereichen Fotografie und Bildgestaltung. Dafür bürgen die aktuell rund 530 Mitglieder des Verbandes. Es handelt sich dabei ausschließlich um stilbildende Fotografen aus den Bereichen Werbung und Editorial sowie innovative Filmgestalter und Hochschullehrer für Fotografie.

Auf Grundlage seines hohen ästhetischen Anspruchs vertritt der BFF seit 50 Jahren die Interessen seiner Mitglieder. Dabei liegt das Augenmerk nicht nur auf der klassischen Fotografie sondern ebenso auf den kreativen Möglichkeiten neuer Bildmedien. 

Mit Mappenschauen, Tagungen und Regionaltreffen gestaltet der BFF die Diskussionen um die Zukunft der Fotografie. Aktiv kümmert er sich um die Wahrung der Wirtschafts- und Arbeitsbedingungen seiner Mitglieder und berät diese in allen Fragen rund um Bildschutz, Urheber-, Steuer- und Künstlersozialversicherungsrecht. Dem hohen Qualitätsanspruch wird der Verband mit Ausstellungen, Publikationen sowie renommierten Wettbewerben gerecht.

Description:

I don’t just shoot pretty pictures; I work with property developers, architects and interior designers to help them put more in their pocket at the end of a job.

Whether it’s asking for a higher selling price or proving work has been done on time, photography is a great way to achieve this.

Name: sichtbart.art

Name: VIEW Pictures Ltd
Description: VIEW represents 60 of the world's most highly respected and talented photographers of architecture and interior design. Architects, engineers, designers and the international architectural press regularly commission our photographers. We have photographed the work of the world's leading architects including Renzo Piano, Jean Nouvel, Frank Gehry, Herzog & de Meuron, Zaha Hadid, Norman Foster and Richard Rogers for example. Photographs of the most significant new buildings from all over the world are continually added to our collection. Classic modern buildings, historic structures all kinds of residential dwellings are also covered.

Name: CEWE Norge
Description:
CEWE Japan Photo er Skandinavias største fotokjede, med 23 butikker i Norge. Vi leverer høy kvalitet enten du bestiller en CEWE FOTOBOK, printer ut bilder ved hjelp av våre CEWE Fotostasjoner som står klare til bruk i alle våre butikker, eller om du kjøper fotoutstyr av topp kvalitet. Vi har et stort utvalg av spennende produkter!

Vi ELSKER foto og ønsker å bidra til gode fotoopplevelser, og at gode blinkskudd ikke blir liggende på mobilen eller bortgjemt på en harddisk. Vi tror at ett bilde på veggen er bedre enn 10 på mobilen, og at gode minner gjør seg aller best i en personlig og unik CEWE FOTOBOK. 

CEWE Japan Photo er eid av CEWE, som er Europas største fotolaboratoriekjede, med virksomhet i 24 land. Japan Photo ble etablert i Danmark i 1985, og sommeren 1990 ble den første butikken i Norge åpnet. Hovedkontoret vårt ligger på Bjørndal i Oslo.

Description: At Cromstar, we go beyond our call to deliver quality and creative images by partnering with our clients to ensure they successfully achieve their set goals. We offer makeup services, Studio photography, Outdoor Photography, Photo Editing, Photo Printing, Photo Framing, Canvassing, Professional Makeup Services, Makeup Accessories Sale and lots more!

Name: Candid Color Systems
Description:
Candid Color Systems was established in 1972 and has been the leader in special events photo finishing and photography for over 25 years. Our goal has been to provide our customers with fast, premium quality photofinishing and, simultaneously, provide marketing methods and tools, which results in a competitive advantage in the marketplace. Our customer philosophy is that “Our customers are our partners and friends. We exist solely because of our customers and we are only successful when they are successful.” Candid Color Systems’ goal is the same as yours – to grow your business profitably.

Candid Color Systems takes the lead in using technological advances to offer new products and services.  We're the industry leader in creating and marketing multi-image photographs including the original Attitude panoramic group pictures.  Using cutting edge green screen technology, your customers are able to select their own background and create their own unique image!  We also offer a wide array of marketing tools that help further your business and increase sales. Our customers have the ability to create and manage mass email campaigns, purchase marketing materials for every photographic market (flyers, order forms, banners), as well as access to many free weekly webinars with topics ranging from booking and shooting sports to promoting your business with social media. To find out more visit http://candid.com and open your free account today!

Join our newsletter!

http://snapshots.candid.com/subscribe/


Join us on other websites!

Twitter: https://twitter.com/CandidColor

Name: Tutti's
Description: advertising and editorial professional photographer specialized in portrait, still life, architecture, indoors, outdoors, urban and documentary with over 35 years of experience. He started photography by developing laboratory darkroom techniques and using analog photography. His experienced in creating studio quality images by manually shaping light and avoiding traditional studio equipment like softboxes and system flashes. He first worked as a photojournalist for the comex, french navy, air force and french government intelligence services. He has worked as a freelance reporter covering documentaries in Panama, Costa Rica, Nicaragua, Honduras, El Salvador, Guatemala, Mexico, Peru, in the Caribbean, Cape Verde. He also spent three years teaching photography in a university of Barcelona Spain. In New York he focused on fashion studio photography before returning to France to work in Parisian photographic studios. He now specializes in creating unique visuals through studio photoshoots in the dark. His approach is to use light as a creative tool to enhance the aesthetics of scenes, producing unique photographic creations. This complex method of photography in the dark requires a perfect mastery of light. His professional services include editorial and commercial assignments.
