Name: Digital Art Studio_ES
Description:
Digital Art Studio is a high-end postproduction studio with an integrated 3D unit, based in Madrid. We have been working for over a decade in the digital image industry and we keep searching for challenges to overcome and make the impossible, real.

Our dedicated team of digital retouchers and multiplatform allows us to treat each image and project as needed. That is why we strive to keep up with technical advances and to create a close and direct dialog with each client.

The world of image is constantly changing and we want to be part of it.

Name: RMP srl
Description:
Stop dreaming and open your eyes: you have just found it!

RMP is Milan based and has an in-house team of photographers, stylists, post-producers who work in synergy by optimizing and customizing customer needs, workflow, and dynamically managing image evolution. The higher the commitment, the happier you make them: they are used to managing 35,000 articles a year and producing 350,000 ready-to-use images.

Each phase of the work is managed with a transversal logic: it creates a continuous and uninterrupted flow that pervades Wardrobe and Logistics, it is released in Photography and Styling, to be finalized in Images Retouching and Video Editing.
The core of it all, the protagonist, is BOON, a true digital hub designed to manage all the phases of the process. Impossible to resist the fascination of BOON, its intuitive and open source interface, from which information can be drawn or exported in an instant.

BOON helps minimize management time and reduce errors during the shooting process.

RMP has got international clients including The North Face, Vans, Bikkembergs, Australian, Napapijri, Woolrich, North Sails, Golden Goose, Decatlhon and Namuk.

Name: Parentsfilms
Description: Parent Films is a leading photography and videography firm with over 8 years of experience in capturing life's most significant moments. We specialize in destination weddings, grand wedding functions, and corporate events, offering a unique blend of storytelling and creativity in every frame. Our talented team is dedicated to providing exceptional service and high-quality visuals that preserve the emotions and beauty of your special day. At Parent Films, we believe in crafting timeless memories that you can cherish forever. Join us on our journey to redefine event photography with innovation, passion, and excellence.

Name: Belfast Exposed
Description:
We are an independent, non-profit organisation and registered charity situated in the Cathedral Quarter, Belfast. Founded in 1983 by a group of local photographers as a challenge to media representation of Belfast’s experience of conflict, our work continues to reflect a socially engaged ethos, while responding to contemporary currents in photography and politics further afield.

Belfast Exposed believe photography is for everyone, it is accessible, meaningful and has the ability to tell stories, allowing us to create dialogue and reflect upon our history, inform our present and inspire a positive future. Celebrating photography’s diversity and creativity, Belfast Exposed works with photographers, artists, academics, communities and business partners to explore photography’s powerful ability to make a meaningful contribution to the world.

Belfast Exposed provides a range of services including four public galleries exhibiting work by internationally renowned and local photographers, images from our 'Archive', and our ‘Futures’ programme for emerging artists. We maintain an archive recording the political, cultural and social change in Northern Ireland; we deliver an extensive educational and socially engaged outreach programme; we provide specialised and bespoke training courses for the public; we offer accredited educational programmes for schools and community groups, we provide a range of corporate packages for businesses, and venue hire facilities suitable for meetings, presentations, product launches, networking events and bespoke corporate hospitality.

Name: HR Imaging Partners Inc.
Description:
HR Imaging Partners has been providing schools throughout the Midwest with the highest quality products and services for over 45 years.  We are a second generation, family-owned company committed to quality service, excellent products, and the most innovative technology solutions in the industry - all at the best value to the schools and families we serve.

HR Imaging provides photographic services for Fall and Spring Underclass, Sports, Seniors, Candid work, Dances, and Event Photography.  Our Sales, Photography, and Home Office staff are some of the highest-trained and knowledgeable in our industry.

HR Imaging is also a growing player in the world of Yearbook Publishing, from the smallest soft cover elementary books up to the largest hard cover high school books.  

We pride ourselves on being large enough to offer any product or service, while still being small enough to know our customers by name.

Name: EyeQ Imaging Inc. | Creators of Perfectly Clear
Description:
EyeQ Imaging Inc, previously known as Athentech, is an innovative technology company focused on evolving the way businesses correct and process batch imagery and video. 

Perfectly Clear is the patented core technology that automatically enhances photos and videos pixel by pixel through the perfect balance of real science and artificial intelligence. EyeQ’s imaging suite also includes auto color correction, auto retouching, auto cropping, and more. Currently, Perfectly Clear is used by some of the top companies around the world, including Hallmark, Norwegian Cruise Line, and Strawbridge Studios.

Our award-winning technology automatically corrects over 147 million images per day. We have automatic photo correction solutions for any business, and we even integrate with DP2. Whether you need automatic photo editing in a kiosk, for your lab, or in the cloud, we can help.

Name: Make You Smile Photography
Description:
Nieves Gonzalez, IV is the founding photographer of Make You Smile Photography. He is married to his beautiful wife and is the father of two cute smiling little girls. He and his family are parishioners of St. Laurence Catholic Church. Though he has worked in the IT field for many years, he has been interested in photography since childhood and has been shooting professionally since 2005. Please feel free to visit his portfolio.

Nieves, who goes by “IV,” uses state-of-the-art Canon equipment including “L” glass, and Profoto studio lighting. He edits all his work with the latest versions of Adobe Photoshop and Adobe Lightroom for post-processing on his color corrected monitors with his Macintosh systems.

Make You Smile is a family-oriented business based in Sugar Land, Texas. IV offers a fully equipped studio, or can shoot at a location of your choice, indoors or out. He is happy to take professional, family, candid, or event portraits.

When the shutter clicks, we Make You Smile! :-)

Name: f-stop
Description:
At f-stop, we believe your camera bag should assist you in getting the perfect shot -- not hold you back. That’s why we have created our line of packs and bags with the adventure photographer in mind. Whether you are skiing down the backside of the Alps, climbing in Patagonia, exploring the rain forest in Brazil, or just on holiday, our bags will get your equipment there safely, no matter the conditions.

What is Adventure Photography?

We define adventure photography as photography involving anything that gets the blood moving – Skiing and Snowboarding; Expeditions and Travel; Skateboarding, Roller Blading, and Surfing; Hiking, Camping, and Climbing; Hunting and Fishing; Cycling, Mountain Biking, Adventure Racing and Tri-Athletes. Adventure Photography is about pushing to the limits.

Name: Simataï
Description:
SIMATAÏ est leader dans la post-production d’images.

• Expérience : nous effectuons depuis 15 ans un travail de qualité sur des milliers d’images en production Offshore grâce à une équipe interne rompue aux exigences de nos clients ainsi qu'à un outil de gestion de production unique. 

• Confiance : nos clients comptent parmi les plus prestigieuses entreprises françaises et européennes : sites e-commerce, studios photos, commissaires priseurs, marques de mode ou encore organismes publics nous font confiance depuis des années.

• Expertise : notre studio de fabrication est composé d’opérateurs experts du détourage et de la retouche d’images ainsi que de contrôleurs-qualité. Nous vérifions ainsi systématiquement le travail de nos opérateurs et le corrigeons si nécessaire. Cette méthode vous garantit une qualité zéro défaut.

• Sécurité : vos images circulent sur notre réseau, dans un environnement crypté et sécurisé afin de garantir le respect de vos droits d’auteurs.

Name: FlyHarder - Drone photos & films
Description:
FlyHarder drone photos & films er et enkeltmandsvirksomhed med hjerte og passion på det rette sted. 

Igennem mit fuldtidsarbejde som byggeleder har jeg ageret som dronepilot for mit daværende firma. Det var her min passion voksede og jeg blev drevet af at starte op selv, hvilket er grunden til at jeg grundlagede FlyHarder.

Jeg bliver drevet af mine kunders reaktioner, og yder derfor altid det ekstra for at få det bedst mulige resultat. Jeg kommer aldrig til at aflevere et resultat jeg ikke selv er stolt af.



FlyHarder har adresse midt på Sjælland, og tager derfor som udgangspunkt kun opgaver på Sjælland 

 

Vi stræber efter det ekstraordinære, og stiller os ikke tilfreds før vi opnår kundens forventninger, eller endnu bedre, overgår dem!

Try Harder - it´s worth it!

Name: Walter Luttenberger Photography
Description:
Ich bin seit über 25 Jahren Hotel-, Architektur- und Image-Fotograf, der mit seiner langjähriger Erfahrung Projekte aller Größen, weltweit, leidenschaftlich und professionell umsetzen kann. 

Meine Ausbildung zum Fotografen fand in den späten Achtziger Jahren statt. 1993 startete ich in Frankfurt/Main in die Selbständigkeit und 1995 folgte die Gründung von Walter Luttenberger Photography in Österreich mit dem Schwerpunkt der Architektur- und Referenzfotografie für alle Betriebe, die Ihre Arbeit im Architekturbereich und in der Bauwirtschaft professionell darstellen wollen.

Seitdem fand eine ständige Ausweitung des Einsatzgebietes bis zu weltweiten Einsätzen im Bereich der Hotelfotografie statt. Hier kann ich meine Leidenschaft für die Architektur ideal in meine Fotografie einbringen und meinen, über die Jahre aufgebauten, Bildstil perfekt umsetzen. Mit meinem Gespür für gutes Design und meiner Empathie in der Zusammenarbeit mit einem großen Team, bin ich somit ein idealer Partner für die professionelle Umsetzung von größeren Fotoshootings für Hotelketten und 5-Sterne-Hotels weltweit.

Name: PA Images
Description:
PA Images is a leading provider of news, entertainment, royal, lifestyle and sports photography. The organisation has an archive charting more than 100 years delivering over 30 million images supported by a network of over 40 international picture agencies, supplying up-to-the minute photography on major stories across the UK and around the world.

Contact one of our experts today and we can help to maximise the exposure of your brand.

Great people with even greater ideas for your productions when you might be out of ideas yourself.

Name: HELLIX-IR - Vidéo Photo Drone à Lille
Description:
HELLIX-IR située dans la région de Lille, est spécialisée dans la prise de vue aérienne artistique et technique (photo et vidéo) à l'aide de drones.

 Nous nous adressons essentiellement aux entreprises et institutionnels, même si nous n'excluons pas le particulier.

 Nous assurons la chaîne de traitement complet, depuis la qualification des missions, leur planification, l'obtention des autorisations légales (préfectorales, aériennes, propriétaires, droit à l'image, ...), l'intervention sur site, la post-production, la sous-traitance (voix off, impression, prise de vue au sol, ...), la livraison et tous les aspects administratifs nécessaires à la bonne fin de nos prestations. Notre leitmotiv : La qualité.

Nos matériels sont équipés pour le Full HD ou la 4K et une stabilisation d'image exceptionnelle.

Au-delà de l'aspect artistique, nous réalisons des prises de vues à vocation technique, telles que : la thermographie, l'inspection d'ouvrage ou technique, la photogrammétrie, l'orthomosaïque, le 360°, la 3D ou encore l'observation aérienne.

Nous intervenons dans des domaines variés, tels que l'urbanisme, l'agriculture, l'architecture, le bâtiment, les travaux publics, l'industrie, les carrières, l'archéologie, les associations, le service, les commerces, …

Vous pouvez voir quelques échantillons de notre activités en regardant quelques vidéos sur notre chaîne Youtube : https://www.youtube.com/c/Hellix-ir.

Si vous voulez une vision un peu différente et Web Responsive de notre site web, c'est ici : http://m.hellix-ir.com

#video #photo #drone

Name: Milena Partsuneva Photography
Description:
Once upon a time, there was a girl, who captured moments. She turned them into fairy tales in a way that girls who love fairy tales can. That girl is me 

Hi, my name is Milena. I am a photographer and a PR specialist. I capture moments and emotions and turn them into fairy tales because this is my favorite genre – not only in literature, but also in photography. I did not even know it existed until you called my colors “magical” and my photos – “fairy tales”.

You know that in most fairy tales magic happens either in the enchanted forest or by the mystic river. So does in my photo shoots! 

And unless you have a specific place in mind where you would like your photo session to take place, you are welcome to my beloved and picturesque Pancharevo, Sofia where we could do magic and create your own fairy tale either in the enchanted forest or by the mystic river or by the lake.

Name: PSTFotografía
Description:
PSTFotografía es una empresa joven y apasionada.

Sus componentes, Isa y Pau, trabajan con vocación en cada trabajo que realizan, ya sea, una boda, unas fotos familiares, fotografías para empresas o corporativas para trabajadores/as autónomos y empresarios.

La mayor parte de sus trabajos fotográficos, o de diseño, van enfocados a una posterior comunicación online, bien para mejorar la visibilidad de las empresas en redes sociales o bien para incrementar las inversiones futuras, generando nuevos patrocinadores y/o clientes.

Para cualquier duda, o contratación, les atenderemos en la siguiente dirección de correo: info@pstfotografia.com, por tlf: 633618791 o en persona en nuestro estudio situado en C/Sant Vicent Ferrer 38 Bajo, zona alta de Alcoy.

Name: Ludwig Nadon Photographie
Description: Je m’appelle Ludwig et je suis un photographe passionné. Je vous propose mes services pour immortaliser vos moments les plus précieux, que ce soit en famille, lors d’un mariage ou d’un événement. Je saurai capturer l’émotion, la beauté et l’authenticité de vos instants avec sensibilité artistique et professionnalisme. N’hésitez pas à me contacter pour discuter de vos besoins et de vos projets, je serai ravi de vous accompagner.

Name: The Smile Fixers Photography Studio
Description:
Welcome to The Smile Fixers photo studio – Where Every Click Tells a Story . We are more than just a photography studio; we're curators of cherished memories and visual storytellers passionate about encapsulating the essence of every moment. 

 Crafting Visual Tales: Our talented team of photographers brings a unique blend of creativity and technical expertise to every project. From portraits to events, we specialize in turning fleeting moments into timeless memories.

 Client-Centric Approach: We prioritize your vision and satisfaction. We work closely with clients, ensuring a collaborative and personalized experience from concept to final delivery. Your story is our inspiration.

 Diverse Expertise: Whether it's capturing the raw emotions of a wedding, the energy of corporate events, or the artistry in a portrait, our diverse portfolio showcases a range of photographic styles and genres. We adapt our skills to suit your unique needs.

 Innovation in Every Frame: Technology is ever-evolving, and so we embrace the latest advancements in photography, constantly pushing boundaries to deliver cutting-edge visuals that stand out in a crowded digital landscape.

Name: Vanguard World
Description:
Vanguard is a global company that designs and manufactures tripods, bags, sporting optics, and accessories. For over 30 years, our drive to disrupt mediocrity and commitment to innovation have allowed us to create the highest quality products for photographers and outdoor enthusiasts at an affordable price. 

Growing into a global leader since its founding in 1986, Vanguard provides more than our competitors because we ARE the factory. There are no third-party factories, development or design firms, or other outsourcing of any kind in the process. More than 1,000 Vanguard employees create the products and power the brand within our robust global operation. Every step of the process is orchestrated by Vanguard’s in-house R & D, production, administration, marketing, and sales teams in Vanguard-owned and controlled facilities. This enables us to ensure standout product quality and to eliminate “middle men.” The result is money savings for customers, higher margins for retailers, and greater efficiency in direct communication with the manufacturer for everyone. 

Vanguard founders credit our success to the people, across the globe, who have given valuable feedback about product features and price points over our three-plus decades. This focus on listening to the market’s needs and wants has inspired us to create products with first-of-its-kind features, steadfast reliability, and impressive price points. 

Notable industry publications and media have consistently recognized our products’ quality and performance. We are proud to have earned top honors from the Technical Image Press Association, the reddot design award, iF design award, the Industrial Designers Association of America, Gmark, and other respected global associations.

Name: TRIBVN Imaging
Description:
Depuis 1988, TRIBVN Imaging met son expertise au service de la numérisation et de la valorisation du patrimoine.

Spécialistes de la numérisation patrimoniale, nous mettons notre savoir-faire au service des collectivités publiques et des entreprises privées avec un seul objectif : préserver et valoriser leurs fonds d’archives graphiques et photographiques.À ce jour, plus de 20 millions de photographies ont été numérisées dans le respect des standards de qualité les plus exigeants : photographies et négatifs, documents anciens, dessins, photographies aériennes, manuscrits…

Afin de s’adapter aux contraintes logistiques de nos clients, nos prestations peuvent être réalisées dans nos locaux à Châtillon ou directement sur site.Nous offrons des services complémentaires tels que le nettoyage des originaux (plaques de verre, phototypes souples), leur reconditionnement (papiers permanents, pochettes en polyester ou polypropylène) et leur identification via étiquettes à QR codes.Avec une expertise reconnue tant en France qu’à l’international, TRIBVN Imaging s’engage à contribuer à la sauvegarde du patrimoine.

Name: Kurt Johnson Photography
Description:
Kurt Johnson Photography provides a complete creative solution for healing nature photography and nature art in hospitals, clinics, behavioral health, senior living, cancer treatment centers and other healthcare and wellness environments.  

We pride ourselves on our relationships with our clients and are here to guide you through every element of creating a functional, beautiful, inspired space for healthcare settings and beyond.  

From the earliest development stages with the architects and builders, to art selection and placement, through to the very finishing touches of hanging the artwork, there isn't a single element overlooked.  

We have an extensive library of stunning images by Kurt Johnson, including botanicals, landscapes, waterscapes, textures and our popular color slices.  We also specialize in creating indigenous, custom imagery for your project.  Studies have shown using images taken from the same location as the facility itself can increase patient outcomes. 

Why should you hire us?  Because you have enough on your plate.  Let us do the work, so you can get back to yours.

Name: Patrick Lambertz Photography
Description:
Patrick Lambertz (1972, Germany) is a distinguished photographer who began his visual journey at 14. Largely self-taught, with later studies at the Film University Potsdam, Lambertz has developed a unique photographic voice characterized by striking minimalism and centered compositions.

His portfolio spans monochrome and color photography, with subjects ranging from Swiss architecture to landscapes and hunting highstands. His breakthrough series, "Chalets of Switzerland," showcased his ability to capture architectural forms in their environmental context, propelling him into the spotlight.

Inspired by masters such as Stephen Shore and Bernd & Hilla Becher, Lambertz's style invites contemplation on the interplay between man-made structures and natural landscapes. His work has been honored with the German Book Award - Silver Medal and various other accolades.

Lambertz's photographs have been exhibited in galleries across Switzerland, Germany, Austria, and France, and featured at international art fairs. Major publications including Süddeutsche Zeitung and Frankfurter Allgemeine Zeitung have showcased his work.

From ethereal misty mountains to stark geometric hunting stands, Lambertz's images demonstrate his keen eye for composition and light. His recent "Seascapes" series further exemplifies his ability to capture nature's sublime qualities.

Lambertz brings a unique perspective to his work, informed by his background in entrepreneurship and experience as an advisor for various companies and startups. This blend of creative vision and business acumen distinguishes him in the world of fine art photography.

Through his lens, Patrick Lambertz continues to transform the ordinary into the extraordinary, inviting viewers to see the world anew.

Todos los productos son biodegradables es decir no usamos químicos en ninguna parte del proceso lo que nos hace un producto fotográfico no contaminante y único en el país.

Fotofoto utiliza tecnología de punta para ayudar a que las personas le den vida a sus archivos y revivan esos momentos tan únicos que todas las personas tenemos.

La visión de la compañía es que todas las personas hagan un photobook y la misión es poner a disposición todos los canales informativos y digitales a disposición para que las personas puedan hacer sus fotos desde la comodidad de su hogar.

Name: Peter Hurley Headshot Photography
Description: Peter Hurley's haphazard way of moving through life has had him cruising the 7 seas on a sailboat while training for the Olympics, thrown him in front of a camera modeling for the likes of Polo and A&F and had him recognized as the premier headshot photographer in the world after having over 30,000 faces 3 feet in front of his lens. His prowess as a lensman fueled his desire to educate and he has spoken at Google, Apple, Microsoft and TEDx on the subject of how to be your most photogenic self. His unique ideas on the subject have propelled his YouTube videos to over 8 million views. Canon took notice and brought Peter under their wing by honoring him as one of their coveted Explorers of Light. When he's not taking pictures, Peter spends much of his time educating as the founder of the Headshot Crew, a photographer network that is now home to the largest and most talented group of headshot specialists in the world. Although he never anticipated adding author to his list of accolades, his book, "The Headshot", jumped to the bestseller list in photography immediately after it's highly anticipated release. While he still believes that the twists and turns of his life continue to make it a most interesting journey, he couldn't be more grateful to have picked up a camera along the way.  He calls New York City his home where he lives with his beautiful wife and precious twin daughters.

We are in the midst of an analog renaissance! We have seen unprecedented growth and interest in film, from young photographers and those returning to their first love. CineStill's primary purpose is to fuel this renaissance by increasing current production of analog photography materials and providing new analog tools for photographers. Name: AM+PM
Description:
Angèle Moraiz and Paul Mougeot are two Paris based photographers.

In June 2020 they created the AM+PM duo, meeting point of their respective artistic practices. They create images where the objects coexist without hierarchy. By dissociating them from any context, by reducing them to the sole expression of their shapes and colors, they pursue to reveal their pictorial essence. Inspired by the screen printing process in painting the photographers harness the textured finish generated by the pointillist dithering of digital printing. The object, thus analyzed in a serial, sometimes systematic process, tends towards abstraction striving to induce a contemplative dimension.

Their clients include Louis Vuitton, Dior, Acne Studio, Chanel, Versace, Kenzo, Burberry, Vogue, D la Repubblica, Prada, Rimowa, Elle Usa, Nike...

They are represented worldwide by Artlist

Contact: ampmstudioparis@gmail.com / tommaso@artlistparis.com

Name: White Room Studio
Description:
From humble beginnings in 2009, White Room Studio has grown into a reputable boutique photography studio in Singapore. Through the thousands of clients who have their portraits taken in White Room Studio every year, the studio's drive for perfection and passion have remained true till this day: to listen and understand, and to be a friend, capturing the essence of clients' personalities.

White Room Studio’s style is one that embraces the moments of spontaneity. We strive to capture the expressions of life that are real, natural, and reflective of you, and the photos we take create an impact because they carry with them an emotion that is professional and approachable.

Featured in magazines island-wide, White Room Studio is situated in a Peranakan shophouse full of nostalgic character thus giving a wide range of warmth, natural lighting and atmosphere to explore. Our photographers' skills bring together a unique fine art quality to their portraiture work, giving you a photographic experience like no other.

Name: Splento
Description:
What do most business want? More customers!

There are dozens of channels to attract all these customers (social media, banner ads, pay per click, PR, advertising, etc), but most of them will have one thing in common: professional visual content. 

AirBnB wouldn’t be where it is now, if they hadn’t offered free professional photography of all their properties. No one would want to rent an ugly looking flat.

You wouldn’t attend a conference, if all they had was dodgy highlights posted from the last year’s event. 

And you wouldn’t order any food with Deliveroo, if a chef took photos for the app on his iPhone. 

Nor would you hire a lawyer or an accountant, if their headshots were done by uncle Bob on his 1990s DSLR camera. 

Why? Because: 

PROFESSIONAL VISUAL CONTENT SELLS

Whenever and wherever you are - if you need professional visual content, Splento can deliver it for you faster, more reliably and with consistent quality. 

You can book a professional photographer in under a minute online, via your Facebook messenger or by phone and get your photos ready for a press release the next morning. 

Splento delivers on four counts:  

• Reliability – with thousands of specialist, individually screened and fully insured photographers around the world, Splento will never let you down. 

• Quality  – Splento uses only personally selected photographers with a minimum of five years’ experience, and our own approved photo retouchers. 

• Simplicity – Splento’s fast and easy booking service can provide a specialist photographer within three hours, at the touch of a button

•  Speed – Splento guarantees delivery of all your edited and retouched files within 48 hours and you can choose to get them sooner - within 24 hours or even the same day.

Name: EFET Photographie
Description:
L'EFET Photo située à Paris propose une formation pluridisciplinaire aux métiers de la photographie, de l'image et de la communication depuis 1970. Forte d'une expérience de quatre décennies et d'une équipe d'enseignants en prise avec l'actualité professionnelle, l'école maintient sa place au premier rang des écoles privées formant à la photographie à Paris.

Selon la formations suivie, la scolarité des élèves est sanctionnée par une accréditation à l'European Bachelor of Professional Photography, une certification au RNCP ou une présentation aux épreuves professionnelles du Bac Professionnel de Photographe.

 Photo de couverture : Jun Yu

Name: Fotografia 3.0
Description:
Amanti della fotografia. L’evoluzione della Rete diventa sempre più rapida e così quella delle tecnologie digitali. Una velocità alla quale è difficile stare dietro e, del resto, restare dietro significa esserne esclusi. Un’alternativa all’esclusione è quella di concentrarsi sulla parte di progresso che riguarda più da vicino i nostri interessi sociali, culturali, tecnici. E’ quello che intendiamo fare qui a fotografia30.it: focalizzare la nostra attenzione sui progressi che il web e le tecnologie raggiungono nel pur vasto mare della ‘società dell’immagine’.


E già si tratta di un grosso impegno perchè significa estrarre – e capire – dall’immenso caos della Rete i progressi che la riguardano negli ambiti della comunicazione, dei nuovi media, della società, della tecnologia e delle applicazioni per dispositivi mobili (smartphone android e apple).

E, a volte, non si tratta solo di progressi ma di vere rivoluzioni com’è il caso della fotografia a campi di luce.
Questo è il nostro impegno, questo siamo noi: fotoamatori coscienti che la fotografia non è lo spazio compreso tra il click ed il nostro occhio ma quello tra l’obiettivo e la nostra mente, come anche dimostrato dalle avanzatissime tecniche di post-produzione come la “correzione del colore“.

Name: IMPRESIO STUDIO
Description:
Impresio Studio is a professional photography company specialising in maternity and pregnancy photography, newborn and baby shoots, birthdays and pre-birthday sessions, baby showers, family portraits, weddings, pre-weddings, and commercial brand photography.

Founded and led by Vikas Singh (Founder & Lead Photographer), with Saan as Co-Founder, Impresio Studio is built on a simple belief: photography should feel calm, intentional, and honest — not rushed or over-produced. With over 11 years of experience and 3,000+ completed shoots, our work focuses on storytelling that captures real emotion, natural interaction, and meaningful moments.

What defines Impresio Studio is not a single style, but a way of working. Every project follows a structured, comfort-first workflow that respects people, timing, and context. Whether we are photographing an expecting mother, a newborn, a family milestone, a wedding celebration, or a commercial brand assignment, the process remains thoughtful, organised, and people-centric.

Our services include premium indoor studio photography, farmhouse and outdoor sessions, in-home lifestyle shoots, venue-based event coverage, destination assignments, and cinematic video storytelling. This flexibility allows us to adapt our approach to different environments while maintaining consistency in quality and execution.

Impresio Studio operates from its main studio in Noida, with a second branch in Bangalore and experienced teams available across Delhi NCR, Gurgaon, Ghaziabad, Faridabad, Hyderabad, Mumbai, and other major cities in India. This structure enables us to deliver the same level of professionalism, planning, and creative control across locations.

Clients choose Impresio Studio not just for photographs, but for a reliable, composed experience — one that values comfort, clarity, and authenticity, and delivers visuals that remain relevant long after the moment has passed.

Name: CEWE Japan Photo
Description:
CEWE Japan Photo er Skandinavias største fotokjede, med 23 butikker i Norge. Vi leverer høy kvalitet enten du bestiller en CEWE FOTOBOK, printer ut bilder ved hjelp av våre CEWE Fotostasjoner som står klare til bruk i alle våre butikker, eller om du kjøper fotoutstyr av topp kvalitet. Vi har et stort utvalg av spennende produkter!

Vi ELSKER foto og ønsker å bidra til gode fotoopplevelser, og at gode blinkskudd ikke blir liggende på mobilen eller bortgjemt på en harddisk. Vi tror at ett bilde på veggen er bedre enn 10 på mobilen, og at gode minner gjør seg aller best i en personlig og unik CEWE FOTOBOK. 

CEWE Japan Photo er eid av CEWE, som er Europas største fotolaboratoriekjede, med virksomhet i 24 land. Japan Photo ble etablert i Danmark i 1985, og sommeren 1990 ble den første butikken i Norge åpnet. Hovedkontoret vårt ligger på Bjørndal i Oslo.

Name: Samy's Camera
Description:
For over 45 years, Samy's Camera has been the leader in sales of high quality imaging products and the ultimate resource for the professional and amateur photographer. Knowledgeable sales staff, exceptional customer service, and an impressive up-to-date inventory are the reasons that Samy's Camera enjoys a loyal following. Samy founded Samy's Camera in 1976 with a vision for a full service store. This vision is exemplified in all of our locations including our flagship store on Fairfax Ave., with three floors stocked with the latest and most exciting selection of photographic, video and electronics equipment available.

Samy's Camera regularly hosts equipment demonstrations, special sessions with manufacturers, product training, and guest classes - all in addition to our own classes held in our state of the art computer lab at Samy's EDU. 

We carry an extensive selection of cameras, lenses and point and shoots from every major manufacturer. Samy's rental department constantly updates its extensive rental inventory to provide one easy stop to prepare for any shoot or project.

The Pro Department carries an unparalleled selection of medium and large format cameras, lighting and accessories. Professional and amateur video equipment can be found along with expert assistance in our Video Department.

Our Film and Printer Department carries all types and sizes of film, darkroom equipment, digital printers and scanners and supplies. Our state of the art in-house lab offers a large array of high quality digital imaging services from retouching and restoration, to large format museum quality prints in our Service Bureau.

Samy's DV & Edit showroom in Playa del Rey offers the latest in broadcast video equipment for evaluation and demonstration. Our professional staff has the knowledge and experience to help with any video project.

Name: HGEsch Photography
Description:
HGEsch Photography is a studio for architectural photography and film. It was founded by Hans Georg Esch in 1989. HGEsch is working for national and
international architecture offices, real estate companies and property developers. Today, HGEsch ranks among the most renowned in the field. Alongside commissioned works, numerous photo series of artistic value have emerged, as HGEsch's many exhibitions and book projects prove. The themes are diverse and range from churches and mansions in Cologne to latest construction projects in China's rapidly growing megacities.

Name: Visa pour l'Image - Perpignan
Description: L’association Visa pour l’image – Perpignan, soutenue par l’État (ministère de la Culture), la Région Occitanie, le Département des Pyrénées-Orientales, la Communauté urbaine Perpignan Méditerranée Métropole et la Ville de Perpignan, a pour mission la valorisation du photojournalisme. À ce titre, elle anime le Centre International du Photojournalisme (CIP) créé en 2015, et organise depuis 1989 le Festival international de photojournalisme « Visa pour l’Image ».

Name: Yemura Photography
Description: Yemura Photography is a dynamic photography business specializing in professional corporate photography services, alongside exceptional family, lifestyle, wedding, and concept photography.

Name: H&H Color Lab
Description: For over 40 years, H&H Color Lab has served the needs of the country’s leading professional photographers. The current team of over 180 imaging professionals continue to uphold quality over massive growth and do whatever it takes to partner with, support and help professional photographers put their best foot forward now with the industry’s top quality photographic printing, leather bound albums, and press printed products, books, cards and many other products and services.

Name: DigitalFusion
Description:
DigitalFusion is LA's premiere digital photographic rental & post-production facility and creator of the cloud-based photography management and workflow solution, DF Studio*. We specialize in state of the art studio and location digital capture, retouching, scanning, printing and archiving.

DigitalFusion was founded in 1999 as digital alternative to conventional photo-chemical processes being used by professional photographers. A technological convergence in the areas of scanning, image manipulation and digital printing allowed us to create top of the line post-production process for still photography.

OUR MISSION - The iLCP’s mission is to further environmental and cultural conservation through photography.  

OUR BELIEF - We believe that awe-inspiring photography is a powerful force for conservation.    

OUR VISION - Through conservation photography, the iLCP will replace environmental indifference with a new culture of stewardship and passion for our beautiful planet.

OUR VALUES - We value conservation, integrity, storytelling, and photographic excellence.

OUR WORK - Our work is conservation photography—mission-driven photography that combines artistry and action to further bio-cultural conservation.  iLCP Photographers are storytellers, they are the voice of the planet, bringing back the stories that inspire, raise awareness and ultimately effect change.   The goal of the iLCP is to get these photographers in the field to document the beauty and the challenges of our threatened planet.

Name: Proof of Gods
Description:
Proof of Gods is a channel dedicated to exploring one of humanity's most profound questions: Does God exist? It delves into the nature of spiritual intelligence (SQ), offering viewers a chance to reflect on the divine and its role in leading a purposeful, meaningful life. Through practices like meditation, prayer, fasting, journaling, and introspection, viewers are encouraged to connect with a deeper source of knowledge, transcending the material world and exploring realities beyond time and space.

The mission of Proof of Gods is to foster heightened self-awareness and a deeper understanding of existence. The content promotes resilience, empathy, and holistic problem-solving as viewers navigate their spiritual journeys. By sharpening intuition and fostering empathy, individuals can improve relationships and find innovative solutions to challenges in their personal and professional lives.

Central to the channel's philosophy is the belief that spiritual intelligence guides us toward a higher purpose. Viewers are encouraged to shift focus from material pursuits to a life grounded in compassion, conscious living, and service to others. Proof of Gods integrates intellectual (IQ), emotional (EQ), and spiritual intelligence (SQ), creating a holistic framework that aligns goals with values of peace, kindness, and connection.

The collection emphasizes the interconnectedness of all things, helping viewers see the harmony between seemingly opposing aspects of life. By reflecting on universal spiritual questions, the channel aims to inspire both personal and collective growth.

Proof of Gods encourages a life of compassion, peace, and conscious decision-making through a deeper understanding of the divine. With over 60,000 unique copyrighted photographs, the collection inspires reflection and a purpose-driven existence.

Jay Shri Bhairavnathay Jay Maa Mahakaali.

Denne bakgrunnen gir en unik forståelse for hvordan arkitektur skal dokumenteres og kommuniseres – med presisjon, respekt og innsikt i faget.

Kundene får én faglig kontaktperson som følger prosjektet fra planlegging til publisering – og sørger for at både arkitekturens og hotellets kvaliteter formidles med faglig presisjon og visuell tydelighet.

Hos Arkitekturfoto handler fotografi ikke bare om vakre bilder, men om å synliggjøre verdien av dokumentasjon, formidling og merkevare.
Vi løfter frem kvaliteter slik de oppleves i virkeligheten – gjennom lyset, materialene og detaljene som definerer helheten.

Vi hjelper kundene med å:
 Dokumentere arkitektur og landskap – til konkurranser, presse og porteføljer
 Løfte hotell- og interiøropplevelser – med bilder som bygger merkevare og atmosfære

Name: Belfast Photo Festival
Description:
Belfast Photo Festival is a charitable organisation that curates world-class photography and visual art events in diverse locations across Northern Ireland. For over 14 years, we have fostered creative dialogue, local development, and financial opportunities through commissions, entrepreneurial initiatives, and global arts leadership. We take pride in our adaptability, innovation, and resilience, which has allowed us to continuously engage with national and international audiences, positively impacting communities both locally and abroad.

impacting communities both locally and abroad.

In June 2024, we presented our largest and most ambitious festival yet. Thanks to core and project-specific funding, we expanded participation and deepened our environmental and social impact. A major highlight was the Island of Ireland premiere of Richard Mosse’s Broken Spectre, a profound exploration of the Brazilian Amazon that grappled with the complexities of representing climate change. Dutch artist Matthias Oostrik captivated audiences with his dystopian art installation, immersing them in AI's statistical interpretations. Additionally, 12 winners from our Open Submissions initiative had their works prominently displayed in Belfast’s iconic Botanic Garden.

Our 2024 edition was accompanied by a dynamic press campaign that reached over 115 million people worldwide, drawing physical audiences of over 100,000. The festival has been hailed by Capture Magazine as one of the "best photography festivals in the world," cementing its position as the largest annual festival of photography in the UK and Ireland.

Belfast Photo Festival celebrates the finest in contemporary photography, engaging visitors through exhibitions in museums, galleries, and public spaces. With an emphasis on popular culture, accessible themes, and unexpected encounters with thought-provoking art, the festival inspires public participation and enjoyment. Through photography—one of the most accessible art forms.

Description:
Alicia Kangas Photography reflects more than 25 years of visual storytelling rooted in a lifelong instinct for capturing people, emotion, and truth. My photography began years before any formal role, shaped by an intuitive ability to see depth, authenticity, and narrative in every subject.

As my photography evolved, it expanded naturally into the modeling industry. My discerning eye shaped a style blending candid, fashion, editorial, and portrait work, with my images consistently securing agency representation and elevating emerging talent.

Long before age 23, I was instinctively scouting talent, creating comp cards, and navigating agency standards across multiple markets. My understanding of the modeling industry came from lived experience, not instruction.

Throughout those early years, I demonstrated a rare ability to recognize our world’s top talent with clarity and precision. That discernment informed my approach to portfolio development, agency relationships, and the creative and strategic responsibilities that defined that period.

At 23, I founded Pure International Models, LLC, operating from Duluth’s newest elite corporate suites. The agency gained immediate traction, representing top models internationally and building respected relationships across major U.S. markets. I developed full model portfolios, placed emerging talent, and built a reputation for instantly identifying potential — a skill that has defined every chapter of my career.

I was later selected from nearly 5,000 applicants nationwide to join Duluth’s premier studio as lead photographer, refining my technical mastery while continuing to create work rooted in authenticity and emotional truth.

The dates listed reflect the period I was actively submitting work to the world’s largest stock photography platform, concluding in November 2024. My portfolio stands as a legacy collection, with select works preserved and publicly available on Shutterstock.

Name: Jimmy Nelson Studio
Description:
Dutch-English artist Jimmy Nelson (Sevenoaks, 1967) has worked for the last thirty years as a photographer and is the initiator of the Jimmy Nelson Foundation. At the age of 16, he was accidentally prescribed the wrong medication and suffered from Alopecia totalis, which is total hair loss. At the Jesuit boarding school he attended his subsequent baldness was mistaken as a sign of awkward rebellion and thus he felt socially isolated. As a result Jimmy unconsciously initiated his quest to find a place where he felt comfortable in the world. At the age of 18, his choice was Tibet, where according to his own naive and romantic research, all young men were bald and where he felt he could find empathy. This was the catalyst for his unending search for human connection.

BEFORE THEY PASS AWAY 

With this inevitable search for self, he discovered the world’s most eclectic variety of peoples with their own cultures, aesthetics and languages. He decided to visually dignify the people he met on his way. His work is characterized by its romantic, iconic and celebratory style, which has been initially bundled in his first book Before They Pass Away of which over 200.000 copies were sold. This success, also caused by an element of controversy, was the catalyst for his lifelong mission; to pay homage to indigenous cultures as a message for greater humanity. 

HOMAGE TO HUMANITY

In January 2016 he started travelling with the wish to create a body of work in which the observer gets taken on the journey. By gathering interviews, stories, film and 360 material next to his visual documentation, the start of an immersive experience was born. In September 2018 Homage to Humanity was launched, accompanied by a Webby Award-winning app, which allows the reader to unlock digital layers of the book. By scanning the images, film material will be revealed whereby Jimmy takes the viewer on a personal journey of human connection and the importance thereof. All of the chapters feature a 360 film

Name: ALPA of Switzerland
Description:
At ALPA of Switzerland, we view photography not as a fleeting moment or trend, but as a profound and enduring art form. One that deserves time, intention, and precision. Our mission is to Advance Light and Photographic Art, not simply to manufacture and sell devices. We see ourselves as part of a larger creative ecosystem, where the vision of the photographic artist takes precedence over brand ego or market speed. Whether with our tools or others, we are committed to supporting those who pursue genuine
artistic expression. With this perspective, ALPA’s unique approach is to offer a modular, timeless system - from digital to analog - that provides the highest level of precision, flexibility, and sustainability, empowering photographers to capture their vision without compromise.

ALPA's clients include world-class photographic artists, magnum professionals, leading advertising, architectural and landscape photographers and photo enthusiasts around the globe. They appreciate the authenticity, reliability, innovation and craftsmanship. ALPA is not only a product but an attitude. An attitude of joy, professionalism and the spirit of discovery.

Name: DMB
Description:
WHO WE ARE
Martin Parr, Nadia Lee Cohen, Bruce Gilden, Janette Beckman, Alex de Mora, Alexandre Bassard, Amanda Fordyce, Amy Lombard, Andrew B. Myers, Charlie Denis, Christoffer Rudquist, Elliot James Kennedy, Finn Taylor, Imogene Barron, Juliana & Nicole, Kelia Anne, Lauren Maccabee, Lorenzo Cisi, Lucky Tennyson, McKenzie Thompson, Tonje Thilesen, Vivienne & Tamas, Wulf Bradley.

WE CREATE VISUAL CONVERSATIONS
We believe there is a promising future for collaborative ventures between outstanding talent and dynamic, visionary brands. We push the boundaries of imagination, delivering inspiring images, campaigns and experiences, whilst redefining the process and the story being told.

OUR MISSION
To bring together the most exciting and challenging lens based artists in the world under one portfolio and push the scope of creative thinking and its processes by unlocking the power of digital and live media platforms, bringing creative story telling alive.

CREATIVE
We are ﬂuent in the language of visual design. Hand in hand with clients we create bespoke concepts or support the creative manifestation of an existing idea. Our artists are creatives and the eye behind the lens.

PRODUCTION AND DIRECTION 
DMB offers full-range production solutions for still and moving image requirements worldwide. We do it all. David and his artists also provide full art direction.

STORY TELLING 
The digital age is moving quickly, so is the demand for true, honest and relevant content. By understanding consumer passion points we create stories that deliver the right conversation in the right channels through artists who are also influencers in their own right.

EXPERIENTIAL 
This service supports the increasing amount of pop-ups, fashion shows and real time consumer engagement spin-offs from the campaigns we produce all over the world.

A estrutura é dotada com equipamento de altíssimo nível, seja tradicional que digital, que são utilizados no âmbito de cada disciplina para garantir os melhores resultados técnico-criativos. A Escola propõe diversas tipologias didáticas, dos cursos de Fotografia Básica para uma primeira aproximação no mundo da fotografia, até aqueles sobre temas específicos, como Moda, Reportagem (Casamento/Eventos), Lightroom e Photoshop.

A Escola será constantemente atualizada com o perfil técnico e artístico, preocupada com a verificação dos próprios programas de ensinamento em relação às mais atuais tendências criativas em campo internacional, para garantir um alto nível de preparação e um resultado seguro em âmbito profissional.

Os Cursos de Fotografia da Escola são destinados a todos que desejam aproximar-se ao mundo da arte fotográfica mas também para quem já tem uma formação básica e que gostaria de se especializar com uma aproximação profissional.

QUI SOMMES-NOUS ?

NOTRE SIGNATURE VISUELLE
Une bonne photographie a une portée universelle : elle résonne en chacun de nous, peu importe la langue ou les origines. Notre signature repose sur l’art de lier ces bonnes photographies et leur donner une voix collective. Nous produisons des récits visuels à la narration percutante et sensible.

NOTRE APPROCHE
Prendre des risques fait partie de notre ADN, car nous savons que les meilleurs résultats naissent de l’audace et de l’exigence.

NOTRE CLIENT IDEAL
Nos clients ont une sensibilité marquée pour l’histoire et l’image de leur entreprise. Ils mesurent la valeur de leur patrimoine.

NOTRE FIERTE
Vous accompagner partout dans le monde – déjà dans plus de 25 pays – et la reconnaissance de notre travail, honoré à ce jour par plus de 40 prix internationaux. Ces distinctions renforcent notre engagement à produire des images qui marquent et qui inspirent.

Name: ARNAUD HUMBERT • EXPLORER • ARTIST • PHOTOGRAPHER
Description:
Arnaud Humbert is a French explorer, artist, photographer, and global senior executive who works and lives in South-East Asia.

For more than 20 years, Arnaud’s explorations have taken him on expeditions across some of the world’s most remote and harsh places. From the active volcanoes of Kamchatka to the frozen Antarctic Peninsula, or from the mysterious Eastern Island to the foot of Mount Everest, Arnaud has visited more than 80 countries, kingdoms and territories across all continents, and developed a real spirit of adventure.

Pursuing an approach combining photography and geography of representations, Arnaud experiments processes of construction and reconstruction of the perceptions, allowing the viewer to wonder about his complex relationship to the invisible. Overcoming the veil of familiarity that surrounds the experience of seeing, he offers a new paradigm of visual universes, re-exploring their manifestations, codes and boundaries.

His artwork has been published in a number of national and international magazines, and widely exhibited worldwide.

Fellow of the Explorers Club (East & South Asia Chapter Chair, FI'14), and of the Royal Geographical Society (FRGS), Arnaud holds a Master of Arts in Photography from Speos International Photography Institute (Paris, France). He completed his photographic background at the National School of Photography - ENSP (Arles, France) and the Museum of Modern Art - MoMA (New-York, USA).

Arnaud is also a graduated engineer, holding an Executive MBA from HEC School of Management, and a Certificate in Global Management from INSEAD.

Website: www.arnaudhumbert.com
Instagram: @arnaudhumbert_photographer

Description:

His early images were characterized by a preference for black and white film, which continues to show in a large body of his work.  In 1987, he began collaborating with major advertising agencies in Italy and abroad. For the past years, he has spent time working between Rome, Milan, London, Paris and New York. Among the many personalities he has photographed include, Spike Lee, Rob Lowe, Brooke Shields, Ray Lotta, Pedro Almodovar, Roy Scheider, Roberto Capucci, Pierpaolo Piccioli, Alessandro Michele etc…
He currently continues to shoot fashion, advertising campaigns, celebrity portraits, fine art pictures and video clips.
In 2016 he wrote and directed the docufilm "The inner Way - Meditation in Rebibbia"

In a Business photo test, photos are scored for Competent, Likeable, and Influential traits. 

In a Social photo test, photos are scored for Confident, Authentic, and Fun traits. 

In a Dating photo test, photos are scored for Smart, Trustworthy, and Attractive traits. 
___
Get your photos rated by real people for actionable feedback. You can also vote on photos and provide feedback to help out other users and score a free karma Photofeeler test!

Test a photo now on www.photofeeler.com!

Name: Institut d'Estudis Fotogràfics de Catalunya
Description:
L'Institut d'Estudis Fotogràfics de Catalunya és una Associació Cultural sense ànim de lucre, amb la filosofia d'entitat al servei del públic. 

La missió de l'IEFC és fomentar, estimular i impulsar l'estudi, la investigació i la difusió de la fotografia.

L'IEFC, s'organitza en tres departaments, amb els següents objectius:

    Departament d’Escola: que té per objectiu oferir ensenyaments en fotografia per a persones que cerquin una formació professional o bé un mitjà d’expressió artística. Mitjançant el Graduat de Fotografia, amb un pla d’estudis de tres anys, garanteix la formació integral del fotògraf. Paral·lelament també s’ofereixen Tallers i Cursos d’Especialització en fotografia professional, documental i de creació.

    Departament de Documentació i Investigació: que té per objectiu conservar, gestionar i difondre la documentació existent sobre fotografia, així com el patrimoni fotogràfic de Catalunya. Ofereix serveis oberts al públic de Biblioteca, Arxiu Històric Fotogràfic i Fototeca.

    Departament d'Afers Culturals: que té per objectiu la difusió i promoció de la fotografia com a fet cultural, mitjançant l'organització i participació en exposicions, conferències i altres activitats formatives (tallers, cursos d'inciació a la fotografia, etc.).

Name: Visual Experts - Interfoto  EST.1953
Description:
Wir finden schon lange: Bilder sind der helle Wahnsinn! Seit über 70 Jahren beschäftigen wir uns intensiv mit allen Facetten von Fotos und ihrer Verwendung. Mit unserer Erfahrung in der Bildrecherche, der technischen Bearbeitung, bei der Klärung rechtlicher Aspekte, Erstellung von KI-Inhalten, Webinaren zum Thema KI und der Verwaltung von visuellem Content stehen wir Ihnen gern zur Verfügung – denn wir sind die VISUAL EXPERTS.


Bei allen Fragen rund ums Bild sind Sie bei INTERFOTO an der richtigen Adresse: Als VISUAL EXPERTS stellen wir Ihnen unsere langjährige Erfahrung in der klassischen Bildredaktion, im Handling und bei der Bearbeitung digitaler Daten, bei der Berücksichtigung rechtlicher Aspekte sowie in der Konzeptentwicklung zur Verfügung. Unsere Experten optimieren Ihre Bildprojekte und beraten Sie umfassend. 

Warum wir uns damit so gut auskennen? Seit etwa 20 Jahren unterstützen wir mit unseren Serviceleistungen rund ums Bild viele große Verlagshäuser. Die Leidenschaft für visuelle Themen existiert sogar noch viele Jahre länger: Seit 1953 versorgen wir den deutschen Markt als Bildagentur mit erstklassigem Material. In über 60 Jahren Agenturbetrieb haben wir jeden Sonderfall kennen gelernt und stehen Ihnen heute deshalb mit geballtem Branchenwissen zur Seite. INTERFOTO vertritt zudem auch zahlreiche internationale Sammlungen und Kollektionen mit verschiedenen Spezialgebieten und hunderte von Fotografen.

Name: Cortona On The Move
Description:
Founded in 2011 by the Associazione Culturale ONTHEMOVE, the principal objective of Cortona On The Move is to spread and promote contemporary photography by bringing new creative talents and novel forms of visual communication to the forefront.

Under the artistic direction of Arianna Rinaldo, the festival provides a continuing exchange between field experts and a ceaseless search for work which represents the ongoing evolution of the photographic language, all showcased within the enchanting Etruscan hilltown of Cortona.

Cortona On The Move is a dynamic centre of contemporary photography, where experimentation and a watchful eye on the future development of visual communications are at home. Our key words are: originality of vision and authenticity in approach to the reality that surrounds us in order to narrate stories through images that reach a vast public.

It is exactly this approach which has enabled us to grow rapidly to become a reference point, not only for accomplished photographers and amateurs alike, but also for a national and international audience that is attentive to contemporary cultural trends. An approach which has spawned continual growth in the number of visitors, volunteers and professionals who come to the festival.

But photography isn’t the only valuable asset of Cortona On The Move. It also cherishes and promotes worthy icons of the local economy, which has made it possible, year after year, to re-open prestigious old buildings for the benefit of the town – dilapidated and abandoned buildings that have now become spectacular exhibition locations.

Cortona On The Move evolves and becomes the international festival of visual narrative.

Name: Market Photo Workshop
Description:
Established in 1989 by world-renowned photographer, David Goldblatt, the Market Photo Workshop has established itself as one of South and Southern Africa’s foremost training institutions in the visual culture. Globally renowned, the Market Photo Workshop is regarded by many as one of the most important photography training institutions across the continent and beyond that provides access for aspirant young photographers from academically and/or financially challenged backgrounds with no access to photography and visual literacy training in other institutions of higher learning. By enabling access into the elitist field of photography, the Photo Workshop ensures that the photography landscape has a diversity of views and voices where use of the medium is democratised. 

The Market Photo Workshop offers practice led photographic training courses, outreach projects and archival services that respond to the complex backgrounds of education, culture, and identity within a contemporary understanding of photography and the social conditions of South Africa. This hybrid training method has provided many of the MPW’s alumni with a competitive advantage which has led them to receive national and international awards and many have since gone on to influence and transform the landscape of contemporary South African photography.

The Market Photo Workshop is a division of the Market Theatre Foundation that was declared a Cultural Institution in terms of the Cultural Institutions Act of South Africa, (Act no 119 of 1998).

Name: Gorilla Photographie

“ Notre travail s'adresse exclusivement aux entreprises ! ” 

C’est un choix délibéré de notre part, ce marché professionnel étant guidé par des cultures, besoins et désirs que nous connaissons bien, par expérience. Nous proposons des services exclusifs de photographe d'entreprise ou photographe corporate. La confiance de nos clients professionnels s'acquiert à ce prix : la connaissance de leurs attentes, leurs besoins.

Nous basons nos sur 3 axes: 

- La photographie STUDIO
- La photographie EN SITUATION
- La photographie REPORTAGE

Notre clientèle de photographe est très variée. Nous pouvons tout aussi bien aider une petite structure d'entreprise à valoriser son image sur le web ou dans les réseaux sociaux ou accompagner de grosses équipes, avec de nombreux collaborateurs. Nous proposons notre métier de photographe, dans le cadre d'images de portraits ou de reportage, à des entreprises de toutes tailles, mais également des auto-entrepreneurs, des artisans, des artistes, des professions libérales. Bref des professionnels qui, tous, ont comme intention d’utiliser la photo pour valoriser leur image ou celle d’un projet en cours, sur le web notamment. Nos photographes entendent proposer une qualité digne des besoins et attentes de notre clientèle professionnelle et nous désirons gagner leur confiance afin d'engager une collaboration pérenne.



« Notre entreprise est une entité familiale. Nous souhaitions bâtir une activité dans le sens de cet esprit de famille. »

— Thierry & Adrien Hage

Name: Monica Stevenson Photography
Description:
Hello!

I am a commercial & fine art photographer who loves incorporating a very rich visual language into my imagery. I’ve worked all over the world - Australia, Puerto Rico, Europe, The UAE and New York, and I’m now holding fort in a beautiful old textile mill in NC/SC. This is where the magic happens. This is where I provide elegant and curated solutions to visual projects and problems.

At the studio, we stress not only delivering the finished project to 100% meet your needs, but to also make it convincing and appealing for YOUR audiences. We seek to listen and understand what your brand and your customers expect to see, and then exceed that expectation. That’s what 25+ years of experience in commercial photography provides for you. And it is evident in the precise, efficient way I conduct a shoot. Although, my masterful technique in lighting and color theory is something to watch out for!

Transparency and communication are at the heart of successful campaigns. We ensure that everyone in these collaborative projects gets to speak their mind – this is what leads to unforgettable campaigns. My commercial work primarily consists of luxury products, cosmetics, jewelry, home goods, and splash/beverages for brands such as Coca Cola, Tiffany and Co., Cartier, Sotheby’s, Montblanc, Gillette, Dillard’s, Movado, Chanel, and Vogue.

I love searching for possibilities and solving with creative visuals, but I also know it is important to provide a relaxing and enjoyable experience for my clients and team. That’s where the right project management and productivity matter most. And that’s what we do best!

It’s up to us to earn your trust. Our flexibility and adaptability to your needs will pave the way. So get in touch, and let’s discuss how our imagery can make your brand stand out!

Désormais photographe auto-entrepreneur depuis 2019, je me consacre essentiellement aux mariages, aux familles et aux photos d'entreprise. Je continue cependant à photographie notre beau département et alentours afin de vous les partager.

Ma vision de la photographie : j'aborde les missions qui me sont confiées comme un reportage, du moindre petit détail aux scènes plus larges. 

Et si nous travaillions ensemble ?

Name: Snappy Snaps Franchises Ltd.
Description:
Snappy Snaps has become one of the leading UK retail franchises since it was founded in 1983. The two founders, Don Kennedy and Tim MacAndrews, were experienced franchisees when they created this business and remain totally committed to franchising.

Developing a successful franchise network has neither been quick nor easy. 
It's taken many years of continuous research, planning and hard work for Snappy Snaps to achieve the level of success that our franchisees now enjoy and benefit from.

The first Snappy Snaps one hour photo store opened in 1983. A further three trial stores were added during the following three years and, following the incredible success of these stores, the first franchised Snappy Snaps store opened for business in 1987.

Snappy Snaps are innovators within the photographic industry and, as a result of this, we are able to offer our customers more products and services on-site than most of our competitors. The very latest user-friendly technology, supported by our quality control checks, means we can produce excellent photos - every time.

Description:

Elle regroupe plus de 600 photographes et illustrateurs parmi les meilleurs au pays.
CAPIC Montréal est une branche régionale de CAPIC, et est entièrement gérée par des membres bénévoles.
CAPIC Montréal rassemble une communauté engagée dans la défense de conditions de travail justes et respectueuses pour les photographes professionnels par la création d’un milieu professionnel stimulant, créatif, rigoureux et équitable.

Name: FERN.photo
Description:
FERN.photo is a creative production company striving to bridge the gaps between art worlds, commercials, images, climate and cinematic narratives.

At FERN.photo & FERN.film we produce images and film with an absolute minimum impact on climate and environment.

In everything we do, we believe in having a positive impact on the world around us and inspiring others to do the same. Through creativity, storytelling and captivating imagery, we help brands that are challenging the status quo and making the world more sustainable have their message shine through the noise.
At Fern, the reduction of climate imprint is encompassed in all aspects of a creative production. From which brands Fern collaborates with to the generation of ideas and the execution of a production. Without compromising neither the creativity nor the production quality. On the contrary, we believe we do better.

Name: LOL PROJECT
Description:
Initié en 2009, ce gigantesque projet participatif a pour point de départ cet instant quasi magique où on lâche prise et où on se laisse emporter par le rire. 
Une expérience collective et humaine imaginée par le photographe David Ken et qui réunit à ce jour plus de 35 000 clichés débordants de bonne humeur !

Une expérience photographique participative qui fait du bien !

L’expérience du LOLPROJECT associe les bienfaits du rire et du jeu. Ces ondes positives se transmettent aux personnes photographiées par David Ken et « ça fait du bien ».
L’expérience du « rire ensemble » c’est aussi une manière de se rencontrer, avec son médecin, avec son collègue de bureau, voir un inconnu. Le Lol Project est une animation photographique originale et unique, idéal pour votre séminaire ou votre soirée d’entreprise.
Cette expérience immortalise vos éclats de rire lors de séances dirigées par le photographe David Ken connu pour ses photos de mode et campagnes de pub.
Plébiscitée pour vos team building, cette activité soude et fédère à coup sûr vos équipes, un outil de cohésion qui donne du sens.

Au départ mis en route à Paris, ce projet photo a rapidement évolué pour gagner la France entière. Les séances de shooting sont proposées dans les hôpitaux et les entreprises, ainsi qu’à l’occasion d’évènements liés à la solidarité. C’est ainsi que David Ken réalise des portraits hilares pour les calendriers de la Ligue nationale contre le cancer, par exemple.

De nombreuses personnalités sont également mises à contribution, en particulier Nikos Aliagas, l’un des soutiens de la première heure du LOL Project.

Le projet est lancé, il ne s’arrêtera plus !

Description:

Name: Istituto Italiano di Fotografia
Description:
Istituto Italiano di Fotografia, da 30 anni presente nel panorama della formazione professionale, è una scuola multifunzionale, uno spazio innovativo e sperimentale in cui la fotografia è vissuta come un linguaggio espressivo, con stile e innovazione.

Istituto Italiano di Fotografia è una scuola capace di trasferire ai propri studenti la sensibilità e le tecniche necessarie per sviluppare un proprio stile personale in grado di catturare la realtà e veicolarne i significati.

Istituto Italiano di Fotografia è suddiviso in tre sezioni, tre realtà in una, che si completano e sono funzionali l’una all’altra:
 - SCHOOL: la scuola di fotografia vera e propria che si occupa di didattica e formazione professionale;
 - ARTSIDE: organizza mostre fotografiche ed eventi culturali per dare visibilità ai propri talenti del Corso Professionale Biennale di Fotografia e dei corsi serali annuali;
 - PRODUCTION: agenzia di produzioni fotografiche, punto di incontro tra aziende e giovani fotografi.

Grazie alla collaborazione delle tre anime di Istituto Italiano di Fotografia, gli studenti possono imparare le migliori tecniche fotografiche, esporre i propri lavori e farsi conoscere e trovare lavoro.

Un metodo innovativo per guidare i giovani nel mondo della fotografia che garantisce solide basi tecniche e offre la possibilità di mettersi in luce ed essere notati da importanti realtà del mondo della fotografia e non solo.

Name: Photoweb
Description:
Photoweb, propose un service en ligne complet, autour d’une gamme d’objets personnalisés et de produits innovants. Créateur, producteur et distributeur de ses produits, Photoweb s’appuie sur une culture d’entreprise fondée sur l’innovation, le sens du service et la qualité dans la quête permanente de la satisfaction clients.
Reconnu pour la qualité de son offre, Photoweb compte une cinquantaine d’articles répartis en 6 catégories : tirages, livres, déco photo, calendriers, faire-part, objets photo. Sa politique : proposer aux consommateurs des produits personnalisables innovants avec une excellente qualité d’impression et une finition irréprochable à des prix accessibles.

Photoweb est la filiale digitale du groupe Exacompta-Clairefontaine. Groupe familial et français comptant parmi les leaders européens de la papeterie. Dans le cadre de sa politique familiale, Photoweb et Exacompta-Clairefontaine partagent des valeurs communes, notamment l’attachement au made in France, un positionnement sur des produits de qualité et une forte culture industrielle. 

Au sein de Photoweb, nous sommes persuadés que la qualité des conditions de travail de nos collaborateurs est source d’efficacité et de réussite pour l’entreprise. 
Pour cela, notre vision du management est orientée autour de 4 grands principes :
- Management participatif, en impliquent au maximum les collaborateurs dans le développement de l’entreprise. Nos méthodes de travail reflètent cet état d’esprit en utilisant les méthodes Agiles et le Lean au quotidien dans le travail des équipes 
- Culture client, en privilégiant une croissance basée prioritairement sur la satisfaction de nos clients externes comme internes.
- Proximité des équipes entre elles, afin de permettre à toutes les équipes de se côtoyer et de se connaitre au quotidien.
- Intéressement collectif, afin d’intéresser tous les salariés à la réussite de l’entreprise.

Name: The BIPP
Description:
The BIPP is an internationally recognised qualifying organisation with experience in supporting and networking professional photographers since 1901.

Early History
You might say that professional photography emerged in 1842, just three years after William Fox Talbot demonstrated his 'photogenic drawings'. An advertisement suggesting that photographic portraits would make useful Christmas presents resulted in studios being besieged with eager customers. From there, photography emerged as a viable profession.

On 28 March 1901 one hundred photographers assembled at a hotel in Fleet Street, and unanimously formed 'The Professional Photographers' Association'. Branches were formed in Birmingham, Edinburgh, Hull and Liverpool. 

By 1907 the membership stood at 757. Since then the numbers have pulsed up and down along with the times and there have been three name changes before settling with the British Institute of Professional Photography.

World Renowned
Our organisation delivers the very best in education, qualifications and professional development. The qualifications structure is highly regarded for producing some of the world's most influential photographers. This is backed up with a regular programme of training courses and events, all geared towards helping professional photographers reach their maximum potential.

We are also working increasingly with the Trade in order to gain great deals on useful products and services.

Colleges, Government and Industry
To ensure the future of the professional photographic industry, the Institute also works with a number of colleges and public/private in-house departments covering every discipline of photography. These include the Defence School of Photography, the College of Policing and Rolls Royce.  

Structure
British Institute of Professional Photography is run by photographers, for photographers, in conjunction with a small Head Office Team based in Preston.

Name: Pentax
Description:
Pentax Corporation was a Japanese optics company, producing cameras, sport optics (e.g. binoculars), etc. The company was merged with and into Hoya Corporation on March 31, 2008. Currently, Pentax is a business division and brand name of Hoya.

The corporation is best known for its "Pentax" brand cameras, starting with the pivotal "Asahi Pentax" single-lens reflex camera of 1957, which followed Asahi's first series of cameras, the Asahiflex of 1952. The success of the Pentax series was such that the business eventually renamed itself "Pentax Corporation" after the product. Although the corporation ultimately merged into Hoya Corporation, Hoya continues to develop and market cameras under the Pentax brand.

blow photo

This year BLOW Photo have set up Fuse, a new Photo Book Programme aimed at mentoring an artist through the process of getting their work onto paper and in front of publishers.

By bringing together the collective knowledge of an editor, publisher, designer, and printer, Fuse gives a selected artist the opportunity to work with some of the industry’s best people while gaining a deep insight into the process of making their own photo book. The 3-month mentorship will end with the unique opportunity to meet and present their dummy to key photo book publishers.

Ultimately Fuse is about collaboration and empowering a photographer with knowledge and confidence to spark the change between where they are now and where they want to be by giving them a real insight into what it takes to get published.

Description:

Comprometida con la enseñanza de calidad y con las personas que acuden a ella, con un amplio interés en lo que hacemos, aportando pasión, profesionalidad, seriedad y entusiasmo.
Nuestro equipo lo forman docentes en activo de diferentes Universidades españolas, con una amplia experiencia en las materias que imparten y con múltiples publicaciones nacionales e internacionales que avalan su trabajo.
El compromiso de Workshop Experience es el futuro. De ahí la importancia que cobra la atención de mirar adelante, ponemos en manos de nuestros alumnos todo lo que está a nuestro alcance para que conozcan sin rodeos, lo que encontrarán en un mercado profesional cada vez más competitivo.
Nos distinguimos por trabajar desde el primer día dentro de uno de los mejores estudios de fotografía de Madrid, donde el alumno sentirá desde un principio ese ambiente mágico que rodea este particular mundo a la vez que perderá el miedo y lo verá como su ambiente natural de trabajo.
