Name: Help-Portrait
Description: The goal of Help-Portrait was simple: 1. Find someone in need 2. Take their portrait 3. Print their portrait and 4. Deliver their portrait. This movement began in August 2009 with the YouTube video launch from Cowart.  Help-Portrait was formed by celebrity photographer Jeremy Cowart as he contemplated using his skills and expertise to give back to those who may not have the opportunity for a professional photo.  The idea is that a photographer has the opportunity to help someone smile, laugh and to remember - it is a movement, a shift in photography.

Name: Cultura Creative
Description:
Cultura Creative showcases diverse cultural representation with beautiful, modern stock imagery and video. 

With a focus on BIPOC models and production, Cultura's mission is to celebrate the communities in which we live and to create stunning imagery that celebrates diversity.

Name: Head On Foundation
Description:
Head On Foundation is Australia’s leading non-profit organisation dedicated to promoting photography through a year-round program and the internationally renowned Head On Photo Festival. Our mission is to make exceptional photography accessible to all, breaking traditional gallery boundaries through free outdoor public art installations and inclusive programming. We deliver the internationally recognised annual Head On Photo Festival, alongside year-round workshops, webinars, a digital magazine, and touring projects.

Each year, the Festival attracts over 400,000 visits and showcases the work of around 900 Australian and international photo-artists in venues across Sydney. Celebrating all genres of photography, from photojournalism and commercial work to fine art, mobile phone photography, and multimedia, Head On activates a wide range of spaces, including galleries, museums, parks, cafes, and large-scale building illuminations. This positions the Foundation as a major platform for discovering new talent and exploring new ideas and technologies through exhibitions, workshops, discussions, and collaborations.

Through the Head On Photo Awards (Portrait, Landscape, and Exposure), the Foundation has distributed over one million dollars in cash and products, supporting both emerging and established photographers. We select work for the Festival and Awards through a blind judging process, choosing photos without seeing artists’ names, an ethos that has earned us a strong international reputation for fairness and inclusivity.

Head On Foundation is committed to fostering cultural diversity, creativity, and community connection through the power of photography, ensuring broad public access to high-quality visual arts and meaningful engagement across Australia and beyond.

Name: Estúdio Rafael Sartori
Description:
Nosso estúdio nasceu em 2011 para oferecer as pessoas e empresas serviços de fotografia de moda em mídia impressa e digital, com foco em e-commerce. 
Quem já conhece os nossos serviços, sabe o quanto é importante para nós entregar soluções fotográficas de forma ágil, personalizada e por um excelente custo-benefício. Mas mais importante do que tudo isso é manter o foco na qualidade do nosso minucioso trabalho, que começa bem antes do clique e vai muito além da imagem. Porque por trás das lentes da câmera existem pessoas criativas com visão, mão e coração, que sentem e registram a moda de uma forma única. Muito além da estética.
Esta é a nossa filosofia. Este é o nosso estúdio.
Um estúdio que começa com e: de estética e de e-commerce. Mas também de equipe, experiência, energia, engenho e essência: tudo aquilo em que acreditamos e que nos motiva a fazer cada vez mais e melhor.

Name: Skylum
Description:
Skylum is a Ukrainian company that develops photo editing software. We create intuitive, powerful, and easy-to-use tools for photographers of all skill levels, aiming to make photo editing enjoyable and accessible to everyone. Above all, we value creativity and innovation.  With our cutting-edge technology, we want to empower artists all over the world to produce photos they love and are proud to share.
Our flagship product is the award-winning photo editor Luminar Neo that enables millions of photographers worldwide to edit photos with the power of AI. 
We believe that the happier a team is, the more successful it will be. So we trust you to bring your best, while we provide the most comfortable working environment!
We also believe that creativity and freedom go hand in hand. Skylum stands with Ukraine — we help the Armed Forces of Ukraine and volunteer at animal shelters. On top of that, we regularly donate to various organizations to help speed up the Ukrainian victory.

Name: Black Women Photographers
Description:
Black Women Photographers disrupts the notion that it is difficult to discover and commission Black and African creatives. Dedicated to providing a resource for the industry’s gatekeepers. 

Founded by Polly Irungu, and launched in July of 2020, Black Women Photographers (BWP) is a global community, directory, and hub of over 1,500 Black women and non-binary identifying photographers, spanning over 50 countries and 35+ U.S. states.

Black Women Photographers is a home for Black women to receive proper recognition, and most importantly, get hired. Dedicated to providing a resource for the industry’s gatekeepers, it supports its members through promoting their work in an active database distributed to photo editors, directors, curators, and art buyers. 

The collective also offers free educational resources such as regular programing of webinars, workshops, training, and portfolio reviews. Through conversation, workshops, educational resources, virtual and in-person events, as well as an active directory of photographers available for hire, BWP is committed to providing a home for Black women identifying photographers with the aim to increase access to professional and paid opportunities for Black creatives around the world. 

Twitter: @BlkWomenPhoto

Instagram: @blackwomenphotographers

#BlackWomenPhotographers + #HireBlackWomenPhotographers

Name: MAGROUND
Description:
MAGROUND is the go-to resource for exclusive imagery to create outstanding marketing visuals for the automotive industry. 

Founded in 2007, MAGROUND became a worldwide leader, enabling brands such as Mercedes-Benz, Volkswagen, Porsche, Kia, Toyota, and many more to produce advertising campaigns, catalogs, and interactive content.

With more than 1 Million background images from around the world, MAGROUND is a solid solution for creating visual content at scale. Also with tight budgets, and timings.

From implementing 3D-Objects with the help of the most extensive 360° HDRi database to creating full CG virtual environments for online experiences to organizing worldwide on-demand photo shootings.

With offices around the globe MAGROUND and its massive network of over 400 professional photographers, not only ensures the “German” efficiency, high design, and quality standards but also helps to reduce the carbon footprint that is inevitable with traditional production methods.

Name: Furkan Kahraman

Name: Ophthalmic Photographers' Society
Description:
A 50 year old non profit Society. We pride ourselves in being a global organization dedicated to the highly specialized modalities of biomedical photography and diagnostic testing in the discipline of ophthalmology.   Our Society designs clinical certification instruction programs, which lead to credentialing and proficiency in evolving clinical research ,and instrument applications supporting improved patient outcomes.

Please visit us at www.opsweb.org for more information:

Annual Educational Program (Runs concurrent to American Academy of Ophthalmology)
Mid-Year Educational Program (May- June)
Certified Retinal Angiography and Optical Coherence Tomography-C Certification Programs
The Journal of Ophthalmic Photography/ digital and library
Membership Services including webinars, career job listings and other benefits.

The main objectives of our Society are to provide primary and continuing education in the field of ophthalmic imaging and photography, to set and maintain standards for the profession through multiple certification programs, and to promote scientific advancement in ophthalmic imaging technology.

Please contact us via phone or email for more information about Memberships, Educational Programs, Corporate Advertising and Sponsorships.

Name: Studio Dice
Description:
’m a visual storyteller with a background in photography, design, and picture editing—obsessed with crafting bold, clean visuals that connect. More recently, I founded Dice Media to focus on B2B content—producing sharp, high-impact imagery and video for brands, fashion labels, and events across the UK and Ireland.

I’ve collaborated with clients locally and remotely, building campaigns that blend commercial clarity with creative energy. From product shoots and portraits to ad campaigns and polished edits, I bring technical skill, art direction, and a fast turnaround to every project. Always curious, always crafting.



Now, I’m excited to introduce Dice Media—your go-to destination for affordable photography, web design, and social media content tailored for small and medium-sized businesses. With a growing portfolio and published work in two industry papers, I specialize in comprehensive design solutions, including:

 Branding & Design: Logos, websites, business cards, brochures, and more
 Photography & Video: Advertising, product, and fashion shoots
 Digital Enhancements: Creative retouching, photo editing, and illustration

If you're looking to elevate your brand, let’s connect! I offer a free initial consultation to explore how Dice Media can help your business stand out.

Name: White House Custom Colour
Description:
White House Custom Colour is a premier professional photography and press printing lab, located in Eagan, Minnesota. Founded in 1978 as a small photofinishing lab, we have grown to be an industry leader that serves photographers worldwide. We are a family-run business whose main goal is to help professional photographers thrive in the art and business of photography.

As a production-focused company, we have multiple facilities and hundreds of expert employees who handcraft our products here in the US. From aspiring photographers to consumer brands, all of our clients require exceptional quality and design. We pride ourselves on providing creative solutions, high-quality products, and excellent customer service.  

To stay on top of an ever changing and growing industry, we’re always looking to improve our practices, invent new products, and stay dedicated to our clients. Innovation is key, which is why we encourage people to drive change rather than hide from it. With WHCC, you’re guaranteed a partner in success—because when you succeed, we succeed.

Name: XSModelz
Description:
We set out to create a "New Faces" agency to give people on the street a helping hand to establish themselves in the industry.  Giving them a stable platform to promote their portfolios and secure them contracts.

If you fancy yourself as a Glamour or Fetish model then drop us a line and get in touch!

XS Modelz was created by Martin Fox in 2009 and strives to set new boundaries in the glamour model industry.

The company specialises in two distinct areas, the first being photography and the second modelling.

Name: Studio Platon
Description:
Fine art studio for photographer Platon. 

Shooting portraits for a range of international publications including Rolling Stone, the New York Times Magazine, Vanity Fair, Esquire, GQ and the Sunday Times Magazine, Platon developed a special relationship with Time magazine, producing over 30 covers for them. In 2007, he photographed Russian Premier Vladimir Putin for Time Magazine's Person Of The Year cover. This image was awarded 1st prize at the World Press Photo Contest.

In 2008 he signed a multi-year contract with the New Yorker. As the staff photographer, he has produced several large-scale photo essays, two of which won ASME Awards in 2009 and 2010. Platon's New Yorker portfolios have focused on themes including the U.S Military, portraits of world leaders and the Civil Rights Movement.

Platon has published four book of his work: PLATON’S REPUBLIC [Phaidon Press, 2004], POWER [Chronicle, 2011], CHINA: THROUGH THE LOOKING GLASS [The Metropolitan Museum of Art, 2015], in collaboration with The Metropolitan Museum of Art, and SERVICE [Prestel, 2016].

Platon is a communicator and storyteller and is represented by the Washington Speakers Bureau. He has been invited to be a keynote speaker on leadership at the World Economic Forum in Davos, Chanel, Nike, Yale University, Oxford University, Wharton University, the National Portrait Gallery in London and International Center of Photography in NY. 

In 2013, Platon founded a non-profit foundation named The People's Portfolio. The foundation aspires to create a visual language that breaks barriers, expands dignity, fights discrimination, and enlists the public to support human rights around the world. He serves as the Creative Director at Large for the Center for Civil and Human Rights in Atlanta, GA.

Platon is currently on the board for Arts and Culture at the World Economic Forum and serves as a steward for the Economic Growth and Social Inclusion Initiative.

- Photos de portraits : Que ce soit pour un book personnel ou professionnel, je réalise des portraits qui reflètent votre personnalité avec authenticité.
- Shooting/Lifestyle : Immortalisez vos moments de vie, en intérieur ou en extérieur, avec vos proches, vos animaux ou simplement vous-même, dans un cadre naturel et spontané.
- Shooting au studio photo : Profitez d'un cadre professionnel pour des séances photo avec un éclairage et des décors maîtrisés.
- Fêtes familiales : Mariages, baptêmes, anniversaires... je capture l'essence de vos événements familiaux pour en garder des souvenirs impérissables.
- Événementiel : Des défilés de mode aux concerts, en passant par les expositions et salons, je couvre vos événements pour en sublimer chaque instant.
- Reportages entreprises : Valorisez votre activité avec des reportages photo et vidéo qui illustrent votre savoir-faire et votre dynamisme.
- Reportages immobiliers : Mettez en avant vos biens immobiliers grâce à des images professionnelles et des visites virtuelles 360° qui en révèlent tout le potentiel.
- Reportages vidéos : Clips musicaux, reportages ou concerts, je crée des vidéos percutantes et esthétiques qui captivent votre audience.
- Prestations drone : Explorez de nouvelles perspectives avec des photos et vidéos aériennes, ainsi que des inspections techniques précises.

Chacune de mes prestations est conçue pour s'adapter à vos besoins et à vos attentes, avec une attention particulière aux détails et à la qualité.

Description:
Imagerie aérienne par drones ....

En tant que professionnel, vous avez conscience de l’importance de promouvoir votre travail grâce à des supports dynamiques, originaux et de qualité. Des prises de vue au montage, je vous accompagne dans la valorisation et la communication de vos projets et ce, grâce au drone !
Il est en effet l’outil incontournable pour obtenir de bons résultats, quelles que soient les circonstances.
Altitude Drones vous propose ses services de suivi de chantier par drone afin de garantir un véritable gain de temps dans la réalisation de vos projets mais aussi la sécurité de vos équipes.
Outre vos équipements, qui nécessitent un suivi technique régulier, les grandes structures dont vous avez la charge doivent aussi subir quelques contrôles. Spécialisé dans l’inspection d’ouvrages par drone, je  vous aide à atteindre les zones les plus inaccessibles de viaducs, barrages et autres tunnels.
Le drone est un outil qui présente l'atout majeur d'atteindre au plus proche les zones inaccessibles  avec efficacité et en toute sécurité.
En traitant les photos aériennes haute-résolution, nous vous restituons des données précises et détaillées en 2D ou en 3D. Ainsi, vous obtenez une vision exacte et réaliste de l'élément inspecté.
Expérimenté en inspection d'ouvrage, nous analysons les pathologies de désordres pour vous fournir un compte rendu détaillé répondant au cadre légal de l'inspection d'ouvrage d'art.
Apportez une nouvelle vision à votre activité grâce à des photos aériennes et autres vidéos HD réalisées par drone. Chez Altitude Drones, nous en avons fait notre spécialité et mettons notre expérience à votre service. 
De l’acquisition des images au montage vidéo en passant par les modalités administratives et la retouche photo, je vous propose toute mon expérience de photographe et de chargé de communication  afin de vous satisfaire. Altitude Drones travaille dans tous les Hauts de France et se déplace régulièrement.

Name: Snappy Snaps

Snappy Snaps is the UK's fourth-largest photo service chain predominately based in the South of England with 115 franchise stores and 9 company-owned stores.  

Timpson bought the Snappy Snaps franchise in 2011. We have a strong affinity with our Snappy Snaps franchisees, all of whom aim to deliver the same customer service excellence you find in our other High Street and supermarket brands. 

Snappy Snaps stores offer the complete range of digital and analogue developing and printing services and provide a huge range of options to make the most of your photos, including enlargements, reprints, photo restoration and processing slides. 

All stores provide a range of other photo and imaging services such as scanning photos onto CD and prints direct from digital files and camera onto a variety of materials and merchandise. From mugs, T-shirts and cushions to eye-catching large format wall art, Snappy Snaps can create unique personalised gifts to suit all budgets and interior spaces.

Snappy Snaps photo professionals check every print for quality standards, with every image treated with the care and attention your precious photo memories deserve. This attention to detail and professionalism has earned Snappy Snaps the amateur photographer 'High Street Lab of the Year' award on numerous occasions. 

All are equipped with the latest user-friendly technology, backed by in-store quality control checks and supported by our state-of-the-art technical excellent centre in Cheshire to ensure you get quality photos every time.

Whatever your photographic needs, from simple holidays snaps to damaged photo restoration or production of exhibition quality black and white photography and framing to large format promotional materials, our Snappy Snaps colleagues will be pleased to advise you on the options available to create compelling, lasting images.

This owner-managed company offers a wide range of high-quality photo products and customizable items. Both production sites are powered by 100% renewable energy sources. The business activities of this family-owned enterprise include traditional photo lab services, on-demand production, white-label production, software integration and services in school and children’s photography.

Together with our software and retail partners, we develop easy-to-use design applications for desktop, online, and mobile devices.

Our home is Lindenberg in the Allgäu region—a charming town of around 12,000 residents, located near Lake Constance and the Alps, at the intersection of Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. This scenic location offers our 200+ employees numerous recreational opportunities.

Name: Street Photography France
Description:
Chez Street Photography France, nous sommes passionnés par la photographie de rue. Nous croyons que chaque coin de rue cache une histoire captivante, prête à être capturée et partagée avec le monde. Notre objectif est de promouvoir et de célébrer cet art unique en mettant en valeur les talents de photographes talentueux comme vous.

Que vous soyez un photographe émergent ou un professionnel chevronné, nous vous invitons chaleureusement à nous contacter. Nous sommes ouverts à la collaboration et nous sommes impatients d’explorer de nouvelles opportunités pour mettre en lumière votre travail exceptionnel.

Nous sommes conscients que la photographie de rue est une forme d’expression artistique qui capture souvent des moments intimes et éphémères. C’est pourquoi nous nous engageons à respecter votre vision créative et à préserver l’intégrité de vos œuvres. Lorsque vous nous sollicitez pour la publication de vos photos, nous considérons cela comme un privilège et une responsabilité que nous prenons très au sérieux.

En tant que plateforme de publication, nous offrons une visibilité accrue à nos photographes partenaires. Vos photos auront l’opportunité d’être vues par une audience mondiale passionnée de photographie de rue. Nous valorisons également l’authenticité et la diversité dans notre sélection, car nous croyons que la street photography est un reflet de la société dans toute sa richesse et sa complexité.

Lorsque vous nous contactez, veuillez inclure une brève présentation de vous-même, de votre parcours photographique et de votre approche artistique. Si vous avez un portfolio en ligne, n’hésitez pas à le partager avec nous. Nous sommes impatients de découvrir votre travail et d’en apprendre davantage sur votre passion pour la street photography.

Name: broncolor USA
Description:
Bron Elektronik AG, founded in 1958, with its well-known broncolor brand, has developed over the past half-century into a “global player” in the international market for professional lighting systems.

Light is our passion
The challenge of consistently meeting your needs and repeatedly surprising you with innovations is our motivation – and light our passion.

Our goal is to produce State of the Art products, housing in a corporate and modern design including broncolor's technological innovations and guaranteeing an unbeatable quality standard. This is also what you expect from us in your daily work in the studio or on location.

60 years of expertise
We manufacture flash and continuous light since 1958. More than the reference in the professional lighting industry, we are a well-trusted partner on which you can count on.

Swiss made
Engineered in Switzerland, manufactured in Switzerland. The Swiss quality and attention to details are present in all our products.

WORLDWIDE PRESENCE
We are present all around the globe. Don’t worry about travelling with your own equipment. broncolor is available for buy and rent in a myriad of countries.

Reliable
broncolor products handle intensive shootings easily. To ensure you get products you can rely on, all equipment undergo a thorough stress test.

SAVE MONEY ON THE LONG RUN
broncolor gear lasts for decades! Choosing broncolor is the smart choice for a long-term investment to boost your ROI.

Our Products
Every product is unique
Every unit that leaves our production facilities undergoes exhaustive functional testing. Wherever possible, new developments are made compatible with earlier models.

Systematically implemented over the years, this philosophy has enriched the broncolor product line to such an extent that it leaves almost nothing to be desired in terms of operating convenience, long-term value and reliability. And we stand by that.

Name: Profimedia
Description:
Profimedia is the largest czech photobank that provides licences for usage of photos taken by world´s best photographers. Without even realizing, you see our images every day. You will find them all around you: in magazines, in newspapers, on the internet, in adverts, in TV or as photographs on the walls of your favourite restaurant.

Profimedia has over 350 world class suppliers of images from all areas: stock images, news, celebrities, fashion, food, garden, portraits, paparazzi, historical photos, reports, art, music, film stills. The most prestigious partners of Profimedia are for example AFP, August, CPi, Splash, Backgrid, Everett, The Mega Agency, Magnum Photos, The New York Times, Sipa Press, TASS, Figaro, Topfoto, UPPA, Zuma Press and many others.

Company headquarters is in Pardubice, from here we manage business in ten countries of Central and Southeastern European region: Czech Republic, Slovakia, Hungary, Croatia, Slovenia, Serbia, Romania, Montenegro and Bulgaria. Besides Pardubice we have offices in Prague, Budapest and Zagreb.

Profimedia cooperates with majority of media houses, advertising agencies and graphic studios.

Name: Ikelite
Description:
Ikelite has manufactured and designed underwater lighting and photography equipment since 1962, and continues to pave the way with innovations in the lighting and housing markets. 

Our products are designed, built and tested in the USA. We use locally sourced, top-grade materials. Our housings are built by hand and individually tested for fit, function and waterproof integrity. We back our products with over 50 years of experience and service within the dive industry

Name: Segoma (Acquired by R2NET Inc.)
Description:
In an era where online marketing is imperative for the success of any retail business, the importance of presenting products online takes on a whole new role. The goal is not only to present a product online, but also to duplicate the touch and feel of the product to the upmost extent. The perfect way to do so is to present a fully rotatable high resolution image of the product allowing potential customers and buyers to view the product from all angles as if it were in their own hands.

Segoma’s cutting edge patent pending technology combines high accuracy mechanics, unique lighting solutions and top-notch optics - Enabling multi-view image creation, presentation and trade of three-dimensional objects online.

Name: LXN Creative
Description:
Aloha, I’m the photographer behind the lens, Lianna Xiakoui Nakashima. I’m a wedding and event photographer who has captured 200+ weddings across California and destination locations worldwide. My style blends authenticity, vibrancy, and dreamlike storytelling to preserve each couple’s unique love story in timeless images.

 What sets me apart is not only my artistry but also my hands-on approach. With 7+ years of cross-functional experience in event planning, project management, and marketing, I’ve coordinated 40+ events ranging from 15 to 1,500 guests. This background allows me to anticipate timelines, manage logistics seamlessly, and create a stress-free experience for my clients on one of the most important days of their lives.

 Since founding LXN Photography in 2014 (rebranded to LXN Creative in 2025), I’ve worked with clients from intimate elopements to large-scale luxury weddings. Alongside weddings, I’ve collaborated with brands such as Yelp, Foley Estates, Firestone Vineyard, Dagoma 3D Printers, JLL, and CBRE to create compelling visual stories that elevate engagement and marketing impact.

 My creative journey started at UC Santa Barbara, where I double majored in Art (emphasis in Graphic Design + Photography) and Dance (emphasis in Modern + Pedagogy) with a minor in Professional Writing Multimedia Communication. My background in dance taught me how to capture movement and emotion, while my training in design sharpened my eye for detail, composition, and aesthetics.

 Above all, I pride myself on creating an experience where couples feel cared for and seen. From clear communication and detailed planning to delivering a final gallery that feels both personal and magical, my goal is to provide an experience as memorable as the images themselves.

 Packages begin at $2500, with custom options available for a range of visions and budgets. Whether you’re planning a backyard celebration or destination wedding, I’d be honored to help tell your story!

Pacific Dream Photography oversees  Coral Photography, and Coral Wedding Photography, Studio Eminence, and Blinnk Photography.  We believe in providing a 5 star product and service that constantly ranks us in the top photographers on Google and Yelp throughout the islands of Hawaii. Nous effectuons également le shooting photo de vos locaux ou de vos biens immobiliers en intérieur et en extérieur, sans oublier les reportages photo (en milieu industriel, dans l’univers du tourisme, au sein des sociétés de services...)

Name: Forretningsfilm.dk
Description:
Med mere end 15 års erfaring inden for video og marketing, finder du ikke et videohold der er bedre rustet til at lave din videoproduktion.

Vores mange års erfaring med reklamefilm har gjort, at vi kan levere en super høj kvalitet til en rigtigt skarp pris.

Ligesom vores marketing baggrund er med til at sikre, at de videoer du får produceret, også rammer din målgruppe på de medier som du annoncerer på. Så uanset om det er din hjemmeside, Youtube, Facebook, Instagram, Snapchat eller noget helt syvende.

Så har vi både annonceret på medierne, og produceret content til dem rigtigt mange gange.

Med andre ord, kan du forvente at få en forretningsfilm, der sælger din forretning. Vi er et dedikeret videohold der har en inderlig interesse i, at producere højkvalitets video -og billede materiale.

Vi har et landsdækkende hold af de dygtigste videografer, så uanset om du skal have lavet video i København, Sjælland, Fyn eller Jylland, så har vi altid en lokal videograf klar til at rykke ud.

Skulle du imod forventning, stadigt være i tvivl om hvorvidt vi er det perfekte match til reklamefilm? eller er du bare i tvivl om hvad den ideelle løsning er på din kommende videoproduktion? Så ring til os nu på telefon: 52 30 22 60. Så lover vi en 100% ærlig rådgivning, og kompetent faglig sparring på projekt.

Name: PWG Lens

Trusted and renowned name in corporate photography!

From corporate headshots to branded and dynamic conferences/events and milestone moments, we deliver impactful visuals that become valuable assets; building connection, trust, and recognition.

• Why it matters: Because your imagery should be as strategic as it is stunning.

Headquartered and serving the Metro Atlanta community in Conyers and the Southeastern, United States regions. We’re your trusted partner in visual storytelling. 

Let’s create valuable and impactful visuals!

Our company is composed of a skilled team of freelance 3D artists who work together to push the limits of 3D scanning technology. We have invested in state-of-the-art 3D scanning equipment, allowing us to offer the highest quality 3D scanning services for people in the visual effects and gaming industries, clay maquettes, props, fashion, and prototyping.

We are dedicated to providing our clients in Southern California with the best quality 3D scanning services at the most competitive prices. Contact us today at 818-358-2286 to discover how we can help bring your project to fruition.

Name: Adostrophe
Description:
Adostrophe offers Matterport 3D virtual tour scanning services in India. Apart from 360 degree photography, services also include Google Ads campaign management for businesses around the world.

The capture technicians travel across India to digitise properties and open areas using professional scanners like the Matterport Pro 2, Pro 3 and the Leica BLK360 G2. These 'digital twins' are typically used by businesses to promote and document their spaces. Making it easy to share as a link or embed in the website, the 3D virtual tours are gaining popularity across multiple verticals like education, hospitality, real estate, healthcare, retail and more.

For worldwide clients, we offer Search Engine Marketing services like Google Ads and Microsoft Advertising. With over 18 years experience in managing Pay Per Click campaigns, our expertise with large enterprises are available for small businesses too.

Other services include as-built laser scanning, Google Street View photography, real estate marketing, keyword research, sponsored ad campaign audits and Google Ad Grant account management for nonprofits and NGOs.

For certain nonprofits, our services are available without charges, however Matterport virtual tours are captured only in India. Feel free to leave us a message if you think there's a location that could use a professional panoramic image (or a complete virtual tour) in their Google Maps listing. We will club them along with our paid projects and get it done.

Visit our website to learn more. Thanks for following our company - we'll keep updating the page with interesting content regularly. Cheers!

Name: Drone Photography Services Ltd
Description:
Drone Photography Services produce amazing quality aerial photography and aerial filming using the latest GPS enabled multi-rotor drone quadcopters.

Drone Photography Services has Civil Aviation Authority (CAA) “Permission for Aerial Work” PFAW which means we are a licensed commercial operator of UAV’s (unmanned aerial vehicles) drones in the U.K.

All of our skilled pilots have passed the CAA-approved exams, ﬂight assessments, and hold the established the industry Remote Pilot Qualiﬁcation (RPQ-s) for multi-rotor aircraft under 7kg.

Our experienced pilots are capable of flying our agile drones close to difficult locations, while maintaining the highest standards in safety and operation.

Our unmanned aerial vehicles (UAV’s) carry cameras using the best gyro-stabilised gimbals to produce ultra sharp HD 4K video and 12 megapixel still images.

We have a wide variety of clients using our aerial drone photography, filming and video services which include:

Aerial corporate videos for product launches, advertising, websites and promotion
Aerial drone photography for Estate Agents
Commercial property aerial photography
Events and sports aerial filming
Tourism, travel and hotel aerial photography and video
Indoor aerial photography

Our largest business growth is now coming from using drone UAV’s for surveys, 2D and 3D mapping and Precision Agriculture.  Using our pre-programed flight paths and autopilot flying with GPS positioning, we are able to produce very detailed and accurate results.

Damage inspection and progress monitoring

Roof and building surveys | construction sites | planning applications |solar panels | roof, tower and chimney inspections | flooding and flood risk | erosion | wind turbines | solar panels | weather damage | forest management.

Accurate 2D and 3D mapping usages

NDVI imagery for precision agriculture | volumetric analysis | stockpile monitoring | quantity surveying | risk assessments.

Name: MarathonFoto
Description: MarathonFoto, for more than 45 years, has had a mission that goes beyond capturing mere images. Dedicated to inspiring and celebrating athletes, MarathonFoto transforms moments into memories.

Name: LGM Studio | Fotografía de Arquitectura
Description:
Con sede actualmente entre Madrid y Ciudad de México LGM STUDIO es la firma de fotografía de arquitectura dirigida por Luis Gallardo y Ady Montemayor, dedicada a documentar arquitectura, interiores y fine art a través de fotografías profesionales de calidad editorial.

Nuestra fotografía ha plasmado la compleja interacción del espacio y la luz en el trabajo de reconocidos arquitectos, diseñadores, artistas y empresas. Trabajamos en estrecha colaboración con nuestros clientes para proponer una narrativa visual que mejor represente su obra. Creamos imágenes refinadas sobre estructuras, espacios, contextos y experiencias que exponen lo mejor de cada diseño y evocan un sentimiento y un sentido de lugar. Para nosotros es un honor tener la oportunidad de colaborar con reconocidos arquitectos y diseñadores y documentar su obra a través de nuestra mirada.

La visión creativa de LGM STUDIO nace de nuestra formación como arquitectos, misma que nos facilita comprender y plasmar las ideas de diseño detrás de cada proyecto, no solo desde el punto de vista del fotógrafo, sino también del diseñador. 

Aportamos un enfoque editorial a nuestra fotografía; por ello, nuestro trabajo es publicado regularmente en medios editoriales de prestigio especializados en Arquitectura, Diseño y Life Style: en impresos como 2G, a+u, Abitare, AM Editores, Ambientes, Architect Magazine, Architectural Digest, Arquine, Bau Meister, Casa Viva, Código, Condé Nast Traveller, Departures, domus, ELLE, FRAME, Glocal, MARK, Phaidon, PLOT, Rizzoli, Summa+, Rizzoli, THISISPAPER, así como en medios como ArchDaily, Designboom, Dezeen, Divisare, Dwell y Metalocus.

Cada proyecto tiene una historia que contar. El reto está en capturar imágenes fuertes que comuniquen el carácter de la arquitectura y que cuenten la historia detrás de cada proyecto de diseño. Ese es nuestro trabajo y estamos deseando ayudarte. Conectemos y trabajemos juntos!

Name: Maurizio Mucciola Photography
Description:
I am an architect and architectural photographer based in London. 
I trained in Milan, Lisbon, and New York, and I have over 20 years of experience in architecture, having worked in cities such as Tokyo, Edinburgh, Paris, and London. 

I had the privilege of collaborating with Kengo Kuma for many years and designing many beautiful buildings, including the V&A Dundee, art galleries, and private residences. 
My clients have ranged from cultural institutions to ambitious private clients and luxury brands like Dalmore Whisky.

My passion for photography started as a child when I got my first 35mm film camera, and then, when at Columbia University I took the architectural photography class taught by Erieta Attali I started to realise the potential of using photography to investigate the built environment.
Since then, I have been dedicated to photographing buildings and spaces.

There is a constant exchange between my photographer and architect roles. I use photography to better understand how people interact with architecture, cities and buildings, looking through my camera lens with the architect’s eyes.

I also teach architectural design at the Bartlett School of Architecture.

Name: Tales by Zoticus
Description: At Zoticus, it’s been a habit to go an extra mile to breathe life into all your precious memories so that you relive them every time you look at your wedding pictures or the film. Every time we play with light and shadow, with the flash and lenses, we tell tales, those tales which we choose to tell by sneaking in and stealing some candid moments out of your most important day. It isn’t just wedding photography, it’s your big day full of happiness, tears, dreams & promises – for now and forever.

FOTOGRAFIE

Our goal is to help a diverse cohort of students to unlock and develop an identifiable point of view, often based in their own life stories and experiences, while providing them with the artistic and technical skills, along with career savvy, to achieve excellence in the field. We achieve these goals through an innovative model that combines rigorous, sequential visual art instruction taught by well-known artists and highly-experienced creative industry professionals, along with individualized mentoring, college preparation, career exploration, placement in internships, and job readiness training.

Name: Nieuwe Schoolfoto
Description:
Laat ze lachen
Onze missie: "Laat ze lachen" vertaalt zich niet alleen in onze passie voor vrolijke kinderen die wij iedere dag op de foto zetten, maar ook in onze service naar de ouders en scholen die we blij mogen maken.

Passie
Studiofotografie is onze passie! Het liefst nemen wij ruim de tijd voor een uitgebreide fotoshoot. Wij weten als geen ander dat dat op scholen niet altijd haalbaar is, maar er is toch meer mogelijk dan alleen maar die standaard pasfoto. Wij vinden van wel.

Efficiënt Plannen
Ons doel is door efficiënt plannen en fotograferen meer mogelijk te maken binnen dezelfde tijd. Het maximale uit een fotomoment halen, fantastisch! Van in luier kruipende kinderen tot stoere groep-8-ers; ons doel is de mooiste herinnering te maken. Naast de fotografie zijn wij gedreven om het scholen makkelijker en leuker te maken.

Ervaring
Ons team van leuke en goede fotografen is gewend om te werken van kinderdagverblijven met 30 kinderen tot scholen met 2000 leerlingen. Onze missie is ieder kind de maximale aandacht te geven, de mooiste foto te maken, scholen te ontzien van administratie en ouders tegemoet te komen met een flexibel bestelsysteem. Continu zoeken wij naar verbetering, wij staan nooit stil!

Nos valeurs sont celles de la photographie professionnelle : respect de la propriété intellectuelle et droit d'auteur.

Name: LUMS Photographic Society
Description:
LUMS Photographic Society is the largest student run photographic society in Pakistan. Succinctly, this is a society by the people and for the people, and runs much like a democratic institution, with a well-laid out selection criteria including interviews and a thorough screening process. 

From the subtle art of photography to the use of this very art to change lives, LUMS Photographic Society has unequivocally come a long way. Besides hosting innumerable events including the annual Mehfil-e-Tasaweer and the LUMS Annual Photography Summit (LAPS), the society has made efforts to make incoming batches feel welcomed during O’week, and has bid farewell to the graduating batches with videos that encapsulated their memories. 

From capturing glimpses of happiness and deliriousness at various events held at LUMS, external or internal, to preserving contemporary works of art put forth by LUMinites in all fields of life, LUMS Photographic Society has aimed at connecting people for over two decades. Aimed at preserving every memory made at LUMS, for the sake of promoting the art of photography and reaching unreachable limits, LUMS Photographic Society has been a core society at LUMS for a long while. Its Social Responsibility Program successfully collaborated with a local NGO: Rizq, for projects such as the Ramadan drive and free wedding shoots for the underprivileged. Moreover, initiatives such as Awaz; a series to voice the indigent in our community through our social media platform, Chiragh-e-Umeed; an initiative to spread awareness through photography amongst students from underprivileged schools and Libaas-e-Khuloos; a project to provide food and clothing to needy communities, are carried out throughout the year to contribute towards the betterment of our society. LUMS Photographic Society has spread its roots beyond the gates of LUMS, to let the art of photography flourish and preserve. All this has been possible due to the support of successful brands such as Nikon.

We’ve been curating and licensing high quality, fully 360° interactive panoramic photos and videos since 2007 and have rewarded thousands of passionate VR photographers and videographers from around the world with royalties on their work.

The 360Cities collection of high-quality VR-ready images and videos is now available via custom API connection. Add the immersive magic of our massive database of curated virtual reality panoramic photos and videos to your EdTech service, stock image offer, VR app, or other service.

Name: SADECKI | Fotografia przemysłowa
Description:
Welcome to the world of industrial and construction photography, where we shine a new light on the giants of industry and capture the beauty within their bustling activity.

We specialize in translating the raw power and intricate details of industrial and construction processes into breathtaking, high-resolution imagery. From the steely determination of a construction worker against the backdrop of a towering skyscraper, to the mesmerizing dance of machinery in an assembly line, our photography encapsulates the heart and soul of industry around the globe.

Our photographer, with over a decade of hands-on experience in health and safety management for large-scale projects, brings a unique perspective to each shot. His keen eye for detail and deep understanding of industrial processes ensures that every photograph not only tells a compelling story, but also accurately represents the subject matter.

From our base in Sopot, Poland, we are eager to travel the world to bring our skills and passion to your organization. Whether you're a construction company looking to showcase your latest project, an industrial corporation wanting to highlight your technological advancements, or a machinery manufacturer keen to demonstrate the efficiency and precision of your equipment, we are here to provide stunning visuals that convey your message powerfully and accurately.

Through a unique blend of technical precision and impassioned artistry, our photos resonate with viewers and make a lasting impression. Let's capture the soul of your industry together. Reach out to us today, and let's create images that not only impress, but also inspire.

Experience the power of industry through the lens of a seasoned industrial photographer. Embrace the allure of construction and industrial photography.

Name: STEMUTZ PHOTO
Description:
STEMUTZ, c’est du sérieux! :-)

 Photographe du Conseil Fédéral 2018 et du magazine Le Gouvernement en bref 2019
 Photographe professionnel à l’Union Suisse des Photographes Professionnels (USPP)
 Membre de la Chambre de commerce et d’industrie du canton de Fribourg (CCIF)
 Membre de la Communauté Fribourgeoise des professionnels de la communication (YouComm)
 Membre de la Maison des Artistes (mda)
 Studio à bluefactory/FR


Jeune quadra, Stéphane Schmutz dit STEMUTZ est au bénéfice d’un Brevet Fédéral de communication et marketing ainsi que de 20 ans d’expérience dans la vente et le marketing industriel.

Après avoir été responsable de marketing et des réseaux sociaux d’une société internationale active dans l’industrie, Stéphane Schmutz, trilingue (français, allemand, anglais), s’intéresse en 2008 à la photographie professionnelle afin de créer son propre contenu visuel et de disposer d’images de qualité qui répondent à ses exigences.

EN STUDIO OU SUR LE VIF
Il crée son studio de travail de 100m2 en 2013 au sein de BlueFACTORY, à 5 minutes de la gare de Fribourg. La technique du studio permet de composer la lumière et le décor à partir d’un espace neutre et de réaliser des shootings photographiques qui répondent aux besoins spécifiques de chaque mandataire.

« Sur le terrain », Stéphane Schmutz produit avec sensibilité des images percutantes et efficaces pour la promotion de tous types d’évènements, d’entreprises, d’objets, de bâtiments, de travaux artistiques, etc.

Quel que soit le contexte, ce « caméléon » de la photographie œuvre avec discrétion, créativité, réactivité et rigueur professionnelle.

UN ŒIL CURIEUX OUVERT SUR VOTRE MONDE
Ses intérêts personnels riches et variés l’ont amené à travailler dans différents domaines avec des mandataires d’horizons divers : Groupe E, Fribourg Centre, Softcom, Virdis Architecture, Fri-Up, Frewitt,  le Grand Conseil de Fribourg et le HC Fribourg-Gottéron.
Liste non exhaustive. Découvrez-en plus sur www.stemutz.com

Name: CEWE Sp. z o.o.
Description:
CEWE to największy koncern fotograficzny w Europie, który został założony w 1961 roku. Działamy w 23 krajach, a w Polsce od lat 90. Posiadamy nowoczesne laboratoria, w wielu europejskich miastach. 

Nasze fotoprodukty CEWE można zamawiać przede wszystkim online, a także w sklepach stacjonarnych. Wykonujemy je z największą dbałością o każdy szczegół, dzięki czemu prezentują one najwyższą jakość. 

Posiadamy również ponad 30 specjalistycznych Salonów fotograficznych CEWE FOTOJOKER, ze sprzętem oraz usługami fotograficznymi. Nasi profesjonalni Doradcy Klienta w Biurze Obsługi Klienta są gotowi na wsparcie Klientów przez 7 dni w tygodniu, online oraz telefonicznie.  

Nasz flagowy produkt - CEWE FOTOKSIĄŻKA, jest fotoksiążką numer 1 w Europie. Wybrało ją już ponad 70 milionów zadowolonych Klientów. Jako pierwsi wprowadziliśmy program do projektowania fotoksiążek – CEWE Fotoświat. 

Marka CEWE w 2020 roku po raz czwarty i trzeci rok z rzędu otrzymała międzynarodową, prestiżową nagrodę TIPA World Awards. Jesteśmy jedyną firmą w historii konkursu, zajmującą się fotousługami, która zdobyła aż cztery wyróżnienia, przyznawane przez globalny panel niezależnych ekspertów.
 
CEWE charakteryzuje się społeczną odpowiedzialnością biznesu. Jesteśmy partnerem Stowarzyszenia SOS Wioski Dziecięce oraz Fundacji Akogo?. Ważnym punktem w naszej działalności jest również środowisko. Produkcja naszych fotoproduktów jest neutralna dla klimatu i certyfikowana przez FSC, czyli prestiżową, międzynarodową organizację, która dba o zrównoważone zarządzanie lasami. 

W CEWE stale się rozwijamy. Charakteryzuje nas wysoka kultura organizacyjna. Zostaliśmy dwukrotnie uhonorowani tytułem Solidnego Pracodawcy Roku i wyróżnieni jako Solidny Pracodawca branży fotograficznej 2020.

Voici le mantra de mon entreprise Les Odyssées d'Angel.

 Photographe, je propose des photos 100 % Pure Nature pour une communication authentique & inspirante. Je réalise des séances et des reportages photos pour les entreprises qui évoluent en étant respectueuses de la Nature, des savoir-faire en lien/en connexion avec la Nature, des collectivités & organismes liés au tourisme qui souhaitent mettre en lumière les patrimoines culturels & naturels de leur territoire. 

 Historienne de formation, détentrice de la carte professionnelle de Guide-conférencière, j'ai à cœur de valoriser les patrimoines culturel & naturel français et en particulier le Cotentin. Je connais parfaitement ce territoire d'exception où je suis née et où j’ai grandi, et auquel je suis très attachée. Découvre Les Carnets de route d'Angel, des "guides touristiques" pas comme les autres !

 Je propose enfin des ateliers et des journées de cohésion autour de la Photographie, de l'Art & des Patrimoines où durant ces moments uniques, je partage avec toi ma vision et mon expérience de vie.

Les Odyssées d’Angel, c’est aussi une entreprise engagée pour un tourisme positif, écoresponsable et bienveillant :

 adhésion au dispositif Tarif Bas Carbone lancé par Normandie Tourisme

 sensibilisation au respect & à la préservation des patrimoines culturel & naturel

As the name suggests, the journey of AstroBackyard started in an urban residential backyard with seasoned astrophotographer Trevor Jones, sharing his ten plus years of experience with an online audience.
 
As a members of the DarkSky International, AstroBackyard also advocates for dark-sky locations and educates others on the issues related to light pollution and the effect it has on our ability to enjoy the night sky.

Follow AstroBackyard on Instagram, Facebook, YouTube or at astrobackyard.com for more information.

Name: Villa Pérochon - CACP
Description:
La Villa Pérochon est un Centre d’Art Contemporain Photographique labellisé d’intérêt national depuis 2018, et administré par l’association « Pour l’Instant ». Situé à Niort, il est un lieu de rencontre national et international pour les artistes et le public environnant. Grâce à son événement emblématique que sont les Rencontres de la Jeune Photographie Internationale, sa reconnaissance est acquise bien au-delà du territoire français. Sa résidence est un véritable laboratoire d’expérimentation, une carte blanche donnée à des artistes émergents dans un esprit de partage et de découverte. 
Tout au long de l’année, la Villa Pérochon, met en place une programmation d’expositions (grandes monographies d’artistes contemporains, collectives sur des thématiques choisies, invitations à des curateurs...) et des actions au profit d’un large public. Elles sont destinées aussi bien à un public néophyte qu’à des spectateurs rompus à la photographie. Depuis 2020 la Villa constitue une banque de vidéos d’interviews d’artistes invités, proposée sur la chaine YouTube Villa Pérochon-CACP et intitulées Question d'images.
C’est dans un esprit de sensibilisation à l’art photographique que des projets sont construits en direction du jeune public, mais aussi d’un public plus éloigné, tels que les établissements carcéraux et hospitaliers. 
La Villa Pérochon est un espace où interagissent artistes, citoyens, bénévoles et institutions territoriales, au profit d’une réflexion et d’échanges sur l’art contemporain.  
Centre d’Art Contemporain Photographique d’Intérêt National, la Villa Pérochon bénéficie des soutiens de la Ville de Niort, du ministère de la Culture / DRAC Nouvelle-Aquitaine, du Conseil Régional de Nouvelle-Aquitaine, et du conseil départemental des Deux-Sèvres. 
La Villa Pérochon est membre des réseaux Astre en Nouvelle-Aquitaine et du réseau national Diagonal.

Names such as Peter Lindbergh who collaborated with Filomeno for 14 years of his career, or Mario Testino who began with Filomeno in Milan before moving to Paris where his career launched.

Today, the agency continues to represent a new generation of multidisciplinary artists such as Bruno Aveillan, Eric Valli, Paolo Ventura, Katerina Jebb, and it expanded with a department dedicated to multimedia art and creation of content for multiple digital platforms, actively pursuing the development of the work of emerging talents such as William Waterworth & Arcin Sagdic.

Our focus is on representing conceptual artists, intersecting art, culture and innovation into immersive brand experiences in Luxury, Sustainability and Savoir-Faire, finding the right aesthetic fit for our clients and partners. Name: Spriiks
Description:
Nous vivons un moment clef de bascule. Le système de notre société occidentale touche à ses limites : limites planétaires qui fragilisent de nombreuses chaînes de valeur (alimentaires, énergétiques, industrielles, etc), inégalités sociales croissantes qui créent de la violence. Simultanément des opportunités inédites s’ouvrent à nous : collaborations en réseau, place croissante occupée par l’image, intelligence artificielle… Face à cela tous les secteurs d’activité doivent changer leurs pratiques et se ré-inventer.

Chez Spriiks, nous sommes convaincu que le secteur de la photographie a son rôle à jouer dans le monde à venir : pour réduire son empreinte environnementale, être plus éthique sans oublier de gagner en efficacité ; mais aussi pour s’émanciper des cadres qui immobilisent, pour interpeller et stimuler les imaginaires, pour incarner de nouveaux usages et comportements.


Spriiks fédère un écosystème de professionnels de l’image (photographes et organisations-utilisatrices) qui souhaite améliorer ses pratiques au fil des projets et explore le rôle de la photographie dans notre monde en transition.

Nous offrons une solution digitale pour démocratiser et fluidifier la gestion de projet de photographie consciente .

Name: Lindsay Adler Photography
Description:
Lindsay Adler is a professional portrait and fashion photographer. She is passionate about photography and enjoys creating surreal fashion editorials that allow her to take her dreams and fantasies and turn them into beautiful realities.

She spends the majority of her time working on fashion editorials, running a portrait studio, and writing articles for a variety of publications. She is a regular contributor to Popular Photography, Shutterbug Magazine and Apogee Photo.

Lindsay also teaches photography workshops and lectures at professional photography organizations, photo conferences and other international photo events. She has photographed in more than two dozen countries.

Over the years, she has received many awards for her photography including Hearst awards for photojournalism and College Photographer of the Year awards for her fashion work. She has received honors or scholarships from the North American Nature Photography Association (NANPA), New York Women in Communications (NYWICI), and Syracuse University where she received her college degree.

Lindsay recently returned from living abroad in London. Name: Papricut.com
Description:
Papricut.com - Bringing access to work
 
Papricut.com - Bringing access to work for youths in the Middle East, Asia and Africa. 
 
Papricut.com is a tech startup that’s focused on bringing access to decent work and economic opportunities for youths in Africa, Asia and the Middle East.
 
Here's why Papricut.com dedicated its platform to bringing access to work for youths. 
Due to lack of access to international project platforms, local videographers and photographers are often bypassed with international teams being flown into their countries to carry out the work
This create a vicious cycle - local videographers lack exposure to international orders, they lack the experience that comes with such work and international clients cannot book them because they don't have international experience
The need to fly in videographers is not only expensive but also has its impacts on global warming. 

This is the reason why Papricut.com was launched - so that local talent can get access to international projects and vice-versa creating a win-win. 
This benefits both the videographers and the client.   
Clients gain access to affordable photography and videography services
They gain access hard to reach areas where remote projects might be based
They avoid filming interruptions brought about by international travel lockdowns or restrictions
Clients cut down on project management times as we facilitate or even take over communications between client and videographers 
and best of all, all the above efficiencies lead to a more affordable approach to documenting projects. 

Who is this solution most suitable for? Papricut is perfect for companies working in social impact projects in hard to reach areas, media houses looking to film in multiple locations have also found our content useful and marketing teams that want real stories told by their customers wherever they are have been knocking on our doors too. 
 
Reach out to us on www.papricut.com to get started.

Name: Luis Médici Fotografía
Description:
En mis fotografías homenajeo al visitante de museo. Creo que el visitante es una pieza fundamental en el arte. El visitante es el actor que logra contemplar e interpretar a la obra, y de esa manera, recibir las sensaciones pensadas por el artista. No sólo es el receptor, es el generador de la contemplación.
Para que haya arte es necearía la obra de arte y el visitante. La obra de arte por sí sola, es una mera conjunción de elementos sin vida. Un marco de madera, una tela, acuarelas o un pedazo de mármol. La obra de arte por sí sola no es arte. Necesita de una persona que lo contemple y lo descifre. Recién ahí, nace la contemplación, por lo tanto, el arte. 

Mi trabajo es sacar fotos a visitantes de museos para honrar su rol primordial en el arte. Les saco fotos artísticas utilizando las mismas luces que utiliza el museo para iluminar a las obras de arte pero con ellos. Lo hago sin que ellos se den cuenta para poder captar el pleno acto de contemplación. Hago del visitante una obra de arte más en cada museo.

-
Wat begon als een experimentele fase, bleek al snel de basis voor een zeer uitdagende carrière als fotograaf. Het fotograferen van de spontaniteit, de authenticiteit, het gevoel en de emotie geeft mij veel energie. Met mijn Rotterdamse mentaliteit, enthousiasme en oog voor detail leg ik de belangrijke momenten op een vakkundig en creatieve manier vast.

Vanaf het begin wist ik meteen dat ik een brede voorkeur had in fotografie. Door mijn brede interesse ben ik vakkundig in meerdere gebieden binnen de fotografie. Kwaliteit van het werk staat bij mij voorop en daarom neem ik alleen opdrachten aan die passen bij mijn expertise. Uiteraard sta ik ervoor open om samen een passend concept te realiseren of te helpen een passende collega voor je te vinden.

Het sparren met de opdrachtgever zie ik als een belangrijke factor om tot een succesvol resultaat te komen. Ik streef ernaar om meer te doen dan alleen fotograferen. Door samen het gesprek aan te gaan, brengen we de belangrijkste wensen en behoeften in beeld. Zo kunnen we de ideale strategie bepalen. Partners grote waarde bieden of een merk uniek maken is echt iets waar ik voor sta.

Name: Photographer and Videographer New York
Description:
Photographer and Videographer.

A wedding is a beautiful occasion of one’s  life. The groom and the bride both want it to be a memorable event. One of the best ways to store the best moments of the entire event is to take quality pictures and videos.
These pictures can be saved for generations to come and the moments can be enjoyed over and over again. Taking pictures and videos at weddings has become a common tradition and no wedding event seems complete without it.
However, it is necessary to hire professional photographers and cameraman so that the pictures are of good quality. Low-quality pictures never bring the same kind of emotion that high-quality pictures can invoke within a person.

Why Choose a Professional Service

Professional photographers and cameramen have the right skills to take high-quality pictures. They know how to capture both candid and posed moments. Moreover, it is just not about the people attending the event but it is important to capture the atmosphere as well. The atmosphere helps to recreate the same memories and feelings when the people will view these pictures and videos years later. The atmosphere includes the lighting and the decoration that has been arranged. It is also an art to capture the bride and groom against these amazing backgrounds. Therefore, professionals are hired as they can do all this with great skills. They also have quality equipment that helps to capture moments in high quality that are great to view and feel the emotions all over again years later.

Name: Hunt's Photo & Video
Description:
Three generations of Farber family ownership have established Hunt's as a trendsetter in the imaging equipment industry. Begun as a Malden Center drugstore by pharmacist Solomon Farber and his sons, Hunt's began building its camera business during the 1950s under the visionary leadership of Solomon's son, Jack. As interest in photography grew and small neighborhood pharmacies fell victim to big national chains, Hunt's began shifting its emphasis away from the pharmacy business and into the business of cameras and accessories. By 1992, the pharmacy closed and imaging equipment became Hunt's primary focus.

Led today by Jack's sons, Scott and Gary, Hunt's proudly serves a diverse audience of individual, corporate, educational, and government clients as one of the country's largest retailers of photographic, video and digital imaging products. As sponsor of the renowned Hunt's Show and Sale each fall, the company hosts a three-day showcase of the latest trends in photographic equipment for users at all levels. Visit Hunt's 30,000 square foot flagship store at 100 Main Street, Melrose, or one of its satellite locations in Boston, Cambridge, Hadley, MA, Providence, RI, So. Portland, ME, or Manchester, NH, to discover how Hunt's Photo, Video and definitely Digital can help you create your own picture of success.

Description:
Hi, I’m Abderrahim Bouglass and I’m a professional photographer, filmmaker and creative entrepreneur with a passion to inspire people all over the world to create “their moments”. I photographed personalities, well-known products and print campaigns for national and international brands.

For the moment, I live in Marrakech (Morocco), where I run my photography agency – Bouglass Pic. I feel like I’ve been taking photos forever. Ten years ago, when I bought my first DSLR, photography became a big part of my life. I tend to spend all my free time traveling. I love Moroccan culture, its dazzling architecture and amazing landscapes.

More than ten years ago, I began my journey in personal and professional photography. I have lived so many significant moments. Having my own professional photography portfolio has been crucial to my future as a photographer. I have worked with so many known clients around the world that allowed me to garner considerable recognition.

I hope you have a good time on my website and I look forward to working together.

Du möchtest deinem Herzensthema Leben geben und erfolgreich in die Welt damit gehen? Du willst endlich in die Sichtbarkeit kommen, dir eine Community und vor allem ein erfolgreiches Business aufbauen? Du möchtest mit all deinen Kompetenzen wahrgenommen werden und professionell im Netz auftreten? Dann bist du bei mir genau richtig.

Hi! Mein Name ist Holger und als Personal-Branding-Fotograf verhelfe ich dir zu mehr Umsatz durch Bilder, die deine Zielgruppe für dich und deine Leistungen wirklich begeistern.

Nach meinen PEAK-Prinzipien lichte ich mit meiner Kamera genau das ab, was dich wertvoll für deine Kundinnen und Kunden macht. Ich betone präzise die starken Seiten deiner Persönlichkeit und inszeniere dich so, dass du dich 100% wiedererkennst. Dabei achte ich darauf, für Web und Social Media Fotos zu
erzielen, die anders sind als der Standard und ein hohes Maß an Kreativität mitbringen. Kurzum: Ich bereite dir und deinem Business die große Bühne – denn das habe ich gelernt. Bei Hermann Scherer, Tobias Beck
oder Kerim Kakmaci.

Du hast Lust auf echte Faszinations-Fotografie? Dann lass uns gerne einmal sprechen und ich zeige dir, wie du die Macht starker Bilder für dich und dein Business nutzen kannst. Ich freue mich auf dich!

SFF, the Swedish Association of Professional Photographers is a non profit organization for professional photographers in Sweden. Description:

He practised architecture in Edinburgh for over 27 years developing a deep understanding of how to present completed projects in the best possible way. In 2009 he set up Chris Humphreys Photography Ltd and started to offer services as a professional architectural and interiors photographer. 

Chris has a natural eye for composition, lighting and detail. This unique position enables him to translate your brief and interpret your needs more accurately. His strong graphics background enables him to capture and process photographs in a way which achieves maximum visual impact. 

He believes that good architectural photography is not just about documenting spaces, but capturing the design intent behind the space. As an architect, he cognitively knows the way in which buildings and interior spaces are best presented.

Chris captures clean simple images, he has a flexible approach to photography and will always endeavour to meet the clients' needs.

Name: Dorian Studio
Description:
Dorian Studio has been a trusted name in photography since 1914. Founded in Spokane, Washington, we’re a family-owned and operated business led by Joe and Yvonne Mark and their three children—Holly, John, and Jake.

We proudly serve schools and communities across Arizona, California, Colorado, Idaho, Nevada, Oregon, Texas, Utah, and Washington, offering a full range of school photography, yearbook publishing, senior portraits, and youth sports photography services.

Our legacy is built on innovation, resilience, and a commitment to our customers. In 2003, we expanded into yearbook publishing, followed by a full digital transition in 2004. When our production facility was destroyed by fire in 2008, we came back stronger, continuing to deliver high-quality images, timely service, and cutting-edge products.

Today, our in-house, state-of-the-art photo and print facility allows us to offer industry-exclusive products at competitive prices. We provide a wide array of customized solutions—including student ID cards, staff badges, directories, image downloads, award certificates, and full-color yearbooks—all delivered with accuracy and speed.

In addition to our school services, we capture milestone moments through professional senior portraits and dynamic youth sports photography—celebrating student achievements on and off the field.

At Dorian Studio, we grow by listening, learning, and adapting. Our mission is to create exceptional programs for every school and organization we serve, combining outstanding quality, personalized service, and real value.

Name: Karen L Richard Photography - Nashville Headshot & Corporate Branding Photographer
Description:
HELPING YOU STAND OUT FROM THE CROWD

In today’s digital world the majority of business relationships begin online, and traditional face to face meetings have become far less frequent and in many cases even redundant. This is opening up a whole new range of possibilities of building relationships without the constraints of time and geography, but also means it’s never been more important to have strong and consistent branding that sets you apart from your competition.

People buy from people they trust and this is as true today as it has ever been; the challenge is how to convey that trust online. Using attention grabbing photography on your website and for your marketing helps you to tell your company’s unique story and convey its vision and values. It allows you to showcase your skills and your people, and humanizes your brand in a way that is simply not possible using stock images. 

Moreover premium quality professional branding photography will help you to harness the power and potential of social media to reach a wider audience to attract more high-quality leads and connect with more of your ideal clients.

Karen L Richard Photography specializes in helping entrepreneurs, business people and companies deliver their messages with impactful headshots, environmental portraits, and corporate branding images.  

Our full service studio is located in Franklin TN, about 25 minutes drive from downtown Nashville close to I-65, I-840 and Highway 31. We can also bring the studio to any location of your choice within Middle Tennessee.  

Is your organization multi-locational? Many organizations are choosing Music City as the destination of their corporate conferences and bringing employees from across the US together in the Nashville area. These events provide an ideal opportunity to capture headshots of a large number of staff in a consistent, cost-effective and extremely efficient way.

Call Karen for a FREE Personal or Corporate Branding consultation on 615-543-4280

Name: AC Aerial Drone Services
Description:
Welcome to AC Aerial Drone Services, your trusted partner for professional drone services. Established in 2020, our company brings together a passion for photography, IT, and aviation, enabling us to deliver a highly skilled drone service providing exceptional aerial solutions tailored to the specific needs of Surveyors, Building Contractors and Estate Agents. 

We save Surveyors time and money by identifying issues with large industrial buildings even when power lines, trees, railway lines and flight access permissions may be difficult.

For Building Contractors, our site monitoring services support efficient planning, streamlined project management, and optimised resources through accurate volumetric analysis of construction materials, saving you valuable time and money.

Estate Agents, we understand the need to stand out in a competitive market. Our captivating photography and video footage delivers dramatic aerial visuals showcasing unique property features, for both commercial and residential properties, as well as highlighting land borders.

Our cutting-edge drone technology, including the advanced Mavic 3 Pro, Mavic 3 Enterprise RTK, and Mini 3 Pro drones, allow us to swiftly identify issues in challenging environments, providing comprehensive and accurate results for all property and land surveys and assessments.

Our operations are fully authorised by the Civil Aviation Authority (CAA) and we adhere to the highest safety standards and regulatory requirements.

If you require aerial photography or video footage of property or land where issues need identifying quickly, at a price that is affordable, please get in touch.

Name: Ricardo Oliveira Alves Photography & Film Studio
Description:
Ricardo Oliveira Alves photographes architecture for over 10 years. Working with a generous portfolio of national and international clients, his work has already been awarded an honorable mention by Architizer A + Awards, being one of twenty photographers selected from all over the world to be present in the 15th International Exhibition of Architecture – La Biennale di Venezia 2016.
He is mainly asked to photograph projects, in general remarkable ones, conceived by the most recognized portuguese studios, having his work frequently published in the most proeminent architecture and photography magazines, in and outside his country.
icardo Oliveira Alves was born in Lisbon, a well known city by its inspiring light, imagery and cinematographic routes. An unavoidable origin especially to whom deals with creativity and image. Along his way, Ricardo has crossed different areas of knowledge and interests, from architecture to music, from directing to producing, until he reached a more profound and complete dedication to architecture photography.
His work reflects this same dialectics, with an immanent approach even in the simpler shots. A life in space made of natural light, no artifices, nor cosmetic interventions.

Archilapse – Architecture vs cinematographic process.

Light phenomena, a simple but so important element in our existence, motivated Ricardo to throw an imaginary net and dive in the time of spaces. Through Timelapse, a visual technique, he did an approach to architecture with a surprising outcome. This experience is based on doing a sequential register of an architectonic space and, by accelerating time, we can see how time and light change the space, how it comes to life and absolutely goes beyond its four walls and our five senses. “The way natural light is transforming as time goes by, is a fascinating mistery” he says.

Visit us on ricardooliveiraalves.com

Name: BAPLA
Description:
The British Association of Picture Libraries and Agencies, or BAPLA, is the trade association for picture libraries in the UK and has been a trade body since 1975.

Members include the major news, stock and production agencies as well as sole traders and cultural heritage institutions. A substantial percentage of images seen every day in print and digital media is supplied by BAPLA members.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
OUR VISION
To be a clear and representative voice for the United Kingdom image licensing industry.

OUR CORE OBJECTIVES

SUPPORT
-   Represent members of all sizes and types
-   Support best practice amongst members in their business dealings
-   Encourage developments that assist members to connect with new and existing markets

INFORM
-   Inform picture buyers and the creative industry about our members' collections, products and services
-   Provide members with relevant business information
-   Engage with members and the creative community to share and extend industry knowledge

PROTECT
-   Lobby at a national and international level to protect members' interests
-   Promote strong, fair and effective copyright and IP rights
-   Work with other organisations in the creative industry that share our objectives

BAPLA is a member of the Alliance for IP, The British Copyright Council, The Creative Industries Federation and The Creator's Rights Alliance.  We are a founding member of CEPIC (Coordination of European Picture Agencies Stock, Press and Heritage) and maintain close ties with the DMLA (Digital Media Licensing Association).
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
For updates on our members, events and industry news:  https://bapla.org.uk/news/

And we regularly post industry jobs: 
https://bapla.org.uk/jobs/

Name: Simon Devitt Photographer
Description:
Simon Devitt, a globally recognized photographer, specializes in Architectural Photography. His extensive work has led him around the world, where he has captured diverse environments from the bustling streets of Shanghai to the peaceful silence of a Japanese bamboo forest. Simon's profound connection with his subjects is evident in his work, including his love for the diffused light in Los Angeles, and his inclusion of local communities which add a human element to his photographs.

Accomplished in his craft, Simon's images have been featured in numerous books, collaborations, and in major international publications. For a decade, Simon lectured on Architectural Photography at the University of Auckland and established the annual Simon Devitt Prize for Photography. He remains open to commissions, collaborations, and guest lectures worldwide, blending his personal interests and professional skills in a unique way. Simon is represented by PhotoFoyer Milan.

Simon will challenge the traditional paradigms of perception, asserting that other senses; touch, hearing and smell – foster deeper connections to the structures we're photographing. By sharing unconventional techniques and insights, you’ll re-think the creative process, framing architectural photography not as a documentation of physical structures, but as a multi-sensory experience that elicits the true essence of a space, transcend its physicality, and, most importantly, tell its unique story.

Name: Professional Women Photographers (PWP)
Description:
Professional Women Photographers (PWP) is a non-profit organization dedicated to the advancement of women photographers. Through exhibitions, workshops and networking opportunities, PWP creates a dynamic and inspiring environment that encourages individual growth and promotes public interest in photography. The PWP monthly lecture series combines social networking with the opportunity to meet successful photographers and industry leaders who discuss their careers, artistic inspiration, and technical choices.

Our members range from photojournalists to fine art photographers and includes both seasoned professionals and newly emerging photographers. 

Founded in 1975 to address gender disparities in the industry, our mission has evolved to support and celebrate the diverse voices of women in photography today.

We aim to inspire and connect photographers at all stages of their careers through monthly meetings, educational opportunities, collaborative projects, and community support.

By encouraging the sharing of knowledge and expertise, we strive to elevate each member’s unique vision while promoting inclusivity and representation within the photographic arts.

PWP is dedicated to nurturing a vibrant community where we can explore our creativity, learn from one another, and contribute to the ever-changing landscape of photography.

Together, we work towards a future where women’s voices and perspectives are not only heard but are integral to the narrative of the photographic world.
