Name: Rodney Photography
Description:
Mooi beeld creëren. Dat is wat ik elke dag doe. Kijk maar eens naar wat ik in beeld breng. Maar misschien ben je hier omdat je meer wil weten over de man áchter de camera. Ik – Rodney Kersten – ben sinds 1999 actief als fotograaf. Eigenlijk stond dat in de sterren geschreven, want ook mijn vader en grootvader waren fotograaf. Al kwam de passie voor fotografie bij mij pas later.

Aan fotografie geef ik mijn eigen invulling. Daarin kies ik mijn eigen pad en hou ik wel van een uitdaging. Ik bekeek de wereld al eens vanaf de top van de Mont Blanc en de Kilimanjaro. Ook met een camera in handen schuw ik uitdagingen niet. Zowel in het perfecte plaatje van de sporter in beweging, als in de schoonheid van een onbeweeglijk gebouw vind ik die uitdaging. Maar ook voor een goed zakelijk portret neem ik graag de tijd, want het beste beeld heb je niet zomaar gemaakt.

Sinds mijn grootvader 75 jaar geleden begon, is fotografie enorm veranderd. Er is zoveel meer mogelijk met licht, kleur, bewerking, diepte en scherpte. Mooi beeld is meer dan ooit mogelijk en dat biedt zoveel meerwaarde. Een goed zakelijk portret of je bedrijf of product in beeld. Alles wordt béter met professioneel en krachtig beeld. Met die vaste overtuiging neem ik de camera ter hand en fotografeer ik mensen, gebouwen en events. Ik breng stilstand tot leven en schoonheid in beeld.

Name: Open Eye Gallery
Description:
Launched in 1977, Liverpool’s Open Eye Gallery was one of the UK’s first dedicated photography galleries. Excluded from the programmes of art galleries, photographers and others with an interest in the medium established their own network of galleries in the 1970s and ‘80s, drawing on a growing sense of photography’s artistic, social and political potential.

We’re actively rethinking what a gallery can be. We produce exhibitions, long-term collaborative projects, publications, festivals, and university courses — locally and worldwide. We welcome over 85,000 visitors to our gallery every year, over 200,000 to projects in other venues, and many more to our online spaces. We proactively take risks to spark crucial conversations and enable creative expression.

We work with people to push for social change.

We’re taking a lead on socially engaged photography nationally. Bringing different voices, photographers and communities together, we establish projects where the collaborative process is just as important as the final product.

Our work goes from grassroots to global.

Photography is a tremendously powerful way of bringing different cultures into conversation together. We work with local residents and international partners to support representation, empathy, equality and inclusivity.

With expertise in creating multidisciplinary photo and film content for innovative global brands, we boast a charismatic team and an extensive network of local partners to deliver tailored production services on a global scale. 
We firmly believe that fostering a positive and collaborative atmosphere is key to the success of any project.

As the forefront of the next generation artists agency, we proudly represent a curated selection of the most dynamic visual artists. Our photographers, DOPs, hair and makeup artists, and stylists from diverse backgrounds excel both as individual talents and as seamlessly coordinated teams.

With our own location kju.studio we have established the most cutting-edge studio in Hamburg. This light-filled loft redefines standards with top-of-the-line studio equipment and an exclusive selection of designer props, showcasing the pinnacle of innovation.

Name: Marc Canela Fotografia
Description:
Dedicada principalmente al desarrollo de Proyectos Fotográficos para Arquitectura,Street, Viajes, Automóviles Clásicos.

Archivo fotográfico distribuido en todo el mundo a través de Age Fotostock (Oficinas propias en Barcelona, Madrid, New York y Paris,tiene más 36 años de historia y experiencia en el negocio de la gestión de derechos de reproducción de imágenes. 

El archivo fotográfico de age fotostock contiene más de 11 millones de imágenes en una amplia gama de temas y estilos. age fotostock representa alrededor de 400 colecciones de imágenes diferentes, desde las más famosas y prestigiosas del sector hasta otras más especializadas, reducidas y exclusivas.
 
Además, la agencia produce sus propias colecciones de Derechos Protegidos, Royalty Free, y Low Budget Royalty Free que destacan sobre todo por su relevancia cultural, la gran variedad de temas y estilos que cubren, la alta calidad técnica, y la veraz documentación de las imágenes editoriales especialmente. Para asegurar esta calidad, todas las imágenes de los fotógrafos que colaboran con la agencia, pasan un riguroso proceso de edición, postproducción y documentación.
 
La web de age fotostock es muy eficiente y permite búsquedas y compras de imágenes rápidas, seguras y cómodas. La agencia también ofrece servicios adicionales para clientes preferentes como los pagos sin necesidad de tarjetas de crédito, o bajadas de imágenes en alta resolución sin marca de agua para bocetos, entre muchas otras.

Name: Photofocus
Description:
Photography is a beautiful medium. It allows people to capture moments in time for the purpose of keeping, documenting, sharing, protecting and story telling. Regardless of the type of photography you choose to focus on, Photofocus is here as a helpful and educational resource for the aspiring and professional photographer. Our goal is to assist in your success as an artist.  This “blogazine” only provides content from the most accomplished photographers, unique artists and recognized business leaders in the photo industry. We’re here to make sure our audience gains insight into original and educational content from our team of experts, authors and guest contributors.

Photofocus also partners with some of the greatest vendors in the photography space to provide you with informative tools, gear and other products you need to succeed. With up-to-date product reviews, training videos, informative podcasts and inspirational content, we want to fuel your passion with information on the best products around.

Name: DNA Creative Collective
Description:
We are DNA - a creative collective of Three - Daniel, Niko and Andreia. We focused on photography and film. DNA consists of the first letters of our own names and it was created during our search for contrasts and discoveries. 

DNA is a dynamic constellation of Three, which found itself in photography and videography as well as in passionate interest in journeys and human feelings. What does motivate us? We love sharing. We love releasing the feeling of joy of capturing this unforgettable moment that is never going to be the same. And we would love to share this kind of moments with people and capture it the same way they feel it. 

We complement each other and broaden our horizons more and more with each project we take part on and each moment we capture.

Description:

La Organización divide sus tareas en 3 áreas de trabajo:

Name: Agence Zoom
Description:

Depuis plusieurs années maintenant, nous avons diversifié notre offre et mis à disposition notre savoir-faire au-delà du monde sportif.

Nous intervenons sur plusieurs secteurs d'activité : 

- REPORTAGES PHOTOGRAPHIQUES (travail préparatoire, reportages photos et traitements des photos)

- RÉALISATION DE VIDÉOS

- STUDIO GRAPHIQUE (création, réalisation de chartes graphiques, illustrations, mise en page)

- GESTION DES MÉDIAS EN LIGNE (service de médiathèques en ligne, indexations des photos avec métadonnées)

- MISSIONS ÉVÉNEMENTIELLES DE PHOTOMANAGER (organisation et gestion des photographes et des conditions de travail offertes, conception et réalisation du pavoisement d’un événement, réalisation de la signalétique)

Name: Photo Days
Description:
Photo Days
un virée photo · vidéo 
du 2 au 30 novembre 2024
plus d'infos sur www.photodays.paris

Photo Days Paris was conceived to highlight photography in Paris keeping in mind the chaos and uncertainty that currently surrounds us. In solidarity with the current situation in the capital, Photo Days intends to present venues and events related to photography in November. 
30 locations in 30 days that includes galleries and museums, but also the apartment of a collector and the Rotonde Balzac: an unknown place taken over by an artist. 
The month-long event covers a wide spectrum of subjects covered by French as well as international photographers ranging from exploring inner journeys to feminism, from documentary photography to plastic photography via fashion, nudes or landscapes that portray realities as well as fantasies. 
From the left to the right bank of the Seine, Photo Days guides you around Paris to discover their program which includes exhibition visits as well as other curated meetings and talks.

Name: Alpes Photographies
Description:
Ma passion pour la photographie et la montagne en générale s’est découverte au cours de mon parcours universitaire et professionnel dans l’analyse géo-physique mais également anthropique des territoires de montagne.

Origine d’Auvergne, je vis aujourd’hui dans les Alpes du sud au coeur de la station de Serre Chevalier. Territoire si différent, mais si proche de part l’authenticité et la beauté naturelle de leurs paysages.

Relief, géologie, environnement, aménagement, tourisme, culture…toutes ces composantes qui forment un territoire sont au coeur de mes sujets et de mes découvertes.

J’arpente, j’explore, je découvre, je m’interroge. J’apprends également et surtout je m’enrichis de nombreuses rencontres.

Vous : professionnels, passionnés, sportifs, amoureux de leur territoire; au fil des rencontres, j’écoute, je questionne. On me transmet, on me partage la vie, votre vie.

Quel honneur de pouvoir ainsi mettre en lumière vos métiers, vos savoir-faire, vos territoires de vie, vos passions, vos loisirs, vos sports, vos projets.

Toujours curieux, toujours motivé, je serais fier de mettre à profit mon expérience à votre service.

Entreprises, collectivités, particuliers, porteurs de projets ou passionnés, n’hésitez pas à me contacter pour toutes demandes de reportages, tirages photos ou vous accompagner dans une démarche marketing sur-mesure.

Name: ROLF ART
Description:
Rolf Art, located in Buenos Aires and founded in 2009 by Florencia Giordana Braun, is the only art gallery specialized in technical image in Argentina. Focused on contemporary Latin American visual arts, the gallery represents and promotes a selected group of artists & Estates that explore the limits of the image in its several expressions. The curatorial profile challenges the given conjuncture considering the social, political & economical background of artistic production as a determining factor for art’s interpretation.

In order to promote the production and appreciation of contemporary art, Rolf Art develops a solid global program comprising research and archive work, exhibitions, sustained participation in leading international art & photo fairs, editorial and audiovisual
__

Rolf Art, localizada en Buenos Aires y fundada en 2009 por Florencia Giordana Braun, es la única galería de arte especializada en imagen técnica en Argentina. Enfocada en las artes visuales latinoamericanas, la galería representa e impulsa un selecto grupo de artistas y legados (Estates) que exploran los límites de la imagen en sus diversas expresiones. El perfil curatorial de la galería indaga en la unión, siempre en tensión, entre las estrategias formales y la profundidad conceptual, desafiando la coyuntura y considerando el contexto político, social y económico de la producción artística como un factor determinante para la interpretación del arte.

Con el fin de promover la producción y apreciación del arte contemporáneo, Rolf Art desarrolla un sólido programa global que comprende trabajos de investigación y archivo, exhibiciones, proyectos editoriales y audiovisuales, participación sostenida en ferias de arte y fotografía, encuentros de formación, colaboraciones institucionales y gestión de adquisiciones públicas y privadas; posicionando internacionalmente la obra de artistas latinoamericanos y contribuyendo a la legitimación de las expresiones visuales de América Latina en el mundo.
Location: CABA, Ciudad Autonoma de Buenos Aires

Description:

Phone:   01483 610 535
Mobile:   07792 139 506

Horizon Imaging offers a range of specialist photography and filming services, including Drone Aerial Photography and Filming, Telescopic Mast Photography, Architectural Photography, Virtual Tours and Video Production to provide fresh new perspectives on your projects for marketing, inspection, surveying and documentation purposes.

Operating since 2007, Horizon Imaging's services include:



DRONE AERIAL PHOTOGRAPHY AND FILMING

Ideal for large developments where you are looking to show off the scale of a site or show how it fits in with the surrounding landscape.


TELESCOPIC MAST PHOTOGRAPHY

Ideal for situations where the drone cannot be flown but where an elevated viewpoint is still desired (eg. in built-up areas).


ARCHITECTURAL PHOTOGRAPHY

Ideal for documenting projects from ground-level in stunning clarity using the latest imaging techniques.


VIRTUAL TOURS

A truly immersive and interactive way to explore projects / sites as a 3D model on a computer or tablet.


VIDEO PRODUCTION

Ideal for creating introductory videos or promotional showreels.



Horizon Imaging is fully-licensed by the UK Civil Aviation Authority for undertaking commercial aerial work with Drones, all our activities are covered by £5M of Public Liability Insurance and we also hold a CSCS Visitors card for working on active construction sites.

Name: SIGMA Nordic
Description:
SIGMA Imaging Nordic is a subsidiary of SIGMA Corporation Japan in the Nordic region. We bring handcrafted, high-performance cameras and lenses from Aizu to the creative community of photographers, filmmakers and companies who demand exceptional optical quality and reliable tools for both photo and video.

Since SIGMA was founded in Japan in September 1961, our focus and efforts have been on creating tools for photography. Photography is all we do. And it’s all we’ve done. It is something we are truly passionate about, and the most fulfilling mission we can imagine, being a part of capturing your special moments.

We are incredibly proud to say that SIGMA is 100% made in Japan, and have been since the start. Manufactured at one single factory in Japan, in the beautiful region of Aizu. This ensures total control of the production system, and enables an exceptional level of manufacturing technology and quality control.

For sponsorship opportunities please contact Chris Coe.

Name: Juul Photography
Description:
LAAT JOUW VERHAAL VASTLEGGEN 

Met 9 jaar aan ervaring is Juul een echte allrounder. Afgestudeerd aan de vakopleiding fotografie op het Koning Willem 1 Collega in Den Bosch, uitgebreide stages bij Dagblad de Limburger en Zuyderland ben ik gespecialiseerd in journalistiek-, documentaire- en bedrijfsfotografie. Door middel van intensief klantcontact, een goede samenwerking met mijn klanten en creatief denken breng ik ‘out of the box’ resultaten. 

Missie en visie
Ik wil mensen, bedrijven en gemeenschappen de mogelijkheid geven hun verhalen te delen en hun eigen identiteit te versterken. Het stelt mij in staat om mijn passie en betrokkenheid bij bepaalde onderwerpen te laten zien. Ik wil mensen raken en misschien zelfs aanzetten tot (zelf)reflectie. 

Wat onderscheidt mij
Door mijn intuïtie gecombineerd met technische kennis, creativiteit en emotie komen er meer dan ‘gewone’ foto’s uit de camera rollen. Deze kunnen zwart-wit, met lekker veel contrast zijn of vol kleur. Kwaliteit, vernieuwing en empathie zijn de belangrijkste pijlers binnen Juul Photography. 

Mijn benadering is flexibiliteit en het aangaan van een nauwe band met mijn klanten. Ik ben het enige aanspreekpunt voor al jouw behoeften, waardoor je als klant een naadloze oplossing krijgt voor al je vraagstukken. Hierdoor kun jij vetrouwen op een gestroomlijnde ervaring die aan jouw verwachtingen voldoet.

Name: Joao Morgado - Architecture Photography
Description:
Joao Morgado is an architectural photographer based in Portugal and since 2007 he has been working with some of the most respected architects in Portugal and abroad.

João Morgado's work is regularly published in several national and international publications:
Architectural Digest (Spain, Germany, Russia, France), AIT (Germany), Azure (Canada), Betonart (Turkey), Bob Magazine (South Korea), Design Magazine (Portugal), Domus (Italy), Frame (Netherlands), Id+C (China), Modern Decoration (China), Monocle (USA), mur+betong (Norway), On Diseño (Spain), Taschen (USA), Wallpaper (United Kindgom).


Biographical Note

2014 - Winner of ARCAID Architectural Photography Award 2014 - Category 'Sense of Place'

2013 - Introduces a new approach to architectural photography with Aerial Photography of Architecture using RC drones.

2012 - Represented by the main international agency for architectural photography - VIEW Pictures, London.

2011-2012 - Alongside the photographic assignments, develops architecture photography workshops in Lisbon, Cascais and Porto.

2010 - Founded his company 'Joao Morgado - Architectural Photography'

2008-2010 - Speaker at conferences on architectural photography at the Lusiada Lisbon University, Fnac Coimbra and Pecha Kucha.

2008 - His photographic works were awarded in several photography competitions in Portugal

2007 - Starts his activity as architectural photographer collaborating regularly  with several renowned national and international architecture offices.

2003-2008   Master in Architecture at ISCTE – Lisbon

Name: Photography by Matthew James
Description:
I'm a professional photographer in Copenhagen, specialising in sport photography, commercial photography and editorial photography.

Fast. Flexible. Fun to work with. 

These are just some of the positive words I hear when I ask my clients to review our professional relationship. They tell me they’re looking for a creative photographer who listens to their needs, makes them feel comfortable, and always delivers the work on time.

As a former press photographer for the UK media, working to tight deadlines was an absolute must. It meant thinking on your feet and being able to imagine, create and deliver a selection of fantastic images within a very short space of time.

Like most skills and hobbies, taking pictures everyday helped me to progress quickly in my field. Whether it was photographing  social events or taking portraits for international  corporations, the desire to continue improving as a photographer has always been at the forefront of my mind . The result is a portfolio full of exciting images that include portraits, sport, action, event and travel photography. I bagged the NCTJ Photographer of the Year award too… which was nice.

Today I'm based in Copenhagen where I specialise in Action and Sport Photography, Corporate Photography and Editorial assignments. More and more clients are hiring me to help them with their video and short-film promotions, too.

My photojournalistic approach and attention to detail has attracted clients such as National Geographic, Lonely Planet, Adidas, Nike, Condé Nast Traveller, The Guardian, Deloitte, Carlsberg, Cycling Plus magazine, The Times, the BBC, and many more.

I also run  Shooting Copenhagen - a series of photography workshops that take place in and around the vibrant Danish capital.

Name: Fredography
Description:
Ik ben Frederic Paulussen en als freelance fotograaf uit Antwerpen kijk ik met mijn camera graag naar alles dat uw bedrijf helpt bij uw visuele communicatie en marketing. Je bedrijfsevenementen vastleggen, foto-reportages maken, en je medewerkers van een professioneel portret voorzien.

Als sinds het middelbaar doe ik aan fotografie. Eerst lag de focus op creativiteit en deed ik mijn best om met nieuwe ideeën af te komen. Experimenteren met digitale fotografie, wat toen nog gloednieuw was, en spelen in de donkere kamer.

Daarna ging ik meer de marketing kant op. Ik werkte een tijdje bij enkele agencies en bedrijven als (content) marketeer. Daar kwam mijn kennis over fotografie heel goed van pas. Het werd er zelfs nog aangesterkt.

DE START VAN FREDOGRAPHY
Ik kon het dan ook niet laten om Fredography op te starten en bedrijven te helpen met hun services en producten in de kijker te zetten. Iets wat ik na al die tijd met groeiend plezier doe.

Met o.a. deze bedrijven werkte ik al samen: Bose International, Huawei Mobile Belgium, Omnia Vastgoed, Tuerlinckx Advocaten, HR magazine, Land Rover Belux, Codit, Ekonomika Alumnia, STIB/MIVB, …

Ik geniet er dan ook van resultaten te boeken voor mijn klanten, hun bedrijf te verkennen, en de medewerkers te leren kennen.

Wil je graag bespreken wat ik voor jouw bedrijf kan betekenen? Neem dan zeker contact met me op!
frederic@fredography.be

Name: Miller's Professional Imaging
Description: In 1939, Bill Miller opened up a small photography studio in downtown Pittsburg, Kansas. From shooting weddings and portraiture in his studio to serving as a cinematographer on the front lines of World War II, Bill’s passion for photography grew into something larger than he ever could have imagined. Upon his return from the war, Bill recognized the potential for a full service photo lab that would cater to professional photographers providing high quality prints and lightning fast turnaround. Miller’s Professional Imaging was born and we haven’t looked back since. Just like Bill’s original vision, our focus remains on providing customers first-class photo products with the fastest turnaround in the industry. From our early days of film to the innovative technology of the modern era, we have witnessed seismic changes in our industry. We have maintained our success through revolutionary and ground-breaking advances in all facets of our business, but we have always stayed true to our core values. Although our tradition may be old, we are far from old-school

Name: Lauren Blue Wedding Photography - Devon & Cornwall
Description:
Relaxed and Modern wedding photography for fun-loving couples who want authentic & natural documentation of their complete wedding story.

Authentic & natural documentation of your special day with two photographers: We are Lauren & Nik, a unique and down to earth wedding photography duo for fun-loving brides & grooms who want relaxed, authentic and natural modern wedding photography.

We tell your complete wedding story with every aspect of your day covered from two perspectives. We share a huge part of your day with you & genuinely get caught up in the fun, tears, excitement & love with you!  We’ll blend in among your guests capturing beautiful, unobtrusive moments but are totally approachable to you and your guests for an impromptu photo.

What to expect...

Having two photographers means that not only are behind the scenes, normally unseen moments captured, but also all the key moments are captured from two perspectives giving unique, moment by moment coverage that you simply couldn’t get with a solo photographer.

For most of the day, we’ll blend in among your guests capturing beautiful, unobtrusive moments and authentic moments as they happen which will make you smile for years to come.

Generally, the only coordinated part of the day will be for the group and couple photos, where we will gently organise you & your guests, we keep this to an absolute minimum so your day doesn’t feel like a photo shoot and you can enjoy your day together with your friends and family.

That said, documentary wedding photography takes organisation, intuition & skill which we have gained from our past weddings - we know exactly where to be & will discuss your day in detail beforehand with you.

If you care about beautiful candid moments & want authentic & natural documentation of your complete wedding story please get in touch to check availability and discuss your day.

Description:
Ik ben een fotograaf uit Eindhoven.
Meestal maak ik foto’s van handbalwedstrijden, maar ook van andere sporten, evenementen (feesten), natuur en stadslandschap, winkel- en bedrijfspresentaties.

Ik werk samen met de grootste handbalsites van Nederland: Handbal Inside en Handbalstartpunt.

Name: Utopia the Agency
Description:
For more than 15 years, utopia has represented some of the finest talent in the areas of photography, hair, make-up and styling. With a full-time staff producer, we also provide end-to-end production from casting and scouting to post-production and delivery.

Our core philosophy has always been to balance the two components of a successful career in this industry, namely editorial and advertising. Besides working with advertising and catalog clients, every person represented by Utopia also actively shoots for top National and International magazines.

utopia is also unique in that we maintain a high talent-to-agent ratio. utopia has and will always be a boutique agency focused on providing talent and clients with the highest level of attention possible. This means more agents and more production support on both sides of the equation.

Focused on the long-term success of the talent and the agency, we have ample funding to expand in this difficult market. Our belief is that it's never a bad time for a good idea.

Name: Quadriga Management
Description:
Founded in 2000 by Karine Quadriga, Quadriga is intended to discover and to promote talents from all backgrounds. Initially focused on the commercial development of photographers, the agency evolved towards the promotion of multi-faced talents , such as stylists, set-designers and art-directors, without moving away from its core business, that is photography. 

Since the agency launched in Paris, Quadriga managed to share its expertise with the artists represented by the agency, and increased its clients visibility thanks to its know-how.

The strength of the agency lies both in its artists' talents and in the sustainable relationships Quadriga maintains with the clients. Therefore, the agency works on a regular basis with many luxury brands, prestigious fashion magazines and several advertising agencies. 

Quadriga is focused on fashion and luxury projects, in the form either of editorial projects or advertising print campaigns.

The agency makes a point of honor to reveal and develop the talents it discovers, and is committed to bringing a new perspective to art and fashion by enabling its artists to express their creativity.

The purpose of the agency is to provide appropriate artists and ideas matching the clients' expectations regarding their specific projects. Furthermore, Quadriga provides a full production service for all photo shoots both studio, location throughout Europe and USA.

Name: Emond & Eid / Création Visuelle
Description:
Chez Emond & Eid, Mélanie et Elie forment un beau duo créatif! Ensemble, ils orchestrent chaque étape des séances photo : recherche visuelle, stylisme, direction artistique, postproduction… Ils s'entourent aussi de collaborateurs pour enrichir chaque projet. 

Découvrez les deux têtes de cette équipe complémentaire. 

Mélanie Emond, copropriétaire et directrice artistique

Photographe professionnelle d’expérience, Mélanie Emond allie sensibilité artistique, maîtrise technique et passion du métier. Formée en photographie, experte en photomontage et en retouches complexes, elle sait capter des photos marquantes. Que ce soit pour mettre en lumière un produit, un lieu ou une personne, chaque image qu’elle crée raconte une histoire. Pour elle, une séance photo est une rencontre, un échange, une expérience humaine. 

Elie Eid, copropriétaire et directeur des opérations

Elie Eid allie instinct visuel, design et savoir-faire en cuisine pour créer des images qui marquent. Diplômé en cuisine professionnelle et en gestion/marketing, il comprend à la fois le produit, le client et le marché. Son approche? Créer des visuels à fort impact, alignés avec l’univers, le style et les objectifs des organisations et entreprises. 

Il aime sortir de sa zone de confort ou des conventions, explorer de nouvelles façons de présenter les aliments, les espaces ou les produits.

Photographie

Name: IMAXtree
Description:
IMAXtree is a global leader in the production and distribution of Fashion & Beauty content, creating and providing cutting-edge content marketing and digital publishing solutions to Editors and Brands!

IMAXtree hit the scene in 2000 as the first ever international portal distributing high-definition front and backstage images and video of fashion shows, street-style and beauty to publishers around the world, guided by two fundamental principles: Listening and Technology. 

Listening to our clients we’ve honed our solutions to find what needs improving and how to do it, and developed our business model by keeping a keen eye on an ever-changing market. Researching New Technology we’ve transformed IMAXtree, bringing in new tools to speed up production, enhance quality of service and make content distribution and diffusion easier and more effective than ever.

Listening, suggesting and innovating makes IMAXtree the ideal partner for bringing together retail and media communications. 

IMAXtree today has reached the apex of its sector, having worked for years with the Italian Chamber of Fashion and seen its content published in all the major international fashion publications both online and off. The IMAXtree Network has grown constantly over the last 20 years, creating links and partnerships with over 2000 publications and brands in more than 70 countries throughout the world. In those countries we cover 70% of the market, promoting new models for content distribution and diffusion.

Name: foto²
Description: foto² is a photography company based out of United States.

Name: Rupa Creative & Studio
Description: Rupa Creative & Studio (PT. Senyum Dalam Warna) is a photo and video production company focusing on the exploration of style and colors aiming to bring happiness to all ages.

Name: Maison Racine
Description:
MAISON RACINE is a collaborative studio founded by award winning artist, photographer and filmmaker Eve Racine. Establishing a global network of inhabitants pulsating under a shared ethos, MAISON RACINE identifies a methodology to develop conceptual projects tied to film and photography.Based in London and Athens, a newfound perception prioritises light-infused experimentation – the Mediterranean landscape has inspired a progression towards entering the vast abyss of terrain. MAISON RACINE creates evolving worlds and atmospheres through an evocative approach to the production format using emerging technologies and an aesthetic ethos that is grounded in research and playful manifestations. 

Previously co-founding Metz + Racine, a globally-lauded practice for moving image and photography, Racine expands the principles for which the former was based to evolve into unforeseen territory – that of the personal, uninhibited, where emerging ideas are softened and articulated under a strong visage. Critical to this aim is the exploration of unexpected partnerships, fortified through such projects including “Address” in collaboration with Director Mototake Makishima, where the personal cosmos of select participants transform to build novel narratives of identity shaped by a conscious rendering of their environment.

Name: Oliver Pohl Photography
Description:
Photography is not a question of location, but rather a question of perspective. And as your photographer, I align it appropriately: for private photographs such as wedding photos, portraits & application photos or family pictures as well as for event photos, business portraits and commercial photo shoots in industrial and advertising photography. You decide where to take photos - whether at your location or in my photo studio in Hemer.

Name: Master Photographers Association
Description:
Established in 1952, the Master Photographers Association (MPA) are one of the longest standing photographic associations in British history. We pride ourselves on our expertise and care about our members photographic journey of excellence. We understand your needs and value them too.

As the UK’s leading qualification body exclusively for the professional wedding, portrait and commercial photographer the MPA encourage professional photographers of all levels to join the Association.

The Master Photographers Association is run by photographers for photographers who have many years of experience behind them. Our team is committed to sharing knowledge and experiences to help guide you.

With a qualification and mentoring system designed to promote continual professional development, the MPA are recognised leaders in setting the standards of professional photography today.
 
Offering a wide variety of membership benefits and a tiered membership system, the MPA strives to develop both the professional photographer as well as the aspiring photographer just embarking on their fledgling career. We believe that by educating the ambitious professional, we set the standards for the future of professional photography as well as the present.

We offer a benefit package, mentoring programmes as well as inspirational and motivational regional and national seminars on business building and marketing support. We offer a holistic approach in our ethos of support to the professional photographer that we continually strive to improve.

With over 60 years in the professional photography arena, the MPA prides itself in developing some of the industry’s leading photographers of today.

Name: Estudio Nadjar
Description:
Creado en 1993 por Nicolás Nadjar, este estudio cuenta con una de las mejores infraestructuras de Chile. Un estudio fotográfico especialmente diseñado para este fin con 180 m2 de instalaciones divididas en 2 estudios fotográficos.En la actualidad utilizamos captura digital en format o medio Digital y 28 Mpx, lo que asegura la máxima resolución y profundidad de colores que permite la tecnología fotográfica actual, como precaución adicional los monitores usados en el estudio se calibran una vez a la semana usando la más reciente tecnología de calibración.

Con 16 años de experiencia en fotografía de alta exigencia, Nicolás Nadjar ha trabajado para una vasta gama de clientes.Dentro de los cuales se destacan:
Agrosuper, Viña Tarapacá, Coca Cola, Socovesa, E Molina Morel, Banco Estado, Grey Chile, Creactiva, BBDO, , La Crianza, Assa Abloy Chile, Henkel, Duo Diseño, emeige marketing inmobiliario, Viñedos J.Bouchon, Universidad Diego Portales, Duoc , Hambre, Sepia, Sopraval y muchos otros más.

Tenemos una alta especialización en Fotografías de Arquitectura, Alimentos y Publicidad. Y por lo mismo contamos con todos los conocimientos necesarios y toda la infraestructura tanto humana como tecnológica para desarrollar estos tipos de fotografía.
Nuestra relación con la captura digital en alta resolución, de la que somos pioneros, se remonta a 1997.
En este momento nos econtramos avocados a la incorporación de nuevas técnicas a nuestro quehacer, ejemplos de éstas puedes verlas en las galerías de panorámicas esféricas e imágenes HDR.

Name: Photography for Industry
Description:
Blackpool College was responsible for my photography training during the 1980's.  At the time it was considered one of the best places to study photography with a high proportion of students proceeding into the profession.

In 1988, I took on the role of staff photographer with the world's largest oil company, Saudi ARAMCO, based in Saudi Arabia.  The Dhahran photolab supported the company Kingdom wide both onshore and offshore.  Frequent commissions came in from the petrochemical complexes, capturing installations and expansion projects.  Remote desert construction projects and Gulf based operations with shipping were regular subjects.  Working with other major contractors also took place on big projects including Brown & Root and Bechtel.

Photography for Industry was created in 1995 having returned from The Middle East.  The aim was to establish UK based clientele which relied upon high quality photography to support marketing.  Topics which have been regular subjects include :-  transport, chemical plants, manufacturing, workshops, fabrication, paints, quarrying, metals, surface coatings, machinery, process industry, building, heavy lifts, technology, recycling, composites, agriculture,systems & controls, shipping, electrical installations, materials handling, alloys, analytical services, heat treatments, waste to energy and the odd school prospectus.  More recently, pest control has been covered in food manufacturing and preparation areas.

The aim is to supply top quality, well lit images for use in literature, presentations, exhibition displays and to support business promotion and tenders.  To transform everyday subjects into striking images which will provoke interest and generate business and enhance the image portrayed by the company.

An extensive gallery can be viewed at www.photographyforindustry.com

Name: Sarah Anne Wilson Photography
Description:
We specialize in coaching clients so you know exactly what to do with your face. For example, where to position your nose, how to stretch your neck slightly forward to thin out your jawline and neck, and to drop your head so that your eyes open wider and allow more light to capture the color of your eyes. Together, we’ll work to create different expressions, including small, medium, and large smiles. We’ll also work on positioning your body into just the right angles. It’s important not to turn too far during a headshot session.

A professional headshot should always reflect your personality…confident, friendly, and easy-going. At the same time, We'll pay particular attention to details. From your posture and expression to hair, make up and clothing. We'll make sure everything comes together seamlessly in order to create headshots that you’ll love.

Name: Tempest Travel Photography
Description:
Tempest Travel Photography (TTP) is a division of Tempest Photography, a company with over 90 years of heritage and a reputation as one of the UK’s largest and most trusted photographic firms.

While Tempest’s headquarters in St. Ives, Cornwall, is home to one of Europe’s most advanced photographic laboratories, TTP operates remotely from Southampton to better serve the cruise industry. This allows us to stay closely connected with our partners and provide exceptional photographic services to the Cunard and P&O Cruises fleets.

We employ over 100 talented photographers across 11 cruise ships, supported by a dedicated shoreside team. Our photographers capture the magical moments that make each voyage unforgettable, offering a range of services including elegant portraits, private photo shoots, and event photography.

TTP brings the traditions of professional photography to the excitement of travel, ensuring that cruise guests take home lasting memories of their once-in-a-lifetime adventures. Together, we create timeless images and exceptional experiences for guests on the world’s most prestigious cruise lines.

I am a visual storyteller. I believe the visual image is a powerful tool that creates a lasting impression of emotion, curiosity, caring and ultimately hope and humanity. 
Photographs illustrate life in a way that words cannot.

What is important to me in my work is the way my understanding of people and the world deepens. I hope my work inspires others to see we all matter and to care more profoundly.
I travel the world photographing divergent peoples and cultures. The resulting images express the dignity of our universal connection. I believe we are all the same — we all want to be loved, to love our families and our traditions.
The soulful intimacy of my photos comes from my having developed personal relationships with my subjects, spending time in their world and capturing the essence of their culture. The permission they grant me, the openness they offer by inviting my into their world, never ceases to inspire me. My mind, my eyes and my heart have been opened by these experiences. I hope my images do the same for you.
In collaboration with foundations, corporations and NGOs whose efforts are directed toward addressing important social welfare concerns, I am able to fulfill my personal mission to bring a greater awareness of pressing humanitarian issues. 

For collaborations, assignments, editorials or other questions, feel free to contact me directly.


Follow my endeavors: www.martinvogt.ch

In fotografie draait alles om focus, de juiste focus is namelijk essentieel voor een geslaagde foto. KeepFocus dus. De foto vertelt daarmee een verhaal. Een verhaal dat wordt gezien, maar waarbij er door iedereen een andere uitleg aan zal worden geven. Een goede foto is daarmee een momentopname die de geest blijft prikkelen.

Hi, ik ben Dave en ik ben freelance fotograaf. Mijn focus ligt op verschillende facetten van het vak. Met een jarenlange achtergrond in de reiswereld vormt reisfotografie een logische gevolg. Koffer, ticket én camera; ze zijn al heel lang onlosmakelijk met elkaar verbonden. Mijn scherpe oog voor details en menselijke emoties zorgen voor sfeervolle en eigentijdse beelden bij de fotografie van evenementen. Daarnaast zorgen mijn persoonlijke interesses in architectuur, interieur en design ervoor dat ook woningen en (bedrijfs)gebouwen professioneel worden vastgelegd.

Ooit begonnen met een Agfa Click II (wie kent ‘m nog?), maar inmiddels werkzaam met high-end materiaal, inclusief digitale nabewerking. Drone-fotografie behoort hierbij ook zeker tot de mogelijkheden.

Neem gerust contact met mij op, bij interesse in inhuur of een reproductie van mijn foto’s. De mogelijkheden zijn talrijk.

Name: Paradox
Description:
Paradox develops projects around contemporary issues with documentary authors: photographers, filmmakers, visual artists, writers and researchers. Since 1993 the non-profit has produced over 60 distinctive activities, travelling to some 120 venues worldwide. Among the projects realized are Maydan - Hundred Portraits by artist Emeric Lhuisset, Go No Go with photographs by Ad van Denderen and The Last Days of Shishmaref with filmmaker Jan Louter and photographer Dana Lixenberg. 

Within these projects we experiment explicitly with multimedia forms of presentation, and the interaction between different disciplines (photography, film, audio, writing) as well as platforms (exhibitions, websites, books, DVDs, tablet Apps and educational programmes). Our main goal is to reach a wide audience without losing the nuances that the addressed social issues require. This is the main reason behind our multiplatform strategy: one reaches a different audience with a diversity of platforms. But the synergy between different media as well as platforms also creates new experiences for an audience, raising questions in unexpected ways. Furthermore it challenges the notions and conventions around the presentation of (photographic) material leading to experiments mixing of old and new technology, media and platforms. 

Paradox seeks partners in realizing these kind of projects, in particular publishers, designers and partner institutions in the Netherlands and abroad. Exhibitions are created in close collaboration with museums and as a result travel to a broad variety of institutions, both nationally and internationally. Venues in which Paradox projects have been shown include FOAM (NL), Photographers Gallery (UK), Three Shadows Photography Art Center (CN) and Le Centquatre (FR).

Name: Stichting De Zilveren Camera
Description:
De Zilveren Camera is de Nederlandse prijs voor fotojournalistiek en documentaire fotografie en wordt sinds 1949 uitgereikt. Stichting De Zilveren Camera is de drijvende kracht achter het initiatief. De Zilveren Camera heeft als taak de kwaliteit van de fotojournalistiek in Nederland te verhogen, een opdracht die nog komt van de oprichters in 1949. Het belangrijkste instrument hiervoor is de jaarlijkse wedstrijd, waarmee prijzen worden toegekend in diverse categorieën en de keuze voor de belangrijkste onderscheiding voor nieuwsfotografie in Nederland: de Canon Zilveren Camera.

MISSIE
De Zilveren Camera is maatgevend voor de Nederlandse fotojournalistiek en toont jaarlijks de stand van het vakgebied. Zij stimuleert kwaliteit en vernieuwing in alle disciplines van de visuele journalistiek. Tegelijkertijd wil de Zilveren Camera het belang van fotojournalistiek voor een pluriforme, democratische en open samenleving benadrukken.

De Zilveren Camera wil een platform zijn om de fotojournalistiek in al haar facetten te stimuleren en de binding met fotojournalisten te vergroten. Gericht op jong en oud, op hard nieuws, op verdieping en vernieuwing. De Zilveren Camera wil alle vormen van fotojournalistiek omarmen, wil versnipperen noch uitsluiten, en de kwaliteit van de fotojournalistiek voortdurend verbeteren.

We offer a range of Visual Documentation services - well beyond standard construction site progress photography and videos, including; 

•	Pre-Construction photos & videos 
•	Construction Site Progress Photography and Video Documentation
•	Aerial Photography
•	FAA Certified UAS / UAV / Drone Pilot Services
•	UAS-Drone 4K Aerial Imagery

Name: College Marsan
Description:
Le Collège Marsan est une institution privée où les étudiantes et les étudiants peuvent se réaliser pleinement dans des programmes spécialement conçus pour des adultes passionnés qui n’ont pas de temps à perdre.

 Vous faites un retour aux études?

Notre engagement est de vous aider dans un des projets les plus important de votre vie : apprendre un métier dans un domaine qui vous passionne et qui vous rendra heureux. Grâce aux divers cours de l’attestation d’études collégiales en photographie ou en multimédia, vous découvrirez tous les aspects essentiels à la réalisation de votre projet de carrière. L’efficacité de nos programmes repose sur une formation technique solide en imagerie numérique et une recherche artistique individuelle, le tout enseigné dans l’optique d’une approche commerciale en phase avec les réalités du milieu.

La photo amateur vous intéresse?

Que vous soyez débutant ou avancé, nos ateliers de photo et de vidéo ouverts à tous sauront répondre à vos besoins. Vous y découvrirez tous les éléments créatifs et techniques pour bien vivre votre passion des images.

Grace à sa réputation, le service de placement du Collège de photographie Marsan est quotidiennement sollicité par des employeurs qui trouvent chez nos diplômés des professionnels compétents pour combler leurs besoins en images. Ces occasions d’emplois et l’aide des professeurs permettent aux étudiants, et ce, très tôt dans leur formation, d’apprivoiser le métier tout en se bâtissant rapidement une clientèle.

Name: Andy Mallins Photography
Description:
Hello and welcome to Andy Mallins Photography!

I am an Aerial and Landscape Photographer based in Manchester.

My fascination with photography started over ten years ago when I got my first iPhone and setup my Instagram account, at some point in that Instagram journey and from all the feedback and likes I received, I realised I had a natural eye for taking landscape shots. 

Over the last couple of years I have took my passion for photography further and have featured in exhibitions and have been a winner of regional photography competitions.

Shot with either my Leica Q2, DJI Mavic 3 Pro or Mini 3 Pro, my style of aerial photography and landscape photography captures the very essence of the moment, the mood, the drama, the atmosphere and holds it in time. 

And I’m proud to share my stunning collection of seascape photography, aerial photography, coastal photography and landscape photos featuring lighthouses, windmills, statues and landmarks. 

All prints for sale in my print shop are of the highest standard in image and print quality. Photos are printed on Canon professional photo paper using a Canon professional photo printer with Canon inks and are then shipped safely and securely in Andy Mallins Photography branded packaging.

My prints make a great present for you or a loved one and look great as part of your home decor or displayed in an office. 

If you do not see an option available for my prints, such as royalty free licenses for the original images, custom borders on prints, framed prints, printed canvases or different paper sizes or types, then please contact me and I will do my very best to fulfil your request. 

I am also available for collaboration and commissioned work, either aerial or landscape photography, please contact me to discuss any requirements you may have. Some of my current clients include Wigan Council, Manchester Central and The Woodland Trust.

Description:
Photography is the challenge to inspire others minds. To go a little beyond.

After being a lawyer for more than 20 years, I decided to study Photography from the beginning, and follow my dreams.  My work is based on my passion for human issues, for nature and transformation. 

Photography passionates me because it's a way to be involved with people, with nature and with my inner thoughts.

Name: Sitevisuals
Description:
At Sitevisuals, we know time-lapse photography. Our high-quality, high-frequency image capture ensures you never miss a minute of site activity. Use your web browser to view progress from anywhere through our cloud-based portal.

Capture and share important project milestones with ease, thanks to our database of high-resolution images. Plus, commemorate your project’s journey with a professionally produced, in-house time-lapse video.

We also offer professional photography services with an AIPP accredited photographer for progress and project completion imagery.

Sitevisuals has been a part of some of Western Australia’s most iconic development milestones, including the ongoing expansion of the International Terminal at Perth Airport, the redevelopment of the Perth Museum, the construction of ECU’s $853 million city campus, and the demolition and rebuild of the Fitzroy River Bridge. We have also been actively involved in Perth’s largest ever single investment in public transport, METRONET. Our time-lapse cameras have captured the action along the Armadale Line Upgrade, as well as critical beam lifts in the eastern corridor.

We look forward to discussing with you how we can best support your next project!

Name: G Photography by G
Description:
At G Photography by G, we believe every family has a story worth telling—and preserving. We specialize in luxury portrait photography that captures the heart of your journey, turning meaningful moments into timeless visual narratives.

Led by Gwendolyn Houston-Jack, a Certified Black Woman Photographer and passionate storyteller, G Photography by G offers a full-service portrait experience that is joyful, stress-free, and deeply personal. We take the lead on your photo projects—so you can simply relax, be present, and enjoy the moment while we bring your vision to life.

Gwendolyn’s artistic approach blends elegance with authenticity, celebrating family, identity, and legacy through powerful imagery. Whether you're celebrating a milestone, updating your family portraits, or simply want to honor your story, we guide you through every step—from creative direction to custom-designed wall art and heirloom albums that transform your home into a gallery of love and connection.

We proudly serve Arlington, the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex, and Houston, offering personalized sessions that reflect your values, your beauty, and your voice. Our work is rooted in inclusion, self-love, and the belief that everyone deserves to see themselves represented with dignity and grace.

At G Photography by G, we don’t just take pictures—we tell stories that last for generations.

Name: Gerry O'Leary Photography
Description:
Gerry O’Leary is an international multi-award winning photographer specialising in architecture & interior photography. 

He is acknowledged as Europe‘s foremost architectural photographer, and is just one of two “European Masters of Architectural Photography“ – a distinction conferred on him by the Federation of European Photographer’s in 2007. 

Gerry has won 18 international awards for his photography – which notably include, European Commercial Photographer of the Year 2009/10, and Best British Architectural photographer of the year 2009 & 2010.


O’Leary believes that “photographers are hired for their vision, they compose just like musicians and poets, they are commissioned for their ability to see and for their creative aptitude and they earn their reputation accordingly”.

Gerry is an accomplished & highly respected international photographic judge. He has judged in Ireland, UK, Italy and the UAE. He was recently appointed to the European panel of international judges to judge the European photographer of the year awards for 2011.

O’Leary is a past President of the Irish Professional Photographer’s Association and a past President of Master Photographer’s Association of Great Britian. He has guest-lectured in Ireland, UK, Italy, Spain and the UAE.
    
Now a resident of the UAE, Gerry is recognised as the leading interior & architectural photographer in the GCC region having recently been commissioned to photograph many prestigious projects which include;-

Name: Festival of Ethical Photography
Description:
A Festival entirely dedicated to photojournalism. 

Annualy, we organize an international contest entitled World. Report Award|Documenting Humanity. This year, the Festival of Ethical Photography is pleased to present the eleventh edition of the contest.
The maturity and experience gained over ten years of an international competition, alongside dozens of judges from all over the world represent an incredible heritage as well as a challenge to continually improve.

Every year the contest creates a fresco that tells the stories of our Planet, its great changes and its intimate and personal relationships connecting human beings.
A collective narrative unfolds each year out of the trust and commitment that the world of photography offers alongside our continued promise to try our best to support the international photojournalism community. 

The World.Report Award aims at a new form of social commitment through photography. The award is open to both professional and amateur photographers from all over the world.

The award will give attention to works focusing on people and their social or cultural stories; public or private, minor or crucial, major human tragedies or smaller daily life stories, changes and immutability.
The main focus of the evaluation of the reportages will be the story that the project tells through compelling images submitted.
The awards are intended to economically support photographers who are actively engaged in this sector of photography.

Name: Don Feely - Photographer
Description:
I help professionals solve their headshot and portrait problem—and deliver what most people rarely experience in front of a camera: confidence, comfort, and results they genuinely love.

If you’ve ever felt uncomfortable, rushed, or disappointed by a past photo session, you’re not alone. I understand those concerns firsthand. That’s why every session I run is guided, relaxed, and step-by-step. From posing to expression to professional lighting, I coach you through the entire process so you look approachable, credible, and polished—never stiff or over-posed.
No one leaves my sessions without a headshot or portrait they’re proud to use.

I’m a member in good standing with Professional Photographers of America (PPA) and Professional Photographers of North Carolina (PPNC), and I bring that standard of professionalism to every client experience.

My work has supported individuals stepping into new roles, careers, and companies, as well as organizations such as the Town of Apex, NC, Boy Scouts of America, Duke Law School, Freshfields Law Practice, and Arise Collective. Selected images have been featured on billboards for Donate Life NC across North Carolina and published in City Insight and Health Tech magazines.

If your image matters—and how you’re perceived professionally does

I make sure your photos work for you, not against you.

- Do you want a stunning headshot that represents you?
- Do you want your staff headshots to look consistent and professional?
- Do you want a photographer who listens to you?
- Do you want to feel good about the photographs you are posting on your profile?

Name: fivefourstudios
Description:
fivefourstudios, a 1970’s warehouse transformed into a state of the photographic studio and event space. The building has been renovated and reopened by David Oldham, a world-famous fashion and beauty photographer and Emma Stamp, who brings over twenty years fashion retail and hospitality management to the business.

David’s aspiration was to create the perfect photographic studio both in a practical and aesthetic sense, and it is his style and attention to detail which has made this a reality. Restoring much of the original industrial features and adding a touch of decadence, the result is an elegant mix of styles from the scandi-minimalism of the loft to the opulence of the bar and lounge.

The unique venue set over three floors consists of three pure white studios, one full daylight studio and two with infinity coves, a bar and lounge.

The studios have served a number of high-end clients, including Manchester United and Manchester City football clubs, Morrisons, Footasylum, New Balance, Team GB, Oxfam, NSPCC, Metrolink and Adidas, and the fivefourteam are now turning their creative skill, operational expertise and excellent client service to events.

Name: Nick Cole Photography
Description:
Great photos don’t just look nice, they tell a story and bring you and your business to life. Your photography is an important investment so you need photos that represent your business and show you looking your best. And authentic photography lets people imagine how it would feel to work with you, and ultimately makes it more likely they’ll get in touch. 


A bit about me

I’m Nick, a specialist in bringing your business stories to life with photography. I can help you create engaging headshots, personal branding and business storytelling photography that helps you connect with your customers. 

Before photography, I had a 20-year career in commercial and marketing roles. I’ve worked in SME’s and corporates, where I developed the marketing and storytelling skills I still use every day. 

I’ve been a photographer since my 20’s and after gaining my LRPS with the Royal Photographic Society, I’ve built a business based on great customer service, collaborations with other creatives and a visual storytelling style that brings what you do to life. 


So what might your photos look like?

It could be a headshot for a profile picture showing you looking your best, or a storytelling photo that reveals more about the business. Ultimately, each set of photos will ‘look’ different, as your brief will be different to the next person’s. But the aim is the same: to create authentic and compelling images that leave your audience wanting to find out more about you. 


Helping you feel comfortable

I know for many, you may feel self-conscious about how you’ll come across in your photos. It’s totally natural! You put a lot of thought and care into what you do, of course you want your photos to do your work justice. I’ll guide you at every stage. I’ll get to know you first, we’ll explore your business plans and how you intend to use the images. This allows us to create something that truly reflects your vision.

Name: Fotoforma.pl
Description:
Fotoforma powstała w 2002 roku, z młodzieńczej pasji jej założyciela. Od 2007 roku stopniowo uzyskaliśmy większość liczących się na rynku autoryzacji wiodących marek fotograficznych. Dziś, dekadę później, Fotoforma to specjalistyczny dostawca rozwiązań fotograficznych z wartością dodaną.
Oznacza to, że nie jesteśmy jedynie dostawcą pudełek – oprócz prowadzenia sklepu, aktywnie działamy na rynku fotograficznym, organizujemy warsztaty i szkolenia, mamy własny komis fotograficzny, prowadzimy laboratorium usługowe i wspieramy sprzętowo duże imprezy ogólnopolskie. Nie ma co ukrywać, fotografia to nasza pasja, której oddajemy się bez reszty.

W sklepie fotoforma.pl znajdziesz wszystko to, czego potrzebujesz, by fotografować amatorsko lub profesjonalnie. Oferujemy m.in. aparaty cyfrowe, lustrzanki, bezlusterkowce, obiektywy, statywy, lampy błyskowe, statki powietrzne, kamery, aparaty profesjonalne, aparaty amatorskie, a także liczne akcesoria fotograficzne. 

Działalność Fotoformy nie ogranicza się do zapewniania sprzętu profesjonalnym i amatorskim fotografom. Działamy na znacznie szerszą skalę, tworząc zintegrowane oferty dla firm stomatologicznych i kosmetycznych, które potrzebują stałej i profesjonalnej dokumentacji stanu zdrowia pacjenta przed, po i w trakcie prowadzonego leczenia. Oprócz tego dostarczamy certyfikowany sprzęt fotograficzny policji, jednostkom wojskowym i służbom specjalnym, a także służbom leśnym, Straży Granicznej i wielu innym polskim służbom mundurowym. Od 2013 roku w sprzęt Canon wyposażamy fotoreporterów Legii Warszawa. Nasza działalność obejmuje również prowadzenie specjalistycznego laboratorium fotograficznego Fotolab, w którym pomagamy przygotować profesjonalne zdjęcia. Każdego roku organizujemy wydarzenie pod nazwą „Wizje natury” dla specjalistów fotografii przyrodniczej oraz działamy jako partner stowarzyszeń fotografów ślubnych.

Jesteśmy autoryzowanym partnerem najlepszych producentów aparatów i akcesoriów fotograficznych.

Name: Stuart Hasson Headshots

WHAT I CAN DO FOR YOU!
You're looking for an image that will make people stop and consider you.  They'll want to read more about you, get to know you better, and how they can move forward with you.  A great Headshot can do that!  Executive Portraits, Modeling Headshots, or a straight forward Business Head Shot that says "This is ME" and "I'm Not Hiding"!  THAT'S what I can do for you.

HOW DO WE DO THAT?  
Yes, 'WE'.  This is a collaboration because this is going to be the BEST VERSION OF YOU POSSIBLE.  I'll get to know your END GAME.  What you need to happen from your photo session and how your portrait will be used.  The COMPLIMENTARY phone consultation is so important for this.  It's the KEY to unlocking a GREAT HEADSHOT.

TYPICAL SESSION
Studio Sessions or On-Location Sessions; we talk about everything you're hoping for BEFORE the session so we don't waste any time during your Camera Time.  Wardrobe, Looks, Backdrops, and Backgrounds.  All of this plays a part in making you look Great.  Posing and Lighting are my Specialties so we'll work together to get you comfortable and looking your best.  Nice and RELAXED.  CONFIDENT. APPROACHABLE and ready GO!  
You'll review all of the images at the end of your session, select the ones you want and they'll be delivered within 2 days. 

100% Money-Back Satisfaction Guarantee!

Let me know how I can help you look GREAT with my camera!

Name: Bigstock
Description: Bigstock was founded in 2004 with the goal of providing affordable, royalty-free images – perfect for any type of design project. Since then, Bigstock has grown into one of the world's largest credit-based stock image agencies, offering millions of high quality photographs, illustrations, and vectors.  Bigstock's extensive image library, its affordability and strong search engine have made the company an important resource for image buyers worldwide. In 2009, Shutterstock, the world's largest subscription-based stock image company, acquired Bigstock. Bigstock, based in New York City, is a wholly owned subsidiary of Shutterstock.

Name: Orama Photography Studies
Description:
THE PHILOSOPHY
Passion for photography, constant progress, freedom in expression: These are the principles that are taught at Orama. With high demands, first of all by us and then by our students, we commit ourselves to a lively, creative teaching process that will train perfectly and inspire every photography lover to discover his own self as a photographer.

THE PROGRAM
Keeping track of the latest trends worldwide, Orama offers an innovative and versatile photographic program. Here, the student can explore a whole range of photographic kinds with annual courses or autonomous workshops, while the professional photographer can evolve with specialized seminars. Intensive programs, photographic trips around the world, and even private or distance photography courses complement the available photographic experiences.

THE SCHOOL
The school was founded in 2007 and has hosted thousands of students until today. Its graduates have excelled both in the professional field and in important artistic events. It is housed in a modern photographic studio in the center of Ampelokipoi, providing all the necessary teaching materials. The courses at Orama are taken up by recognized professionals, while top Greek and international photographers work regularly with the school.

Name: Sumico Photography
Description:
Sumiko Eyears is an internationally awarded portrait photographer.  Through her business, Sumico Photography she produces magazine style portraits that transform everyday women into stunning models. Sumiko works with professional hair and makeup artists who bring out the natural beauty in women of all ages having them looking and feeling beautiful inside and out.  Sumiko then guides her client throughout the photoshoot showing them the best poses for their body type, helping them to relax and have fun to bring out their natural, radiant essence. 

Clients can also enjoy a complimentary styling session with Sumiko to advise on the most flattering outfits in preparation for the photo shoot. Professional stylist and personal shopping can be arranged at extra cost. Sumiko carries a selection of outfits at her studio to suit all sizes and tastes. This allows for multiple outfit changes to achieve very different looks.

Sumiko is currently running a special promotion called 50 over 50 Project, Chapter 2 – portraits of 50 women over the age of 50.  She has completed photo shoots for the first 50 women and the second round is now open to applicants.  The first 50 women’s portrait will be exhibited at the Able Gallery in Loganlea from October 24th to 30th.

Business Photo NL specializes in branding photography services! 
From professional headshots to captivating visuals that define your business.

Do you recall that sinking feeling when you look at a bad photo? It's the moment your confidence takes a hit.

Our mission is to make people happy and elevate your confidence through stunning photos.

Marfa Vasilieva (M.P. Viegas), founder and photographer at Business Photo NL, is a versatile professional adept at capturing moments and uplifting individuals through her artistry.

Through Business Photo NL, Marfa offers tailored photography solutions for individuals, groups, and businesses. 

Business Photo NL and its team specialize in creating magnetic visuals that resonate with your audience, blending marketing expertise with personal brand insights. 
Our phototherapy method brings out your authentic self, complemented by contemporary art influences for added creativity and flair.

La galerie Écho 119 offre également une large sélection de livres photo, des dernières sorties aux éditions rares. Noëlle Colin, la fondatrice de la galerie, partage sa vie entre la France et le japon, et rapporte régulièrement dans ses valises des raretés dénichées au japon.

- - -

Galerie Écho 119, (formerly &co119 Gallery), was founded in 2016, as an unconventional gallery / bookstore specializing in photography. The gallery presents the works of both well-known and as yet undiscovered photographers from Japan and around the world. Galerie Écho 119 also offers a large selection of photobooks, new releases, but also rare editions. Noëlle Colin, the owner who shares her life between France and Japan, looks for rarities directly in japan, several times a year.

Somos un equipo súper fresco, que ayuda a las empresas interactuar a con sus público de una manera divertida, creativa e innovadora. Sabemos lo potente que es una fotografía para una persona es por eso selfietime! une a la tecnología con la fotografía, brindando la mejor experiencia fotográfica para eventos.

Contamos con 5 servicios:

-SelfiePrint: Tus invitados podrán interactuar con tu marca con solo usar un hashtag, a la hora de publicar su fotografía en las redes sociales, se imprimirán lindas fotos brandeadas.
-SelfieGif: Es una estación fija que se coloca en un punto donde tus invitados posan y crean GIF, estos se pueden compartir en redes sociales automáticamente y también se pueden imprimir con el diseño de tu evento.
-Selfiewall: Todas las fotos que se van publicando con el hashtag de tu evento, podrán ser reproducidas en las pantallas gigantes! :D
-Paparazzi: Un fotógrafo de nuestro equipo recorre tu evento y va tomando fotos con una cámara profesional, las fotos son de tamaño jumbo y son brandeadas! 
-SelfiePad: Un anfitrión de nuestro equipo recorre tu evento con un ipad para que tus invitados creen GIF, Boomerang para que los compartan en redes, haciendo que tu marca llegue a más personas de una manera orgánica y divertida! Y lo mejor es que te genera base datos! 

Beneficios para tu marca:

1. Exposición de marca, mediante el uso del hashtag, tu evento tendrá más exposición en redes sociales (twitter / instagram)
2. Engagement, tus invitados engancharán más con tu marca al llevarse un recuerdo personalizado, mucho más potente que un merchandising
3. Es medible, porque se puede evaluar el comportamiento del hashtag utilizado en tu evento y así medir el impacto que tuvo.
4. Fotos sin perderte de un minuto del evento, porque con selfietime! no existen colas como en las fotocabinas.
5. Alta recordación, Porque es algo más que un simple merchandising, es una fotografía editada e impresa por tu invitado, la cual guardará o colocará en un lugar especial.

Name: CLAP - Comité de Liaison et d'Action pour la Photographie
Description:
Le CLAP est une association loi 1901 fondée en février 2019 à la suite de deux  tribunes publiées dans Libération  et au mouvement #PayeTaPhoto lancé à l’occasion de la semaine d’ouverture des Rencontres d’Arles 2018.

Né de l’association de cinq agences et collectifs d’auteurs (Signatures, modds, Tendance Floue, MYOP et VU’), le CLAP a pour but de procéder à l’étude et à la défense des droits et des intérêts économiques et moraux, tant collectifs qu’individuels, de ses membres. Par la création de ce comité, ses fondateurs se réunissent régulièrement pour faire état des pratiques auxquelles ils sont confrontés chaque jour et en informer au mieux ses adhérents. La mission du CLAP est avant tout pédagogique, son rôle est de faire de la prévention auprès de  ses adhérents afin de les avertir des mauvaises pratiques que subissent nos métiers. 

Représentant d’agences et collectifs d’auteurs travaillant sur le territoire français, le CLAP a aussi pour mission de faire valoir la photographie française en France, et à terme, à l’international. Nous sommes convaincus qu’il existe une école française et que ses auteurs doivent être mis sur le devant de la scène !

Name: Herzensbilder
Description:

Familien, in denen ein Kind schwer krank oder verunfallt ist, Familien, in denen ein Baby zu früh oder still geboren wird, können den Dienst von Herzensbilder beanspruchen. Herzensbilder richtet sich auch an Familien mit Kindern und Jugendlichen bis und mit 18 Jahren, in denen ein Elternteil bedrohlich schwer erkrankt oder verletzt ist.

Die Organisation Herzensbilder ist ein 2013 von Kerstin Birkeland gegründeter gemeinnütziger Verein, der sich für kostenlose Familienfotografien einsetzt, wo um ein schwer krankes Mitglied der Familie gebangt wird. Der Verein besteht und wirkt dank der Spenden und dank vieler ehrenamtlicher Einsätze.

As a photographer, Ritam has shot extensively across categories : travel, photojournalism, advertising, interiors, portraits, automobiles, fashion; always seeking inspiration and challenge in variety

Ritam has shot for brands such as Audi, M.A.C, Hermès, Elizabeth Arden, Mercedes-Benz, Ford, Disney, Incredible India, Hershey's, Christian Louboutin, Royal Enfield, Unilever and McDonald’s, among others

He has also worked with several fortune 500 companies like General Electric, Siemens, HSBC, Citigroup, Tata Steel, Procter & Gamble, Johnson & Johnson, Accenture, Bosch, Deutsche Bank, Novartis, Roche, Barclays Bank, State Bank of India, ABB, Nike, Microsoft, Citibank, Shell, Volkswagen

Globally, Ritam is represented by Getty Images

He has also been the official photographer of global sporting events, such as BCCI Indian Premier League 2010, ICC Cricket World Cup 2011, T-20 Cricket World Cup 2016 and ICC Women’s World Cup 2017

In recent years, Ritam has discovered the joy of sharing ideas and experiences with amateurs and professionals at conferences & seminars. From the University of Johannesburg, South Africa, to the Indian Institute of Technology, he has taught, and in turn, learnt, about his art. He was also invited as a speaker at TEDx talks

Name: Graine de Photographe

Le groupe GP Lab

GP Lab voit le jour en 2018 dans le prolongement de Graine de Photographe. Déjà leader des cours photo pour le grand public, nous renforçons ainsi notre rôle d’acteur majeur du monde de l’image.

Avec GPLab.fr, nous communiquons sur nos différentes marques et activités :

Graine de Photographe
Graine de Photographe, dédiée aux formations photo et vidéo pour le grand public, seul ou en groupe, partout en France ainsi qu’en Belgique et en Suisse. 

Une offre complète sur des durées courtes ou longues, complétée par des masterclass et des ateliers photo privés dans des lieux prestigieux.

Nos photographes professionnels accompagnent également nos citybreak et voyages photo, partout dans le monde.

_______

GP Business
GP Business dédie aux entreprises et à leurs collaborateurs, le savoir-faire de notre marque historique grand public, Graine de Photographe.

Nous proposons des séances de portraits, des reportages photo et vidéo sur vos activités et lors de vos évènements, des prises de vue de vos infrastructures, produits et services.

Nous organisons, sur mesure et avec vous, des formations photo et vidéo, des Team Building et des ateliers photo privés dans des lieux exceptionnels, encadrés par nos photographes, ainsi que des séminaires et voyages incluant des activités autour de l’image.

Name: Judith Keessen Fotografie
Description:
Sneller verkopen en meer omzet. De website bezoeker laten terugkeren en verleiden tot een aanvraag of bestelling. Tijd- en kosten besparing. Dit bereik je door te investeren in goed, helder en duidelijk beeldmateriaal.
Een klant ziet graag met wie hij/zij zaken doet. Voeg een persoonlijke noot aan je site toe en een klant neemt sneller contact op.
 
Door de aandachtsspanne van 1,2 seconden van een gemiddelde surfer is een pakkende foto hét middel de bezoeker te intrigeren, wat uitnodigt verder te kijken en klikken. Zorg dat de bezoeker een klant wordt!
Hoge bomen zagen lange planken; wees anders dan je concurrent, focus op je klant en laat zien wat je doet.

Goed beeldmateriaal verdient zich in no time terug.
Zoals uitnodigende hotelkamers voor op booking sites, culinaire hoogstandjes van restaurants, producten en processen binnen bedrijven, huizen en vastgoedfotografie voor makelaars, personeel- en teamfoto's.

Op locatie of in mijn studio, ik help je jouw eigen onderscheidend vermogen in beeld te brengen en het resultaat te bereiken dat je wilt; meer klanten en meer omzet!
