Name: Photosbyroed.dk
Description:
Lars Roed er en dansk prisvindende fotograf, der især er kendt for sine smukke fotografier af Vadehavet og den sårbare skønhed i vores verden. Han har gennem sin karriere skabt enestående fotokunst, der fanger det rå og vigtige i vores omgivelser, men også det sanselig og smukke. 

Jeg holder en del foredrag om min rejse ud af stress, om mine billeder, teknikker og billedkomposition. 

Jeg guider både 1 til 1 og grupper rundt i Vadehavet, i teknikker og redigering i Adobe Lightroom og Photoshop. 

Udover landskabsbilleder, arbejdes der også meget med portrætbilleder, både privat og virksomhed. Og det kan både være enkel person eller grupper

Årets Fotograf 2021/2022 – Natur & Dyr – dff/Dansk Fotografisk Forening


“Fine Art Photography Awards (FAPA)” – Landscape 2nd place winner

"Best of Nation" winner at World Photographic Cup 2020 & 2022 (WPC Photographer National Team 2019-2022 - det danske fotograflandshold)


"Bedste læserskud" winner in Digital Foto magazine 2019 (The north biggest photo magazine

Name: MARM360 by Rakesh Panchal
Description:
MARM360 is a passionate and experienced professional photographer specializing in hotel, resort, and architectural photography. With the privilege of working with renowned hotel brands, we contribute to their visual storytelling through captivating photography. We have crafted a unique style that combines technical expertise with creative vision.

Our Offering:
At MARM360, our forte lies in capturing the essence of hotel properties and bringing forth their unique features. Whether it's the grandiosity façade, luxurious accommodations, grandeur of banqueting spaces, inviting amenities, or the enchanting ambiance, we specialize in showcasing these elements through our lens. Beyond that, our comprehensive services extend to food and lifestyle photography, social media content creation, video reels, and promotional video production.

Camera Gears:
Central to our commitment to delivering outstanding results is our utilization of top-tier, professional-grade camera equipment. The renowned Fujifilm GFX system, boasting a large format and an impressive 102-megapixel capability, stands as a testament to our dedication to excellence in architectural and interior photography. Complemented by a diverse range of GF lenses, professional lighting systems, filters, and additional equipment, our gear enhances the overall quality consistently, enabling us to produce exceptional results.

Clients and Portfolio:
Over the years, MARM360 has had the privilege of working with an array of esteemed hotel brands, contributing significantly to their visual storytelling through captivating photography. Our portfolio boasts collaborations with iconic names such as JW Marriott, The Leela, ITC, Hilton, Taj, Vivanta, Crowne Plaza, Novotel, Holiday Inn, The Lalit, Sarovar, and many more.

We invite you to explore my portfolio on our website at https://marm360.com/ You can also see projects individually at https://marm360.com/hotels-projects-gallery

Name: Nannie van Berkel - Pegasus Art & Fotografie
Description:
Pegasus Art werkt in opdracht en presenteert autonoom werk.
Fotografie met een specialisatie in paardenfotografie en fine art. 
Paard en ruiter zo mooi mogelijk op de foto krijgen door op het juiste moment te fotograferen is mijn doel. Met mijn achtergrond in de paarden wedstrijdsport heb ik daar een goede kijk op. Dat kan tijdens een training, een evenement maar ook buiten in de natuur of dichter bij huis.

Dingen mooier maken, maar ook processen beter laten verlopen is wat mij drijft. In mijn zakelijke carrière als accountmanager en HR manager heeft dat ook altijd een rol gespeeld. Naast mijn werkervaring en studie bedrijfskunde wilde ik meer uit mijzelf halen en mijn creativiteit niet alleen gebruiken voor het vinden van oplossingen in een zakelijke omgeving.

Name: Georgie Greene Photography
Description:
Georgie Greene Photography is a Sydney-based headshot and personal branding photography service. Helping professionals and business owners stand out in a crowded digital world with authentic headshots and personal branding portraits that attract ideal clients, generate leads, and grow sales.

In today’s world, having no headshot isn’t optional anymore, especially on LinkedIn. 

A professional headshot:
1. Puts a face to your name
2. Shows you care about your career
3. Attracts professional opportunities because like attracts like

WHAT TO EXPECT?

In just 30–60 minutes, we’ll create a headshot that could make a real difference. We use top-quality lighting or natural light at the perfect time of day, guide you into poses that suit you, and show you the images throughout the session so you’re always in control. It’s a collaborative process and we also like the process to be un-rushed, fun and relaxed. Any anxiety you may have will fade away during one of our photo shoots. Your final images will be edited inhouse to highlight the real you, never a “plastic” version.

WHY CHOOSE US?

1. 100% 5 Star reviews on Google, LinkedIn and Trust Pilot
2. Multi award-winning
3. Trusted by 300+ individuals and companies and counting
4. BA (Hons) Arts Degree - trained in light and composition to create images you will love
5. Corporate background that gives a deep understanding of what you do

WHAT'S NEXT?

Booking is simple: choose the package that’s right for you and book online. Before your session, we’ll chat about the headshot style, what to wear, and what will make you feel confident in front of the camera. Our goal is to create headshots and personal branding that you will love and that truly reflect who you are.

Let’s connect! Whether you need a single headshot, a full team session or personal branding, we would love to help you with authentic and genuine photographs that help you move forward in your career and or business.

Call- 0414 679 797
Email- georgie@ggphoto.com.au

Name: photoSentinel
Description:
photoSentinel is a world leader in long-term timelapse hardware and software.

We partner with local photographers and professional content creators across more than 55 countries, in over than 3000 locations worldwide. 

Our clients use our products and services to capture high-resolution timelapse images of everything from construction sites to seasonal environmental growth. Our systems provide up-to-date photos that can be viewed online anywhere, anytime. 

Our flagship photoSentinel Mach II timelapse system is well-equipped for challenging environments and locations, with solar power, 4G and LAN connectivity, and a rugged weatherproof camera housing.

Our advanced cloud platform enables remote camera control, custom-branded online galleries, and up-to-date status reporting for peace of mind.

With offices in Australia, Dubai and USA, photoSentinel provides around-the-clock sales and technical support across the globe.

Name: laif foundation for independent photojournalism
Description:
Artificial intelligence is blurring the lines between truth and lies, making the spread of disinformation a piece of cake.

Images are of crucial importance in this context.

The mass media are facing a serious loss of public trust, and commercial journalism is barely able to fulfill its informative and monitoring tasks.

The financial pressure in the private media business creates conditions for journalists under which high-quality work is becoming more and more difficult.

Purely profit-oriented social media companies increasingly dominate news flows – largely without comprehensible ethical or editorial standards.

There is a growing danger that journalism, including photojournalism, will become purely mainstream-driven. Only what can (still) be sold is being published.

This creates gaps in the formation of public opinion, and our democracy is gradually losing its independent watchdog.

Now more than ever, a reliable news media is essential – as an authority for credibility and guidance that verifies information, classifies topics and stories constructively and points out connecting factors.

That’s why we are establishing a corporation for non-profit journalism, the
laif foundation for independent photojournalism.
We focus on three key impact areas:

Promoting media literacy
The ability to gather information and evaluate news is becoming increasingly important in democracy. Through photography as a medium, we engage people by providing inspiring educational activities, thus awakening an interest in critical media reflection.

Safeguarding and fostering photojournalism
As a complement to traditional media, we establish exciting and innovative publishing formats for photojournalistic projects.

Providing a quality seal for the provenance and credibility of images
In collaboration with the Content Authenticity Initiative (CAI), we are promoting a standard for the traceable authenticity chain of image media based on a voluntary commitment by creators.

Professional Headshots

If you’re a business owner, entrepreneur, or professional, investing in a high-quality, professionally taken headshot is an investment in your personal brand. It shows you at your best, the way you want prospective clients to see you.
Now that social media has taken on such an important role in promoting our professional abilities (ex:-Linkedin), having an impact-making headshot is more important than ever. Since every social media platform requires a profile image, your headshot will have a far-reaching web presence.
Many of us are not naturally photogenic. As a result, amateur photography can actually end up making you look nothing like you do in person…and definitely not your best. A professional photographer that specializes in headshots knows how to position you, how to choose the best backdrop and how to use lighting to get the best shot possible. 

Commercial / Product photography

As a marketer I am well knowledgeable about brand image and esthetics of a brand. And I can make that hero shot for your product; for commercials or e-commerce. I can photograph your brand with live staging or with live models. 
Also I am equipped with state of the art technology and methods to match the exact colour of your product which most of the competition fail to deliver.

Corporate photos

I have experience photographing managing directors, company board directors and senior managers of leading companies for annual reports, web sites and etc. While understanding the busy schedule of these senior executive I can plan the photoshoot which takes minimum time and at convenient time for my clients.

For your next headshot / commercial shoot contact me on 0718317900.

Name: Fotofestiwal
Description:
Fotofestiwal – International Festival of Photography in Łódź was born in 2001 as one of the first photography events in Poland. It is intended as a space for various forms of photography and a forum for discussion on art and society, but also as a search for alternative methods of talking about photography and its presentation. 

Every year it attracts over 20 thousand visitors from all around the world. The main exhibitions are prepared especially for the festival and they present diverse curator visions. They constitute the core of the whole festival programme and provide themes for subsequent editions. The exhibitions are always complemented by accompanying events, where different audiences exchange their experiences. Visitors, artists, curators and teachers meet during workshops, portfolio review, lectures, discussions and evening slide shows. All the events take place in old factories, tenement buildings and villas in Łódź – post-industrial architecture creates a truly unique atmosphere for presentation of photographs. 

The main organiser of Fotofestiwal is the Foundation of Visual Education which has been cooperating with Łódź Art Center, Art Factory and the City of Łódź Office for a number of years. The organisers have also created the Photo Festival Union – an association that brings together European photography festivals, and the festival itself is a member of the Festival of Light – a similar association operating globally.

Name: FUTURES Photography
Description:
FUTURES is a Europe-based photography platform bringing together the global photography community to support and nurture the professional development of emerging artists across the world. Since 2017, it aims to add long term value in empowering early and mid-career photographers – launching initiatives to promote their work and granting them access to an unprecedented network of professionals, markets and audiences.

FUTURES seeks to encourage new and adventurous ways of enhancing the vital relationship between artists and the industry by creating an ecosystem that allows and stimulates cross-pollination, whilst simultaneously becoming the go-to source for emerging photography worldwide. The platform currently draws from and collaborates with a consortium of the following art institutions across Europe to amplify emerging talents in photography: CAMERA - Centro Italiano per la Fotografia (IT), Centre Photographique Rouen Normandie (FR), Copenhagen Photo Festival (DK), Triennial of Photography Hamburg (DE), Der Greif (DE), FOMU (BE), FOTODOK (NL), Fotofestiwal Lodz (PL), Fotogalleriet (NO), Fotograf Magazine (CZ), Organ Vida (HR), ISSP (LV), PhotoEspaña (ES), PhotoIreland (IE), Photo Romania Festival (RO), Plataforma de Fotografia Ci.Clo (PT), Robert Capa Contemporary Photography Center (HU), Void (GR) and our research member, Eurokleis s.r.l. (IT).

Every year, the Futures members nominate a group of artists to join the platform. By bringing together a wealth of resources and curatorial expertise, each talent selected by the members gains access to an unprecedented network of professionals, markets and audiences. The platform aims to stimulate the photographic economy from the bottom up by expanding the market. Being selected within Futures is a proof of quality of the artists and increases their commercial opportunities.

FUTURES is co-funded by the European Union.

Meine Stärken und Themengebiete liegen in der Landschaftsfotografie, Tierwelt, Pflanzen und Portraits. Als Reisender durch dutzende Länder, wie beispielsweise dem Iran, Tadschikistan, Indien, Russland oder Äthiopien, habe ich mich auch auf die Produktion von Multivisionsshows spezialisiert.

Seit 2020 organisiere ich Fotokurse als umfassenden Lehrgang für Anfänger:innen und bereits erfahrene Fotografen:innen mit folgenden Themen: Kameratechnik, Kameraeinstellungen, Bildgestaltung, Bildbearbeitung, Bildsprache und Präsentation, Archivierung, Blitzen, Studio, Portrait, Landschaften und Architektur. Der Kurs zielt darauf ab, dass die Teilnehmer:innen Ihre Kamera unter verschiedenen Lichtbedingungen besser einsetzen können und kleine fotografische Projekte selbständig realisieren lernen. Im Kurs ist die Kamera das zentrale Arbeitsmittel, die vermittelte Theorie wird stets fotografisch umgesetzt.

Name: Society for Photographic Education
Description:
Society for Photographic Education provides members with opportunities, essential resources and a vibrant community to support their photographic practice. Founded in 1963 with aspirations of refining the language of photography and its study -questions of how to make photographs and how to look at pictures made by others- our heritage is grounded in nurturing the creativity of the individual to the benefit of the larger photographic profession.
 
With 2,300 members and growing, SPE exists as a forum to reflect the concerns of imagemakers and scholars of photography whose far-reaching network offers members many opportunities to build relationships and share knowledge.  
 
The annual national conference held in rotating locations throughout the US each spring provides opportunities for members to present their research and artistic work to a community of peers and celebrate the diversity of photographic practice.  
 
In addition to three days of presentations, the conference features portfolio review sessions, exhibits fair with photographic vendors and institutions, workshops, gallery tours, member exhibition opportunities, a curator portfolio walk through, silent auction, print raffle and much more. In addition to the national conference, SPE's eight regional chapters hold local conferences and events annually as an opportunity to connect with others on a more intimate scale.

Name: Fotograf Kim Poulsen
Description:
Som fotograf kan jeg hjælpe dig med både fotos og videoer af din virksomhed, dine medarbejdere og dine produkter. Men den del kommer nok ikke som en stor overraskelse for dig.

Jeg har mange års erfaring med fotografering, videoer og dronefotografi for virksomheder såvel som private. Som professionel fotograf kan jeg finde de gode vinkler og rigtige motiver, der kan vise din virksomhed frem fra dens bedste side. Jeg tilbyder både erhvervsportrætter, virksomhedsportrætter i både film og videoer, droneoptagelser, produktbilleder, samt presse- og eventfotos. 

Noget, der overraskede mig i 2020 (udover corona), var, at jeg i slutningen af 2020 blevet kåret blandt verdens 10 bedste fotografer, og jeg vandt også titlen “årets fotograf” i kategorien reportage her i Danmark. Det var stort.

Jeg kan vise din virksomhed frem fra den bedste vinkel
Når jeg kommer ud og fotograferer din virksomhed, finder vi sammen ud af, hvad du gerne vil have at virksomheden udstråler. På den måde kan du gennem billederne få fremhævet lige nøjagtig de værdier og egenskaber, som din virksomhed står for. Du kan både få billeder af virksomhedens indre og ydre, eller du kan fremhæve dine medarbejdere i deres arbejdsgang. 
Som professionel fotograf kan jeg sørge for at vise din virksomhed fra dens bedste vinkler og fange øjeblikke, der udstråler virksomhedens sjæl. Når I får billederne, overgiver jeg alle rettigheder til jer, hvilket betyder, at I kan bruge billederne, som I vil. 

Billeder af din virksomhed kan være gode at bruge på jeres hjemmeside, eller de kan bruges i reklamer eller til SoMe på f.eks. Instagram eller LinkedIn. Det er en god måde at vise potentielle kunder eller nye medarbejdere, hvad jeres virksomhed står for og invitere dem indenfor rent visuelt. 
-	Dronevideo/-foto
Med en dronevideo kan du på en ny og anderledes måde præsentere din virksomhed. Med droner får man flydende og lækre optagelser, der kan tages på store afstande og ovenfra.

VERZEKERD TEGEN SCHADE EN DIEFSTAL TER WAARDE VAN 2500€

Name: Photo Memory NYC
Description:
Our mission is to capture your important moments, and turn them into ever-lasting memories for you and your loved ones. Our modern and resolute style of photography will pop whether it be on your Instagram feed, printed and framed on your wall, or in a photo album.

Our photographic process is broken down into four steps:

Subject - Who or what is our subject? What are is the focus of what we are trying to capture? We aim to hone in on this to draw the client and whoever the client's audience is to that subject.

Light - How can we use lighting to create the best possible view of our subject? We use lighting to our advantage to give our subjects that "pop".

Composition - What kind of composition will our subject stand out in? Our compositions will ensure that our photographs are eye-catching and thoughtful.

Color - What colors will give our photo that final wow factor? With our photo retouching and coloration, we will ensure that anyone viewing your photograph will stop and spend more time looking. Even you!

Here at Photo Memory NYC, we are dedicated to capturing your important moments and turning them into tangible memories. We hope you choose us for your photographic needs!

Name: Fotografie Margret Tielemans
Description:
Ben jij ook zo trots op jouw bedrijf? Breng dat dan optimaal in beeld met goede foto's. Ik kan jou daarbij helpen.

Foto's van jouw medewerkers, foto's van jouw bedrijf en van het bedrijfsproces, foto's van bedrijfsevenementen die bij jullie bedrijf plaatsvinden of die door jullie bedrijf georganiseerd worden.

Veel foto's worden gebruikt op websites. Ieder bedrijf heeft wel een website. Hierop maken mensen vaak voor het eerst met jouw bedrijf kennis. Zorg dus voor een eerste beste indruk. 

Ben en blijf kritisch naar je eigen website, die heb je ooit laten bouwen maar die moet je ook onderhouden. Met teksten en met beelden. Door die beelden professioneel en up to date te houden ziet jouw website er krachtiger uit. Een reden voor een bezoeker om op jouw website te blijven en verder te komen dan de homepage.

Samen kunnen we jouw website onder de loep nemen, niet zozeer technisch, maar wat in beeld komt. Achter de schermen moet het goed zijn, maar de foto's die vallen meteen in het oog. Waar zijn nog gaten te vullen, waar zijn verbeteringen nodig? Met een plan de campagne kunnen we samen kijken, wat we binnen en buiten kunnen maken. 

Foto's van het bedrijfsproces, producten en geleverde diensen kunnen samen met professionele respectvolle portretfoto's en profielfoto's jouw bedrijf en je medewerkers waardig in beeld brengen. Je mag met recht trots zijn op jouw bedrijf. Dit wil je toch ook aan anderen laten zien.

Ik kijk er naar uit met jou samen jouw bedrijf nog mooier te maken.

Onze verkopers hebben allemaal ruime ervaring in de fotografie en kennen de producten door en door. Uiteraard hebben verschillende mensen een verschillende voorkeur voor een bepaalde tak van fotografie en bepaalde apparatuur, de één fotografeert het liefste vogels met een zware spigelreflex camera en tele-objectief terwijl de ander een voorkeur heeft voor straatfotografie met een onopvallende compactcamera. Deze verschillende voorkeuren en achtergronden maakt ons juist sterker. Onze medewerkers weten veel, ons team weet alles!

Name: Clfd Capture. - Photographe pro à Clermont-Ferrand
Description:
Photographe professionnel basé à Clermont-Ferrand, j’accompagne les entreprises, indépendants, agences et hôtes dans la mise en valeur de leur image à travers des photographies impactantes, authentiques et adaptées à leurs besoins.

Je suis convaincu qu’une bonne photo, ce n’est pas seulement une belle lumière ou un cadrage soigné, c’est surtout une image qui parle à vos clients, qui reflète votre univers, votre énergie, votre valeur ajoutée.

 MES SPÉCIALITÉS :

 Portraits professionnels (LinkedIn, trombinoscopes, portraits d’équipe ou de dirigeant)
 Reportages entreprise (séminaires, événements internes, artisanat, process métier)
 Photographie immobilière & Airbnb (biens d’exception, résidences de standing, locations meublées)
 Packshot produit pour catalogues, boutiques ou communication digitale
 Événementiel (concerts, festivals, conférences…)

 Mon approche :
Je privilégie un fonctionnement simple, fluide, humain. Avant chaque séance, je prends le temps d’échanger avec vous, de comprendre vos enjeux, vos attentes, votre univers.
Je travaille avec réactivité, discrétion et un vrai souci du détail.
La retouche est toujours naturelle, les délais sont rapides, et vous gardez une liberté totale d’utilisation des images.

 Où je travaille ?
Je suis basé à Clermont-Ferrand, mais je me déplace partout en Auvergne, en France, et même à l’étranger selon les projets.

 Disponible aussi en carte cadeau, pour offrir un shooting à un proche, un client ou une équipe.

 Envie de booster votre image ou de documenter un projet ?

Name: Experimental Photo Festival

Our approach is rooted in experimentation as a path to freedom, creativity, and inclusion. We create spaces for exchange, reflection, and collective growth—where the process matters more than the result.Experimentalphotofestival es una asociación cultural sin ánimo de lucro dedicada a promover la fotografía experimental en todas sus formas. Creemos en la fuerza de la comunidad, la igualdad y la creación compartida. Somos creadores de AGORA – Escuela de Experimentación, del Experimentalphotofestival (Barcelona) y de la IPFA – Asociación Internacional de Festivales de Fotografía, construyendo redes internacionales entre artistas y festivales. Nuestra apuesta es por la experimentación como vía para la libertad, la creatividad y la inclusión. Name: Creative Talks
Description:
Met ons unieke mentortraject inspireert CreativeTalks fotografen in hun creatieve en zakelijk groei. Wil je meer plezier in je fotografie én meer verdienen? Meld je dan aan voor een gratis Creative PEPTalk. Dat kan via onze website: www.creativetalks.nl

CreativeTalks is er voor fotografen die willen groeien in hun creativiteit en ondernemerschap. Fotografen Vincent Boon en Lilian van Rooij zijn de oprichters en hebben als doel andere (startende én ervaren) fotografen te helpen hun weg te vinden en doelen te bereiken. We bieden op maat gemaakte mentortrajecten: een boost voor beeldmakers!

Waarom hebben wij Creative Talks opgericht? Net als wij heb jij vast al honderdduizenden foto’s gemaakt. Maar dat is geen garantie voor het kunnen verzilveren van jouw ervaring en talent. Op een fotografie-opleiding komt ondernemerschap vaak niet uitgebreid aan bod. Als je er dan na je opleiding voor kiest om je vak uit te oefenen als zelfstandig ondernemer, blijk je er alleen voor te staan. Het ondernemerschap kan eenzaam zijn en veel fotografen hebben er geen ervaring mee. Ook het bijschaven en door ontwikkelen van jouw eigen stijl zijn veel leuker met collega's aan je zij die je scherp kunnen houden. Eén dag in de week maken we vrij voor het helpen van andere fotografen, daarnaast werken ook wij gewoon nog in de praktijk en maken veel zakelijke portretten.

Wij kennen jouw situatie dus als geen ander. Na jarenlange ervaring (samen al meer dan 40 jaar!) als ondernemers in de fotografie weten wij wat je voelt als een week de telefoon niet gaat. Dat je niet weet wat je volgend jaar gaat verdienen, laat staan komende maand! Als je hierover gaat piekeren kom je in een negatieve spiraal. Dan kan je best wat input en inspiratie van buitenaf gebruiken. Het helpt dan om anderen met een frisse blik naar je bedrijf te laten kijken. Wij zijn ervaringsdeskundigen en gunnen jou het beste. Je hoeft het niet helemaal alleen te doen en het wiel niet zelf uit te vinden: samen kom je verder!

Name: Ellen von Unwerth Studio
Description: Ellen von Unwerth, born 1954 in Germany, gained widely attention with her sensual Guess campaign in the early 1990s, followed by campaigns for Absolut, Agent Provocateur A.P.C., Aston Martin, Baccarat, Belvedere, Chanel, Chantal Thomass, Crazy Horse, David Morris, Diesel, Dior, Elisabetta Franchi, Ferragamo, G-Star, Guerlain, H&M, Hysteric Glamour, Jimmy Choo, Lacoste, L’Oreal, MAC Cosmetics, Mary Katrantzou, Mercedes-Benz, Miu Miu, Opel, Revlon, Rolex, Shiseido, Tommy Hilfiger, Veuve Cliquot, Victoria’s Secret, and many more. She is a regular contributor to magazines all over the world, like Arena, Cosmopolitan, Egoïste, ELLE, Glamour, i-D, Interview, Lula, Numéro, Paper Magazine, Playboy, Stern, The Face, The New York Times, Vanity Fair, and many international Vogue editions (American, French, German, Italian, Russian). Furthermore she directed short films for clients like Azzedine Alaïa, Dior, Guess, and Katherine Hamnett, and a range of commercials and music videos. Her book projects are an important part of her career : Her first book, Snaps, was published in 1994, followed by Wicked (1998),Couples (1999), the photo-novella Revenge (2003), Omahyra & Boyd (2005), Fräulein (2009), DieSpieler(2010), the photo-novella The Story of Olga (2012), and lately Heimat (2017). Her works have been exhibited worldwide, and are part of various collections. Ellen von Unwerth won several prizes, amongst others the first prize at the International Festival of Fashion Photography in 1991, and the LUCIE Award in 2012.

Name: LXN Creative
Description:
From independently teaching myself marketing and technical skills needed to accomplish widespread audience engagement, I discovered the creative power of digital media that inspired me to start my business, LXN Photography, in 2014. 

I developed as a social media marketer by practicing in various mediums including photography, videography, web development, and graphic design. I worked for organizations including Residential Dining, Gaucho Farmer’s Market, Bike Committee, Gaucho Street Dance, MultiCultural Center, Word Magazine, Writing Program, and Nextimage3D. Together these leadership positions have built my confidence to run my business, LXN Photography.

Growing up dancing throughout my life since I was 3 years old, I struggled thinking I needed to fit a mold. As I became more serious about dance in high school, I decided to apply and audition for college’s as a dance major. Although I still love dance, the superficial world of being expected to have the perfect body and technique made me feel inadequate. I was frustrated as a dancer because we were expected to perform other choreographer’s work rather than our own.

Through photography, I could still be involved with the dance world by photographing concerts while creating my own work. I discovered photography as my favorite medium to express myself while double majoring in Art and Dance and minoring in Professional Writing’s Multimedia Communication track at UC Santa Barbara. 

I struggled deciding on my niche because I love photographing portraits, events, macros, food, architecture, and dance equally. Amazingly weddings combine all of those genres into one! I love capturing every moment of the wedding day from details, candids, to portraits. What I enjoy most about capturing weddings is the variety of experiences, clients, locations, and genres of photography involved.

Name: Fotostiftung Schweiz
Description: Die Fotostiftung Schweiz ist eine national und international tätige Stiftung, die sich dem Medium Fotografie, seiner Geschichte und seiner Bedeutung in unserer Zeit widmet. Zu ihren wichtigsten Aufgaben gehört es, eine Sammlung aufzubauen, die das Fotoschaffen der Schweiz von den Anfängen bis zur Gegenwart repräsentiert. Die gesammelten Werke werden nach modernen, konservatorischen Standards aufbewahrt und archiviert. Als gemeinnützige Organisation setzt sich die Stiftung zum Ziel, ihre Sammlung einer breiten Öffentlichkeit zugänglich zu machen. Sie organisiert Ausstellungen, gibt Publikationen heraus, veröffentlicht ausgewählte Bestände im Internet und stellt Werke für Reproduktionen in Büchern und Medien zur Verfügung. Sie arbeitet mit anderen Museen und Archiven zusammen, um das fotografische Erbe der Schweiz zu sichern und zu vermitteln.

Name: Lorenzo Mancini • Studio
Description:
Since my earliest memories, I've viewed society with an unfiltered eye. Through my lens, I delve into the soul, capturing raw emotions and the duality of our genuine and constructed selves.

My work delves deeper than the immediate image, seeking the intricate layers of depth and meaning beneath. I'm deeply captivated by the duality of the self—the genuine self and the 'constructed self' that individuals present to society. This dance between our true nature and the personas we adopt is a recurring theme in my explorations.

The allure of dark tones and sharp contrasts in my photographs unveils a brooding, tormented essence, mirroring the complexities of the human psyche. Photography serves as both my escape and my bridge, blurring the lines between idealism and nostalgia.

With an unwavering commitment to minimalism, I strip away distractions. The deliberate choice of black and white amplifies this pursuit, eliminating the diversions of color.

In a world saturated with superficiality, I beckon viewers to experience the authenticity of my creations—a call to simplicity and a return to our genuine roots. As a purist, I rely on natural light, capturing the harmonious blend of emotion and spontaneity without artificial enhancements.
 
In essence, less is truly more.

Name: Arcangel Images
Description:
Arcangel Images is a global leader in rights-managed, human-crafted photography and illustration for book publishing, entertainment, and premium creative industries. For more than two decades, we have built a reputation for uncompromising quality, rigorous legal governance, and a curated visual aesthetic trusted by the world’s top publishers and creative teams.

In an era saturated by synthetic, low-cost AI imagery, Arcangel occupies a fundamentally different space. Every image in our library is created by real artists, fully released, provenance-verified, and curated for narrative depth and emotional authenticity. As generative content floods the market, our contributors and clients benefit from what has become one of the rarest assets in the industry: clean, defensible, human-authored intellectual property.

This commitment has made Arcangel the preferred partner for major book publishers, leading studios and agencies worldwide. Our images appear on thousands of bestselling book covers each year - a testament to the creative and commercial impact of authentic visual storytelling.

Arcangel represents a creator community working at the highest level of the craft. Our stringent evaluation process, long-standing relationships, and rights-managed licensing model create a library defined not by volume, but by intention, rarity, and creative excellence.

As the visual media ecosystem evolves, we continue to innovate across curation, metadata, legal certainty, and search, ensuring clients have a safe, premium alternative to synthetic content, and that contributors’ work remains protected, valued, and globally visible.

Arcangel Images: Authentic by Design. Human at the Core. A strategic asset in the age of AI.

Name: Drone Discovery Ltd
Description:
At Drone Discovery Ltd, we specialise in aerial photography, videography, FPV (First Person View) fly throughs and drone data capture for inspections, and mapping across the UK—helping clients market smarter, inspect safely, and make informed decisions.

We support a wide range of industries, from property and construction to surveying, tourism, and events. Whether you're looking for captivating FPV content or detailed survey-grade data, our unmanned aerial services are tailored to your project's goals.

FPV Drone Filming
Our First-Person View (FPV) drone tours offer a dynamic and engaging way to bring spaces to life. FPV fly-throughs are ideal for property walkthroughs, commercial venues, event spaces, or construction progress.

Drone Inspections, Mapping & Surveying
We provide drone data capture for inspections and surveys, and mapping and modelling services that reduce time on site, improve safety, and increase accuracy. From cliffside surveys and roof inspections to orthomosaic maps and 3D terrain models, we deliver actionable data for surveyors, developers, and engineers. Our maps support construction planning, environmental monitoring, and infrastructure assessments.

Aerial Photography & Videography
We create high-resolution aerial imagery and 4K drone videos for estate agents, tourism boards, corporate brands, and venues. From showcasing properties to enhancing promotional campaigns, our drone content is ideal for use across websites, social media, brochures, and branded video content.

Fully qualified and CAA-certified, we prioritise safety, compliance, and quality in every flight.

 Based in the UK

 Explore more at www.dronediscovery.co.uk

Seit 2001 bin ich auf selbständiger Basis in den unterschiedlichsten Bereichen der Fotografie unterwegs, sowohl im Stuttgarter Raum, als auch bundesweit und international.

Auf ein bestimmtes Thema festlegen? Dazu bin ich viel zu neugierig und freue mich immer wieder auf neue Herausforderungen.

Name: PUNCTUM STUDIO
Description:
Punctum Studio es una productora fotográfica y audiovisual especializada en empresa. Realizamos fotografía, video y servicios de realidad virtual de la más alta calidad.

Los servicios que más realizamos son: Fotografía industrial y corporativa, fotografía publicitaria, fotografía gastronómica, fotografía de producto y fotografía de arquitectura y espacios. También realizamos videos corporativos e industriales, al igual que videos de productos y eventos para empresa.

En la actualidad estamos desarrollando la aplicación de nuevas herramientas interactivas y de inteligencia artificial para ser más competitivos y ofrecer soluciones más complejas y alineadas con las nuevas necesidades de nuestros clientes. 

Uno de nuestros productos más demandados es la producción de visitas virtuales para empresas, showrooms, laboratorios y hoteles, donde la navegación avanzada y la interactividad total ya es imprescindible.

¿Quién hay detrás de Punctum Studio?

Soy Xavier Escolano, fotógrafo publicitario, director de fotografía y fundador de Punctum Studio; proyecto audiovisual resultado de más de 20 años de pasión por la fotografía profesional, la dirección de fotografía, el video publicitario y la tecnología aplicada a la imagen. También he sido director de arte y coordinador de equipos en multinacionales y estudios de grandes producciones. He creado departamentos de fotografía "in-house" dirigiendo a equipos de profesionales y he sido director de postproducción. 

Tras una sólida formación y experiencia en importantes empresas del sector, doy inicio a Punctum Studio para ofrecer nuevas y satisfactorias soluciones para empresas en un mercado que evoluciona constantemente y a una gran velocidad. Aportamos nuevas soluciones gracias a  una formación continuada que permite estar a la altura de las nuevas necesidades del mercado, ayudando así a nuestros clientes a conseguir sus objetivos de negocio.

Name: BFoto
Description:
➥ Mijn passie is fotografie, momenten en herinneringen vastleggen. Mijn specialisatie zijn zakelijke portretten en zakelijke evenementen. Ik houd van interacties tussen mensen en van de mooie momenten die dan ontstaan, en wat is er dan nog mooier dit te kunnen vastleggen. Fotografie is oprecht mijn passie! 

➥ Je kan bij mij in mijn studio komen voor een mooi sprekend portret, ik kijk altijd naar hoe je overkomt en hoe je staat, en neem dit mee tijdens het maken van het portret, zodat het echt jij bent die op de foto staat en niet iemand die op je lijkt.

➥ Ik kan ook mijn hele studio meenemen naar jouw bedrijf, zo kan ik meerdere mensen op jullie eigen locatie fotograferen, zorgen dat iedereen een professioneel portret krijgt met een eenduidige uitstraling, bijvoorbeeld voor op de contact pagina van de website, in het smoelenboek of op LinkedIn.

➥ Ik help evenement organisatoren om hun mooie momenten vast te leggen en opnieuw te beleven. Dit doe ik door goede en sfeervolle foto's te maken welke helpen om meer bezoekers voor het evenement te realiseren. Ik leg het hele evenement voor je vast, van ontvangst, tot sprekers, pauzes, workshops, en ook de borrel. Dit doe ik door het maken van overzichtsfoto's, maar ook detailfoto's, ik let vooral op de interactie tussen mensen. Mensen maken tenslotte het evenement. Op deze manier krijg je echt een totaal beeld van je evenement!

➥ Sinds 2008 werk ik als fotograaf en ben ik vooral actief op gebied van portret- en evenementfotografie. Ik heb de fotovakschool afgerond en ik ben lid van de beroepsvereniging DuPho (Dutch Photographers). Ik heb al voor vele bedrijven, evenementen en mensen de sfeer op een pakkende wijze vastgelegd.

➥ Een goede uitstraling is voor elke ondernemer van levensbelang. In het praktische boek ‘Jouw bedrijf in the picture’ leg ik uit wat de kracht van foto’s is voor jouw bedrijf, en hoe je beelden kiest die jouw boodschap versterken. Dit boek in onder andere te koop via Management Boek.

Name: Art of Flight Aerial Solutions S.L
Description:
At Art of Flight Aerial Solutions S.L., we provide aerial photography services using drones and manned aircraft. We specialize in photography and reporting for a range of industries, including solar energy, telecommunications, infrastructure, and construction. We offer services such as 3D modeling, LiDAR, and thermography, as well as logistics support, transportation, and permit applications when needed. 

We have completed projects across Europe, collaborating with global companies focused on O&M and analytics software. Additionally, we offer timelapse, construction progress tracking, interior photography, and virtual tour services. Located in the center of Madrid, with an aircraft based in Casarrubios del Monte, we ensure safe and effective aerial solutions for any location. With over ten years in the aviation industry, do not hesitate to contact us for your aerial needs.



En Art Of Flight creemos firmemente que la tecnología aplicada a los drones va cambiar la forma en como vemos el mundo actualmente. Para ello nos hemos especializado en inspecciones aerotécnicas en una amplia variedad de sectores industriales. 
Haciendo uso de la última tecnología aplicada a los drones de nueva generación y acumulando más de 15 años de experiencia en el mundo aeronáutico, somos capaces de planificar las operaciones con la mayor precisión, aumentando la eficiencia y reduciendo al máximo los costes totales.

Name: FORMAT International Photography Festival
Description:
FORMAT International Photography Festival was established in 2004.

Today it is one of the UK's leading international contemporary festivals of photography and related media. FORMAT organises a year round programme of international commissions, open calls, residencies, conferences and collaborations in the UK and Internationally. The 2013 festival welcomed over 100,000 visitors from all over the world.

The biennale and off year programmes celebrate the wealth of contemporary photographic practice. We love photography and all its expanded fields. Our programmes feature everything from major conceptual works, participative projects, documentary and all that falls between categorisations, from the mobile phone to the archive. We are concerned with what is happening right here, right now in the scene and beyond, whilst sharing and contributing to it.

FORMAT is the place to engage with an incredible range of new work together alongside some of the best-known practitioners in the world. FORMAT is focused on developing opportunities for audiences to see, debate, develop, contribute and participate in the best of what photography is and can be, with comprehensive professional practice programmes and a yearly International Photography Portfolio Review.

Since its inception each major festival adopts a core theme around which it is curated together with the core structure featuring, but not limited to:

FOCUS: Exhibitions, Commissions, Mass Participation 

EXPOSURE: International Open Call 

FLASH: Events, Talks, Performance

DEVELOPMENT: Master Classes, Portfolio Reviews, Talks 

FORMAT is directed by Louise Clements, organised by QUAD and the University of Derby. Supported by Arts Council England, Derby City Council and multiple partners from the UK and international origins.

Name: Photography Club, BITS Pilani
Description:
The Photography Club at BITS Pilani is one of the oldest clubs on campus. It goes back to the days of black and white photography, when cameras had parts made of canvas and when club sessions were devoted to developing photographs in a dark room. Having witnessed a couple of periods of idleness, followed by impressive growth, the club has come a long way. Photog, in its present avatar, was reborn in the year 2006-2007 under the able guidance of some of our seniors.

Achievements

One of the greatest works of the club has been the panograph of the BITS Clock Tower. Composed of over thirty snaps taken at different angles, it is a breathtaking image of the institute in the light of the rising sun. This picture occupies centre stage of the institute's website and has become synonymous with the name of BITS.

This year Photog took it to a whole new level by making a huge 9 ft X 25 ft Photo- Mosaic . Impressed by the work the college authorities have put it up for permanent display on the SAC Wall (Student Activities Club). The mosaic has been made by including passport size pictures of Bitsians. Thousands of photographs to make one big picture.



Stay alive.. and clicking!

Name: Graham Elliott Photography
Description:
As a passionate wildlife photographer I believe that wildlife and environmental conservation comes with the job.
Graham Elliott Photography is about supporting environmental projects through the use of images, books and education. Proceeds from product sales will go to certain projects to help ensure that they continue their vital work.
I strongly believe that it's not enough to simply watch the occasional wildlife film and then forget about it. As a community and as a civilisation we are totally dependent on our environment. If it can't support us we will fail. The balance of key wildlife species shows us whether or not we are doing the right thing. Clearly we are not and it is delusional to think that we can continue to abuse the resources available to us.
The problem becomes worse because those with the most abundant environments and species are often the poorest. And they want what the rich have! So wildlife and environmental issues just get in the way of those people achieving their goals.
We are a world community and we are either part of the solution; actively taking steps to reestablish a balance, or part of the problem; focusing on short-term needs and waiting for someone else to 'fix-it'. There is no middle ground. The good news is that it doesn't matter how little you do, just do it consistently. Make sure the balance of your impact on our amazing planet is a positive one.
The role of Graham Elliott Photography is to offer practical steps you can take to be on the 'right side of history'.

Name: Ylva Erevall Photography
Description:
I have always been devoted to artistic solutions. That’s why photography was the perfect outlet to unleash my creativity through visual storytelling. 15 years later, I can confidently deliver relatable and refreshing visual content through a meticulous understanding of any client’s vision.


How do I do that? It’s mostly lighting ;)...


But I rely on creative collaborations, by utilizing a carefully curated crew and high-quality production resources to push visual boundaries for all my clients.  My professional philosophy is rooted in always providing a relaxed and fun atmosphere, putting nearly any subject, client, or crew member at ease with my easygoing and fun-loving personality. 


I’ve always prioritized a “listen-first” approach. I lead with empathy and acknowledge that bringing out the best in everyone requires patience and understanding. In order to bring out distinct and artistic looks in each campaign and project, I apply a diligent process, for planning and organization, so that everything is ready ahead of schedule on set, and on-time for delivery.

My background as a fashion coordinator at H&M in Sweden honed my eye for detail, but it was my move to New York that plunged me into the beautiful world of photography. And with my recent move to LA, I am excited to continue learning, growing, and exploring how I can use my skills to benefit your needs.

So get in touch, and let’s explore possibilities to work together!

Name: Sigma France
Description:
Fondée en 1961 par Michihiro Yamaki, Sigma est une entreprise japonaise spécialisée dans la fabrication d’objectifs et d’appareils photo. Toujours indépendante et familiale, elle est aujourd’hui dirigée par son fils, Kazuto Yamaki, qui perpétue une philosophie centrée sur la qualité, l’innovation et l’exigence artisanale.

L’intégralité de la production est réalisée au Japon. Le siège se trouve à Kanagawa et l’unique site de fabrication est implanté à Aizu, dans la préfecture de Fukushima. Depuis 1973, cette usine rassemble l’ensemble des étapes de conception : ingénierie optique, assemblage, contrôle qualité, mais aussi fabrication et approvisionnement des composants. Cette organisation favorise la cohérence technique, la réactivité, et un haut niveau de précision.
Ancrée dans la région du Tohoku, Sigma entretient des liens profonds avec la communauté locale. Cet ancrage contribue au développement des savoir-faire régionaux et permet une transmission continue des compétences, au cœur du processus industriel.

Chaque objectif, appareil ou accessoire est conçu pour répondre aux standards les plus élevés. Depuis plus de soixante ans, Sigma accompagne les photographes et cinéastes du monde entier en leur fournissant des outils fiables, performants et durables.
La marque défend une vision de la photographie comme forme d’expression libre, personnelle et universelle. À travers ses produits, elle cherche à offrir à chacun la possibilité de traduire sa vision du monde avec justesse, finesse et créativité.

Name: Paltenghi Claudio Photography
Description:
Freude an der Arbeit lässt das Werk trefflich geraten.

In dieser Bildergalerie finden Sie besondere Arbeiten, an denen der Fotograf bereits Freude gehabt hat und die nun den Betrachter erfreuen sollen – und Lust darauf machen sollen, selbst dabei zu sein.

Portraits, Beauty, Fashion and more: Im Zentrum – das Individuum
All diese Bilder haben den Menschen im Fokus und zeigen künstlerisch und ausdruckvoll alle Facetten des menschlichen Wesens. Sie illustrieren die friedliche Unschuld von Neugeborenen ebenso wie die individuellen Charakterzüge jeder porträtierten Persönlichkeit.
Im Business erweisen sich aussagekräftige Portraits und Bilder für die Bewerbung als hilfreiche Assistenten und im Privatleben hüten Fotografien von „friends and family“ den wertvollen Schatz schöner Erinnerungen. Unser Fotostudio dient auch als Laufsteg für Models und stilvolle Studien für besonderen Setcards schmücken die Cover von Magazinen und Zeitschriften.

Landscape, Architektur und Produkte: von Elementen, Komponenten und Segmenten
Mit kreativer Liebe zum Detail und mit einem fachkundigen Auge beleuchtet der Fotograf bei diesen außergewöhnlichen Bildern erstaunliche Kleinigkeiten, grandiose technische Werke und die großartige Naturkulisse des Lebensraums rund um uns.

Making of: Optische Leckerbissen hinter den Kulissen
Diese Aufnahmen erlauben einen Blick „behind the scenes“ und zeigen einige Details der Arbeit vor und hinter der Kamera. Auch hier ist die Freude an der Arbeit bei allen offensichtlich – und sichtbar. Wir freuen uns auch darauf, mit Ihnen zu arbeiten!

What do you get?
Virtual Tours - Hands down the most important part of the package. Immediately show your clients the home with a shareable website link that is so immersive you will surely captivate the attention of the buyer. Walk through the building from the comfort of your own living room on a smartphone, tablet, or laptop.

Dollhouse View - Have you ever wondered what a house looks like if the exterior walls were removed? Well, you can quit wondering. With our service you will get pictures of what the exterior of the home looks like. This can help buyers get a better feel for the house!

Schematic Floor Plans - Probably the second best part of the package! Are you tired of breaking your back measuring rooms and spending time doing calculations to figure out square-footage? Measure no further! We use the virtual tour to make actual floor plans of the home, which gives approximate square-footage to use for your MLS listing. This is huge!

Professional Photography - Of course, you can’t be a photography company without providing high quality photos. For every home we service we provide 30 to 50 photos of both the interior and exterior parts of the home. Having this amount of photos helps boost your MLS listing!

Let us earn your business! 
For all first time Realtors who use our business we offer the Premium Package for $100!

Name: Christian Redermayer Photography
Description:
My name is Christian Redermayer and I'm based in Vancouver, Canada. 
A little bit about myself first. Playing ice hockey as a goalie, or doing sports in general is part of my life ever since I was a child. I was a little boy when I first used my dad’s film camera. It was so fascinating for me how this machine, combined with a role of film could freeze a moment in time on a piece of film and paper. 

During my apprenticeship as a pastry chef, I attended many photography courses after work, but it was not my goal at that time to be a professional photographer. 
My career path was a different one. I worked for a leading Swiss Television company. I also worked in the sports, retail, finance, and IT communication sectors amongst others as a team leader, project manager, and event organizer, and also had a chance to discover the world during my work as a motorbike tour guide. 
Besides my regular jobs.  always documented my journeys in Europe, Morocco, and the United States through photographs and received positive feedback about them all the time. 

I sold some of my best images and albums to friends and clients, and I had the opportunity to hold my first exhibition showcasing the photographs I had taken during my trips in 2015. The exhibition was quite successful and encouraged me to keep taking more photos and improving my skills. 

All the positive feedback also encouraged me to make some changes in my life, especially after I went through a difficult time with some serious health issues. 
I applied for a full-time photography program in Vancouver, and this definitely pushed my skills and level of work to a professional level. In the meantime my photography has been recognized by some of the World prestigious Photography Awards Organisation's and earned multiple International awards. 
I enjoy focusing and fine art photography and consider them essential for me. This gives me a lot of inspiration and pushes me forward to discover new techniques and extending my skills.

Name: Blue Room Production
Description:
Alle surfere kender fornemmelsen. At fange en god bølge. Finde den rigtige position. Bevare koncentrationen og følge bevægelserne. Mærke suset, når det lykkes. At surfe i The Blue Room. 

Den fornemmelse kender vi. Vi er så heldige at leve af den! 

Det, alle kan med et kamera, er at fotografere. På ferie, til fest og med familien. Det, vi kan med et kamera, er at lave billeder. Fortælle historier, vise personligheder, være kommercielle. Vi løser små specialopgaver og store katalogopgaver. Og vi løser alle typer opgaver derimellem. 

Ikke altid kun i tosomhed, for ofte benytter vi os af vores store netværk af dygtige folk, der inddrages for at nå den optimale løsning. 

Vi elsker et godt resultat, men insisterer også på en god proces. Hvor vi er nysgerrige, ydmyge og interesserede i det, vi skal fotografere. Og hvor ærlig dialog med kunden er en forudsætning.

Kundetilfredshed er naturligvis vores mål, men lysten er midlet til at nå det. Faglig stolthed og vilje skal drive værket i The Blue Room. For når hjertet er med, kommer vi længst!

Name: Kate Mitchell Photography
Description:
I believe that every individual has a unique story to tell, and my mission is to weave those stories into a stunning visual masterpiece. 

Why choose me? It's simple. I blend artistry, passion, and technical excellence to create captivating portraits, all while making my clients feel at ease in front of the camera by creating a comfortable and relaxed atmosphere during our sessions. 

Whether you are looking for a professional headshot, a family portrait, or a personal portfolio, my keen eye for detail and ability to connect with subjects on a personal level ensures that each image is a work of art.

My process begins with a consultation, where I take the time to understand your vision and aspirations. I believe that collaboration is key, and I work closely with you to bring your ideas to life. From selecting the perfect location to guiding you through wardrobe choices and posing techniques, I ensure that every aspect of your portrait session is tailored to reflect your unique personality and style.

During the photo shoot, I create a relaxed and comfortable environment, allowing your genuine self to shine through. Through expert lighting, composition, and careful direction, I capture the moments that reveal your true character, preserving them for generations to come.

Once your session is complete, my commitment to excellence continues as I meticulously edit and retouch each image, enhancing its beauty while maintaining authenticity. From timeless black and white portraits to vibrant colour compositions, I employ a range of techniques to deliver images that evoke emotions and leave a lasting impression.

Ready to embark on a photographic journey that celebrates your unique story? Contact me today to schedule your personalised portrait session. Let me capture the essence of who you are, creating breathtaking images that will be cherished for a lifetime.

Description:
Adam Bouska ( www.AdamBouska.com )  born in Decatur, Illinois (October, 31st 1983) is a Los Angeles based celebrity fashion photographer and co-creator of the internationally recognized #NOH8 Campaign, a silent photo protest to promote human equality.

With over 10 years of experience, Adam has worked with thousands of subjects including familiar faces such as Miley Cyrus, Aaron Carter, George Takei, Pauley Perrette, Liza Minelli, Ricky Martin, Barry Manilow, and Lisa Ling. Most recently, Adam helped create book covers for Jane Lynch, Jenny McCarthy, Jenni Pulos and Meghan McCain. 

No stranger to activism, Adam's photography has aided a variety of charitable causes including a fund-raising calendar for AIDS Project Los Angeles in 2008, a national ad campaign with Nia Vardalos for HelpUsAdopt.org in 2011, an edgy calendar (6 packs / 9 lives) featuring guys & their cats to promote adoptions for FoundAnimals.org in 2012, and 'Lights Out', a marriage equality ad campaign for ECOYA in 2013.

In addition to his published work, Adam has made appearances on TV shows including: Running Russell Simmons, Giuliana & Bill, Keeping up with the Kardashians, The Real Housewives of OC, Millionaire Matchmaker, Million Dollar Listing, The World According to Paris, Hollywood Exes, MelB: It's a Scary World, and Dog the Bounty Hunter.

Description:
FORMERLY RECOGNISED AS AAYUSH SIKKA PHOTOGRAPHY 
For a couple of years now I have been on an otherworldly adventure that has caused a move in my spirit. I began to feel that as my point of view on life developed, my motivation for taking photos didn’t impact me any longer. It as of late hit me that my explanations behind adoring photography could advance inside me also.

I used to take pictures trying to stop time. I felt frantic to clutch past recollections, instead of living in the now. I in the long run understood that I need to take pictures not to look back, but rather with an end goal to commend the vitality of the present minute. Presently is all that we have.

Name: Tether Tools
Description:
Tether Tools is a design and manufacturing company providing innovative workstation solutions for photographers and filmmakers. The company offers photography equipment and accessories for shooting tethered and instantly transferring images (cabled or wirelessly) from your camera to the screen of your choice.  

What is tethered photography? Tethered photographyis a useful shooting strategy which has been utilized by many advertising, fashion and product photographers for years.  In the past, used primarily for studio work and high end commercial photo shoots, the process was cumbersome and expensive. However, in recent years tethering technology has become more reliable, portable, less expensive and easier to use.  Due to these factors, it’s only natural the uses have spread to many other areas of photography and filmmaking. 

To make it easy to find exactly the set up needed, Tether Tools provides complete solutions kits for nearly any workflow scenario from setting up a photo booth to mounting a tablet as a teleprompter. With tablet, laptop, monitor, and phone mounts that integrate directly with your existing photography gear, Tether Tools can help you build a workstation that meets your needs. From the cables and cable management tools to the mounting and grip gear required for a seamless and secure workflow, Tether Tools provides the highest quality gear for creative individuals. As photographers ourselves, we understand your uniqueneeds and your desire for the best tools available to ensure you get the shot just right – for yourself and your clients. Tether Tools unique workflow solutions are available online at www.TetherTools.com, and at select photo and video specialty retailers worldwide.

    Os ambientes aspiram arte e as cozinhas são equipadas para o desenvolvimento e elaboração dos mais distintos pratos. A produção conta com um acervo flexível de louças e utensílio e ainda uma biblioteca muito direcionada a Arte e Gastronomia.
    Os 4 espaços distintos; Fotografar, Harmonizar, Filmar e Ensinar, oferecem um conceito diferente apoiado na arte para a qual será dirigido.
    Para comodidade e apreciação dos cozinheiros e clientes há um livre acesso ao Espaço Plantar, uma horta de 30m2 de flores comestíveis, ervas e hortaliças muito especiais, cuidadas com esmero e atenção.
    Localizado em região de fácil acesso, no centro da zona sul de São Paulo, do lado do Parque Ibirapuera, o Planalto Paulista é um bairro como poucos na capital, tranqüilo e arborizado. O Estúdio Gastronômico fica na Avenida Nhandú, 864.

Name: Stichting Earlybirds
Description:
Stichting Earlybirds zet zich geheel belangeloos in voor ouders met een te vroeg geboren kindje in het ziekenhuis. Onze 200 fotografen zetten zich allen vrijwillig in voor deze kindjes en ouders om hen in een periode die veel angsten en zorgen kent een lichtpuntje te schenken. Foto's die belangrijk zijn voor de 'verwerking' van deze heftige periode. 

De lichtomstandigheden in ziekenhuizen zijn vaak moeilijk waardoor ouders snel donkere foto's hebben. Wij leggen deze periode om een mooie liefdevolle manier vast voor ouders en voor het kindje zelf. Dit alles tijdens de dagelijkse routine. Er zal dus niet worden geposeerd en het kindje zal zo min mogelijk extra belast worden. De gezondheid en rust staan altijd bovenaan. 

De sessie is geheel gratis en de ouders krijgen een (door de fotograaf bepaalde) selectie van minimaal 20 en maximaal 50 foto's. De fotografen ontvangen een vergoeding voor hun reis- en parkeerkosten.

Inkomsten genereren we vanuit onze speciale veilingpagina en een jaarlijkse grote loterij.

Name: Photo Studio Solutions
Description:
Real estate agents across the U.S are realizing that not only does virtual staging cost less, but gives potential buyers a realistic feel for what that blank canvas space is capable of becoming. 

In 2018, U.S. sellers are selling their homes faster than ever with increased commissions to agents through the power of 3D virtual staging. Here’s what virtual staging can do for you and your clients. 

Virtual staging saves time:

Consider only having to wait two days for a staging compared to traditional staging where you would have to wait to schedule movers, a moving truck and everything that comes with a designer’s rental.

3D virtual staging saves money:

Keep costs at a minimum by saving thousands on moving expenses, designers and furniture rentals. A 3D virtual showing eliminates the need for all the extra overhead

3D Staging saves frustration:

Forget about the wrong furniture showing up to the home or movers canceling with excuses. With a 3D virtual showing, you get exactly what you pay for. Not to mention, edits to your model are always free of charge til you’re completely satisfied. 

On a regional scale, Photo Studio Solutions is based in Tampa, Florida. Locally we perform full-service photography and video services for homes being placed on the market. We partner with Realtors to provide the very best in visual marketing for their home listings. Whether it’s a few shots from the front or a full aerial view, no job is too big or too small for Photo Studio Solutions. High-quality photos are just the basics, as our services extend to 3D virtual tours powered by Matterport, video tours, drone shots, night photos and many more options. When you’re looking for a partner to take your listings to the next level, we’re here to help. Real Estate photography is our only focus as we are completely dedicated to helping real estate professionals sell their properties faster 

Visit www.PhotoStudioSolutions.com/ to see our portfolio.

Name: KELEPOQ
Description:
KELEPOQ a été créée afin de faciliter la découverte et l’acquisition de photographies anciennes d’une qualité exceptionnelle à des prix abordables.

Nombreux sont ceux qui apprécient le caractère authentique des photos d’époque et le pouvoir qu’elles ont d’arrêter le temps. Les dénicher peut être en revanche long et fastidieux. L’équipe KELEPOQ chine pour vous ces vieilles photographies en noir et blanc afin de vous offrir une fenêtre ouverte sur le monde d’autrefois et de donner de la personnalité à vos murs.

KELEPOQ sélectionne soigneusement les photographies et nos experts les retravaillent au sein de notre atelier afin de pouvoir les tirer en très grande qualité sans pour autant dénaturer la photographie ancienne. Nous proposons ces photos en open édition, tout en gardant une qualité irréprochable sur les tirages et la finition, afin que chacun puisse s’offrir des photos d’époque de qualité et ce, quel qu’en soit le format.

Afin d’avoir une décoration d’intérieur qui vous ressemble, l’équipe KELEPOQ constitue un éventail de collections variées et uniques. En fonction de vos affinités et vos passions, vous trouverez la photographie parfaite pour décorer votre intérieur.

Notre ambition est de faire de KELEPOQ le premier éditeur de photographies anciennes. Les photographies KELEPOQ ne sont pas des photographies d’art mais bien des photographies immortalisant des scènes de vie de l’époque.

Name: Football Case Study
Description:
Football Case Study is a platform created by STADE that uses photography to research and document the diverse cultures of football from around the world. Unlike traditional content platforms focusing on highlights, scores, and branded content, Football Case Study is dedicated to exploring the rich and complex cultural contexts shaping football in different regions and communities. Through our work, Football Case Study aims to create a comprehensive photographic database of football cultures, which can be used by scholars, journalists, and other professionals in various fields. Over time, this database will serve as a valuable resource for academic research, newspaper reporting, and other forms of storytelling.

Football Case Study believes that understanding football's cultural and historical contexts is essential for appreciating and respecting the diversity of our global community. By showcasing the beauty and richness of football cultures, we hope to inspire people to embrace and celebrate differences rather than fear or reject them. Through our Instagram account and website, Football Case Study provides a platform for underrepresented communities to share their stories and experiences of football.

We aim to create a space for conversations about football beyond the pitch and give a more nuanced and comprehensive understanding of the game.

Name: Nika Art Photography
Description:
Viele Führungskräfte haben nicht die passenden Bilder für Webseiten oder Projekte.
Ihre Fotos sprechen ihre Zielgruppe nicht an.
Ihre Fotos zeigen nicht ihre Persönlichkeit.

Als Business-Fotografin kreiere ich seit 2020 genau solche Bilder.

Meine Dienstleistung

1. Business-Fotografie für Führungskräfte und Teams

Die richtige Fotografie entsteht in einem Prozess.
Im Prozess, wo ich dich begleite, deine Persönlichkeit auf dem Bild zu zeigen.
Dadurch bildest du Vertrauen zu Kunden, Geschäftspartnern und identifizierst dich besser mit deiner Marke.

2. Branding-Fotografie

Ich helfe dir, durch Bilder deine Geschichte zu erzählen.
Deine Fotos widerspiegeln deine Werte und Persönlichkeit.
Dadurch präsentierst du dich als authentische Marke und wirst sichtbar sein.

3. Porträt-Fotografie

Professionelle und stilvolle Porträts heben dich aus der Menge heraus.
Ich begleite dich dabei, deine Persönlichkeit selbstbewusst darzustellen.
Dadurch hinterlässt du einen unvergesslichen Eindruck im Bewerbungsprozess oder auf LinkedIn.

Vorteile meiner Dienstleistung

- authentische Fotografie, die deine Zielgruppe anspricht
- aussagekräftige Fotografie, die dich sichtbar macht
- natürliche Fotografie, die deine Marke abbildet
- persönliche Begleitung inkl. Bedürfnisanalyse
- Tipps zum selbstbewussten Auftreten
- Tipps zur Wahl des Hintergrunds
- Tipps zur Wahl deiner Kleidung
- offene Kommunikation
- Empathie

Kontakt: via persönliche Nachricht

Name: Cameriska Fotografie
Description:
Ontdek de magie van professionele fotografie, vastgelegd met passie en precisie. Ik breng jouw verhaal tot leven met adembenemende beelden en tijdloze herinneringen. Vertrouw op mijn ervaring, creativiteit en toewijding om jouw kostbaarste momenten te vereeuwigen.

Ik ben een creatief persoon, altijd op zoek naar nieuwe manieren om mijn passies en interesses te uiten. Als kind was ik altijd al bezig met tekenen, schrijven en muziek maken. Naarmate ik ouder werd, ontdekte ik dat ik ook gepassioneerd was over het helpen van anderen en het delen van mijn kennis en ervaringen.

Nu heb ik mijn eigen bedrijf opgezet om mezelf te promoten als een veelzijdig persoon en om anderen te inspireren om hun eigen creatieve reis te ondernemen. Hier vind je mijn portfolio van projecten, binnenkort komen hier mijn blogposts over fotografie, creativiteit en persoonlijke groei, en nog veel meer.

Maar het gaat niet alleen om mij. Het gaat om het verbinden met anderen en het creëren van iets moois samen. Ik ben altijd op zoek naar nieuwe samenwerkingsverbanden en projecten, dus als je ideeën hebt of gewoon wilt chatten, stuur me dan gerust een berichtje!

Mijn missie is om iedereen die voor mijn camera komt te laten stralen, en jou, je kids of je vrienden of familie te laten zien dat iedereen mooi kan zijn op de foto. Het is mijn passie om je zo op je gemak te stellen dat je niet eens door hebt dat ik erbij ben, dat je echt kan zijn wie je bent!

Ik maak zoveel mogelijk spontane en echte foto’s waarop jij op je allerbest komt staan, ook als jij denkt dat je eigenlijk nooit mooi op de foto staat.

Laten we samen een creatieve en inspirerende reis maken!

Denk je nu na het lezen van dit alles: dat wil ik ook? Aarzel niet en neem contact op voor een kennismakingsgesprek of een offerte!

Name: Marieka Ratsma | Food Fotografie
Description:
Hey, I am Marieka

I started as a shoe and bag designer, drawn to the world of form, colour, and texture. With a designer’s eye and a love for detail, I spent years creating pieces that told stories through materials and shape. But over time, my creative focus began to shift from designing objects to capturing moments.

What began as a personal passion for photography—documenting favorite cafés, hidden food spots, and the beauty of everyday life—naturally evolved into something more. The camera became my new tool for storytelling, allowing me to blend my design background with a visual style that felt both instinctive and deeply personal.

Today, I work as a freelance photographer with a focus on food, lifestyle, and place. My images go beyond simply showing a dish or a space, they capture the vibe, the creative energy behind it and the story waiting to be told.

Design taught me to see with intention. Photography taught me to feel it. And somewhere in between, I found my voice.

Also important: i’m a coffee and cheese addict, always on the lookout for the perfect flat white or a slice of something sharp and crumbly.

Visit mariekaratsmafotografie.com for more info.

Name: Fredy Salzmann Hochzeitsfotografie
Description:
Ich bin seit etwa 10 Jahren mit der Fotografie unterwegs und habe mich in den letzten Jahren auf Hochzeiten spezialisiert.

Ich begleite Paare an ihrem Hochzeitstag in Form von Reportagen – meist über 8, 10 oder 12 Stunden. Dabei halte ich fest, was an diesem Tag passiert: vom Anziehen über die Zeremonie bis hin zur Feier am Abend.

Mir ist wichtig, dass die Bilder natürlich wirken und dass sich die Paare darin wiedererkennen. Ich arbeite ruhig, unauffällig und gebe dort Unterstützung, wo es nötig ist – zum Beispiel beim Paarshooting.

Mein Bildstil ist klar, farbtreu und ohne übertriebene Bearbeitung. Ich achte auf gute Lichtverhältnisse und eine saubere, ehrliche Nachbearbeitung, die den Tag so zeigt, wie er war – ohne Filter oder künstliche Effekte.

Die meisten Hochzeiten fotografiere ich im Wallis, bin aber auch in anderen Regionen der Schweiz unterwegs. Vor jeder Hochzeit gibt es ein persönliches Gespräch, damit wir uns kennenlernen und den Ablauf gut planen können.

Name: fredysalzmann-photography.rocks
Description:
Ich bin Fotograf und habe mich in den letzten Jahren immer mehr mit dem Thema Professionelle Fotografie befasst und mich auch entsprechend weitergebildet. Kreativ zu sein, war schon seit meiner Kindheit eine Beschäftigung welche mich immer sehr in ihren Bann gezogen hat. Früher mit Zeichnen und Malen, heute mit Airbrush, Musik und der Fotografie. 
Mich faszinieren vor allem Menschen, Tiere, Landschaften, Architektur, Graffities, Art Design, Musik, Tattoos uvm. Einfach alles was mich zu Kunst und Design inspiriert. Erst vor kurzem habe ich mich entschieden eine eigene Webseite zu gestalten um meine Passion der Öffentlichkeit preis zu geben. 
Sollte dir gefallen was Du siehst, so kann ich das auch gerne für dich, deine Verwandten/Bekannten/Freunde/Familie usw. anfertigen.
Ich nehme gerne alle nur erdenklich möglichen Aufträge entgegen: 
- Shootings (Innen und Aussen) aller möglichen Arten. 
- Kinder, Baby, Schwangerschaft usw. sowie Familienfotos innen und aussen.
- Paarshootings, Freundlinnen, Freunde, Qliquen usw. 
- Tierfotografie aller arten. 
- Sportfotografie (Bewegte Bilder egal ob Sport oder Tanz) 
- Aufträge Shootings für Models (Weiblich und Männlich) auf TFP (Time for Prints) Basis! 
- Ort nach Wunsch und Absprache.
- Aufträge für nachträgliche professionelle Bildbearbeitungen nach Absprache.
- Drohnen - Aufnahmen für Sport, Tanz, Auto, Motorrad, Hochzeiten, Feste usw in Bild und Ton gemäss Wunschvorstellung des Kunden.  
- Hochzeiten und sonstige Anlässe. (Bild und/oder Video) 
- Konzertfotos und Videos aller möglichen genres.
- und viele weitere Wünsche. (einfach alles) 

Kurz zusammengefasst eigentlich alles was Spass macht und dabei immer alles sehr professionell und gemäss Absprache. 
Ich bin offen für deine Wünsche und Vorstellungen. 

Bei Interesse einfach eine Email, Tel. oder PN an mich. 
Fredy Salzmann Photography Rocks

Leica Camera AG's corporate headquarters are located in Wetzlar, Germany, with subsidiaries in the United Arab Emirates, UK, France, Japan, Singapore, Switzerland, South Korea, Italy and the USA and distributors in other areas of the world. Internationally and in the Middle East, Leica products are only available at Leica company flagship stores, boutiques and from a limited number of authorized partners. A destination for the authentic Leica experience, Leica Camera Middle East facilities include the flagship Leica Store Dubai, located at the New Fashion Extension of The Dubai Mall, a state-of-art training facility, after sales and printing services. Name: Millennium Images
Description:
Millennium operates in the field of contemporary photography. Our aim is to bridge a common gap between artistic endeavour and commercial success.

We sell reproduction rights, put on exhibitions, sell prints and undertake portfolio reviews. We are not a publicly funded body and all our revenue is derived from our commercial activities.

We work with many organisations supplying images for magazines, advertising and especially book covers through the world.

Our aim has always been to engage with and foster young and emerging photographers. We have strong ties with many photographic colleges and festivals, both in the UK and elsewhere, sourcing much of our imagery from amongst the brightest young talent around. Of course as Millennium itself has been around for more than 20 years many of our 1000+ photographers are now serious established names in their own right.

Our searchable database of more than 45000 images has become known among our loyal clients around the world as supplying some of the most exciting and usable contemporary photography anywhere.

Millennium has a small team dedicated to our aims in the contemporary photography world. We are based in Hackney, London

Name: Alinea Collective
Description:
Alinea Collective was founded in 2016 by food photographer & director Brayden Lim and international food stylist Almanda Haley. Based in Singapore, Alinea Collective has since grown into a globally recognised food advertising production house, producing high-impact campaigns for some of the world’s most iconic F&B brands and agencies.

With a distinctive visual style and global client base, Brayden has built a reputation as one of the industry’s leading food photographers and directors. Almanda, celebrated for her award-winning work, brings a signature blend of precision, instinct, and bold creativity to every set — making her one of the most sought-after food stylists in the region.

Supported by a full-scale production team, Alinea Collective manages campaigns for brands such as Singapore Airlines, McDonald’s, Burger King Global, Subway International, Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf Global, Tim Hortons Global, Nespresso International, Häagen-Dazs Global, Zespri International, Cadbury Global, Marriott International, and more — servicing markets across the United States, Europe, Australia, New Zealand, the UK, South Korea, Japan, and Southeast Asia.

Alinea Collective’s achievements includes Forbes 30 Under 30, World Food Photography Awards Finalist, Foodelia International 1st Runner-Up, One Eyeland Photographer of the Year – Singapore, and Top 10 Global Finalist for Still Life Photography — establishing him as one of the most sought-after creatives in global food advertising today.

Operating from three custom-built kitchen studios spanning 5,000 sqft, Alinea Collective is purpose-built to meet the evolving demands of global food campaigns — offering scale, efficiency, and creative agility across every production. With over a decade of experience in the global and Asian F&B landscape, the studio continues to push the boundaries of how food is seen, styled, and savoured — delivering work that is bold, precise, creative-led, and globally impactful.
