Name: La Donna Foto
Description:
La Donna Foto is my collection of fine art photography, specializing in Italian landscapes, seascapes, vineyards, cliffside views, caves, natural reserves, architecture and statues.

I have always had a passion for photography, since my aunt gave me a vintage 1960s camera.  Growing up in Houston, Texas and subsequently working many years in various financial roles,  afforded me the opportunity to pursue my travel passions. While traveling to four different continents, my eye for composition cultivated my collection of La Donna Foto.  Described by others as inspiring and romantic, I feel blessed to have abilities to share with others, my love of life.

La Donna means “Lady” in Italian.  Inspired by the beauty of Renaissance art while traveling to Florence, Italy in 2015, I experienced a rebirth myself.  After returning to my hometown of Houston, I began to studying the Italian language. Intrigued by the culture, art, and history, I returned many times to immerse myself in Italy!

Make room for the art you love at:
www.LaDonnaFoto.com

Name: Joe Martz
Description:
Specializing in architecture and the built environment, I like to see and experience how people interact with the things we build and how it affects their day-to-day lives. From a visual perspective, it’s the light and shadow play, the textures and surfaces, and the shapes and colours that really make me stop and look. I use this approach with my photography; my goal is to make the viewer stop and look just that much more and really draw them into the image. I make it a point to hone in on the details that make a project really stand out.

I deliver beautiful imagery of a variety of buildings and structures, both interior and exterior. I’ve shot research facilities, offices, commercial buildings, schools, factories and manufacturing plants, libraries, restaurants, residential spaces, and construction sites.

Name: Lensball
Description:
At Lensball we have created a perfect 60 - or 80mm sphere, that bends light to form a tiny projection of the world behind it.

We found a way to make perfectly round balls out of square blocks of hardened crystal, by using a large sequence of special grinding and polishing techniques. The result is a stunning sphere that everyone wants to hold, and that has the same optic quality as professional camera lenses. It's a work of art, and we are proud to share it with the world!

It's a great centerpiece on a desk, a beautiful present, and a stunningly simple tool that allows photographers worldwide to capture the world in spectacular wide-angle.

At Lensball we are always open to new ideas, approaches, and a fresh look. We are convinced that the future lies in the hands of the companies like Lensball - young, creative, flexible and irresistible.

Name: Walzer Photography: Seattle Wedding Photographer Tacoma Boudoir Photography
Description: A Seattle wedding photographer has to record a myriad of elements that make the wedding day a complex equation with only one chance for a perfect photography outcome! My job as the Seattle wedding photographer is to not only record the nuptials, but the entire wedding day. While the Bride and Groom are certainly the key photo subjects, Moms and Dads, siblings, family and friends play an integral part of the wedding day’s photographic journal. Knowing where to be as well as when to be there are key to photographing the range of emotions of the day as well as the iconic wedding moments. There is a time and a place for “staged” wedding portrait photographs as well as candid moment photos and I always have the schedule for the wedding day worked out to make sure to capture all the photographs that will be needed to record the laughter, tears and joy of the day. The Seattle wedding photographer needs to show the deep abiding love of a bride and groom as well as the joy of the wedding day.

Name: Jadavpur University Photographic Club (JUPC)
Description:
JUPC, one of the oldest student-run clubs in Asia, is the official photography club of Jadavpur University running since its foundation in 1964. The club, through the years, has won many laurels - both national and international and has seen many of its members become prominent professionals in the field of photography. The club that started off in a washroom of the Geology department, now also maintains its own studio and dark-room. It also accommodates a library that gives access to a collection of books and journals concentrating on both National and International circuits of Photography.

The club has a full-scale training programme for JU students with existing members as trainers and guides. It invites speakers for introduction and exposure to newer approaches in photography. Besides, the club has associated itself with Photography Workshops like Foundry Photojournalism Workshop and even conducted National Salons, International Salons, National Contests, International Contests and organised Photo-Fests. Alongside these highlights, there are regular interactive sessions in clubs and annual trips and treks for photography organised by the club. The club not only practises photography as an art but also takes on commercial projects. The club even is entrusted with the duty of photography for the Convocation of the University.

JUPC not only forms a hub of pupils interested in photography but also creates a nexus of members and acquaintances all over the globe that enriches photographic practices in the niche of the University that has inspired generations to be innovative and interested to explore the realm of photography.

Name: Pilar Shoots
Description:
Thibault Debaene reveals his interpretation of the world around him through his lens. Driven by a passion for capturing the interplay of light and architecture, his photographic journey began in his early twenties. What started as an hobby quickly evolved into a deep fascination with interior and architectural photography, through dedicated self-education. In 2020, he founded Pilar Shoots, a creative agency that offers photography and videography in various sectors.

His photography is defined by a keen eye for detail, an intuitive understanding of light, and a deep respect for the spaces he captures. Every image tells a story, revealing the soul of a room, the harmony of design, and the emotions embedded in architectural forms. He focuses on creating timeless visuals that balance precision and artistry, where light and shadow dance together to highlight texture, depth, and atmosphere.

Based in Belgium, he embraces the diversity of architectural styles and cultural influences. Beyond still imagery, also videography and music are integral parts of his creative expression, offering a dynamic layer to his storytelling.

Description:

Description:
EasyShoots is een foto- en videostudio waar wij voor zo’n 250+ klanten (o.a. Hi- Tec, Prenatal, Tricorp, Daily Paper) e-commerce content verzorgen. Of het nu gaat om packshots, modelfotografie of video, wij verzorgen het. Wij onderscheiden ons door 3 belangrijke speerpunten die je overal binnen onze bedrijfsvoering terug ziet:

- Kwaliteit
- Continuïteit
- Service

Kwaliteit staat bij ons boven aan het lijstje. Het hele EasyShoot team werkt samen om de beste kwaliteit te leveren. Van het stomen en voorbereiden van artikelen tot de laatste controle voordat de beelden naar de klant gaan, iedereen werkt samen om de beste kwaliteit foto of video op te leveren. Liever teveel gedaan dan te weinig.

Continuïteit is minstens zo belangrijk als de kwaliteit. Ervoor zorgen dat je altijd dezelfde kwaliteit toont aan je klanten is van essentieel belang heden dag. Niet voor niks beantwoorden 7 van de 10 nieuwe klanten van EasyShoots de vraag “Waarom denk je eraan om je content bij EasyShoots te laten schieten?” met: Continuïteit. Door onze geavanceerde robot apparatuur, die jouw licht en camera instellingen onthoudt, kunnen wij ervoor zorgen dat je altijd een uniform en consistent beeld ontvangt.

Service heeft, wat ons betreft, te maken met klanten ontzorgen. Wij proberen het jou als klant zo makkelijk mogelijk te maken. Wij denken met je mee hoe je jouw collectie het beste tot zijn recht kunt laten komen. Wij zorgen ervoor dat jouw beelden direct te gebruiken zijn, door rekening te houden met al je styling wensen, afbeelding specificaties en planning.

Ik combineer creativiteit en technische vaardigheden om bedrijven visueel te vertalen. Ik begrijp de kernwaarden, cultuur en doelstellingen van een bedrijf en vertalen deze naar beelden die de identiteit en boodschap van het bedrijf weerspiegelen. Name: Andy Barnham Photography
Description:
Born in Hong Kong to a Chinese mum and British dad, I had an international upbringing living in Hong Kong, China, Japan and Saudi Arabia while I attended boarding school in England and, subsequently, university in Scotland.

 I started photography as a hobby while serving as an officer in the British Army and I always carried a camera along with my rifle, be it on exercise such as the jungles of Belize and the plains of Kenya or operational tours of Iraq, Cyprus and Afghanistan. After leaving the British Army I turned this passion into a career and became immersed in London's sartorial scene.

For a decade I photographed the best of British heritage, craft and bespoke for luxury editorial titles capturing the devil that is in the details. I am now focusing my camera on portraiture and using this eye for detail which was refined over ten years. I am a keen fan of rugby union and have recently started Portraits Of Pride to help support gay and inclusive rugby through portraiture.

Inspire engagement with and understanding of photography in Wales and the wider world.

Description:

 Do your actual images fail to communicate your brand's story?
 Do you feel frustrated when it comes to creating visuals for your online or corporate branding?
 Do you think you never look good in photos, or that you're not photogenic?

I completely understand how hard it is to stand out from the crowd. I will guide you every step of the way and here are a few things you can stop worrying about:

 I know how to pose and light you to make you look your best

 A headshot session is short, and you’ll be using those photos for months, even years

I have a simple 4-STEP SYSTEM to make the entire experience enjoyable and stress-free:

1 Before we start the photo session I learn about your profession, needs, and goals. This helps me to create headshots that express the proper look

You will get:

 More brand awareness

My goal is to boost your network, attract clients, advance your career, and embrace the adage "First impressions matter."

Look at it this way: if you don’t take yourself seriously, who will?

 Check out my website at https://www.browerman.com/

 647-884-8251

Name: Jérôme Pace - Photography
Description:
Docteur en Sciences des religions, j’ai longtemps vécu au rythme des mythologies anciennes... Un parcours singulier et qui, m'ayant ouvert à notre histoire, nourrit aujourd'hui mon métier de photographe.  

Explorer le monde aura toujours été pour moi synonyme de liberté. Ce point de suspension qui, teintée d’un romantisme désuet, souffle l’ivresse de confins intérieurs. 

J’ai ainsi fouillé au Kurdistan irakien ; pratiqué le sambo à Moscou ; ou encore récolté le thé dans la préfecture de Kagoshima. Cette errance est qui je suis : elle est ce discours interrompu et dont les heur(e)s, battant la mesure des mondes disparus, révèlent mon âme sauroctone. 

À l'ombre des moulins endormis, les nymphes chantent les rires de mon enfance : aux reflets aguerris de mes solitudes engagées, la vie – ma vie – pour horizon. 

Jérôme.

Name: Journées photographiques de Bienne | Bieler Fototage
Description:
FR
Les Journées photographiques de Bienne célèbrent la photographie contemporaine depuis plus de 25 ans. Unique festival annuel de photographie émergente en Suisse, il a su seplacer sur la scène culturelle nationale tout en renforçant sa présence etses réseaux à l’étranger. Chaque année pendant le moisde mai, les œuvres et les projetsd’une vingtaine de photographes suisses et internationaux investissentdes lieux connus et insolites de la ville de Bienne et sont à découvrir sousla forme d’une balade photographique. Un riche programme d’événements: rencontres, visites guidées, conférences et performances accompagnent les expositions grâce à des partenariats multiples. 

DE
Seit mehr als 25 Jahren zelebrieren die Bieler Fototage die zeitgenössische Fotografie. Als einziges jährlich stattfindendes Fotofestival dieser Art in der Schweiz sind die Bieler Fototage in der nationalen Kulturszene gut verwurzelt, stärken aber gleichzeitig ihre Verbindungen ins Ausland. Jedes Jahr im Mai sind die Werke und Projekte von rund 20 Schweizer und internationalen Fotografinnen und Fotografen an bekannten oder auch ausgefallenen Orten der Stadt Biel zu sehen und können bei einem fotografischen Spaziergang entdeckt werden. Dank verschiedenen Partnerschaften werden die Ausstellungen ergänzt durch ein reichhaltiges Programm mit Begegnungen, Führungen, Vorträgen und Performances. 

ENG
The Biel/Bienne Festival of Photography has been celebrating contemporary photography for more than 25 years. As the only annual festival of new photography in Switzerland, it has been able to position itself on the national cultural scene, while also building its international presence and networks. Each year during the month of May, venues both familiar and new in the city of Biel/Bienne are taken over by works and projects by some twenty Swiss and international photographers, which can be experienced in the form of a photographic walking tour.

Name: VIVI Bride 薇薇新娘
Description:
來自台灣的婚紗品牌，目前在台灣、香港及馬來西亞(吉隆坡與新山)都有直營門市。

擁有將近30年品牌歷史的薇薇新娘，憑著創辦人張德福專業攝影理念的帶領下，薇薇新娘所堅持的攝影品質總是獲得客戶的青睞與肯定，因為薇薇新娘相信，攝影不光只是按下快門、捕捉瞬間的動作而已，被攝者在其中的情感流露與互動表現，正是薇薇新娘所重視的愛情記錄。

為了增加豐富多樣的拍攝內容，薇薇新娘致力於提供新人更多的拍攝選擇，不論是多元的風格導向，或是強調旅遊婚紗的浪漫旅程，目的都是希望新人可以愜意地享受婚紗拍攝的過程，並讓薇薇新娘的攝影專業打造兩人專屬的甜蜜世界。

婚紗攝影與藝術的結合，並融入新人的人文思想與戀愛情史為劇本，拍攝出量身訂製專屬婚紗照。

Ever-improving drone technology does this better than any other form of photography.
Bob has been piloting drones for over 2 years, is FAA Part 107 licensed- including nighttime operations certification, locally licensed and insured. All photo and video editing is done in-house to maintain costs. We do not offer interior photography or virtual models at this time but are open to partnering with companies using this technology.
We welcome you to visit our website to get a better feel for our services and the quality of our work. 
We strive to be fair and honest in everything we do and firmly believe that working as a team accomplishes all goals.

Each word in Vaka Tara speaks to creation, connection, and movement — a philosophy of making with purpose and heart.

VAKA — a way, a vessel, a movement.

TARA — to touch, to build, to connect.

VAKATARA — to allow, to give voice, to guide creation.

Together, these meanings form the essence of who we are:
to move with purpose, to create with meaning, and to connect with heart.

From resorts and tourism boards to development partners and creative collaborations, we bring stories to life with clarity, craft, and cultural depth.
Our work combines contemporary design with Pacific storytelling — shaped by a deep understanding of place, people, and perspective.

Created to Inspire. Grounded to Connect.

Name: CEWE Romania
Description:
CEWE este lider în Europa, în domeniul serviciilor foto și un inovator în tipărirea online. Din portofoliul CEWE fac parte produse foarte îndrăgite și renumite precum: CEWE FOTOCARTE, CEWE Instant Foto, CEWE Calendare, Fotografii și produse cadou personalizate. Gama largă de produse și standardele de înaltă calitate a acestora, 100% garanția satisfacției pe care o oferim, fac ca, CEWE să rămână un brand foarte apreciat. Cu peste 60.000.000 de exemplare printate, CEWE FOTOCARTE a devenit cea mai populară fotocarte din Europa, alegerea perfectă a clienților de a-și retrăi cele mai dragi povești, amintiri din călătorii sau sărbători.
 
Povestea CEWE a început în 1912, când Carl Wöltje a deschis un mic studio foto în Oldenburg iar ca și companie, CEWE a fost fondată în 1961 de socrul său, senatorul h. c. Heinz Neumüller. În 1993 a fost fondată și listată la bursă ca societate pe acțiuni. CEWE Stiftung & Co. KGaA este listată în SDAX și a realizat vânzări consolidate de 714,9 milioane EUR, în 2019.
 
Cu 14 fabrici de producție și peste 4.200 de angajați în 24 de țări din Europa, SUA, Canada și Brazilia, CEWE furnizează în fiecare an, în jur de 2,5 miliarde de fotografii și colaborează cu peste 33.000 de parteneri comerciali din toată Europa. CEWE este prezentă și pe piața serviciilor de imprimare, prin intermediul mărcilor CEWE-PRINT.de, SAXOPRINT, Laserline și Viaprinto. Produsele CEWE sunt tipărite în mod sustenabil într-un proces neutru din punct de vedere al emisiilor de carbon. 

În România, CEWE este prezentă de peste 14 ani. A dezvoltat parteneriate cu cei mai mari retaileri, oferind o gama completă de servicii online, magazine și serivicii B2B. CEWE este un actor important în susținerea și dezvoltarea comunităților de fotografie la toate nivelurile începând cu amatori și până la profesioniști.
 
În calitate de partener CEWE, puteți fi sigur că sunteți susținut de serviciul de imprimare online, de top, din Europa.

Name: Simon Cartwright Photography Ltd
Description:
Originally from the county of West Yorkshire in the UK, Simon moved to Hawke's Bay, New Zealand, with his Kiwi wife Mandy and son Daniel in May 2011. Since then he has been steadily building up a reputation for producing an exceptional calibre of professional commercial photography for clients of all sizes, locally and nationally.

Simon's interest in photography began as a child with his parents' Polaroid and point-and-shoot film cameras. Upon leaving school, he trained and followed a career path within the Civil Engineering sector for nigh on 20 years. However, behind the scenes, his love of photography remained, and upon immigrating to New Zealand in 2011, Simon took the plunge and retrained as a professional commercial photographer.

These days, Simon shoots his photographic images using Canon mirrorless camera equipment and utilises the latest software in a 'digital darkroom' to refine and get the most out of his imagery. He's a passionate believer in pushing his own photographic knowledge, development and skill level, to ensure the best possible images are delivered to his clients, on every project.

Simon is available to shoot all types of commercial imagery including photography for industrial and agricultural businesses, brands, products, services, architecture, people and places. He's also a specialist at capturing people and their activities at events, both large and small. Simon shoots alone or with multiple photographers, which can be arranged for larger events.

Simon is an Accredited Professional Commercial Photographer with the New Zealand Institute of Professional Photography (NZIPP).

For more information, contact Simon at www.scphotography.co.nz or on 021 08246455.
Location: Havelock North, New Zealand, Hawke's Bay

Name: StudioHewin
Description:
At Withhewin Photography, we believe every frame tells a story—whether it’s a fleeting moment of human resilience, a cultural tradition passed through generations, or the raw intensity of a live event. Our expertise spans documentary photography, photojournalism, cinematography, and professional post-production, crafting visuals that leave a lasting impact.  

What We Do:

 Documentary & Photojournalism – Capturing real-world narratives with authenticity.

 Filmmaking & Cinematography – Creating powerful documentaries and visual stories, including investigative features and artist collaborations across geopolitical borders.  

 Photo & Video Editing – Elevating visuals through expert post-production, from color grading and retouching to cinematic storytelling in film editing.  

 Commissioned Work – We take on a wide range of projects, including:  
• Portraits – Personal, editorial, and professional branding sessions.  
• Events – Corporate, cultural, weddings, and milestone celebrations.  
• Commercial Photography – Product, fashion, and brand storytelling.

Name: Thorsten Rother STUDIO
Description:
Thorsten Rother arbeitet seit den späten Neunzigerjahren als freier Fotograf. Seine Arbeiten entstehen aus einer Beobachtungshaltung, die auf Reduktion, Klarheit und Präsenz setzt. Rothers Bildsprache verzichtet bewusst auf gestellte Dramatik und technische Effekte; sie konzentriert sich auf Licht, Raum und die feinen Verschiebungen von Stimmung und Wahrnehmung – bei Menschen wie in Orten.

Nach Jahrzehnten in der Werbe- und Auftragsfotografie richtet er seinen Fokus heute auf den Fine-Art-, Buch-, Ausstellungs- und Kunstsektor. Neben fotografischen Serien arbeitet er mit Sequenzen, bewegten Bildern und mit KI-basierten Verfahren als Erweiterung seines visuellen Repertoires.

Rothers Werk entfaltet sich in drei Bereichen: klassische fotografische Serien, hybride Arbeiten zwischen Fotografie und KI sowie synthetische Bildwelten, die aus seinem eigenen Archiv heraus entwickelt werden. Diese Felder markieren keine technischen Kategorien, sondern unterschiedliche Formen eines erweiterten fotografischen Denkens – die konsequente Fortsetzung seiner Handschrift in neue Bildräume.

Rother lebt und arbeitet in München. Seine Projekte entstehen weltweit, meist in kleinen Teams und mit reduziertem Equipment – präzise, zurückhaltend und mit einer Haltung, die sich auf das Wesentliche konzentriert.

Name: FIAF, Federazione Italiana Associazioni Fotografiche
Description: Il 19 dicembre 1948, in un'Italia in pieno fervore ricostruttivo, dopo la tragedia della guerra, veniva fondata la "Federazione Italiana Associazioni Fotografiche" (FIAF) a Torino. Lo scopo di tale federazione, al momento della nascita, era quello di divulgare e sostenere la fotografia amatoriale su tutto il territorio nazionale, creando un'associazione senza fini di lucro dove le parole, le fotografie, le amicizie dovevano ripagare il grande esercito dei fotoamatori, volenterosi non solo di fare belle immagini, ma anche di operare attivamente per la diffusione dell'arte fotografica. In cinquant'anni di storia la FIAF non ha cambiato il suo originale intento e passo passo  andata crescendo. Oggi annovera circa 5.500 associati e 550 circoli affiliati, tramite i quali raggiunge con i propri mezzi informativi le circa 40.000 persone che ruotano in questi club e nutrono interesse per il mondo della fotografia.  La solida struttura FIAF ha sede a Torino, sua cittˆ natale. Possiede uno statuto che regola i rapporti interni con l'organico impiegato.  La sua forza vera  tuttavia la rete di fotoamatori, che con il loro apporto spontaneo ogni giorno lavorano per servire chi ha nella fotografia la sua vera, grande, passione. La FIAF  membro dell'Associazione Internationale FIAP (FŽdŽration Internationale de l'Art Photographique). Un'associazione moderna, dinamica, sempre disponibile e veramente vicina ai propri associati, perchŽ su di essi pone la propria ragione di esistere. La FIAF ha fatto la storia della fotografia amatoriale italiana ed oggi, pilastro importante della cultura italiana ed anche internazionale, crede di potere dare molto ai propri soci in termini di sostegno, di educazione e di idee, tramite rapporti unici ed esclusivi.FIAF, un pilastro importante della cultura italiana ed internazionale, sostiene la fotografia amatoriale su tutto il territorio italiano.

Imagefotografie

Darum bieten wir Ihnen individuelle und ausdrucksstarke Bilder, die Ihren Kunden einen Einblick in Ihr Unternehmen vermitteln. Dafür kommen wir gerne direkt zu Ihnen ins Unternehmen, oder die Aufnahmen können auch in unserem Fotostudio gemacht werden.

Produktfotografie
Wir präsentieren Ihr Produkt, damit Ihre Kunden sich besser mit Ihren Erzeugnissen identifizieren können. Mit langjähriger Erfahrung, hochwertigem Equipment, professioneller Bildbearbeitung und einer extra Portion Kreativität liefern wir erstklassige Produktbilder. Dabei werden Ihre Produkte entweder direkt bei uns im Studio abgelichtet oder, wenn die Größe oder Form einen Transport nicht möglich oder schwierig machen, vor Ort arrangiert. 

Businessportraits
Portraits für Firmen, Geschäftsführer, Mitarbeiter oder Personen des öffentlichen Lebens bieten sowohl einen authentischen Einblick in die Tätigkeit der Person und transportieren Fachkompetenz und Sympathie. Gemeinsam mit Ihnen kreieren wir exklusive Bewerbung- und Profilbilder, indem wir den für Sie passenden Hintergrund und Lichtsetzung zusammenstellen.

Marike Herselman Photography is a boutique photographic agency founded in 2015 by Marike Herselman. We specialise in professional portrait photography within the corporate, private practise and Non-Profit sectors. Our approach is personal aiming to capture sincerity and honesty in every portrait with the intention of enhancing professionalism for all digital and marketing platforms. .  

"The energy and honesty that a person can bring to a photograph transcends any view or expectation they may have of themselves. In my work I want to build a trust that allows my subject to show their true self so that I can show them how beautiful, interesting and enchanting they can be."

Why do we need professional portraits? To help  business owners, entrepreneurs, corporates, SME’s and non-profit organizations communicate a higher level professionalism which subsequently builds long-lasting trusted relationships between you and your intended target audience.  

Where do you need portraits:

- Company websites
- Professional Social Media platforms i.e Linked In, Facebook Business Pages, Instagram
- Content marketing material
- Live Events 
- Annual reports
- Business cards
- Email signatures
- Book covers
- Tinder :) 

My specialties are:

- Corporate Portraits
- Profile Portraiture
- Headshots

My clients include:
Accounting Firms • Authors • Lawyers  • Opera Singers  • Actors  •  Auditing Firms • Psychologists • Law Firms • IT Companies • Models  • Casting Agencies • Production Companies  • Branding Companies •  Non Profit Organizations  • Marketing strategists  • Financial Advisors  • Life Coaches  • Fitness Coaches  • Bloggers  •

Name: Headshot Toby
Description:
You know when your photos just… don’t feel like you?

Too posed. Too polished. Too ‘that’ll do.’

That’s where I come in. I’m Toby Lee - photographer, filmmaker, and the guy who helps you show up like you actually mean it.

I work with entrepreneurs, creatives, corporate teams, and brands who want more than just a nice headshot and I can bring the whole shebang from lighting, composition, set design, the works. Together, we create images and video that capture who you are, what you’re about, and why people should care.

No awkward poses. No fake smiles. Just the right light, the right direction, and a bit of chat to help you relax and look like the pro you are.

I’m based at my studio in Lincoln, but I work with people all over and travel for the right project.

If you're ready to stop hiding behind logos, stock images, and old LinkedIn pics — let's talk.

If you're just browsing to find out more, hit follow on my profile so you don't miss any of my helpful posts with personal branding advice and how to feel confident for the camera!

Product photography is the only thing we do all day long, and we’re extremely good at it. We’ve photographed all types of products from diapers to assault rifles, from gems and electronic components that measure 2mm across to 20-foot carpets, and nearly everything in between.

Company Overview
Upgraded Images is a professional product photography studio in the Los Angeles area for companies that sell products online or through catalogs. Since we opened our doors for business, we have sold hundreds of thousands of product photos to thousands of clients in dozens of industries.

Mission
At Upgraded Images our mission is to provide world class product photography and remove mystery and intimidation that often surrounds commercial photography studios.

Our Story
Product Photography Studio located in Los Angeles with thousands of clients across the globe. We were established the studio in 2005, our mission to solve all commercial photography concerns for Product Photography.

Photography is the only art at which we are expert, our photography team has a very solid background in marketing and fully understands the importance of communicating value to the customer. They use this knowledge to ensure that every product photo taken at Upgraded Images highlights the most important aspects of each product while representing it accurately and attractively.

Name: Wyatt Peterson Studios
Description:
Welcome to Wyatt Peterson Studios, where the wild is our canvas and the lens is our brush. We specialize in capturing the raw beauty and untamed spirit of nature through our photography, videography, and writing. 

We are storytellers at heart, crafting visually stunning and emotionally charged narratives that transport you to the heart of the wilderness. Whether it's freelancing video editing, writing thought-provoking blog articles on adventure and conservation, or working with some of the most daring adventure athletes in the world, we are dedicated to sharing the magic of the wild with the world. Our online ‘Wall Preview’ feature allows artwork buyers on a limited budget to collectors of limited editions to find the perfect fit for their space.

REEFLEX is a dynamic team of tech enthusiasts - engineers, designers, and photographers - hailing from the vibrant cities of Rome, Zurich, and Copenhagen. Our journey kicked off in early 2020, driven by a bold mission: to redefine mobile photography through advanced computational techniques.

At REEFLEX we strongly believe that the best camera out there is the one you can always have with yourself and that the best part of memories is making them. We envision a transformative era where mobile phones become the quintessential tools for capturing, curating, and sharing content across creative communities. 

Embracing this dynamic shift, we are dedicated to building a cutting-edge ecosystem of tools and software, allowing our users to effortlessly capture extraordinary moments using the device that's always at their fingertips.

Name: John Christopher Studio
Description:
John Christopher Studio is a fine-art portrait studio in Denver dedicated to creating timeless, sculptural black-and-white portraits. Founded by photographer JC Buck, the studio offers a quiet, intentional portrait experience shaped by crafted light, thoughtful direction, and an emphasis on authentic expression.

Each session is designed with care—unhurried, focused, and centered on revealing character and presence. The work is rooted in the tradition of classic studio portraiture while embracing a contemporary, minimalist aesthetic. Clients include artists, musicians, executives, families, and individuals who value heirloom-quality portraiture made with depth and intention.

In addition to portrait work, the studio offers museum-grade prints and fine-art installations, continuing JC’s broader practice in black-and-white photography. John Christopher Studio also collaborates with organizations such as the Colorado Symphony, creating expressive portraits for musicians and leadership across multiple seasons.

The studio is located in Lakewood, Colorado, serving clients throughout the greater Denver area.

Quiet. Intentional. Crafted with care.

Name: Claus Sall Photography
Description:
For mig er det at fotografere en måde at tænke på, det er en måde hvorpå jeg kan fange og udtrykke følelser, og på samme tid kommunikere dem til andre. Det er også en måde for mig at fange et kort sekund, og bevare det for evigt, det er en af de ting der gør fotografiet så stærkt i mine øjne.

Jeg har igennem de sidste 10 år hjulpet et utal af kunder med at billeder der fortæller en historie, og billeder der viser dem fra deres bedste side. For mig er målet altid at skabe det bedst mulige resultat, men det når man kun igennem en god dialog og en klar forventningsafstemning, hvilket er noget jeg lægger stor vægt på når du er kunde hos mig.

Når jeg ikke er i studiet, så finder du mig udenfor, i byen eller i skoven, hvor jeg altid leder efter de glemte og gemte steder, hvor der måske lige var det den smukke komposition der kunne gøre sig godt på væggen derhjemme. Jeg har og er stadig også aktiv inden for adventure-racing, en sportsgren der kan være utroligt svær at fotografere, men det er også med til at få mig ud i naturen og se nogle steder jeg normalt aldrig ville komme til at se.

Jeg bor i Køge men er altid klar på et eventyr, og rejser gerne til opgaver.

Name: Sarah Johnson Photography
Description:
Well hello and thank you for stopping by. 

I’m Sarah- Louise Johnson, a personal branding photographer with a smiling, calming nature and a positive can do anything attitude.

Shall I let you into a secret? I’m not a fan of having my photo taken and much prefer to be behind my camera. 

You too? No way!

That’s why I’ll always do my best to make you feel completely comfortable and relaxed before the photoshoot starts. It’s how we manage to have a fun time together and get amazing pictures. Taking the time to get to know you as part of our planning session and pre photoshoot work really helps. 

My photography is all about capturing natural candid photographs that make you SHINE, and I feel so grateful that I get to do it every day.

Why would you need a professional photographer?

As a business owner myself I know first hand the importance of having all the tools at hand to help to promote you to your clients and potential customers to help you stand out online. From the initial conversation I will work with you to find out about your business, your story, about your brand and how your clients. Only then will we work together to put together a plan for your photoshoot session. The session needs to be relevant to your end goal of your marketing as let's be honest you are going to be using your images to promote you, how you do it, where you do it to be able to connect and talk to your clients.

Through my profile I will be sharing with you ideas for your sessions, how I carry out these sessions and examples of my recent work and if my style of photography is what you are looking for, then please reach out to me and we can arrange an informal chat initially to talk through your requirements.

You can also find me on the other platforms detailed below also. 

www.sarahjohnsonphotography.co.uk
Mobile: 07805896497
Email: sarah@sarahjohnsonphotography.co.uk
Facebook: www.facebook.com/sarahjohnsonphotography
Instagram: www.instagram.com/sarahjohnsonphotography_

Name: Phil Porter
Description:
Guter Stil ist keine Frage des Geschmacks, sondern der Verbundenheit. Schönheit ist also nicht diskutabel, sie ist ein Zeichen der Leidenschaft. Meine Fotos sind Ausdruck meiner Empathie. Für die Gäste vor meiner Kamera sind sie oberflächlich betrachtet Vehikel in eine Zukunft, wie sie sein soll. Doch gute Fotografien sind mehr als das: Sie sind Selbstfürsorge, Neugierde, Spielfreude und die Freiheit, das Leben selbst gestalten zu können. Ein gutes Foto zeigt nicht nur ein Lächeln, nicht die Stärke ohne die Leidenschaft. Es bringt unterschiedliche Nuancen zur Geltung, ist vielschichtig, möchte angeschaut und wahrgenommen werden. Es ist eine ganze Welt in einem Augenblick. Lassen Sie uns diesen Augenblick gemeinsam einfangen:

Name: OllO
Description:
Ollo nace como un colectivo fotográfico multidisciplinar vencellado á creación, divulgación e difusión de historias relevantes para a sociedade a través da linguaxe da imaxe e da narrativa audiovisual.

As figuras vinculadas ao fotoxornalismo que integran o colectivo son Vanessa Casteleiro, Óscar Corral, Agostiño Iglesias, Brais Lorenzo, Óscar Pinal, Adra Pallón e Paula Quiroga. Completan o equipo Sara García e Daniel Lázare no referente ao apartado de xestión cultural e Sabela Eiriz colabora nas tarefas de edición e curadoría.

O fin principal do colectivo é xerar reflexión na poboación ante as diversas problemáticas sociais e medioambientais ás que se enfronta a actual sociedade. Para acadar este fin unímonos persoas pertencentes a diversos eidos tales como o fotoxornalismo, o documentalismo gráfico e videográfico e a xestión cultural.

O proxecto colaborativo apóiase na creación de proxectos culturais, na oferta formativa e no desenvolvemento de proxectos editoriais e comerciais.

Name: Gilmour Commercial Photography
Description:
Photography that works as hard as you do.

We make images for businesses who want more than “content.”
They want credibility. Leverage. Proof that what they do matters.

We work in the real world—industrial sites, boardrooms, labs, construction yards, hospitals, and places where safety boots outnumber storyboards.

Our clients don’t want another thing to manage.
They want a photographer who can walk in, read the room, solve the lighting, and walk out with a library of images they can use for:

Websites

Investor decks

Reports

Social campaigns

Recruitment

PR and media

Internal brand alignment

We’ve delivered 3,000+ commercial shoots in Spain and Canada for companies in energy, engineering, architecture, healthcare, and manufacturing. Whether you’re launching a new brand, refreshing an image library, or managing a safety-critical site, we’ve done it—and we’ll guide you through it.

What we deliver is simple: planning, production, and visuals that move business forward.

If you want images that help people understand what makes your company valuable, let’s talk.

Extending our expertise in news photography, we also take up assignments across India and worldwide – from celebrity shows and corporate events to fashion weeks and sports championships. Our award-winning photographers deliver top-quality work, to the deadline.

Name: FotoFetch
Description:
Founded in 2019, FotoFetch photographs the world every day.  Our vision reimagines the impossible into a simple elegant solution; we provide our customers with Any Photo, Anytime, Anywhere.  Ask us for a short video of the Taj Mahal to be taken tonight or a photograph of a billboard in Topeka tomorrow at dawn, FotoFetch delivers.  FotoFetch connects with 45 billion cameras and the people who own them by making commercial photography a revenue source for all.  

FotoFetch exists on two tenets, revealing ideas and advancing these ideas with actions that boldly lead workers to a fulfilling place in the gig economy.  We embrace the value of people and their thoughts.  We encourage diversity, community, and unity with our employees, partners, and customers. To ensure these values are part of our culture, we have made our Values Statement part of the review process for all who work for FotoFetch and all who FotoFetch partners with or work for.

Name: Christine van Rooijen Fotografie
Description:
Christine van Rooijen Fotografie wil ieder bedrijf een eigen gezicht geven. Laat zien wie je bent als ondernemer en/of als bedrijf! Dus weg met eenduidige, over-gestileerde stockfoto's uit beeldbanken! Die vertellen niet wat jij te bieden hebt. Met eigen beeldmateriaal op je website of brochure geef je je klant een inkijkje in het bedrijf.

Foto's van jullie eigen medewerkers in hun eigen werkomgeving geven de klant een vertrouwd gevoel van herkenning. Het maakt je bedrijf meer benaderbaar.
En met een foto van het eigen pand, het team of de mooie projecten die zijn opgeleverd, geef je je klant een realistisch en uitnodigend beeld en is de stap om ook klant te worden zo gemaakt. 

Als fotograaf met een commerciële achtergrond, denk ik graag mee over hoe we het verhaal het beste in uitnodigend beeld kunnen vertalen. Klanten vinden het leuk om te zien wat het bedrijf nog meer doet, dus laat dat zien. Het vergroot je zichtbaarheid en je klant blijft geïnteresseerd.

Bij Christine van Rooijen Fotografie kun je terecht voor:
- LinkedIn profielfoto's
- Portretten van medewerkers voor een neutrale achtergrond en/ of gefotografeerd in hun eigen werkomgeving 
- Bedrijfsreportage: geef je klant een inkijkje in het bedrijfsproces en de sfeer in het bedrijf
- Sfeerreportages van je bedrijfsevenement.
- Interieurfotografie
- Foto van het bedrijfspand 
- Productfotografie

Wil je weten wat Christine van Rooijen Fotografie voor jou kan doen, of heb je zelf een leuk idee dat we samen verder vorm kunnen geven, neem contact op met Christine.

Christine is een ervaren fotograaf en een rustige persoonlijkheid, waardoor de mensen die ze fotografeert zich al snel op hun gemak voelen. 

Christine van Rooijen Fotografie

Name: Centre for British Photography
Description:
The Centre for British Photography is a charitable initiative set up by the Hyman Foundation  (Registered Charity Number 1190955).  A significant new space for British photography, it will have exhibitions spaces, a programme of public events, an archive, and a shop. It aims to provide a dedicated home for British Photography in all its diversity. The aim is to host exhibitions curated independently by outside curators and institutional partners as well as to provide access to the Hyman Collection and in so doing present an expansive overview of British photography past and present. It is due to open in January 2023. 

The Centre will be based just off Piccadilly in central London for an initial period of two years in order to develop relationships with other organisations, charities and individuals that will allow it to become independent and self-sustaining. It will be a hub for exhibitions, events, partnerships and collaborations. We will be announcing shortly our opening exhibitions and events. 
 
The Centre is initially being funded and run by the Hyman Foundation (Registered Charity Number 1190955) but we are also looking forward to establishing partnerships with other organisations and charities. Please do contact us if you would like to collaborate or support our activities or would be interested in becoming a trustee or advisor. 

Exhibitions at the Centre will be free of charge and all profits from the shop will go to fund the work of the charity in support of photography in Britain.

Name: Emphas.is
Description:
Emphas.is is a new and innovative platform for photojournalism. It proposes a unique bond between photojournalists and their audience, and in the process aims to create a new financial model for photojournalism in the 21st century.

Experience photojournalism

Emphas.is is a new and innovative platform for photojournalism. It proposes a unique bond between photojournalists and their audience, and in the process aims to create a new financial model for photojournalism in the 21st century. Emphas.is launches at the beginning of 2011.
 
How will this work?

Through crowd funding, but with a difference. Crowd funding has already proven successful in other areas, and we believe photojournalism has a large and enthusiastic following that would be willing to contribute financially when given the right incentive. Emphas.is offers this incentive in the form of exclusive access to top photojournalists carefully selected by a board of reviewers composed of industry professionals.

Why will this work?

Photojournalism has a huge and dedicated following. In 2009, no less than 2.4 million people in 46 countries visited the World Press Photo exhibition. Lensblog, the photojournalism blog by the New York Times has more than 750,000 unique visitors a month. The award-winning photojournalist James Nachtwey has 26,401 Facebook fans and counting.

Also, digital technology has spawned a whole new generation of amateur photographers who we believe are eager to learn from the professionals, and who would be willing to pay a small fee for the privilege.

But photography enthusiasts are only part of Emphas.is’ potential reach; people who care about the issues addressed by a photojournalist’s work are another untapped audience.

Who is behind Emphas.is?

Emphas.is is the brainchild of photo editor Tina Ahrens and photojournalist Karim Ben Khelifa.

Name: One Last Magical Adventure - Windsor Ascot based Professional Dog Photographer - MIL Pet Photography
Description:
NO MATTER HOW MANY YEARS WE GET WITH OUR DOGS, IT'S NEVER LONG ENOUGH

  It's never easy to say goodbye to our fur friend, our family member, our closest companion.

 I believe that as your dog's guardian, you deserve treasured memories of the unique and unconditional bond of love and trust between you both - a love that you will carry in your heart forever.

 Through dog photography, by capturing that unconditional love between you, we celebrate the relationship you and your dog have and preserve permanent memories to be treasured forever. Together, we can do everything possible to create One Last Magical Adventure for you and your dog.  

 With the sensitivity, compassion and patience expected from a certified Pet Loss Grief Specialist, I deliver photography that honours your dog, and can also be there to help you with a network of additional help on your personal grief journey.

 Whether it's due to illness or age, this may be the last opportunity to get some professional photographs of you and your dog, and that bond of unconditional love between you. These sessions are sometimes referred to as Memory or Legacy Sessions, and occasionally Rainbow Bridge or End of Life Sessions. As you and your dog deserve the best, I prefer to prepare well for you and your dog, and create One Last Magical Adventure with you. 

WHY BOOK US? 

 We specialize in natural light dog photography 

 5-star Ratings - check out our Google Reviews 

 Certified as the UK’s first Pet Loss Grief Specialist with the worldwide group of Pet Photographers at One Last Network

 I aim to capture the deep bond of unconditional love and joy between you and your dog, preserving beautiful portraits and memories that will comfort and reconnect you with meaningful moments to treasure forever.

 I am here to help you by offering photography sessions to celebrate your dog’s life, and to help connect you to a network of other people who can help you on your journey of grief.

Name: Vishal Kullarwar Photography
Description:
Vishal started out to become an engineer, but a heightened awareness of the visual art diverted his attention to the camera and its versatility. Ridden by this passion, he decided to drop out of engineering college to pursue his dream and completed his graphic designing from a Canadian college. Having worked with reputed Design Houses and Advertising agencies. Soon he shifted his focus towards photography. He started off by assisting renowned photographer in India for over 2 years, soon after which he travelled to Paris and Hamburg to acquire more knowledge with respect to the visual medium after which he decided to start off on his own. Aspiring to carve a niche in the photography industry, he is well versed in fashion, advertising and editorial work. Vishal describes his work as the constant need to move and evolve. 

A true follower of celebrated top celebrity photographer Richard Avedon & Mario Testino. Vishal prefers to eschew the ‘pretty’ and bring out the stark underlying ‘reality’ of the subject.

Boasting a background in graphic Designing, his work has often been considered provocative yet unique. His client and publication credits currently includes International & Indian magazines such as ELLE, GQ, Cosmopolitan, Grazia, Chew, Swank Glossy to name a few. His work has also appeared in the likes of advertising agencies such as Ogilvy, Leo Burnett, BBH, and many more. Current international work includes – Oriflame, Poland’s Next Top Model, Lux, Adweek, etc.

An alchemist behind the lens, offering his most comprehensive art featuring top models, designers, advertising campaigns, fashion editorials, catalogs, etc. He has exhibited his work in the prestigious D & AD awards (London), The World Press Photo, the Dubai Media City (IBDA), Lalit Kala Academy etc. Ventured out on his own 8 years ago in the ever demanding modern fashion world, Vishal's passion for visual beauty and perfection continues to impress many today.

Name: Self Publish, Be Happy
Description:
Self Publish, Be Happy was founded by Bruno Ceschel in 2010 to promote a new generation of photographers and self-publishers. Through its activities in publishing, the curation of exhibitions and events, and education it has helped to support photography culture around the world.

Shortly after the financial crash, at a time when the digital revolution was really taking hold, it became apparent to Ceschel that the traditional publishing industry in which he was working wasn’t going to last. Looking for answers he discovered an international community of young artists making ground-breaking DIY photography books and zines. A new visual culture was emerging and it needed a platform on which people could engage with it: hence he founded Self Publish, Be Happy.

Over the years Self Publish, Be Happy has supported a network of emerging photographers around the world, amassed a huge following, partnered with leading institutions such as Tate Modern, Foam and Aperture, and expanded its remit to match an ever changing visual culture. It now comprises a publishing house, a library of more than 3,000 self-published titles, an education programme, and an experimental creative studio to direct and produce state-of-the-art visual content and socially engaged events.

Our services include: Organization of photos/materials, scanning of photos/materials, conversion of videos/slides/other materials to desired digital format, photo organization software instruction/computer file assistance, back-up of photos/materials, photo restoration, assemble photo albums, create other types of photo projects (memorial or celebration boards, digital photo books, posters, etc.), and Photo Organization Workshops.

In addition, we have created the opportunity for others to start a photo organization business through the use of a Pixologie Trademark Agreement. Our goal is to offer other entrepreneurs the opportunity to be a part of an emerging field that is needed to help individuals and families recognize the importance of photos in preserving family traditions, celebrating memories and telling the stories of life that will be cherished by future generations.

Description:
DER GREIF is an award-winning organization for contemporary photography. It is print-publication, online-publication, curatorial team and joint project all at once. The artistic core and root of the project is the ad-free print-publication. It combines and presents the works of photographers and authors of different origins in a holistic piece of art.

The website is exhibition-, communication-, and information-platform for participants and anyone interested in contemporary photography. Participating artists are presented in special artist-features where they are given the opportunity to blog. In »Guest-Room«, outstanding personalities in the field of international photography curate and select their favorite submissions online.

Der Greif connects the digital and the analogue, exploring and expanding the borders and limits of image-distribution and -reception in the digital era. Since its inception in 2008, the project is involved with contemporary issues like the changing perception of authorship, de- and recontextualization of images, appropriation, artistic approaches to photographic archives and the rise of the remix culture.

DER GREIF has worked with institutions such as FOAM, Aperture Foundation, C/O Berlin, Fotomuseum Winterthur and published works from about 1.000 photographers and artists in printed publications as well as online.

Name: ZiiP Foundation
Description:
The ZiiP Foundation is dedicated to elevating the art of photography through education, exposure, and research. Our mission is to create a vibrant ecosystem fostering creativity, innovation, and cultural exchange among photographers and researchers.

Our Vision
To be the leading light in the world of photography, illuminating the path for artists, enthusiasts, and scholars. We envision a world where photography is a vibrant language that speaks across cultures and borders. Our goal is to foster an inclusive global community that celebrates the power of photography to inspire, educate, and effect change.

Our Mission
The ZiiP Foundation is committed to the advancement, education, and promotion of photography. Our mission unfolds in these directions:

• Education and Empowerment: We provide comprehensive educational programs, workshops, and resources for photographers of all levels, empowering individuals with the skills, knowledge, and inspiration needed to excel.
• Support and Promotion: We support photographers by offering platforms for exhibition, publication, and recognition, promoting outstanding work that challenges perceptions and tells compelling stories.
• Research and Development: We foster research and innovation in photography, supporting projects that explore new techniques, digital transformations, and sustainable practices.
• Community and Collaboration: We build a vibrant community of photographers, visual artists, scholars, and enthusiasts to share ideas, collaborate on projects, and celebrate diverse photographic expressions. We partner with organizations, schools, and communities to broaden photography’s impact.
• Advocacy and Awareness: We advocate for photography’s importance in cultural, educational, and environmental dialogues, raising awareness through exhibitions, publications, and public programs.

Visit our website to learn more: www.ziipfoundation.org

1992. aastal asutatud Nordic Digital AS on Eesti juurtega rahvusvaheline ettevõte, mis on peamiselt tuntud "Photopoint" kaubamärgi all tegutsevate esinduskaupluste ning sadade tuhandete toodetega photopoint.ee veebikaubamaja poolest. 

Edasimüüjad teavad meid kui Baltikumi suurima patareide ning IT kaupade hulgimüüjana. Ettevõttes töötab üle 100 oma ala parima spetsialisti ning 2019. aasta netokäive ulatus 17 miljoni euroni.

Nordic Digitali kaubamärkide protfelli kuuluvad maailmakuulsad brändid nagu Pentax, Panasonic Batteries, Tamron, Hoya Filters, Tamron, Manfrotto, Silicon-Power, Speedlink, Platinet, Vivanco, Roccat, Gorilla Glue, Billy Boy jpt.

Name: Cph Luftfoto ApS
Description:
Følg et byggeri eller udviklingen af en bydel over tid fra et fantastisk perspektiv. Book Cph Luftfoto og vær sikker på at opgaven løses professionelt med flotte og imponerende luftfotos.

Cph Luftfoto tilbyder professionel luftfotografering af ejendomme, byggeprojekter, virksomheder, anlæg og bydele i høj kvalitet.

Opgaverne løses primært fra et et-motors fly af typen Cessna 172 med højt placerede vinger, som sikrer de mest optimale forhold for at få fantastiske fotos. Til optagelserne benyttes udelukkende professionelt, digitalt udstyr fra Canon. Jesper Sørensen har været pilot siden 2004 og har følgende certifikater:

- CPL-Erhvervs Pilot
- MEIR-Flermotors instrument bevis
- ATPL-Airline Transport Pilot License

Cph Luftfoto (tidligere JS Foto) blev etableret i 2013 af Jesper Sørensen, som udover at være uddannet pilot og luftfotograf til daglig arbejder med udvikling af fast ejendom i Danmark. 

Kontakt os for et rigtig godt tilbud    - på gensyn over skyerne...


Jesper Sørensen     js@cphluftfoto.dk 
Carsten Hansen    car@cphluftfoto.dk

Name: Tasveer ka Darji
Description:
Tasveer Ka Darji — where every photo is tailored, and every story is stitched with soul.

We’re not just a photography studio — we’re storytellers with a camera, tailors of moments, and curators of emotion. Whether it’s a smile in a bridal portrait, the texture of handcrafted fabric, or the elegance of a product shoot — we weave visuals that don’t just capture attention, they hold it.

From bustling metros to quiet towns, Tasveer Ka Darji has worked with clients across India. Headquartered in Ghaziabad (Delhi-NCR), we travel wherever the story takes us — from Jaipur to Mumbai, Chandigarh to Kolkata, and beyond. Our mission is simple: to create images and videos that speak louder than words.

 Photography & Videography Services We Offer:

Fashion & Lifestyle Campaigns

Product & E-commerce Shoots

Event Photography & Video Highlights

Portraits & Creative Headshots

Brand Films & Reels

Social Media Content Creation

Flatlays, Lookbooks, and Ad Shoots

BTS, Interviews, and Story-driven Visuals

We combine technical expertise with an artist’s eye and a storyteller’s soul. Our team understands lighting, mood, tone, and how to bring out the uniqueness of a subject — whether it’s a person, a product, or a brand vision.

 Just like a skilled tailor customizes each stitch, we customize each shoot — bringing your ideas, emotions, and brand stories to life through a carefully crafted visual language.

We’ve had the pleasure of working with clothing brands, D2C startups, individual creators, coaches, stylists, restaurateurs, and artists — building campaigns and content that help them connect with their audience more meaningfully.

Whether you're launching a product, refreshing your brand visuals, or simply want to be seen in your true light —
Tasveer Ka Darji is here to stitch your story, frame by frame.

 Let’s collaborate. Let’s create. Let’s make your story unforgettable.
Welcome to Tasveer Ka Darji — Where photos are tailored, and moments are hand-stitched into time

Name: Vitrin by Fotolla
Description:
Mi is a VITRIN? 
Szia, Eisenberger Gigi vagyok. Fotográfus, a Fotolla megálmodója. 
Hosszú évek óta vágytam egy saját üvegházra, amiben egyedülálló, különleges képeket készíthetek. 
2022-ben végre megtaláltam a tökéletes helyszínt is hozzá Fóton, az erdő szomszédságában. Égigérő zöld tujasor, álomszép fények, és a gyönyörű kis üvegházam, a VITRIN. 
2024-ben pedig egy varázslatos, új együttműködésbe kezdtünk az Installáció fotóstúdióval. A VITRIN by Fotolla beköltözött a X. kerületbe, az Installáció fotóstúdió udvarába, és mostantól az Installáció weboldalán keresztül, közvetlenül is foglalhatóvá vált. 
Ha egy különleges fotózást szeretnél a VITRIN-ben, akkor írj a fotolla@fotolla.hu email címre, ha fotósként szeretnéd foglalni, akkor pedig az Installáció weboldalán keresztül teheted ezt meg. 
Gyere, és alkossunk igazán egyedi fotósorozatot Neked, a márkádnak, vagy a családodnak!

VITRIN... üveg, amelyben az értékeinket őrizzük.

Name: AGF srl Agenzia Giornalistica Fotografica
Description:
AGF offre una vasta scelta di immagini e video. L'attualità nazionale e internazionale che riguarda la politica, la cultura, lo spettacolo, l'arte è ora affiancata da un'importante settore Creative. Più di 4 milioni di immagini arricchiscono l'archivio AGF attraverso il contributo di molte agenzie internazionali e di un centinaio di fotografi professionisti. 

AGF può soddisfare in questo modo i media, il settore pubblicitario, l'editoria scolastica, il marketing, con immagini di alta qualità che vanno dalle news alla scienza, dal food alla natura, alle foto aeree, alla storia, con un incremento giornaliero di migliaia di immagini e servizi fotografici completi.

AGF è nata a Roma nel 1976. Da allora collabora con i maggiori quotidiani e periodici. Negli anni, ha realizzato libri e mostre. Produce servizi fotografici e video su assignment sia per le più importanti testate giornalistiche che per case editrici, importanti aziende e festival internazionali.

Accanto all'archivio digitale, AGF conserva materiale su pellicola, bianco e nero e colore, composto da circa tre milioni di immagini in corso di digitalizzazione, in un progetto che mira a selezionare le fotografie più belle e rappresentative degli ultimi quarant'anni della storia italiana. La distribuzione di importanti collezioni internazionali consente un'ampia scelta nel campo della fotografia storica.

Name: Andrea Veneziano
Description:
I was born in the South of Italy and I have a cosmopolitan heart.
I try thru a lens to transfer my passion for everything I do.
I love photography because it allows me to tell about myself and my emotions.
I love to capture the emotions of people around me, to capture the memory of unbelievable experiences during my work and my travels.

Name: Maurice Jager Fotografie
Description:
Tijdens mijn jeugd draait het om sport. De beste zijn en daar hard voor trainen. Toen daar een eind aan kwam door een aanrijding ging ik op zoek naar iets nieuws. Het werd commerciële economie. Ik wilde leren waarom mensen voor een bepaald bedrijf of merk te kiezen. Na wat horeca-baantjes heb ik voldoende lef om in het diepe te springen en begin met mijn eerste ‘echte’ baan in de marketing. Door gebrek aan praktijkervaring moest ik flink mijn best doen, maar ik had plezier en heb een boel geleerd. Maar het werk veranderde en verloor ik de belangstelling. Ik kreeg het gevoel een nieuwe weg in te moeten slaan.

Fotografie

Ik ontdekte dat ik vooral creatief en met mensen bezig zijn erg belangrijk vind. Zo vond ik fotografie. De camera helpt mij met het ontmoeten van verschillende mensen en ik kan mijn creativiteit er in kwijt. Op zoek naar inspiratie kwam ik Peter Hurley’s werk tegen. Nadat ik mijn stoute schoenen had aangetrokken, stuurde ik hem een email. Peter besloot mij te coachen en sinds september 2014 ben ik een Associate fotograaf van Peter Hurley. Dit betekent dat de beste headshot fotograaf van de wereld vindt dat mijn portfolio voldoet aan zijn ‘Standard of Excellence”. Een mooi compliment en teken dat ik echt weet wat ik doe! Sinds begin 2015 mentor ik andere fotografen binnen de HeadshotCrew en tijdens de eerste HeadshotCrewz was ik een van de instructeurs en gaf ik workshops op het grootste headshot fotografie evenement ter wereld. Inmiddels werk ik, naast mijn fotografie, als Chief Marketing Officer mee aan het uitbouwen van de HeadshotCrew.

De toekomst

Het is mijn droom om mensen te blijven helpen met mijn fotografie. Professionals die zich goed willen presenteren weten mij te vinden en ik krijg veel energie van hun positieve reacties. Samen halen we het beste uit jezelf en leggen dat vast op de foto, dat is toch het mooiste werk wat er is!

Mijn droom komt steeds meer uit en ik kan alleen maar hopen dat jij mij helpt om te blijven dromen!

In den Reinbeckhallen, auf dem Gelände des ehemaligen AEG-Transformatorenwerks, ist in den letzten Jahren ein einzigartiger Raum für Freigeister entstanden. Und da Kunst und Kultur in Berlin oft wichtige Impulsgeber sind, entstand hier schnell eine Art Zentrum für zeitgenössische Kunst mit Ausstellungshallen, Ateliers, Werkstätten, Cafés und freiem Blick auf die Spree. Name: H&Y Filter
Description:
Based in Hong Kong since its inception in 2011, H&Y leads the way in photographic accessories, pioneering innovative products that redefine photography.

In 2013, a pivotal moment occurred with the introduction of our proprietary brand, featuring the groundbreaking variable ND filter. This marked our transition to an esteemed OEM supplier for leading industry brands.

2016 witnessed another breakthrough as H&Y introduced the K-Series – a revolutionary drop-in square filter system. This innovation streamlined composition adjustments, enhancing the use of high-grade ND filters with instant filter changes.

In 2017, H&Y unveiled the world's first square magnetic filter frame, revolutionizing filter attachment with secure magnetization in seconds. With compatibility across various sizes, including 100x150 mm, 100x100mm, 150x150mm, and 150x170 mm, this innovation received widespread acclaim.

In 2020, the introduction of the REVO RING marked a turning point – an adjustable adapter ring featuring one-second installation, automated locking, and seamless integration across diverse lenses. The REVO RING exemplifies our unwavering commitment to innovation.

Continuing our legacy of innovation, in 2022, H&Y launched the REVORING Swift system, featuring a modular magnetic design offering unmatched versatility. With over 50 combinations across three systems, photographers and videographers can effortlessly customize their setups for stunning visuals in any scenario.

In 2023, H&Y expanded its product lineup with the EVO-series, epitomizing filter technology by combining threads and magnets in one circular filter. This series provides photographers with unparalleled convenience and efficiency.

At our core, we are dedicated to exceeding photographers' expectations with products that embody quality and innovation. H&Y's commitment to excellence has positioned us as a beacon in the industry, empowering photographers to capture moments with unparalleled precision and creativity.

Billed as a unique lifestyle destination, the gallery invites customers into a tranquil environment of artwork and books, and even has an outdoor lounge where people can relax and enjoy a conversation or photo book.

“Our goal was to create a space that inspires our customers” says Roland Wolff, Vice President of Marketing and Corporate Retail. “Between events, gallery openings, and Leica product launches, the Leica Store and Gallery LA will become a major hub in the world of Leica and photography.”

Name: Ellsworth / Lim
Description: Ellsworth / Lim specializes in commercial photography including architecture, hotel & resorts, advertising, food, portraits and corporate photography. Working with discerning brands in developing photography with lasting impressions that read beyond just an image.

Name: Think utopia
Description:
Think utopia is an architectural photography atelier nestled away among the snowy peaks of the Alps and the mists of Lake Geneva. Fruit of the union between an interior designer Manon Duparc and architect François Pain, who both conceive the image as a dream factory. 

In contrast with the standardization that seems to define our time, Think Utopia claims a world of singularity where nothing is granted, but rather everything is suggested. Their philosophy stems from a sheer desire to capture the fleeting moment where evocative details insinuate a sensible whole, thus harnessing the essence of a place into an image.

Based in Geneva & Paris, the atelier captures and immortalizes architecture, design and art throughout the world.

Name: Snoot Photo - Photographe d'entreprise
Description:
Je suis convaincu que la photographie est un outil puissant pour vous aider à vous démarquer et à communiquer efficacement avec votre public.

En tant que photographe spécialisé dans la mise en valeur d'activités professionnelles, je vous propose :

- Une approche personnalisée : je suis passionné par la mise en valeur des collaborateurs, des locaux, des biens, des produits, des services et des gestes métier de mes clients. Chaque entreprise est unique et mérite une approche personnalisée. C'est pourquoi je mets tout en œuvre pour comprendre les valeurs de mes clients et leur univers afin de créer des images qui reflètent leur identité.

- Des conseils stratégiques : ma plus grande force réside dans ma capacité à conseiller mes clients sur les choix de prises de vue, les gestes à valoriser, les angles de vue et la lumière. Je ne me contente pas simplement de prendre des photos ; je pense comme un conseiller en communication visuelle qui travaille à l'amélioration de l'image globale d'une entreprise.

- Une expertise technique : je ne suis pas seulement un photographe technique qui sait prendre des photos, mais plutôt un partenaire créatif qui travaille en étroite collaboration avec ses clients pour comprendre leurs besoins et leurs objectifs. Je suis convaincu que la photographie n'est qu'un outil pour atteindre cet objectif, et que ma véritable valeur ajoutée réside dans mon expertise et mon œil averti.

- Une expérience complète et valorisante : je suis fier de pouvoir offrir à mes clients une expérience complète et valorisante. Je travaille avec eux pour comprendre leurs besoins, leur budget et leur planning afin de livrer des images de qualité qui répondent à leurs attentes. Mon objectif est de créer une relation de confiance avec mes clients en leur offrant un service personnalisé et en les accompagnant tout au long du processus créatif.

Name: SARA BUBNA photography
Description:
Professional and award-winning photographer Sara Bubna was born in Salzburg, raised in Austria and in the UK. 

After studies in Textile & Design in Salzburg and Vienna she decided to move back to England, where she worked in Marketing, PR and Media including The Economist in London.
At the same time, she has been working as a freelance photographer and continued developing her photographic skills. 
In the years since, her work has been displayed in gallery-exhibitions across Europe.

She made the switch to a full time qualified photographer in 2015 in 2016 she was awarded the internationally recognized EP (European Photographer) by the Federation of European Photographers (FEP)

In March 2021 Sara won the national award for professional photographers with the best wedding photo and the second prize for the best food photography.

She is known for her ability to specialize in commercial photography like architectural-, product- and food photography for business clients as well as exclusive wedding photography, exclusive portraits, and still life / fine art photography as can be seen in her portfolio: sarabubna.com/portfolio 
 
Sara is frequently in demand for her creativity, her close attention to detail and her understanding of her client's PR and marketing needs. 

Whilst based in Salzburg, Austria, work takes her across Europe and further.

Name: PHILIP J.A BENTON
Description:
TL;DR:

↳ With over a decade of experience, I specialise in corporate event photography. 

↳ Renowned for my discerning eye and ability to craft authentic and emotional visual narratives, I thrive on capturing the essence and excitement of corporate gatherings. 

↳ My commitment is to deliver a portfolio that celebrates the success and energy of each event, ensuring no moment goes unnoticed.

---

For those who fancy a longer read:

Located on the outskirts of London, I bring over a decade of experience and passion to event photography, specialising in capturing the essence of corporate gatherings.

With a discerning eye for detail and a natural talent for weaving captivating narratives through imagery, I've earned a reputation for my ability to document events with precision and artistry.

In the dynamic world of corporate events, I thrive on the adrenaline and excitement that fills each occasion. Whether it's the buzz of a high-profile conference, the elegance of a gala dinner, or the intimacy of a company retreat, I am committed to immersing myself fully in the atmosphere, ensuring no moment goes unnoticed.

My approach is not just about capturing photographs but crafting visual narratives that echo with authenticity and emotion. Through a blend of candid shots and carefully composed images, I strive to encapsulate the energy, professionalism, and camaraderie that define each event.

From the brilliance of large-scale conferences to the intimacy of executive board meetings, I pride myself on delivering a portfolio of images that document and celebrate the success and energy of every corporate gathering.

Name: Dunder.Studios

Name: Kaletsch Medien GmbH
Description:
Werbung online oder als Print, von der Idee zum Webauftritt, als Katalog oder Imagefilm.
 
Die unter einem Dach gebündelten Energien von Werbeagentur, Fotostudio, Film und Programmierung entwickeln für Sie individuelle und bereichsübergreifende Lösungen für wirksame Kommunikation – perfekt auf Ihre Zielgruppe zugeschnitten. 
Was vor über 70 Jahren noch als fotografische Werkstätte begann, hat sich sich mittlerweile zu einem der größten Medienhäuser in der Region entwickelt, stets auf der Suche nach neuen Ideen und Herausforderungen. Wir denken nach bevor wir starten, achten auf die richtige Frequenz und wichtige Aspekte der Nachhaltigkeit. Ob Fotografin, Kameramann, Bildbearbeiterin, Art Director, Web Designerin oder Künstler – ein Konvolut von Spezialisten geht leidenschaftlich für Ihr Projekt auf die Strecke. Mit unserer Erfahrung und unserem Ehrgeiz lassen wir Sie Erfolge feiern.

Description:

characteristic input in her works. By means of digital image retouching, she appeals to a delicate

Name: Akademia Nikona - Nikon School
Description:
Fotografowanie może stać się początkiem nowej drogi – nowym hobby, nową pracą, nowym doświadczeniem. Kiedy sięgasz po aparat i patrzysz przez obiektyw, uczysz się świata od początku. To zupełnie nowa perspektywa. Podpowiadamy, jak dostrzegać szczegóły, ale i doceniać ogół, pokazujemy, jak komponować fotografię, oraz kogo lub co wybrać na jej bohatera. Uczymy, jak w pełni wykorzystać możliwości aparatu i jednocześnie, jak wydobyć potencjał, zdolności i wrażliwość osoby, która trzyma go w dłoni.

Nikon School to globalny projekt edukacyjny, którego mecenasem jest Nikon. W Polsce, jako Akademia Nikona, działamy od 2009 roku. Motywujemy do tego, aby skupić się na danej chwili, zatrzymać w czasie wspólne momenty, dokumentować przygody, utrwalać ulotne piękno przyrody. Inspirujemy do robienia jak najlepszych zdjęć.

W naszych szkoleniach biorą udział zarówno osoby będące na samym początku drogi, jak i profesjonaliści chcący przetestować zaawansowany sprzęt i podpatrzeć innych twórców przy pracy. Jednak to, co przekazujemy, wykracza znacznie poza umiejętności techniczne. To uważność, dostrzeganie i otwartość na otaczający nas świat.

Przeprowadziliśmy ponad 2000 szkoleń w 258 lokalizacjach. Na naszych szkoleniach aparat wyciągnęło przeszło 20 000 osób. Ponad 20 000 osób stwierdziło, że chce, aby ich fotografie były czymś więcej – aby opowiadały swoje historie.

Name: Zen9a
Description:
" street photography is like a box of chocolates, YOU never know what YOU are gonna get. " 
— THOMAS LEUTHARD

- - - 

1 about ME : My name is Hamza EL YOUSFI and i am a street photographer from Morocco. i started to focus on street photography in 2017 when i decided to take all my photos with an 18-135 mm lens in the streets. After some time, i realized that this lens was too long for this purpose. The focal length changed, today i take some of my street photos with a 50 mm from a very short distance.

 My content is just a collection of my thoughts about street photography and some tips on how YOU should work as a street photographer.

2 what is street photography to ME ? street photography has changed my life in a way that i didn't expect it would. it’s an activity where i can use my creativity, i get challenged every day and i don't get bored because it's always different.

- - - 

 our mission ? documenting the Moroccan street life for future generations.

 our vision ? we just want people to change the negative idea they have about the Moroccan street.

Name: Midas Retouching & CGI
Description:
Midas Retouching is a global, high-end retouching and CGI production studio that has successfully partnered with the world's leading photographers, agencies and consumer brands since its launch in 2007.

Its founder, Mark Francis, chose the name 'Midas' to underpin the mission of the business – to turn everything they touch into gold. He and his team are image makers, obsessed by their craft, and committed to providing a world-leading, personalised service.

Mark's passion for art has been the driving force behind his >20-year career, which commenced as an agent for top photographers, before he trained as a retoucher under the renowned Dan Tierney at the Dairy Studio and at Saddington Baynes, leading some of the earliest CGI projects for the global automotive industry.

He launched Midas Retouching and has spent the last 15 years directing global, multi-award-winning collaborations with a who's who list of photographers, advertising agencies and consumer brands.

Iconic campaigns include the global launches of Tesla X and Tesla S, with images remaining across Tesla showrooms to this day, as well as the Rolls-Royce Boat Tail and Lexus LF-Z, and the global rebrand of Nissan's Infiniti range. In addition, Midas Retouching has led a multitude of projects for Adidas, Land Rover, Hyundai, Honda, Mercedes, BMW, Toyota, Maclaren, Porsche, Bugatti and Genesis, as well as Heineken, Vodafone and Top Gear.

Midas Retouching’s Founder and Creative Director, Mark Francis has recently received the Martin Evening Excellence in Digital Retouching 2023 Award. Also, Midas has been Shortlisted for the D&AD 2023 Awards, Lurzers 200 Best Digital Artist 2023 one of the foremost advertising magazines in the world and shortlisted for the Production Paradise, Spotlight 2023 Award.

Contact Midas Retouching on: 

+44(0)20 7099 5895 / themidastouch@midasretouching.com / www.midasretouching.com

The perfect headshot is a collaboration between art and science. Technical considerations like lighting and focus are fundamental, but all the technical expertise in the world still needs a genuine human connection to produce a headshot that stands out for the right reasons.

Over the years we have been producing stunning headshots for people in business, entertainment, sports, medicine, and the list goes on and on.

Studies have shown that a professional headshot will significantly outperform a homemade photo and lead to positive outcomes. Our passion is to help you achieve your goals by creating a headshot that captures you in your best light.

We believe that:
* The experience is as important as the product – We want you to have a comfortable and relaxed time and our team are experts at helping even the most nervous clients feel at ease.
* Every client is unique – One size does not fit all when it comes to headshot photography. We adapt to the personality and specific needs of each and every client.
* Time is money – We are efficient but you will never feel rushed. Your photographs will be ready within 24-48 hours of your studio visit.
* Work should be fun – Our photographer, Etti, exudes positivity and humor. We want you to rave about the shoot as much as the photograph.
* Collaboration is key – Your satisfaction is our greatest concern. We communicate openly so that we find the right pose and you are happy with every step of the process.
* Failure is not an option – If for whatever reason you are not happy with your experience; we will refund 100% of what you paid.
