Name: African Artists' Foundation/Lagos Photo
Description:
African Artists’ Foundation (AAF) is a non-profit organization dedicated to the promotion and development of contemporary African art. At AAF we believe in the transformational power of art and its ability to make a lasting impact on society. 

We want to be a catalyst of change, empowering the art scene in West Africa. Opening the minds of many above and beyond the privileged few. Increasing the pulling power of artist and photographers from within West Africa and the diaspora. Be a positive voice, fighting stereotypes, tell the African narrative from the inside out. 

We are always open for a request to work together as long as we can empower the artists and photographers in Nigeria and West Africa, strengthen the narrative and tell stories from the continent from the inside out. If we can find a shared purpose we can work together. 

AAF started the following projects:
Lagos Photo Festival – began in 2010 as the first and only international arts festival of photography in Nigeria.
National Art Competition – began in 2008, helped artist to expose their work to the target audience.
Female Artist's Platform
CDI – Capacity Development Integration
YECA – Youth Empowerment through Contemporary Art
ABA – Art Base Africa, it is an online platform for debating about African contemporary art
NAC – National Art Competition, an annual art competition organized by AAF

Name: KGB - Photo
Description: La fotografía de alta calidad es una carta de presentación que reforzará la identidad de tu marca, producto o imagen personal. Es por eso que quiero destacar las ventajas competitivas de tu empresa, servicio o producto de tal manera que se vuelva atractivo para los consumidores.

Name: Bex Wood Luxe Portraits
Description: Bex Wood runs a photography studio based in The Woodlands, Texas, serving all of Greater-Houston and offers editorial-style photography, headshots & personal branding for entrepreneurs and companies looking to modernize their brand.

Name: Top Estates Media
Description: TOP ESTATES MEDIA is based in Schaumburg, IL, catering to the entire ChicagoLand Metropolitan Area. Our specialties encompass a wide range of services such as real estate photography, video production, aerial services, and a variety of other services. We strive to simplify the lives of our clients. Our streamlined processes ensure consistent quality and lightning-fast 24-hour delivery times, making it effortless for professionals like you to achieve superior results.

Name: Visual 1st
Description: The annual Visual 1st conference hosts executives and entrepreneurs at photo and video software/app companies, photo print product providers, camera manufacturers, photo/video-focused social media companies, stock media companies, and many others. Recap 2025 edition: https://www.visual1st.biz/awards2025 – for updates and to connect with Hans Hartman at https://www.linkedin.com/pub/hans-hartman/6/211/205

Name: Pexels360
Description: At Pexels 360 our aim is to solve a simple yet impactful problem that is of showcasing a particular real estate piece virtually. Whether the property is ready or not ready. For upcoming properties we offer 3D Visualization services and for Live properties we offer Matterport Immersive Virtual Tour services. Our work helps clients in Showcasing their properties virtually and they get global exposure because our virtual work can be seen from anywhere anytime in one click. This reduces physical site visits, enables virtual site visits and empowers sales and marketing teams to tap the online potential buyer's market.

Name: Agence Tristan Godefroy
Description:
We are representing talents since 2008
We offer full production services for our clients, on both still and motion.
In 2017, we created Tristan Godefroy digital.
We can now provide you with talented ressources to make your digital project happen
We can even support your digital project during the whole content making process, from creative concept proposition to postproduction.

Name: Andrew Wood Photography
Description:
We Are Andrew Wood Photography

Andrew Wood Photography is UK’s leading and award-winning boudoir photography studio in Manchester that’s been transforming and uplifting women’s spirits since 2011.


With a legacy of over a decade, we’ve had the honour of empowering more than 22,000 incredible women, helping them recognize their innate beauty and strength.

Our all-female team of top-tier makeup artists and photographers have one core mission that resonates with every click of our camera: to instil confidence and remind every woman of her boundless worth.

Join us, and let’s celebrate the incredible story that is uniquely yours.

Name: əlēl
Description:
əlēl is human.
əlēl is diversity.

əlēl is made by humans.

Name: MatterStudio.ai
Description:
Matter is a groundbreaking creative content studio that expertly combines product photography with AI-generated backgrounds. 

We leverage emerging AI technology alongside decades of experience in production, photography, and post-production to provide clients with unprecedented access to diverse, world class imagery.

We recognise the need for businesses to elevate their imagery without wasting the time, money and labour traditionally associated with highly stylised product photography.  

Matter Workflow
Client brief > AI background conception stage > Shoot product cohesively with approved backgrounds > Composite retouching - Dispatch.

Name: Body & Soul Studios
Description:
Our mission: Help women live lives of fearless authenticity.

Body and Soul is a luxury, all‑female intimate portrait studio in London. We create fully guided portrait experiences, empowerment group shoots, and in‑person events that help women see themselves clearly, own who they are, and carry that confidence into the rest of their lives.

What we do:

• Signature Sessions – high‑touch, intimate portrait experiences from consult and styling through shoot, reveal, and artwork.
• Empowerment Group Shoots – iconic locations where women step into their power alongside others on the same journey.
• Community & Events – in‑person spaces for real stories, connection, and fearless self‑expression.

How we work:

• Sincere Candour – honest, kind feedback so real transformation can happen.
• Radical Accountability – no victims, no passengers; we own our impact.
• Uncompromising Excellence – every woman deserves an extraordinary experience and result.

We’re a team of high‑performing women who care as much about emotional safety as we do about world‑class art.

If you’re a woman who wants to experience this work or a high‑performing creative, operator, or sales professional who wants to do this work for a living, you’ll fit right in.

Name: Eagle Eye Imagery - Peabody MA
Description:
Welcome to Eagle Eye Imagery; where it’s our job to show you the bigger picture. We combine the latest advancements in drone and 3D technology with the most trusted techniques in the industry to secure the high-quality aerial photographs, videos and 3D virtual reality tours you seek. 

From homes to power lines, cell towers, pipelines and beyond, our team of qualified drone operators are here to prove that the sky’s the limit when it comes to achieving your goals.

Whether you’re a real estate, commercial, or industrial business let our team of 3D virtual reality specialists show you and your customers not only the bigger picture, but the whole picture.

To find out more, please get in touch with our friendly team by telephone, via email or by filling out the contact form here on our site. We look forward to soaring you or your business to new heights.

Name: Haut Touch Retouching Studio
Description:
Haut Touch es un estudio de retoque digital fundado en 2005 por Xavi Carreras y Dani Caño, fotógrafos en su origen y ambos con amplia experiencia anterior en retoque como retocadores freelance en diferentes estudios.

En nuestro estudio, el objetivo principal es ofrecer una solución personalizada para la manipulación de sus imágenes que garantice calidad y fiabilidad en cada una de las fases del tratamiento fotográfico.

Name: ESNTL Headshots
Description:
At ESNTL Headshots, we craft headshots that ensure your first impression is unforgettable. We recognize that stepping in front of a camera might feel daunting, which is why we are dedicated to creating a comfortable and enjoyable photography experience. Our professional team guides you through the process, ensuring we capture the best headshot you've ever taken.

We specialize in delivering expert headshot photography services for individuals and groups, both in our state-of-the-art studio and on location. Discover why our mantra, "It’s ESSENTIAL to look your BEST," is the cornerstone of our commitment to excellence in professional imagery.

Explore the difference with ESNTL Headshots—where making you look your best isn’t just our business; it’s ESSENTIAL.

Name: Kalory | Photo & Video |
Description:
We are a London based Photography & Video Studio.  We create Visual Content Marketing in line with a brief and a budget. We have the trust of small businesses,  as well as established brands. 

The studio was started by bringing together the experience and skills of its 2 founders. Brijesh’s acute sense of aesthetics and awareness of the visual language of photography, combined with Franck’s extensive brand management experience in the very detail oriented  Luxury  industry, enable us to create the right images with a focused edit.

Our team will work hard to provide the best visual result in line with your target audience, and your business requirements.

In July 2012, Kalory was selected  for the “Innovating for growth” programme of the British Library Business & IP Centre and the European Union.

In June 2013, Kalory was chosen as a Finalist in the FSB London Business Awards 2013 in the “Best New Business” category.

Name: Phil Benton Photography
Description:
A North East Photographer who creates very different and beautiful photographic images. 

Landscape Photography, Nature Photography, Wildlife Photography and more! I have a great love of the outdoors and I am intrigued at how light changes and embodies a picture.

I have a keen eye for the unusual, picking out the best a scene or visual has to offer. I thrive on the challenge of creating different types of work from Landscapes to Still Life, creating visual images that are outside convention.

I offer a variety of products which include mounted prints, A4 prints, MDF boards, Greetings Cards and Coasters too. All to a high standard of print quality. 

I also take on personal commissions, anything from product and corporate photography for websites to pet and family shots.

Name: Translucent Photography
Description:
Australian Wedding, Elopement, Family & Commercial/Branding Photographer, and call Wollongong, NSW Australia home. Capturing the big and seemingly little events of your most precious and intimate moments, across the entirety of Australia, New Zealand, and beyond.

Family, Maternity, In-Home Newborn Lifestyle Photography, Commercial & Branding Photography - all part of the services that we offer! Though we are most known for our wedding & elopement photography across Australia & New Zealand, this is not all we photograph! We usually spend our weekends capturing weddings & elopements, and during the week we photograph elopements, family & commercial/branding sessions for local businesses & entrepreneurs. These sessions are mainly held in Wollongong, Sydney, South Coast, Southern Highlands & Canberra, though, alike our weddings & elopements, we do travel outside of these regions too!

For all enquiries: hello@translucentphotography.com

Name: Roma Dominguez Photography - Qatar
Description:
The extreme interest in photography made the founder to start his own photography firm which operates in Sri Lanka & Qatar to provide all kind of photography service to individual customers and corporate clients.

Roma Dominguez Photography can offer families beautiful photo services such as pregnancy photography, newborn photography, children photography and family photography, plus glamour photography sessions. 

Special events are also covered for your birthdays, parties, anniversaries, and of course wedding photography. 

For businesses, Roma Dominguez Photography can offer staff photography, product photography, commercial photography, conference photography and corporate events. 

All digital photo negatives are given to wedding photography and photography session clients on a high resolution CD plus you have the option to create beautiful wedding albums and family photo albums using your favorite images.

Specialties that we have excelled are : Event Photography / Sport / Fashion / Life Style / Architecture / Food / Product / Landscapes

Follow Us: https://www.facebook.com/RomaDominguezPhotography

Contact us on 77115606 QATAR

Name: Kola Productions
Description:
Kola Productions is a dynamic production company specializing in photography, film, and VR/XR productions. We love what we do and are strongly involved in our projects and with our clients. As storytellers, we're passionate about concept thinking and creative ideas. We work closely with our customers, making sure to bring creativity and quality to every project.

We're located in Dalarna, Sweden, but with that said – we offer our services throughout Europe. 

Our focus within photography spans three areas: Editorial, Portrait, and Corporate/Industry. Why these three? Because we're super curious, love meeting people, and have a rich history in the corporate and industrial sectors, providing us with valuable insights into working within diverse environments.

Our expertise lies in working with light, transforming ordinary scenes into something extraordinary. We're not just snapping pictures; we're telling a story and showing a vision in both portrait and corporate/industrial photography.

In filmmaking, we focus on:

Storytelling: We're good at telling stories that grab people's attention and make a real connection with your audience. Whether it's sharing your story, expressing your ideas, or even teaching something, we've got it covered. Whether you need a quick 1-minute social media video or a deep 5-minute mini documentary, we're here to bring your ideas to life.

Corporate/Industry: We’re making films that showcase what your company or industry do. Whether it's highlighting your achievements or digging into the nitty-gritty of what you do, our films are made to connect with your audience.

Nonprofit Organizations: We're passionate about working for nonprofit organizations. Our films are crafted to amplify the voices of nonprofit organizations, shedding light on their missions and driving awareness for the positive change they bring to the world.

Name: ZIE Fotografie & Video
Description:
Z!E Fotografie & Video is een bedrijf dat staat voor kwaliteit, creativiteit en service. Naast fotografie met mijn camera gebruik ik mijn drone en zijn er mogelijkheden voor video. De combinatie van de camera en drone voegt voor bepaalde opdrachten veel toe en voor video zet ik graag beide in. 
Met mijn creativiteit probeer ik gewone dingen bijzonder vast te leggen. Beelden met Beleving! 

Ik fotografeer voor bedrijven. Professionele foto's voegen veel toe voor websites, sociale media en drukwerk. Op mijn website kan je een duidelijk beeld krijgen van mijn werk (https://www.ziefotografie.nl/portfolio/beeldend-bedrijf/). Het liefst leg ik de gehele sfeer vast, het pand, interieur, product en de mensen. Het liefst gewoon als mensen aan het werk zijn zodat het natuurlijk is. Zo laat je de echte sfeer zien en dat spreekt, in mijn ogen, het meest aan.

Naast de bedrijfsfotografie voor websites, brochures, social media of drukwerk richt ik me ook op beelden voor aan de wand (https://www.ziefotografie.nl/portfolio/beeldend-bedrijf/wisselende-wand/). Wil je een interieur een geheel andere uitstraling geven dan is een wand, volledig voorzien van een foto naar wens, aan te raden. Kleuren doen veel met mensen dus het is interessant om dit mee te nemen in de keuze. Ik werk samen met een bedrijf die vele jaren ervaring heeft met wanden en waar vele mogelijkheden zijn. Daarnaast nemen ze al het werk uit handen en is het kiezen van de afbeelding het enige wat je hoeft te doen. Nu is dit laatste moeilijk genoeg, indien gewenst kan ik de afbeelding eerst via Photoshop op je wand laten zien en zo kan je meerdere opties vergelijken. 

Er is veel mogelijk, ik denk graag mee en ben flexibel, dus neem gerust contact op voor een vrijblijvend gesprek.

Name: D'Appollonio Photography
Description:
Based in Central Rome, D’Appollonio Photography is an established photography agency that provides different kind of photographic services: product, art, portraits, interior and architecture, landscape and nature. 
The agency is getting always more and more established thank to the quality, the professionalism, the competitive prices and the positive reviews of its costumers and the spread of mouth. The regular customers are the best feedback. Every photo session is different and requires originality, creativity and understanding of the costumers needs and targets.

Name: Shadows Photography
Description:
Shadows is among the very few elite photography studios in India in the arena of wedding photography. We capture the special moments of love, trust and faith in style and spread happiness for years, decades and generations to come. Our work stirs the emotions in you and let you feel special anytime you look at them.

Capturing the special moments is not a single act. It is the outcome of setting it all right to let it look perfect as we are your agents of happiness for a lifetime. Our services begin from the time you see your love and till the time you tie knots to stay together forever.

Name: Froyang Photography by Renato Torres-Andrade
Description:
Hola, somos FROYANG GROUP S.A.C., empresa compuesta por profesionales especializados en fotografía y video digital.

Desde el 2004 brindamos los siguientes servicios:

* Fotografía Publicitaria, 
* Fotografía Comercial, 
* Fotografía Institucional, 
* Retratos Corporativos, 
* Fotografía Industrial,

* Cobertura fotográfica y audiovisual de eventos nacionales e internacionales.

Nuestro principal objetivo es lograr las fotos que necesiten para el desarrollo de su producto, campaña o evento, cubriendo cualquier necesidad que tengan en el área fotográfica.

Name: Camila Ruiz - Studio Fotográfico em Ribeirão Preto/SP
Description:
Apaixonada pela fotografia, Camila Ruiz fez dela sua profissão.
Ainda adolescente, registrava os encontros de família e amigos.

Em 2000, iniciou sua atividade no mercado profissional da fotografia e em 2008 realizou seu sonho de abrir o próprio negócio. Buscando uma melhor estrutura para eternizar os momentos únicos e importantes na vida de seus clientes.

Hoje a empresa cresceu, Camila Ruiz virou uma marca e possui uma equipe especializada em fotografia de Gestantes, Newborn, Infantil, Família e Eventos.

Name: Woukami Agence
Description: « WOUKAMI » signifie en baoulé, langue locale du centre de la Côte d’Ivoire : « AIDE-MOI ». Cette expression traduit la solidarité, la proximité, le partage... Ces valeurs ont nourri notre inspiration pour donner naissance à une agence de communication purement Sociale. Une agence bien outillée qui se veut très proche de vous et de vos bourses.

Name: Mark Lillis Portrait, LLC
Description: From Corporate, to Commercial, to Personal, Mark Lillis Portrait LLC has the talent to make your vision a reality. At MLP, we focus on capturing the person, the look, the image that you need.  If you require modeling talent, our network of models and makeup artists can deliver.

Name: Wild Photography by Alvis Lazarus
Description:
We contribute to Wildlife Conservation through Wildlife Photography

Wild Photography intends to spread the love for Wildlife and Nature. See and download amazing wildlife pictures, learn wildlife photography and tons of tips to enjoy your wildlife vacation at right cost.

Please visit www.wild.photography

Sorry! We are not Tour Operators!

Name: Lauren Renee Photography
Description:
Lauren Renee Photography is an international, full-service photography studio based between Stockholm, Sweden, and Pittsburgh, PA, and available worldwide. With a signature style rooted in her background in Architecture and Design, Lauren brings a fine art approach to her work, creating refined, timeless imagery.

Lauren’s work has been widely featured in prestigious publications, including The New York Times, Style Me Pretty, Martha Stewart Weddings, The Knot, Grey Likes Weddings, Glamour, Little Bellows, How He Asked, Burgh Brides, Whirl Magazine, and more.

To inquire about services, please visit our website.

Name: MaxwellArt Photography
Description: Making people feel empowered and themselves. Your People, Wedding & Lifestyle Photographer from Zurich, available for travel worldwide.

Name: Schnepp Renou
Description:
Schnepp Renou are Simon and Morgane. The duo portraits space—and everything in between. With studios in Berlin, Paris and Marseille and projects around the world, they have created their very own visual language by approaching architecture as something defined by more than four walls and a roof.
Their distinctive aesthetic and perspective are what makes them so unique: Handling architecture with sensitivity and intellect, taking photography outside of its box. In their composition, they take a step back, so that only the true essence remains. Transforming overlooked elements into protagonists and the most inconspicuous surroundings into stages:
A cloudy sky, a dodgy neighbourhood, a woman passing by in a striking red coat, a swimsuit left to dry in a wardrobe: With their ever-changing and ever-challenging point of view, Schnepp Renou reveal that what is picture-worthy can be more than just a house.

Name: rgwords
Description: RGWords is a travel blogger and landscape photographer who aspires through cinematic visuals, storytelling and inspirational pictures.

Name: Seemotion Studio
Description:
Seemotion was founded in 2022, and it specializes in providing all kinds of photography services (video – photograph, etc.).

We adopt a new vision in the visual field that relies on integrating the situation and feelings with the visual material that we create to suit the taste of our customers, as we allow them to “retell their story” again.

Name: Upstate Images
Description:
At Upstate Images our mission is to be the best school photography company, period. We do this by providing schools, parents, teachers, coaches, and students with an amazing photography and yearbook experience.  

If you share our appreciation for world-class photography, please get in touch with us.  We are willing to invest in the right people who want to join our work family and expand our geographic reach.

Name: Shutteris Photography Studio
Description:
Shutteris is a Photography and Multimedia Company that provides professional photography and digital imaging services to corporate clients and individuals.

We are driven by the desire to deliver great value to our clients.

Name: Everyday photos by Renske
Description: Everyday photos by Renske zorgt voor het vol passie en enthousiasme in beeld brengen van kinderen, families, evenementen, bruiloften, zwangerschap en Newborn.

Name: ooak.photography
Description: We, One Of A Kind Photography, are a bunch of enthusiastic and creative Candid Wedding Photographers present PAN INDIA. We’re a team of Best Candid Wedding Photographers, always looking forward to capturing your real moments and emotions into everlasting frames of memories. When it comes to Wedding Photography, we make sure to bring out the best in every moment, as our skilled team of wedding photographers gives their all to make your day special.

Name: Visual Hub Balcells
Description:
En Visual Hub Balcells, nos enorgullece ser un auténtico "hub" de creación audiovisual. Dirigido por Jordi Balcells, nuestro equipo está compuesto por profesionales de diversas disciplinas, unidos por un objetivo común: Conectar personas y proyectos. 

 ¿Qué hacemos? 

Desde Visual Hub Balcells nos dedicamos a la creación de fotografía, vídeo y CGI, abarcando una amplia gama de posibilidades para satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes. 

Nuestro enfoque es simple pero poderoso: Nos adaptamos a la metodología del cliente y la mejoramos, trabajando de manera rápida y eficaz para superar cualquier obstáculo que se presente en el camino. 

A lo largo de los años, hemos tenido el honor de colaborar con prestigiosas marcas, ayudándolas a destacar en un mundo digital donde una imagen vale más que mil palabras. Nuestro compromiso es ofrecer un estándar de calidad visual excepcional en cada proyecto que emprendemos.

 El Concepto de 'Hub'

Lo que nos hace únicos y especiales es nuestro enfoque de "Hub", que nos permite ofrecer múltiples propuestas y soluciones a nuestros clientes. Nos enorgullece ser un centro de creatividad que ayuda a las empresas a comunicar y generar una amplia variedad de contenidos visuales. Entendemos que cada cliente es único, y trabajamos estrechamente con ellos para crear experiencias visuales impactantes que resuenen con su audiencia.

En un mundo en el que la imagen es esencial, nos enorgullece ser socios confiables para todos aquellos que buscan sobresalir en el mercado.

¿Y tú, estás listo para llevar tus proyectos y productos al siguiente nivel visual? Contáctanos y descubre cómo podemos ayudarte a dar vida a tu visión! 

#Fotografía #Video #CGI #CreaciónVisual #ContenidoVisual #VisualHubBalcells

Name: VANLEY IMAGES
Description:
Vanley Images Ltd is an eminent fine art and photography venture, specialising in capturing powerful moments and preserving captivating stories through the lens of acclaimed photographer Vanley Burke.

With a deep appreciation for culture and heritage, Vanley Images brings forth visually stunning and emotionally resonant artworks that leave a lasting impact.

From exquisite fine art prints to thought-provoking exhibitions and talks, we strive to showcase the beauty and diversity of the human experience. Join us on a remarkable visual journey and explore the extraordinary world of Vanley’s images.

Name: Studio Photo Gallery - Photography Studio
Description:
Professional Photo Studio for Hire in London

"Studio Photo Gallery" is a professional photographic and film hire studio located in central London on Drummond Road, within 5 minutes walk of Bermondsey Tube Station. The studio is available to rent by the day or half day. 

Working at "Studio Photo Gallery" is like working in you own studio. Our aim is to provide affordable yet totally professional photographic studio hire solutions to working professionals and students. Whether you are the photographer that knows it all or just would like to try it for the first time, we are always there for you.

Name: Kim Fetrow Photography
Description: Kim Fetrow is an award-winning, internationally-published professional photographer with over 25 years of experience.

Name: CA1 CA2
Description:
CA1 CA2 is a creative talent agency and production company representing photographers, stylists, directors and post production specialists. 
We are a minority certified, woman owned business committed to supporting human welfare, diversity, and environmental sustainability.

Name: Studio Ninja
Description:
Studio Ninja is the world’s highest-rated photography business app, developed by Melbournians Chris Garbacz and Yuan Wang to help photographers eliminate paperwork and save time.

Used by thousands of photographers in 72 countries, Studio Ninja comprehensively handles the different elements required to organise and execute a job, is data-secure, and user-friendly.

Name: Fotografia Empresarial Brasil
Description:
Desde 2009 somos referência em fotos e vídeos para industrias em Minas Gerais .
Atuamos em em todo território nacional produzindo fotos e de altíssima qualidade e fotografia 360º para tour virtual Google Street View.
Somos paraceiros d confiança do Google Street View DESDE 2015

Name: Colectivo Nómada
Description:
Nómada es un colectivo integrado por Fotógrafos, se origina de la necesidad de crear historias que traspasaran el ámbito común de la fotografía. Desarrollando un vínculo entre la obra de autor y la fotografía con contenido social.

Intentamos romper el esquema que le ha caído a la fotografía documental en Costa Rica, intentando legitimarla, quitándole el estereotipo de noticia, como ha sido frecuentemente utilizada por los medios de comunicación, sino como un lenguaje que permite una postura libre de parte del autor, tanto en la escogencia como en el modo de abordar un tema.

Name: FUJIFILM Switzerland
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of FUJIFILM Switzerland! Find all about the latest products from our X and GFX system, upcoming events and exciting happenings in the world of photography.

Since our foundation in 1934 at the foot of Mount Fuji, we have developed from a manufacturer of motion picture film materials to a leading company in camera and photo technology. FUJIFILM offers a comprehensive range of products in the field of photography that inspires both beginners and professionals. This includes mirrorless digital cameras in APS-C and medium format (X and GFX systems), FUJINON binoculars, the INSTAX instant camera series and a wide range of photo service products.

Follow us to stay up to date and discover the world of photography with FUJIFILM Switzerland!

Name: HALOS FOTOGRAFIA
Description:
Somos el antiguo equipo que ha gestionado  el antiguo Taller de Fotografía de Alcalá de Henares durante los últimos 20 años hasta febrero del 2018. Nos embarcamos en este nuevo proyecto como Escuela de Artes Audiovisuales llamado Halos.

Halos Fotografía nace con la intención de seguir ilusionando a jóvenes y mayores con este arte y formando grandes artistas y profesionales.

Nos hemos lanzado a sacar esta nueva iniciativa como escuela privada, gracias a la demanda de nuestros estudiantes interesados en nuestra oferta de cursos en en mundo de la Fotografía y las artes audiovisuales. Os ofrecemos la misma programación de cursos de siempre, con muchas actividades relacionadas en el entorno Audiovisual y artístico. Nuestras expectativas de ir ampliando y creciendo juntos y hacer de Alcalá de Henares un referente en el mundo de las Artes.

Iniciación Fotografía Digital
Sumérgete en el mundo de la fotografía, aprende a manejar tu cámara y tratar tus imágenes digitales con un software de edición y un PC.

Contenidos: manejo de la cámara reflex, aparataje auxiliar, elaboración de la imagen, principios de iluminación, principales herramientas del software de edición, optimización de fotografías, etc.

Intermedio Fotografía Digital
Curso dirigido a personas que ya han realizado algún curso de iniciación o que sus conocimientos son similares a los contenidos del mismo.

Contenidos: Revisión de conceptos de cámara y toma fotográfica: técnicas de exposición, análisis zonal y fotometría. Materiales y mercado fotográfico. Iluminación: naturaleza de la luz, fuentes emisoras y usos. Estética fotográfica. Retoque y tratamiento digital de la imagen, etc.

Fotografía Aplicada
Curso dirigido a aquellas personas que ya han realizado algún curso de iniciación a la fotografía y en el que se profundiza en algunos contenidos técnicos al tiempo que nos introduce en los grandes temas de la fotografía.

Photoshop Creativo

Producción de video con camara DLSR

Name: ISeeVision
Description:

Real Estate: Enable potential buyers to explore properties from the comfort of their homes.

Name: COSMICANTOSHKA
Description:
COSMICANTOSHKA is where thoughts & ideas come to find a new life. Our team is experienced at creating valuable visual assets to fabricate your personalized brand via interactive storytelling. At the basic level, it is about removing distractions by careful attention to detail and the integration of sensory experiences. Working in tandem with a diverse & talented network of clients, producers, artists, technicians, stylists, and assistants. Our essence
is that of creating a long-living reign for the digital nomad.

Fashion & Beauty, Commercial, Advertising, Lifestyle, Fine Art, Conceptual Photography are some of the areas of the traverse, both in outdoor locations and studio setups.


COSMIC to us is drawing on the subconscious dynamics between an individual and the boundless universe tied by myriad threads that weave into shaping a creative understanding of art & design. Through rigorous self-control and raising the vibrations, one constitutes a counsel of a certain awareness, learning how the cosmos is always in flux and perceptions can be
molded and extinguished in abundance, profusely through the infinite source.


ANTOSHKA is a Russian word that has varying interpretations, one of them being – setting thorough goals for oneself and developing a holistic dedication towards achieving them. This being intrinsic to oneself, not a triumphant feat, formulating perspectives to manifest dreams. A constant stream of harmony to flow into & bringing people together for a collective purpose
while being responsive to external stimuli, or memorability, or by a sense of ecstasy, boundlessness, and unity with the universe.

3D virtuālās tūres telpu, produktu vai pakalpojumu prezentēšanai,  nekustamo īpašumu pārvaldīšanai, apmācību nodrošināšanai rūpnīcās, ražotnēs, noliktavās.

Visbiežāk 3D virtuālās tūres izmanto telpu prezentēšanai, tomēr tās izmantošanas iespējas ir daudz plašākas, piemēram to var izmantot kā rīku efektīvai darbu organizēšanai ražotnēs, noliktavās vai nekustamo īpašumu apsaimniekošanā.

3D virtuālā tūre sniedz iespēju uzņēmuma darbiniekiem pašiem veikt izmaiņas virtuālajā tūre, tādejādi aktualizējot informāciju par vietas izmantošanas iespējām, plānotajiem darbiem vai instrukciju nodošanu kolēģiem.   

Ar paplašinātās realitātes tehnoloģiju palīdzību, virtuālo tūri iespējams papildināt ar  navigācijas iespējām, virtuālajiem asistentiem, uzdevumiem, audio materiāliem, objektiem un citiem interaktīviem rīkiem, kas dod iespēju veikt apmācības un  sagatavot darbiniekus dažādām situācijām.

Name: Kids in Focus

Kids in Focus is a 501(c)3. We work with youth experiencing the challenges of growing along with serious adversities such as economic insecurity, and food and housing instability. Through our Photography Programs youth are paired with dedicated volunteer mentors. Together they explore the world with their cameras - gaining new perspectives, confidence and resilence. Giving kids a new lens on life!

When kids experience trauma, they disconnect from the world and from themselves. A camera in their hands, with the right guidance and encouragement, can switch the light in their eyes back on, giving them a new lens on life.

Description:
>> PHOTO - VIDÉO - 3D <<

LA TEAM
Studio Le Carré est un regroupement de compétences au service de l’image. Une jeune équipe pluridisciplinaire créant une synergie unique: la Carré Family ! A notre arc, vous pouvez compter de sacrées flèches : photographes, vidéastes, artiste 3D, développeurs… tout pour assurer vos projets de A à Z dans les domaines de la publicité, le corporate et l’événementiel. Dans nos studios ou sur le terrain, en France ou à l’étranger, pas une journée ne se ressemble dans notre quotidien. 

RÉFÉRENCES
—> Event pour : Edf, Sncf, Sanofi, Bayer, Aviva, April, Cgt, Mercedes, Dior, Kering, Guerlain, L’oréal, Hachette, Paul Bocuse, Blédina, Française des Jeux, Heineken, CEA…

PRESTATIONS : 
Photocall événementiel / Activité team building / Reportage événementiel / Campagne publicitaire / Reportage événementiel / Portraits pour entreprise / Photo de produit packshot / Formation professionnelle / Lieux événementiel / 

LES STUDIOS
Actuellement, nous comptons 3 structures sous les couleurs rouge et blanc de Studio Le Carré. La maison mère étant Lyon depuis 2012, nous avons ouvert Toulouse en 2016, puis nous avons inauguré Grenoble en 2023. Hors les murs, nous avons créé notre réseau à Dubai en nous rendant régulièrement dans le Middle East depuis 2016.
Nos studios accueillent des équipes extérieur à la nôtre pour des shooting et tournages sous le pôle "Location". Modulable et atypique soient-ils, ces espaces entre 100 et 300m2 réceptionnent aussi tout autre événements comme vos réunions d'équipe, séminaires, afterwork, anniversaires, pop-up store... Ici tout est permis, à vous d'imaginer le reste !

Grâce à la diversité de marques et de produits que nous représentons, nous sommes en mesure de les placer efficacement dans divers segments de marché, touchant ainsi une clientèle aussi variée que les amateurs débutants, les studios de photographie professionnels, les institutions muséales et les administrations gouvernementales.

Description:
V Photography is a Pune-based interior and architectural photography studio helping designers, architects, realtors, and Airbnb hosts win more clients with scroll-stopping visuals and consistent content that sells. What we do:

•	Interior & architectural photography tailored for portfolio, awards, and editorial use.
•	Real estate photo/video packages engineered for faster inquiries and better conversion.
•	Instagram-ready reels, BTS snippets, and cinematic property videos for social-first visibility.
•	Monthly content retainer plans for interior designers: predictable shoots, fixed deliverables, reliable timelines.

Why clients choose us:

•	Design-sensitive compositions that honor your aesthetic and materials.
•	Consistent lighting and color accuracy for true-to-life presentation across web and print.
•	Social media focus: vertical-first edits, hooks, and captions that accelerate reach.
•	Business reliability: on-time delivery, structured revisions, and campaign-ready assets.

Ideal partners:

•	Interior designers and architects seeking portfolio upgrades, case studies, and award submissions.
•	Real estate professionals needing faster turnarounds and high-ROI listing content.
•	Airbnb/holiday home hosts aiming to improve occupancy with premium visuals.

Monthly Plans (popular):
•	Starter: 1 shoot/month + 10 edited photos + 1 reel.
•	Growth: 2 shoots/month + 20 photos + 2 reels + BTS.
•	Pro: 4 shoots/month + 40 photos + 4 reels + cinematic video.

Let’s create design-forward visuals that drive inquiries, build trust, and elevate your brand presence—consistently, month after month. Connect to view packages, availability, and recent work.

Name: Xangle Studio
Description:
Xangle is a production studio specialized in multi-camera systems.  We do mostly 360-degree bullet-time capture and 3d scan, either at our studios in Montreal or on the road. Over the last year, we've been working with Intel, Adobe, HP, Microsoft, Facebook and Riot Games in tours that brought us to France, Sweden, California, Texas, New York, China, Spain and Thailand.  The company is managed by Eric Paré who brings his visual signature to the company with his concepts and light-painting projects. Eric's work has been presented on BBC, MTV, CNN, TEDx, Musique Plus, Petapixel and much more.

Xangle Camera Server is the main service/product we provide. It is a set of softwares that allows easy connection to multi-camera systems: connect, control, calibrate, trigger, grab, preview, publish, share. We also do our own electronic components, research and development, and invest constantly in new technologies to improve multi-angle capture.

Our studios in Montréal are 8000 ft2 and are located in the heart of the Plateau Mont-Royal. We have 200 Canon DSLRS available and many different rig sizes. Studio B and C can be rented for private events, video productions, 3d scan sessions and art installations.

Our technology is currently licensed by various agencies and partners around the world, which helps us moving faster and have greater access to replicated rigs when working abroad. At this point, we have access to a few thousands of cameras (North America, Europe, Australia, Africa, Asia).

Name: V-Flat World
Description:
Who We Are:
At V-Flat World, we're not just another company; we're a revolution in light shaping. We've redefined the way photographers and content creators craft their visual narratives by providing them with the ultimate tools in their arsenal - the Foldable V-Flat for portrait photography, Duo Boards for food and product photography and The Light Cone for shooting shiny items like jewelry and really anything reflective. 


Our Vision for Photographers:
For photographers, our products are designed to be versatile, portable, and easy to use, empowering you to sculpt light and create content exactly as you envision it. Whether you're a seasoned pro or just starting your journey, we have the tools to help you turn your creative visions into stunning images that captivate and inspire.
 
Our Vision for E-commerce Brands:
E-commerce brands, we understand that the success of your business depends on presenting your products in the best light possible. That's where we come in. Duo Boards for dynamic backgrounds, set up these double sided bad boys in seconds and illuminate your products, captivate your customers, and drive sales. They help you showcase your merchandise in a way that makes your products irresistible to online shoppers. V-Flat World is your partner in creating product imagery that drives conversions and boosts your brand's bottom line.


Our Vision for Content Creators:
Content creators, we know how important it is to maintain a consistent and professional visual style across your videos and photos. V-Flat World is your secret weapon for achieving clean and captivating content. From YouTube channels to social media platforms, our products give you the freedom to focus on your content while we take care of the rest. Elevate your storytelling with V-Flat World.
Join us on our mission to transform the world of lighting and visual storytelling. Connect with us to stay updated on the latest innovations, tutorials, and inspiring success stories from our community.

Name: Midwest Photo
Description: In the early 1980s, At Ohio State University, Ph.D. candidate Stu Appelbaum started selling used cameras from his home to support his family. By 1989 Stu's operation had begun to outgrow his home and himself as a lone employee. He incorporated and named the new venture Bill and Mike's Photo, Inc, after his grandparents. Ultimately he moved the operation to North High Street in Columbus' suburban neighborhood of Clintonville and called it "Midwest Photo." In 2014 Stu retired and his eldest son, Moishe bought the business, expanding on his own ideas while maintaining a family-run and small-business feel to the company. In 2016 Moishe moved the entire operation to a building three times the size complete with a learning studio and large warehousing space to accommodate the growing business. Midwest Photo has been owned and operated as a family business for over 30 years and continues to be a community resource locally and supplier of quality photo, video, and printing products.

Description:

We maken herinneringen van een afscheidsdag, zoals een uitvaart, maar ook voor of na een overlijden. 

Zo is een portret bij leven zeer waardevol. Of kan een nieuwe gezinsfoto jaren na een overlijden gemaakt worden, om de dierbare een plek te geven in de nieuwe situatie. 

Op onze website vind je verschillende video's waarin nabestaanden vertellen over hun ervaring met een bekwaam afscheidsfotograaf.

Name: Jacqueline Mathijssen Fotografie
Description:
Sinds februari 2023 ben ik gediplomeerd als Bekwaam Afscheidsfotograaf. Een weinig algemeen bekende tak van de fotografie. Mijn passie is om mijn kijk op een gebeurtenis beelden te vangen en zo een waardevol herinneringsdocument te creëren voor nabestaanden. Afscheid is in mijn ogen breder dan alleen een afscheidsdienst. daarom bied mijzelf aan om ook de laatste levensfase van iemand in beeld te brengen. Het vastleggen van belangrijke herinneringen staat daarin centraal. Nog een mooi uitstapje, een familiebijeenkomst of zelfs een levensfeest. Ik maak er graag een beeldverhaal van.
Daarnaast haal ik veel plezier uit het fotograferen van mensen van jong tot oud. Zoals het vastleggen van een pasgeboren kindje, schoolkinderen, koppels en gezinnen. Dit doe ik graag in jouw eigen omgeving of op een zelfgekozen plek ergens buiten. Ik kies voor een ontspannen en spontane sfeer. Het liefst geef ik je het gevoel dat je helemaal niet bezig bent met een fotoshoot en lekker jezelf kan zijn.

Name: 360 Grad Fotografie - omnify.ch GmbH
Description:
Mit einem virtuellen Rundgang zeigen Sie Ihren Kunden und Interessenten auf einfache Art und Weise einen Raum, ein Haus, ein Hotelzimmer und vieles mehr. Wir erstellen für Sie 360 Grad Fotos und virtuelle Touren und Events.

Virtuelle Rundgänge sind eine tolle Möglichkeit, um Orte aus der Ferne zu erkunden und zu erleben. Durch die Verwendung von Technologien wie 360-Grad-Videos und Virtual Reality können Nutzer von überall auf der Welt auf eine interaktive Art und Weise an einem bestimmten Ort teilhaben.

Ein Beispiel für einen virtuellen Rundgang wäre ein Museum, das seine Ausstellungen online zugänglich macht. Nutzer können durch die Räume des Museums navigieren und die Exponate hautnah erleben, als wären sie tatsächlich vor Ort. Dies ist besonders nützlich für Menschen, die aufgrund von Entfernung, Zeitmangel oder körperlichen Einschränkungen nicht in der Lage sind, das Museum persönlich zu besuchen.

Virtuelle Rundgänge bieten auch für Unternehmen und Organisationen interessante Möglichkeiten. Zum Beispiel können sie ihre Büros, Produktionsstätten oder Veranstaltungsorte online präsentieren, um potenziellen Kunden oder Partnern einen Eindruck von ihren Räumlichkeiten zu vermitteln.

Ein weiterer Vorteil von virtuellen Rundgängen ist, dass sie häufig kostengünstiger und umweltfreundlicher sind als herkömmliche Besichtigungen vor Ort. Da Nutzer von überall auf der Welt teilnehmen können, müssen sie nicht weite Reisen unternehmen, was Zeit und Geld spart und die CO2-Emissionen reduziert.

Insgesamt bieten virtuelle Rundgänge eine spannende Möglichkeit, Orte und Einrichtungen auf eine neue und innovative Art und Weise zu erleben. Sie sind nützlich für diejenigen, die aufgrund von Entfernung oder körperlichen Einschränkungen nicht in der Lage sind, bestimmte Orte zu besuchen, und bieten Unternehmen und Organisationen die Möglichkeit, ihre Räumlichkeiten online zu präsentieren.

Name: Linda Kazares Photography
Description:
WHAT IS VIRTUAL IMPACT PHOTOGRAPHY (VIP)

* VIP is a remote photography and coaching service.

* The service mirrors a professional studio photoshoot experience for headshots and personal branding.

* A VIP experience lets clients feel comfortable and safe in their own surroundings.

* A professional photographer coaches them via FaceTime for the best poses, lighting and most effective setting.

* The photographer then snaps the shutter remotely.

* Photos taken during a virtual photoshoot are actual live sessions using the iPhone’s camera and shot in the client’s own environment.

* They are NOT screenshots or fake backdrops.

* The photoshoot is conducted in real-time anywhere in the world.

 WHY IT WORKS

* It saves remote employee productivity by reducing time invested in travel for photography.

* Provides one point of contact no matter where the employees are located. 

* One photographer and project manager - scheduling, photographing, editing.

* Maintain photos of employees who are located remotely.

* Budget management.

* Corporate consistency

* New employee remote digital photo onboarding.

 WHAT OTHERS SAY

Christopher Dunmire, New York

"My firm, AlphaFMC, worked closely with Linda to roll out a virtual headshots program to support the transition of at-home work for our current employees and new hires. From the very beginning of the process, Linda worked hand in hand with our leadership to ensure communication, set-up, the eventual photography all went off without a hitch. Through this process, Linda was able to deliver dozens of high-quality headshots for our employees, all from the comfort of their homes. We plan to continue to work with Linda due to her excellent communication and quality photography, Thanks Linda!"

Name: Leo Torri Photographer
Description:
Leo Torri is a professional photographer specialized in architecture, interiors, design and furnishing items. 
His activity had its origins in the Eighties, at first in the field of design and furnishing items; from the early 2000s, he also started documenting architectural and interior projects. Over the years, Leo Torri has worked for some of the major design and architecture studios, as well as magazines. 

Leo Torri's business has been able to adapt to changes in technology, welcoming the evolution from the analogue to the digital; at the same time, he has developed his own peculiar stylistic trait, based on a skilful use of light to best render the lines and the design of each object. 

In fact, photography is much more than a job: “I interpret the world through the lens of my camera. Everything in this world, every object, every material, demands to be observed and understood. This way, when put in the proper light, it can fully express itself. After 40 years of professional photography, I have never stopped looking for that which escapes most eyes.”

Name: Lors Photography Incorporated
Description:
Lors Photography was born out of the vision of two siblings, Laurence and Stanley, and Stanley's son Thomas, who founded the company in 1926 as Lorstan-Thomas Photography in Newark, New Jersey after Laurence mistakenly got off the train from Pittsburgh in "Newark", instead of "New York," a mistake that continues to be made by people even today. Several years later the brothers bought out their cousin and changed the name to Lorstan.

The second generation of the family took over in 1968, and began the expansion of the company into New York. Richard and Steven, Laurence's sons, completed the acquisition of Carol Studios of Long Island in 1991, changing the name to Empire Classics. Lorstan was then renamed Lors in New Jersey.

With no clear family transition to the third generation, the brothers sold the company to Modern Holdings, Incorporated of Summit, NJ in 2005. Since then, Modern Holdings has expanded the reach of the combined companies to upstate New York and as far south as Delaware adding the acquisition of Studio 53 in Philadelphia in December of 2007.

Lors Photography and Empire Studios maintain the consistent commitment to quality and customer service that was the hallmark of the Slutsker business over 80 years ago. Today we employ over 200 creative minds energized with the mission of commemorating the milestones and achievements of the student populations at over 600 schools throughout the Northeast.

Description: Studio Oostrum, een creatieve onderneming waar wij dagelijks met foto én film bezig zijn. Wij hebben een duidelijke visie in het toepassen van beeld als communicatiemedium. Daarbij maken we  iedere keer weer de afweging: wat is de wens van de klant en hoe vullen wij die in met de creativiteit van de vakman. We denken mee, bouwen samen aan een concept, beheren de planning, zorgen voor de uitvoering en werken iedere opdracht naar wens af, zodat de klanten - en ook wij -  tevreden zijn. Fotografie en film zonder concessies en altijd 'beeldbepalend en scherp'.

Name: Natuurscherm.com
Description:
Natuurscherm.com – Brengt de rust van buiten naar binnen 

Stress en spanning zijn in de zorg vaak onvermijdelijk. Of het nu gaat om patiënten in de wachtkamer, bewoners in een zorginstelling of iemand in de tandartsstoel – natuurbeelden helpen aantoonbaar om rust te brengen, stress te verminderen en de sfeer prettiger te maken.

Met Natuurscherm veranderen we elk scherm in een venster naar de natuur. Onze natuurpresentaties bestaan uit rustgevende foto’s en video’s, zorgvuldig samengesteld door natuurfotograaf Marcel Versteeg. Ze sluiten aan bij de seizoenen en kunnen eenvoudig worden afgespeeld op bestaande schermen of geleverd worden als complete oplossing inclusief professioneel scherm en installatie.

 Wat we bieden:
 Rust en ontspanning voor patiënten, bewoners en bezoekers
 Positievere ervaringen en beoordelingen
 Een prettiger werkklimaat voor zorgteams
 Keuze uit losse presentaties of totaaloplossingen inclusief scherm

Samen met partners als Nature For Health, Wachtkamerschermen en IDS Media brengen we natuurbeleving naar wachtkamers, behandelkamers en zorginstellingen.

 Meer weten of demo’s bekijken? Bezoek: www.natuurscherm.com

Name: Nicolas Debrosse Photography
Description:
Since 2016, I am specialized in business and family portraits and events in Montreal. My approach is human and will be felt from our first call until the delivery of your photos. Each photoshoot is unique, since I take the time to make you comfortable in front of my camera. My priority is to provide you with quality pictures that will highlight your greatest features.

My event pictures are described as small documentaries shot in a journalistic style.

I’ll take pleasure in capturing your story in an authentic way, so why don’t we share this experience together ?

Name: Kramer Portraits
Description:
Kramer Portraits is devoted to creating portraits that are alive with personality, capturing the distinctive character of those special to your heart. Timeless, striking and as unique as the subjects, Kramer Portraits are truly unforgettable, living memories.

Each portrait is hand finished, creating an original piece of art for you to treasure for generations to come. Having created thousands of portraits in this style, Kramer has been recognized as the leading expert in the art of timeless expression and posing, creating an unmistakable look that is recognized throughout the country as a Kramer.

Name: Criativa Pix Fotografia
Description: Fotografia Criativa, especialista em Ensaios Corporativos e eventos.

Name: Suder Pictures - marka silna wizerunkiem
Description:
Jako firma specjalizująca się w fotografii przemysłowej i korporacyjnej, posiadamy ponad 17-letnie doświadczenie w budowaniu wizerunku firm poprzez profesjonalne sesje zdjęciowe. Nasze portfolio obejmuje ponad 200 przedsiębiorstw, głównie z sektora przemysłowego i produkcyjnego.

Współpracowaliśmy z takimi markami jak: AVON, CEVA Logistics, FIAT, Opel, Stellantis, Volkswagen Motor Polska, General Motors Manufacturing, KGHM Polska Miedź, Mota-Engil, ArcelorMittal, Tauron Ciepło, RR Donnelley, Gühring Polska, McCormick - Kamis, Operator Logistyczny Paliw Płynnych, Instytut Nafty i Gazu, Muzeum Historii Polski, Wikipedia, UNESCO i inne.

ZAKRES NASZEJ OFERTY OBEJMUJE:
‣ Tworzenie portfolio zdjęć wizerunkowych firm przemysłowych i wytwórczych
‣ Systematyczną dokumentację fotograficzną inwestycji budowlanych i drogowych
‣ Profesjonalną fotografię wnętrz i architektury na potrzeby reklamowe i wizerunkowe
‣ Obsługę fotograficzną eventów biznesowych – gal otwarcia, podsumowań roku oraz kluczowych momentów w życiu organizacji
‣ Fotografię biznesową dla zarządów, rad nadzorczych i kadry kierowniczej
‣ Zdjęcia lotnicze firm i inwestycji

PODEJŚCIE DO PRACY:
W naszej pracy kładziemy duży nacisk na dokładne zrozumienie potrzeb i oczekiwań klientów. Staramy się być elastyczni i dostosowywać do specyficznych wymagań każdego projektu, co pozwala nam na tworzenie unikalnych i dopasowanych do kontekstu fotografii. Dzięki naszemu zaangażowaniu i pasji do jakości, jesteśmy w stanie dostarczać zdjęć, które nie tylko spełniają, ale często przewyższają oczekiwania klientów!

NARZĘDZIA I TECHNOLOGIE:
Korzystamy z najnowszych technologii i sprzętu fotograficznego, aby zapewnić najwyższą jakość zdjęć. W naszej pracy używamy profesjonalnych aparatów, obiektywów, dronów do fotografii lotniczej oraz oprogramowania do postprodukcji, co pozwala nam na pełną kontrolę nad ostatecznym efektem wizualnym.

Zadzwoń lub napisz: 

info@pawelsuder.pl, +48 600 55 50 50
www.pawelsuder.pl/referencje

Name: Immortal Vision Studio
Description:
Created by a multi talent content creator, CJ Wolfe; Immortal Vision Studio, is a collaborative space fostering creativity through numerous mediums such as photography, videography, brand development, graphic design and web development. The brick and mortar location not only provides space for artists and creators alike, but doubles as an event venue available for professional and personal engagements. 

Providing a safe and accessible space for creators to produce and showcase content while joining a network of like-minded artists. Immortal Vision Studio cultivates diverse and inclusive collaboration, encouraging community.

Name: Studio Gently
Description:
I'm Anna, the brand photographer behind Studio Gently, and I know what it's like to hate having my photo taken!

Captivating photos are crucial for our brand visibility, but what if you dislike being photographed? I specialize in making even the most camera-shy clients look and feel their best, leveraging my magazine experience to create images that make your brand stand out 

I work with:

 Solo founders
 Small teams
 Independent magazines

What does a brand shoot entail?

 We’ll start with an introductory call to get to know each other and discuss your business in detail.

 You'll gain access to a personalized client portal, where you can easily find outfit, location, and prop guides.

 I’ll develop a detailed photoshoot plan for you, complete with moodboards, a schedule, shot list, and plenty of preparation tips. I assist in selecting the perfect location and provide outfit advice as needed.

 On shoot day, I ensure a relaxed but purposeful environment, so you'll feel at ease and never rushed or pressured, while I capture your best moments in a beautiful setting.

 After the shoot, you'll receive your final edits in a stunning, SEO-ready gallery. We'll also have a post-shoot workshop to strategize on how to maximize your new photography for your brand.

By working together, you’ll get:

 Ready-to-publish photography perfect for magazine pitches, shot by a photographer familiar with editorial needs.

 An enjoyable shoot day focused on your business, with thorough preparation and all details handled by me.

 A strategic plan alongside your photo gallery – the post-shoot workshop uses insights from our collaboration to guide your next marketing steps.

When I'm not behind the camera, I’m Edinburgh’s biggest fan, an enthusiastic but clumsy hiker, and a year-round Great British Bake Off aficionado. I’m also an auntie and a proud psychosis survivor (7+ years strong!)

If you’re interested in a supportive and nurturing photo shoot experience, sen

Name: The Ruum Africa
Description:
The Ruum Africa (TRA) is shaping the future of African photography through 54Ruum — a community of the best photography talents across the continent. We’re building a creative space that connects artists across all 54 African countries.

We promote artists and boundary-pushing creatives across Africa, including photographers, visual artists, and models. If you’ve got talent, vision, or just raw curiosity, there’s Ruum for you here.

Your story. Your lens. Your voice. Together, we amplify the continent’s creative energy — one visual at a time.

Name: The One Who Captures
Description:
Welcome to The One Who Capture, a premier photography and videography brand led by Ritik Arora, specializing in capturing unforgettable moments with exceptional artistry and creativity. With a focus on big events, wedding photography, fashion photography, and brand social media theme photography, we bring a unique perspective to every project we undertake.

Our Expertise:-
Big Events:
At The One Who Capture, we excel in covering big events, ensuring that no moment goes unnoticed. From corporate conferences and product launches to music festivals and gala dinners, we have the experience and technical know-how to document the essence, energy, and key moments of any occasion. Our team of talented photographers and videographers work seamlessly to deliver stunning visuals that encapsulate the atmosphere and excitement of each event.

Wedding Photography:
We understand that weddings are a once-in-a-lifetime celebration, and we are committed to preserving the joy, love, and intricate details of your special day. Our wedding photography services go beyond traditional poses and clichés. We strive to capture the authentic emotions, candid moments, and unique stories that make your wedding truly memorable.

Fashion Photography:
As a fashion photographer, Ritik Arora has an innate ability to showcase the beauty and style of each subject. With an eye for detail and a passion for creativity, we collaborate closely with models, stylists, and brands to create captivating visual stories. Whether it's high-end fashion editorials, lookbooks, or campaign shoots, we bring a fresh perspective and a touch of artistic flair to every project.

Brand Social Media Theme Photography:
In the digital age, strong visual content is crucial for brand success. We specialize in creating compelling imagery for brand social media themes, helping businesses make an impact and connect with their target audience.

Name: Dark Studio
Description:
DARK STUDIO
is a Bengaluru based photography company, specializing in Architecture, Interiors, Exteriors, Industrial, Products as well as other various kinds of Photography

Dark Studio is providing professional photography, motion pictures of interiors and exteriors, walkthrough, testimonials and many more. With full control of modern imaging techniques, Dark studio explores architectural photography using today’s most advanced tools, including state of the art digital cameras and photo enhancement software.


Dark Studio’s goal is to create images that are dynamic and memorable, delivering exceptional, effective professional photography time and time again.

Dark Studio is your resource for professional, consistent and beautiful photographs.

Name: Miguel Perez Photodesign
Description:
I have worked in photography for over three decades. It all started out as a hobby, and became a passion that resulted in a profession. 

My specialty includes photo design, meaning I create and direct the environment the pictures are taken in. If you hire me, you hire a complete photgrapher with strong art direction skills, you can see that in both the work for BMW and Ikea, but specially in the projects for Miguel Perez Photodesign.

When I am not taking photos, you can find me on my bike riding hundreds of kilometers, or with my guitar, playing songs at bonfires. I am also proud part owner of Karl Oskar Gården, a organic farm specializing in organic meats, plants and inhouse baked breads. You can find more info on Karl Oskar Gården on Instagram, going by that name.

Name: Shamrock+
Description:
Shamrock+ provides innovative visual solutions, professional photography, and 3D data collection services to individuals and businesses.

Using state-of-the-art drones, cameras, sensors, and software, we deliver realistic representations of built and virtual environments.

Name: Fotografie Mike Rikken
Description:
FOTOGRAFIE VOOR UW BEDRIJF
Als gekwalificeerd en gepassioneerd vakfotograaf heeft Mike in de afgelopen 27 jaar veel ervaring, kennis en expertise opgebouwd om uw boodschap met de juiste beelden krachtig te kunnen communiceren naar uw opdrachtgevers. Met het juiste professioneel apparatuur en innovatieve technieken van de hoogste kwaliteit kan hij bijna iedere situatie aan. Zijn zakelijke werk kenmerkt zich door strakke lijnen, hoge contrasten, volle kleuren en unieke standpunten.

Behalve bedrijfsreportages, zakelijke profielfoto’s op locatie, beelden van diensten voor uw website, onroerend goed foto’s voor uw makelaar- en/of verkoop-brochures, interieur-/ exterieurfoto’s, sfeerfoto’s van het personeelsfeest, etc… bezit hij over een ruime fotostudio voor o.a. productfotografie voor uw webshop, foodfoto’s voor uw menukaart en unieke klassieke zakelijke portretten voor bijvoorbeeld je linked-in profiel. Ook goed te combineren met een bedrijfs-video welke hij graag voor uw business en diensten verzorgd. Zijn dienstverlening is snel, vriendelijk, open, flexibel, klantgericht en betaalbaar. De tarieven staan online dus geen geheimen! Interesse? Mike komt graag langs om te kijken hoe je met zijn beelden optimaal kunt communiceren voor, met EN naar uw klant!

Name: Mosaic Journal
Description:
We’ve all been there. Getting distracted by other people’s lives instead of appreciating the beauty of our own.

Our daily photo journal invites you to embrace and connect with your present, with what’s actually going on around you, moment by moment.

Each picture, printed and delivered back to you, is a reminder of what made that day special.

We are the only photo journal that sends you prints automatically every month to create a beautiful album that breaks your shots out of socials and the cloud, bringing them into your hands and home.

Welcome to a more mindful and joyful way to experience your photos… go get lost in the moment and we’ll make sure those moments don’t get lost.

Name: WIT fotografie & videografie
Description:
WIT fotografie & videografie is een full-service beeldbedrijf met een vast en gemotiveerd team van professionele en gediplomeerde foto- en videografen. WIT biedt services in verschillende fotografische domeinen, waaronder portret-, bedrijfs- architectuur-, event- en publicitaire fotografie en videografie.

Vanuit de ruime fotostudio en galerij in Lissewege bij Brugge zwermen Jürgen en zijn team graag in binnen- en buitenland uit voor uiteenlopende opdrachten met een sterke hang naar creativiteit en beeldkwaliteit.

Onze beelden, jouw verhaal!

-

WIT photography & videography is a full-service image company with a motivated team of professional and qualified photographers and videographers. WIT offers services in various photographic fields, including portrait, corporate, architectural, event and advertising photography and videography.

From the spacious photo studio and gallery in Lissewege near Bruges, Jürgen and his team swarm through Belgium and abroad for a variety of assignments with a strong aim on creativity and image quality.

Our images, your story!

Name: picdrop.com - image transfer for pros
Description:
picdrop is a powerful, easy-to-use image sharing and proofing tool — built by photographers, for photographers.

Trusted by over 200,000 photographers, designers, and creative teams around the world, picdrop makes collaboration seamless and client interaction stress-free.

What sets picdrop apart?

 No client logins required
 Instant image previews
 Smart selection tools: likes, comments & annotations
 No file size limits or link expirations
 Built by creatives, for creatives

Based in Berlin, we’re a SaaS company on a mission to simplify workflows for professional photographers and streamline creative collaboration.

Name: Pics_andstories
Description:
Gestart als fotograaf en als vanzelf in de bedrijfsfotografie gerold.
Dat voelt goed en vind ik vooral fijn om te doen!
Content aanleveren aan bedrijven om hun social media en/of website te voeden.
Als snel botste ik op een tweede opportuniteit. De bedrijven in kwestie hadden dan wel mooie content, de tijd (en goesting) om die ook daadwerkelijk te posten ontbrak dikwijls. En wat moet er daar dan van tekst bij? En wanneer post je dan best? Aangezien ik ideeën, woorden, beelden en vooral goesting genoeg heb lag de oplossing voor de hand: een social-media take over! Vooral in combinatie met mijn bedrijfsfotografie is dit onweerstaanbaar! Ik werkte 3 formules uit & ondertussen zijn de eerste klanten al gestart. Ook meer weten? Stuur me een bericht, ik vertel er graag alles over!

Name: Dakota Photos
Description:
Con casi 20 años de experiencia creando FotoComposiciones para Instalaciones turísticas, culturales y eventos, en Dakota Photos capturamos momentos especiales en enclaves privilegiados, convirtiéndolos en FotoRecuerdos únicos. Hoy tenemos presencia en 7 ciudades, y hemos sido pioneros de la tecnología chroma en España, convirtiendo un espacio vacío en un mundo único y lleno de magia.

Hemos fotografiado más de 3 millones de sonrisas y nos esforzamos para conseguir aquella instantánea que te emocione cuando la veas 5, 10, 15 … años después. Un abrazo con los jugadores de tu equipo favorito, ver a los más pequeños junto a los protagonistas de sus dibujos animados preferidos, disfrutar de nuevo de las emociones de un atardecer en la azotea de la enigmática Alhambra… Inmortalizar esos momentos son nuestro compromiso contigo.

INNOVACIÓN TECNOLÓGICA
En Dakota Photos hemos creado uno de los Software de Chroma Profesional más potentes del mercado, con el que hacer realidad la Fotografía Soñada. Un FotoRecuerdo impreso en la máxima calidad y digitalizada para poder ser compartida al instante por el Usuario. 

SOPORTE EN PUNTO DE VENTA 
Ofrecemos a nuestros clientes soporte en diferentes ámbitos relacionados con la Gestión de Ventas. Disponemos de un preparado equipo humano en plantilla especializado en hacer del Punto de Venta una estructura ordenada, productiva y con una grata sensación de profesionalidad de cara al usuario. 

CLIENTES: MÁS DE 100 EMPRESAS CONFIANDO EN DAKOTA PHOTOS
Los clientes son la gran apuesta de valor, el verdadero aval de la compañía y la mayor garantía de continuidad. Por este motivo, agradecemos la confianza que nos brindan día a día clientes como el Real Madrid, la Casa Batlló, el Museo de Cera de Madrid, la Confederação Brasileira de Futebol o el Teleférico de Montjuïc, entre muchos otros.

Name: Modified Photography
Description: Modified Photography provides professional, high-quality corporate, commercial, and business photography & videography Australia-wide. Trusted by clients like Meta Optima and TFM Digital for unmatched service and visual excellence. See our Google reviews to learn more and contact us today for your project!

Name: Black Box Industrial Photography & Video
Description:
Film and Photographs is like a dream.
Black Box is in the making of dream come true since 1998….
It’s a long and creative journey.
The experience of creating steps with sharing, listening, Understanding, Shooting, Processing, Feedback and finally one product which you have imagined is delivered.
A Photograph coming out of Black Box is more perfect than the real one.
This all happens with our knowledge of product, subject and our dedication.
Welcome aboard…
Your dream will be shared with the WORLD…..

Name: CYS Group, Inc.

CYS Group, Inc. currently encompasses two brands: Creative Image and Celebrate Your Sexy. Celebrate Your Sexy is currently CYS Group, Inc’s largest and fastest-growing brand.

Name: BOOGS Photography
Description: BOOGS Photography is a professional photography service, based in KZN South Africa. We specialise in Sport, adventure and corporate photography. We are a;; forever learning and trying new things to make our photos stand out that much more.

Name: Focused Aerial Real Estate Photography
Description:
Focused Aerial Imagery Service supercharges marketing materials with jaw dropping aerial videos and photos. We'll increase awareness of your property and highlight it's attributes with our Emmy Award winning staff! Focused Aerial pilots are FAA Part 107 Certified and fully insured.
We are legally able to capture the amazing perspectives of your listing from the air.  Exclusive properties and homes with scenic qualities can benefit the most from drone imagery, and it’s been proven that an average listing is enhanced greatly by using aerial images and video as well.
Focused Aerial Imagery uses (Forward Looking Infrared) cameras, paired with an aerial platform such as a portable drone can provide effective identification of heat and temperature anomalies for a host of industries and operations. Focused Aerial Imagery can provide any level of aerial (or ground level) thermographic analysis your installation or operation might require, from inspection for home owners, to detailed measurements paired with post-measurement analysis and custom reporting. Using FLIR Systems best practices for observation, recording and analysis ensures accuracy and high data fidelity for all of your thermographic inspections.Today’s aerial drone technology with precision telemetry, when paired with state-of-the-art mapping software, can provide planners and project or operational managers with valuable orthographic, distancing, and volumetric measurements. Focused Aerial Imagery can produce 3D models of structures and detailed topographic imaging of terrain for better understanding of challenges such as adverse drainage, or for long-term infrastructure planning or water resource management. Aerial photography of your agricultural operations can give you insight into crop condition and health in the most cost-effective way possible. Please call to discuss your project.

Name: Bart Ros Fotografie
Description:
Hallo, ik ben Bart Ros, een gepassioneerde fotograaf gespecialiseerd in architectuur, interieur, stads- en evenementenfotografie in de regio Deventer en Overijssel. Mijn werk benadrukt de schoonheid en het verhalende aspect van onze omgeving. Bezoek mijn profiel, ontdek mijn portfolio, en laten we samen verkennen hoe mijn visuele expertise jouw project kan versterken. Neem contact op en start onze creatieve samenwerking vandaag nog! [Bezoek mijn website voor meer informatie.](https://www.bartros.nl)

Wat kan je verwachten van mij? 

Hier zijn de introducties in de ik-vorm, beknopt herschreven:

1. **Stadsfotografie**: Als fotograaf in Deventer leg ik de dynamiek en charme van stedelijke landschappen vast, perfect voor zowel alledaagse als unieke momenten, en ideaal voor marketingdoeleinden.

2. **Architectuurfotografie**: Ik leg de esthetiek en structuur van architectuur vast, waarbij ik speel met licht en compositie om mijn werk zowel artistiek als functioneel te maken voor architectenbureaus en bouwbedrijven.

3. **Evenementfotografie**: Ik focus op het vastleggen van levendige en emotionele momenten bij evenementen, wat cruciaal is voor zowel documentatie als promotie.

4. **Interieurfotografie**: Met een scherp oog voor detail en sfeer breng ik interieurs tot leven, waarbij ik de essentie van zowel commerciële als residentiële ruimtes vastleg voor marketing en presentatie.

5. **Productfotografie**: Ik combineer mijn technische vaardigheden en creatieve visie om producten op een aantrekkelijke en informatieve manier te presenteren, ideaal voor commerciële catalogi en online marketing.

Name: L'Oeil d'Anouk - Photographie
Description:
Je m'applique à raconter cette histoire à la manière d'un reportage, la discrétion est ma clé, la lumière naturelle est mon alliée.

Avant tout une passion, une histoire de famille, une manière d’envisager ce qui m’entoure. Un premier appareil à 6 ans et j’apprends à ouvrir l’œil. Observer, prendre le temps, contourner. Les années passent, certaines sont photographiques, d’autres moins. S’en éloigner, y revenir. Je cherche ce qui attire l’œil. Une lumière, un angle, un sourire, un contre-jour. Cligner de l’œil, viser, parfois déclencher.

Name: VGN Concept
Description: VGN Concept est une société spécialisée dans la numérisation-modélisation 3D (SCAN TO BIM) par scanner LiDAR et par drone, l'agriculture de précision par drone et également dans les prises de vues aérienne par drone.

Name: Master Photographers Network

Name: Banyan Headshots + Portraits
Description:
Your online presence is more important than you might think. It should show trust, professionalism and approachability. It should help you stand out from the crowd, start conversations, gain more connections, receive more enquiries and do more business.

It doesn't matter if you'll be having your photo taken for the first time, or if you're starting a new venture; let's work together to capture the best version of you.

At Banyan Headshots, we provide focused coaching and directing to help our clients relax in front of the camera. You'll walk away with photos of yourself you'll be proud of. Photos you'll want to share. Photos that will help you shine and get you noticed.

Call Karl for a FREE Personal or Corporate Branding consultation on 843-900-0289.

Name: D'Angelo Connell Photography
Description:
We're intentional about every partnership I take on.

Not everyone gets access — only the people who value excellence, professionalism, and visuals that work.

We were recently named one of Memphis’ Top 3 Commercial Photographers by ThreeBestRated. 

That didn’t happen by accident. 

It came from delivering strategic visuals that build trust, signal authority, and communicate with clarity.

If there’s alignment, We're open to being a creative partner — for you or anyone in your network who’s ready to elevate how they show up visually.

If not, no pressure. We only move where there’s real value on both sides.

Name: Life N Light
Description: We partner with brands and people.

Name: Alan Green Business Portraits Photography
Description:
Getting the right message across about yourself on social media is very important. It’s the first chance people take to make a judgement about you!

The thing is, we should be keen to show our face and not simply hide behind a business logo or name. By being present on our profile, we give others an immediate opportunity to identify with us and that’s a very positive thing. It demonstrates a willingness to “be seen”.

First impressions are rightly important to us when we meet someone face-to-face and in the same way, it’s best to make a good impression with our social media, website and the like.

It’s fair to say that we don’t all like to have our photograph taken. (Photographers are often the worst because they’re used to being on the other side of a camera!). But that’s only natural. It’s also part of the enjoyment of proving how easily we can work together to produce photographs you’ll want to use.

For a FREE, no-obligation consultation about what I can do to make you feel relaxed and happy about having updated photographs taken, message me on LinkedIn, or call or email me, as follows:
