Name: Catherine Couturier Gallery
Description:
Formerly John Cleary Gallery, our doors were opened in 1996, in our current location on Gallery Row.  The gallery quickly evolved into the premier photography gallery in Houston.  John sadly passed away in 2008 after a one-month battle with pancreatic cancer but not before insuring the gallery’s future by passing the torch to me. I worked for John for eight years before his death as the gallery manager and director, and I take the responsibility of carrying on the John Cleary Gallery tradition with all the gravitas it is due.

Under my ownership, the gallery has evolved to embrace both that which John and I both loved (mid-century French street photography and portraits of children, to name two) and more contemporary art that was always my area of expertise. The range of work represented is broader, and my eye is apparent on every wall and in every bin. It is now very much Catherine Couturier Gallery, and I am proud to put my name on this group of artists and these works of art.

I love selling art, but that isn’t the reason I own a gallery.  My philosophy on dealing art has always been that it is not my job to sell anything to anyone. I am here to present amazing work, offer comprehensive information and facilitate one finding a photograph that will enhance his or her life. I love meeting first-time collectors who are really excited about a purchase, and I find a lot of joy in tracking down a rare or sold-out piece for a collector with a special request.

The Catherine Couturier Gallery is a member of AIPAD (Association of Photography Art Dealers), and I am honored to be part of such an excellent organization. We participate in AIPAD’s “The Photography Show” each spring and various other art fairs throughout the year. I also review portfolios for organizations and festivals such as Fotofest, give lectures to artists and collectors alike, and am proud to serve on both the Advisory Council of Houston Center for Photography and its annual auction committee.

The course was diverse and assignments included having to make our own music videos… before Danny knew it he was more in love with the creation of images than I was the music itself.

A winter season in the French Alpes later and Danny came back to Jersey with the experience of having photographed stunning mountain landscapes, incredible snowboard and ski action – and a few crazy aprés ski parties!

Since that time Danny has photographed a wide variety of subject matter, in a wide variety of conditions!

Connecting with the subject – whoever or whatever it is – is of the upmost importance to us and we ensure that all our brides & bridegrooms, families and business owners are at ease and comfortable in their surroundings and in the approach wehave planned before I start capturing their stories.

Because that’s what photography is to us.....a story.

It’s the emotion of a father as he sees his daughter in her wedding dress for the first time.

It’s the natural smiles and laughter of family fun down the beach.

It’s the carefully crafted image that conveys your message to your customers.

ÁYLO stands for all those little fragments of life that can take a minute to grasp, but when you do, it takes a whole lot more to forget. From conversations, ideas, music to culinary experiences and nature. 

We are fueled by a purposeful sense of merit in life itself. An instinct to fuse the authenticity of a story with the power of a camera’s click. 

Through photographing people with everyday stories we are incessantly realizing that an experience should be whole and consistent. That beauty and aesthetics are in all. Our mission is to discover them and blend them all together. 

We love capturing people who aren’t professionals in front of a camera. Talking to them, getting to know their ways and capturing them in a fashion we couldn’t have predicted. 

At heart, one thing always catches our attention, regardless of time and place. Anything that raises our emotions. Anything powerful enough to shift the energy in the room, one creative touch at a time. 

Everything in life is unique and full of surprises. Our goal is to incorporate this uniqueness to our art.

Name: De Rooij Fotografie
Description:

De cursussen worden niet alleen op locatie gegeven, De Rooij Fotografie is namelijk de grootste aanbieder van online trainingen over fotografie en fotobewerking in Nederland. Met online trainingen kun je leren over fotografie en fotobewerking vanuit huis wanneer het jou uitkomt.

Cursussen en workshops op locatie zijn onder andere te volgen in Rotterdam, Den Haag, Berkel en Rodenrijs, Amsterdam, Amersfoort, Arnhem, Groningen, Utrecht, Emmen en Den Bosch. Niet alle cursussen worden door Mark de Rooij gegeven. Om zoveel mogelijk fotografie liefhebbers in Nederland en België te kunnen bedienen worden er samenwerkingen gesloten met andere ervaren fotografen en fotografie trainers. In de komende jaren zal het aantal locatie en fotografie trainers verder toenemen.

Privéles over fotografie of fotobewerking behoort ook tot de mogelijkheden. Daarnaast geeft Mark de Rooij ook lezingen/workshops op evenementen en voor fotoclubs.

Voor eventuele vragen over de cursussen of offerte aanvragen voor lezingen/workshops is het mogelijk om contact op te nemen via info@derooijfotografie.nl

Ook zijn de foto's van Mark de Rooij af te nemen als print, wanddecoratie of digitaal bestand. Veel foto's van Rotterdam worden door tientallen nationale en internationale bedrijven gebruikt op hun website, brochures en flyers. Bekijk de foto's op https://www.derooijfotografie.nl/fotos-rotterdam-licenties/

Jag är fotograf i Skellefteå. En sorts berättare i en berättarstad. Vacker på sommaren och kall på vintern. Vitberget och Möjligheternas torg. Vi är kanske inte så många som bor här men vi är duktiga på det vi gör. På musik, hockey och inom de kreativa näringarna och industrin.

Eftersom vi inte är så många har vi gott om tid att lära känna varandra. Lyssna på varandras berättelser. Att bo här ger mig en känsla för hur människor är. Innerst inne, på något sätt. Det är det, det personliga, jag vill lyfta fram när jag fotograferar. Varje människas berättelse. Varje företags unika uttryck.

När jag fotar gör jag det inte bara i studio utan på plats. Där människor arbetar, producerar, planerar, samarbetar. Där de kan vara sig själva. Då kan jag ta foton som berättar något äkta

Name: Perth Centre for Photography
Description:
The Perth Centre for Photography (PCP) is WA’s only dedicated photographic arts organisation, promoting and supporting emerging and established photo-based art. 

Our goal is to increase the advancement of contemporary photographic practices, to incubate wider audience engagement, placing great Australian art on the world stage. 

With assistance from our ongoing partners and sponsors we;

- Deliver a diverse annual program of gallery and off-site exhibitions of the highest quality for local and visiting audiences  

- Create and deliver educational programs for all

- Provide internships and opportunities for employment

- Create studio residency and professional mentoring opportunities

- Facilitate information exchange and networking opportunities

- Deliver artist studio residency exchange opportunities

- Facilitate exhibitions opportunities interstate and internationally for WA artists

- Provide a platform for emerging and established local, national and international artists in Perth building awareness of photo-media art for the residents and visitors of Western Australia

We also offer countless opportunities for social inclusion, community pride, tolerance, participation, discovery, learning and overall increase in quality and enjoyment of WA life. Our program provides such opportunities by offering links between people through an accessible free to low-cost range of art and culture events and opportunities aimed at supporting or/and fostering; inclusivity, cultural awareness, reconciliation and tolerance, a sharing culture and celebration and diversity of WA culture. 

We are a not for profit charitable organisation with tax-deductible status. We are always looking for partners to join us on our mission. Please contact us for more information about our program and how you can be involved. 

PCP's ongoing annual program is supported by the Western Australian Department of Culture and Art (DLGSC).

Name: Brian Austwick Photography
Description:
Welcome to the World of Visual Storytelling

Hello there! I'm Brian Austwick, a passionate commercial photographer and videographer nestled in the heartbeat of Carlisle, Cumbria.

In today’s dynamic digital landscape, imagery speaks louder than words. I firmly believe in the power of a single frame to narrate a tale, represent a brand, and create an indelible impact. With every shot, my goal is to embody your brand's essence, ensuring that your unique story resonates with its audience.

Why Invest in Commercial Photography?

Most businesses understand the importance of a robust digital presence, but few recognize the difference that professional photography can make. Engaging, high-quality images not only offer a glimpse into your business ethos but also serve as a bridge, connecting you with your customers. They provide them with a deeper understanding of who you are, what you stand for, and how you operate.

When you partner with me, you’re not merely investing in photography; you're investing in your brand's future. I ensure that each frame reflects your brand values and offers an authentic depiction of your organization and its dedicated team.

Services Offered:

Aerial Photography
Aerial Videography
Promotional Videos
Video Production
Drone Video and Photography Package

Alongside my commercial photography business, I also own and run Photographic Creations, a one-stop shop for UK landscape photography and prints. If you are looking to book a photography workshop with me, you will be directed to the Photographic Creations website to complete the booking.

Nous réalisons des missions d'inspection, de thermographie, de relevé de l'existant, de suivi de chantier et de promotion destinés aux entreprises de nombreux secteurs : Bâtiment, Industrie, Immobilier, Énergie, etc. ainsi qu'aux collectivités.

Nous intervenons en France et à l’étranger.
Nous assurons toute la chaîne de prestation : de l’élaboration du projet, la qualification des missions, leurs planifications, l’obtention des autorisations légales (préfectorales, aériennes, propriétaires, droit à l’image, …), l’intervention sur site, la post-production, le traitement des données jusqu’à la livraison du produit.

Name: Jan van Woerden Photography & Orange Africa Travel
Description:
Jan van Woerden Photography
Jan van Woerden is een professionele fotograaf met een brede visie en expertise op verschillende terreinen. Zijn grote liefde ligt echter op het gebied van het fotograferen van "wildlife in Africa". Met veel passie en kennis van zaken heeft hij door de tijd heen een groot scala aan reis- en dierenfoto's gemaakt. Zuid-Afrika, Botswana en Namibië zijn de landen waar Jan van Woerden de meeste beelden "schiet", maar ook Australië, Azië, Amerika en Europa behoren tot de gebieden waar hij fotografeert. Niet voor niets is zijn slogan "Photographing the wild world". 
Bekijk zijn mooiste foto's op www.janvanwoerden.com en maak gebruik van de mogelijkheid om uw favoriete foto te bestellen.

Orange Africa Travel 
Wilt u op reis door het zuiden van Afrika?  Samen met Orange Africa Travel brengt u die droom in vervulling!
Neem het maar aan van de fotograaf en ervaringsdeskundige: voor een nóg mooiere ervaring van het continent kunt u het beste zelf naar Afrika reizen. Daar helpt Orange Africa Travel graag bij, met uw wens als uitgangspunt.
Jan van Woerden, de man achter Orange Africa Travel, neemt u - eventueel met uw partner, gezin, vrienden - mee naar de plekken die hij al ruim vijftien jaar bezoekt en fotografeert. U kunt bij Jan in de Landrover stappen om rond te rijden. ’s Avonds kunt u kamperen op het dak van de auto. Is kamperen niet uw ding? Dan regelt Orange Africa Travel andere accommodaties. 
Als u interesse heeft in fotografie kan Jan, als professioneel fotograaf en Afrikadeskundige, zeker tips geven. 
Zelf door Afrika rijden met een op maat gesneden route is ook mogelijk.
Orange Africa Travel kent de weg en heeft de contacten. Samen met Jan kunt u een route en rijschema opstellen waarmee u zelfstandig een rondreis door het zuiden van Afrika kunt maken.
Kijk voor meer informatie op de www.orange-africa-travel.com

Description:
WHO AM I?
I’m Adam Toth, Business Portrait Specialist Photographer. I help the commercial and business community of East and Central London create that perfect first impression with beautiful headshot photos that capture your character and professionalism.
I am driven by my passion for the beauty of human faces. This is why I deliver photos of the highest quality.
I love the work that I do, that’s why I always have a positive attitude. I approach and fulfil each project with great enthusiasm and go beyond my client’s expectations.

WHAT DO I DO?
There is something attractive about everyone. And this attractiveness that I bring out with all my clients. It’s visible when we feel confident about who we are and what we do. These are the people we want to be around and be inspired by their presence. This is what I capture with my photography.

Trust and professionalism are major factors in any entrepreneur’s and company’s online presence. I help you to raise your public profile with attention-grabbing headshots – that get you noticed.

WHAT CAN I DO FOR YOU?
You’ve got the website. Your social media is up and running. But bookings and new clients just aren’t flooding in, right?

My question to you: Do your website and social media platforms show who you really are? Here’s my solution. Image is everything online.
You need photos of the highest quality. Photos help you build trust and win over new clients – because looks aren’t just about looks. The way we present ourselves shows people that we care.

THE NEXT STEP?
If you are serious about making the best first impression online to your prospective clients, then drop me a message or call me today for a free consultation and quote.

Name: Wilcovak A1 & Wilcovak bv
Description:
Wilcovak BV in Hoogeveen was founded in March 1979 as a trading company.
Wilcovak A1, located in Amersfoort started in March 2025, as a Randstad satellite. 

What makes Wilcovak unique…

Regarding fine art printing and finishing as well as art deliveries you find all under one roof. 

In 1980, Wilcovak obtained the exclusive licence of the Diasec process for the Netherlands.

The company is run by Sandra and Erik Stoffers; 8 employees complete the professionalism.

Over the years, various products have been added to the range alongside Diasec. 

Meanwhile, Wilcovak has become a standard in the art market when it comes to printing, finishing and framing.

Digital printing was a logical step for Wilcovak. Many photographers are happy to know that both analogue knowledge and digital printing knowledge are among Wilcovak's skills.

Wilcovak through it’s partner VDP is a dealer of Epson and Eizo and is the Dutch importer of Canson Infinity fine art papers. Various other high-quality products are available within the range are marketed under the trade name VDP Digital Imaging.
https://www.vdp-digital-imaging.nl

Meanwhile, handmade frames were also added. Since then, Wilcovak has been known for high-quality frames that are undoubtedly among the absolute best.

Services:

Archive-quality printing
Diasec (plexiglass mounting) 
Handmade frames from raw wood
Framing on dibond and aluminium 
ChromaLuxe dye sublimation on aluminium

Specialties:

Face mounting of images using the Diasec process in plexiglass, creating museum-quality works of art.
The Diasec process is the first face mounting system since 1969. The quality has been outstanding ever since, due to the network of cooperating companies worldwide.
http://www.diasec.com

Wilcovak bv is a sister company of Diasec-Support bv, which became the official training centre for the Diasec licensor in Switzerland. For Information about a Diasec licence for your company, please visit here.
http://www.diasec-support.com

Name: European Photography Awards
Description:
The European Photography Awards welcome photographers from worldwide nations ready to hone their photography skills and their extraordinary takes on diversity, whilst portraying the majestic cultures passed down for generations.

It has seen over 3,500 of entries from around the world every year where the awards are judged by an esteemed International Jury, bringing together some of the most talented and respected experts in the industry.

Winners of the European Photography Awards receive personalised certificates (both physical and digital), exclusive marketing materials, and free global advertising, including on Muse.World, European Photography Awards’s media partner platform.

With accessible entry fees, European Photography Awards provides a unique platform for winners to gain recognition, publicity, and industry exposure. Recipients have the option to acquire beautifully crafted trophies, allowing them to showcase their achievements in an elegant and lasting way.

Name: Silver Eye Center for Photography
Description:
For thirty years,  Pittsburgh's Silver Eye Center for Photography has been at the forefront of celebrating photography as an expressive art form and its ever-changing and influential role in shaping contemporary culture and life.

A nationally-recognized, non-collecting institution, Silver Eye is the only nonprofit organization in the region with this unique scope and focus on contemporary photography and related photo multimedia.  

We accomplish our mission by organizing approximately 3-5 free exhibitions per year, which take place onsite, online and, at times, in the community.  They present the most important trends and ideas defining the current state of photography, and feature work by iconic figures, younger but already well established artists from the region and well beyond, and photographers just beginning to build their reputations.

Silver Eye also offers a wide range of programs for people involved in image-making and collecting, for schools and university groups, youth, adults, and families, and anyone with an interest in and curiosity about art and culture.

Name: Björn Vilcens - Businessfotografie & Film
Description:
Businessfotografie und Film für kleine und mittelständische Unternehmen
Mein Name ist Björn Vilcens und ich unterstütze Sie als Experte für visuelle Kommunikation dabei, Ihre unternehmerischen Ziele zu erreichen.  Durch ansprechende Kommunikation mit modernen Bildern und Filmmaterial...

- gewinnen Sie Neukunden,
- erhöhen Sie die Bindung zu Bestandskunden,
- stellen Sie sich als attraktiver Arbeitgeber für Ihre aktuellen und potentiellen Mitarbeiter dar (Employer Branding)

Wo kann ich Ihnen helfen?
Mein Schwerpunkt in der Businessfotografie ist das Portraitieren von Personen, die Dokumentation von Arbeitsabläufen und die Präsentation von Innenräumen. Visuelle Konzepte erstelle ich für kommerzielle Anwendungen, private und Corporate Headshots sowie für Sedcards von Schauspielern, Models und Personen des öffentlichen Lebens. Die persönliche Verbindung zum Menschen vor der Kamera und die Begeisterung für ihre Arbeit ist meine Stärke.

—

Fotografie ist für mich …
Für mich ist Fotografie in erster Linie eine Arbeit mit Menschen. Sie in ein gutes Licht zu rücken und natürlich und entspannt festzuhalten, ist mir wichtig. Mit Kreativität und Herzblut löse ich die Probleme meiner Kunden und setze mich mit den technischen Anforderungen auseinander. Ob Drohnenflüge, eine Reportage in Ihrer Werkhalle oder Mitarbeiterportraits in Ihren Räumlichkeiten: keine Umsetzung ist gleich, und jedes Shooting ist eine neue Herausforderung.

—

Für gute Fotos braucht es …
Begeisterung und Leidenschaft für die Sache – und die passende Technik, um alle Vorstellungen zu realisieren. Ich finde: ein Fotoshooting soll Spaß machen, hinter und vor der Kamera. So entstehen in produktiver gleichzeitig entspannter Zusammenarbeit Bilder, die genau das zeigen.

Name: Lindy Powers Photography
Description:
Lindy Powers began her association with the photographic image as a model in the U.S. and Europe in the 1970s. In high demand for ten years, she worked with major photographers, fashion designers, and directors, including a year of making television commercials with Federico Fellini.

It didn’t take long, however, for Lindy to become fascinated with the view from the other side of the lens. In the early 1980s, Lindy shifted to a career as a commercial photographer.

Lindy Powers works with a variety of clientele. Her client list includes the New York Times, GlaxoSmithKline, Women’s Wear Daily, Wedgewood Pharmacy, Aramark, Astra Zeneca, and W.L. Gore.

Lindy’s photographs in the hardcover coffee table book, The Cleveland Indians: A Family Album, authored by Bill Levy and Steve Saferin, capture the behind-the-scenes personal relationships of the players, coaches, and families of the Cleveland Indians Baseball Organization. The book has been hailed for its intimate portraits and has become a baseball collectible.

Lindy now specializes in Corporate and Executive Headshots. Her process isn't just taking pictures and then editing in photoshop. Lindy and her team will curate your image using a mixture of makeup, wardrobe styling, & posing techniques.

Name: Middle East Images
Description:
Middle East Images is a photo agency that presents Middle Eastern photography by accomplished local artists who seek to share their deep understandings of home through visual storytelling. Their technical expertise and cultural fluency guide an intimate mosaic of a geographic region that has been plagued for decades by war, terror, injustice, and violence. Mainstream images of the Middle Eastern region draw heavily from this suffering and violence and are broadcast around the world on a daily basis. Our team of experienced photographers is committed to portraying these subjects from a culturally responsible point of view, incorporating aspects of the Middle Eastern experience that reach beyond what mass media typically allows.

Middle East Images brings together photographers, spanning first-hand experiences in Iran, Saudi Arabia, Yemen, Egypt, Lebanon, Syria, Turkey, and Iraq, among others. Our goal is to uplift a visual narrative of the Middle East from within, where local photographers with a global vision can continue to document their homeland on a long-term basis, sharing their lens with the rest of the world.

Name: Icon International
Description:
Icon International is one of the last remaining, genuinely independent photo syndication agencies. While the agency is distinguished for its celebrity portraiture holdings—here "celebrity" refers to notable figures from all walks of life, including the arts, letters, entertainment, politics, sports, and business—Icon also has a deep archive of fashion, lifestyle, beauty, and travel photography. Neither a boutique nor stock agency, Icon has the resources, reach, and expertise of the largest corporate agencies while offering the service, creativity, and care that one would expect from a much smaller agency. Icon's legal services, available to all of its photographers, are unparalleled in the industry, as is the agency's tireless advocacy on behalf of photographer rights, including copyright and intellectual property issues.

Icon was founded by Kimberly Ayl in 1997. The agency’s roster of eminent photographers continues to grow, from precisely two shooters in 1997 to more than 50 today, including Rankin, Cliff Watts, Wayne Maser, and Jonas Karlsson.

In addition to editorial print publications, Icon also works closely with movie studios, film distribution companies, and record labels to support their promotional, publicity, and merchandising efforts. Non-print, digital and electronic platforms, such as branded websites and PDAs, are emerging as still another important market for photo syndication.

The near future will see the agency pursuing print sales, art exhibitions, and the syndication of film and video content.

For more information and access to Icon’s image holdings, visit www.iconphoto.com.

Name: Escritório-galeria Eduardo Macarios
Description:
Para fazer um recorte do mundo é preciso ter outros tantos recortes dentro de si. A fotografia é tudo
o que a precede: as andanças do fotógrafo, as gavetas abertas, as esquinas dobradas.

O retrato de interiores pede uma percepção atenta da realidade lá fora. Para fotografar a
arquitetura é preciso mergulhar na urbanidade, na dança cotidiana, na cidade.

Antes de tornar o instante estático, é necessário ler o movimento de tudo: da luz, do ser, do caos.

Antes de criar o alinhamento preciso e a composição simétrica, é essencial reconhecer a beleza do
que foge da linha e subverte a ordem.

Então, com rigor, visão e método, finalmente apertar o botão e contar uma história.

Name: Fotógrafo Lisboa
Description:
Headshots LinkedIn & Retratos Profissionais em Lisboa

 O que a sua foto de perfil está a dizer sobre si?

Se a sua fotografia LinkedIn não transmite confiança, profissionalismo e credibilidade, pode estar a perder oportunidades sem sequer saber. No mundo digital, a primeira impressão acontece antes de trocar uma palavra – e no LinkedIn, a sua imagem define como os outros o percecionam.

O Fotógrafo Lisboa é um estúdio dedicado à criação de headshots profissionais, um espaço concebido para capturar retratos de alto impacto e performance, que o ajudarão a destacar-se.

Se acha que “não é fotogénico(a)” ou “não sabe posar”, não se preocupe. A nossa abordagem inclui orientação especializada, ajudando-o(a) a encontrar a postura e expressão certas para um resultado natural e confiante.

 Como funciona?

 Sessão guiada – Não precisa de saber posar. Damos, indicações para que se sinta relaxado(a) e obtenha a melhor imagem.
 Iluminação e edição profissional – Fotografias equilibradas, com tons naturais e um fundo adequado ao LinkedIn.
 Estúdio em Lisboa – Ambiente profissional otimizado para headshots corporativos.
 Rapidez e eficiência – Sessões de curta duração, sem complicações e entrega rápida das imagens editadas.

 Para quem?

- Executivos, empreendedores e freelancers que querem um perfil LinkedIn forte.
- Profissionais em transição de carreira que precisam de uma imagem que reflita a sua nova fase.
- Empresas que desejam fotografias LinkedIn de qualidade e uniformes para toda a equipa.

Se a sua fotografia LinkedIn já tem mais de dois anos, está desatualizada ou foi reaproveitada, está na altura de investir numa imagem que realmente o(a) valorize.

Uma boa fotografia LinkedIn pode abrir portas. Está pronto(a) para dar este passo?

Das 420qm große Tageslicht-Loft erstreckt sich über drei Ebenen.
Die Hauptfläche hat 250 Quadratmeter und sieben Meter hohe Decken mit südlich ausgerichteten Fenstern.

Designer Requisiten stehen kostenlos für Foto, Film und Events zur Verfügung. Die sieben Meter hohen Industriefenster lassen sich mühelos im gesamten Studio verschieben.

Drei unterschiedliche Wandoberflächen bieten Abwechslung für spannende Motive: Eiche, Beton und schlichtes Weiß.
Von der Galerie aus hat man eine wunderschöne Vogelperspektive auf den Hauptbereich des Ateliers, die zusätzliche Perspektiven bietet.

Die ebenerdige Anlieferung, eine Barista Siebträgermaschiene, 5 exklusive Parkplätze und eine Rundum-Betreuung sind weitere Vorteile der Location.

Nachhaltigkeit ist tief in der Unternehmensphilosophie verankert. Nahezu alle im Studio verwendeten Produkte und Dienstleistungen (von Ökostrom bis zum recyceltem Toilettenpapier) stammen aus Kooperationen mit lokalen Geschäften und Unternehmen, die sich ebenfalls der Nachhaltigkeit verschrieben haben. Ein fairer Teil der Studioeinnahmen wird direkt in ihre Projekte investiert.

kju.studio steht für Foto- und Filmproduktionen und Events zur Verfügung.

Name: beatrizdubal.com
Description:
Beatriz Durán Balda. 
Professional photographer specialized in documental, photojournalism and portrait. I am currently based in Madrid, but I offer my photographic services worldwide. I develop multi-format projects, I know the mobile environment and I am familiar with real-time delivery requirements.

I have a Master in Photography and Postproduction, with the Specialization in Photojournalism. I Previously studied Engineering in Industrial Design and Product Development between Zaragoza and Jönköping (Sweden), and later I was certified as Project Manager Professional (PMP). This basis gives me a broader vision when developing and documenting projects.

I lived in Sweden for two years and I have been working with international clients for more than six years, so I can communicate seamlessly in English. I also have knowledge of French and Swedish.

My documentary projects focus mainly on these pillars: diversity, identity, society, inequalities, ties and change. There are many unknown stories that the world should know and I use my camera to amplify their voices (I don’t like the idea of “giving people a voice”, because everyone has theirs… we simply amplify it with our means so that they can reach more people).

Name: Francisco Nogueira · Architectural Photography
Description:
FRANCISCO NOGUEIRA (b. 1985) is an Architectural Photographer based in Lisbon.
Always interested in arts and images, he graduated in Architecture (FA-UTL, Lisbon) in 2008, and started that same year working as a photographer. In 2010 he was awarded the scholarship INOV Contacto to work in Ventura Valcarce Architects in Barcelona.

Back to Lisbon later that year he started his own photography studio working with clients and magazines in Portugal and abroad. His work focuses mainly on architecture, but also on advertising, portrait, product and travel photography. His editorial clients include DOMUS Magazine and The New York Times.

In 2013 he published the book As Roças de São Tomé e Príncipe, written by architects Duarte Pape and Rodrigo Rebelo de Andrade, published by Tinta-da-China.

His work is represented in private collections such as the PLMJ Foundation and has participated in several group exhibitions. He is now preparing his first solo exhibition.

www.francisconogueira.com

Your business needs you to be visible ...

Many people associate getting in front of a camera as unpleasant, bringing on a level of stress and something to get out of the way quickly, resulting in an experience you didn't enjoy and images you don't particularly like.

There is a series of help sessions that will bring you a greater understanding of why you feel that way, an altogether better experience, guide you through a change in mindset, and give you the tools to make this a permanent improvement in your life on how you see yourself in images and on video.

Yes it includes getting in front of a video camera too ... focusing on body language, presentation technique ... and importantly, being yourself.

Benefits to your business:

* No more nerves - and greater confidence to be yourself.

* More frequent photoshoots and video creation for marketing.

* Greater creativity, variation and quantity of marketing images.

* Improved transparency, showing the expert you truly are in your field.

* Better engagement from your marketing material and with your clients.

Name: FotoFest
Description:
MISSION STATEMENT
FotoFest's mission is to bring together a global vision of art and cross-cultural exchange with a commitment to social issues, community involvement, and the enrichment of cultural resources.

ABOUT US
FotoFest is a Houston-based contemporary arts organization co-founded by photojournalists Frederick Baldwin and Wendy Watriss. FotoFest is dedicated to advancing photography and visual culture through the presentation of exhibitions, public programs, and publications. The examination of social, cultural, and political histories and contemporary life through the lens of photography and related media is central to FotoFest’s mission.

In addition to the organization’s year-round programming, FotoFest organizes a city-wide biennial project in the form of large-scale central exhibitions, curated lectures, performances, a symposium, and film programs. The organization also hosts several professional development programs, including annually held Meeting Place Portfolio Reviews, which host hundreds of artists and professionals working in the field of art and photography. Through its Literacy Through Photography program, FotoFest organizes K–12 classroom-based learning projects designed to encourage creativity and strengthen student writing, comprehension, and expression, reaching thousands of students. A platform for art and ideas since 1983, FotoFest is committed to promoting lasting international dialogue, cultural exchange, scholarship, and community enrichment by working with artists, audiences, academics, curators and influential figures in art, culture, and society.

Name: From the Back of a Motorbike - the new (old) Rugby Union Photo Archive
Description:
For more than twenty-five years Pete Jenkins photographed first class Rugby Union in England and Wales. For much of that time he was the lead Rugby Union photographer for the Sunday Telegraph Picture Desk, part of the highly regarded sports photography team that Nigel Skelsey and Malcolm Lang had carefully brought together.
After The Sunday Telegraph he owned and ran, with business partner Tim Hewson the Spedegrafix (UK) Sports Photo Agency based in Kings Langley and later Park Royal.
Pete ceased photographing sport  in 2003, however the archive is still here, hidden away in his office, and now no more.  
More than 700 Rugby individual matches, and 50, 000+ frames to examine, edit and scan, it will be a long job, however it will be one of the most extensive privately owned and run Rugby Union archives of its kind.

Why ‘From the Back of a Motorbike’?
From 1978 - 2003 Pete's main mode of transport was a a series of Motorbikes, mostly 750 four stroke four cylinder machines and in the final seven years an 850cc MotoGuzzi  California II

If perhaps you were a player of rugby during the 1980s and 1990s, and want to know if there are photographs of you, then please get in touch and we will be pleased to look through the collection on your behalf.  Phone the 'From the Back of a Motorbike' office on +44 115 960 0738  +44 7762 202268 or e-mail on info@FromtheBackofaMotorbike.co.uk, or simply go directly to the 'From the Back of a Motorbike; website www.fromthebackofamotorbike.co.uk

Name: Ola Garpendal Photography
Description:
Stunning photographs showing the beauty of the Australian landscape to be displayed on the wall of your home or office. 

About me

Photography has been part of my life since my teenage years. My uncle had a Pentax Spotmatic and took amazing black and white photos. As a marine biologist, he spent a lot of time in the great outdoors and plenty of his photos were landscape photos. I had found the beginning to a hobby and a lifelong passion. My parents bought me a second-hand Nikomat FT2 for my 16th birthday as a first step on the journey. The rest is, as they say, history. I still have that camera and it still works.

My first encounter with professional photography was as an assistant to Tomas Ringqvist & Vänner, one of the most respected commercial advertising studios in Stockholm at the time. Apart from the privilege of working with a seasoned, professional photographer, I had the opportunity to operate the latest Nikon, Mamiya, Hasselblad and Sinar cameras. I learned about lighting, models, processing, studio sets (how to build them and tear them down), film loading, and last but not least how to carry a lot of stuff.

While the studio experience laid the knowledge foundation, I soon realised that my passion was landscape photography. I have always been an outdoors person so the leap to landscape photography wasn’t a big one.

My work is a mixture of carefully planned and spontaneous photography. Considering the amount of camping and exploring I do with my 4WD, there is no shortage of opportunities to come across fantastic views that lend themselves to great photographs. There is always a camera nearby which means that anything I see can be turned into a piece of art.

I hope you love my photographs as much as I do.

We have an expert eye for content and detail composition, we are committed to capturing the essence of each moment we shoot. Whether it's an adventurous journey or a serene landscape, trust Pate Creatives to capture your business with breathtaking imagery.

𝐀𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐏𝐚𝐭𝐞:
Born and raised in Savusavu, with paternal links to Ono-i-Lau, Pate started his career in hospitality management and mixology. He then found his true calling – videography and content production - while travelling Fiji as Brand Ambassador for Fiji Rum Co.

Pate gained international exposure through his work as Content Producer for Tourism Fiji, where he was responsible for their digital photography and videography content. Pate is now freelances through his growing his business, Pate Creatives, where he can partner closely with businesses and individuals throughout Fiji to capture their unique stories and showcase them to the world.

Pate has honed his craft capturing the beauty and diversity of the islands and its people. His passion for storytelling through visuals has allowed him to showcase the unique culture, traditions, and landscapes of Fiji, captivating audiences both locally and globally. He has an unwavering commitment to capturing the essence of each moment he shoots. Whether capturing the perfect shot on the set of a film production or capturing the candid moments of daily life through his lens, he brings a creative and innovative approach to his work. 

With his talent and dedication, he has established himself as a talented filmmaker and photographer in the vibrant and growing creative community of Fiji.

Name: Angkor Photo Festival & Workshops
Description:
The Angkor Photo Festival & Workshops (APFW) was launched in 2005 as a non-profit organisation with a key purpose: to offer photographers in Asia affordable and accessible opportunities for professional development and growth. We have remained committed to this mission over the years, while adapting to the evolving needs of our community and the changing landscape of photography. 

Based in Siem Reap, Cambodia, the APFW is Southeast Asia’s oldest established international photography event. Our regular annual programme consists of the Angkor Photo Workshops for Asian photographers and the Angkor Photo Festival, which features exhibitions, projection screenings, talks and an array of other activities to engage visitors and the general public. Our programmes are firmly non-commercial and egalitarian.

At APFW, we have never just been about photography – what is important is how it can help us engage with the real world in a useful, meaningful manner. We embrace explorations and experimentation, potentially opening up new approaches to the medium. Across our activities, we assume an autonomous framework to teaching and discussing photography to encourage the development of each individual’s unique artistic voice and vision.

Over the years, we have been privileged to become a vital gathering space for practitioners from across Asia, creating a close-knit community of festival attendees and workshop alumni from various cultures, backgrounds and practices. To further enhance collaboration and open exchange amongst this diverse gathering of photographers, we design our events to be informal and non-hierarchical. 

The sense of solidarity that emerges from being part of a wider community with shared beliefs and interests is an invaluable asset for photographers in the region. Through this connection, they can access peer support and advice, an outlet to share their struggles, and a resource for collaboration and mutual inspiration.

Description:
LA ESCUELA
Fotoarte tiene como objetivo no sólo la transmisión de los conocimientos relativos a la fotografía, sino que también busca motivar e inspirar a los alumnos, a fin de despertar un interés que les permita seguir avanzando por el camino del aprendizaje.

Nos diferenciamos por nuestro enfoque pragmático al momento de enseñar. Buscamos que el conocimiento que se transmite sea en todo momento verificable en la experiencia por el alumno, a efectos de interiorice la teoría a través de una auténtica comprensión.

NUESTRA FILOSOFÍA
Consideramos que lo que no se sustenta en el amor no prospera. Es por ello que buscamos inspirar a nuestros alumnos, e incentivarles en todo momento su pasión por la fotografía.  El arte supone la expresión de uno mismo, por lo que merece un espacio de tolerancia y respeto a la individualidad, y un ambiente cálido donde sea posible fluir con libertad.

Description:
Alexandre et Chloé Bès sont un couple de photographes professionnels qui partage ensemble les mêmes passions : les animaux et la nature.

Au travers de leurs photos, ils essayent de montrer la splendeur de la faune et de l’environnement afin de susciter la curiosité et l’émotion auprès des spectateurs.

Grâce à des plans très rapprochés, ils adorent mettre en avant les moindres détails qui subliment tant l’animal. Ce sont les ambiances, les atmosphères, les lumières uniques qui font que leurs images dégagent l’étonnement.

Après avoir réalisé plusieurs reportages dans différents pays, ils ont décidé de vous faire découvrir leurs plus grands coups de cœur à travers des tirages photos de qualité.

Leur objectif ? Vous faire partager la beauté de notre monde à travers des clichés saisissants et uniques, tout en vous ralliant à leur cause : la protection de la faune et de l’environnement !

I started my journey in photography in 2012, driven by the fact that I liked to capture all the precious moments with our first daughter. Name: Photo Agency F64
Description:
F64 Photo Agency photographers can be seen documenting all kinds of occasions from Presidental state visits, Parliament and the Cabinet of Ministers, to abandoned rural houses in Latgale or Latvian sportsmen in the Olympic Games in London, Sochi and Rio.
For 10 years the photo agency has been providing services to the largest Latvian digital and printed media companies. We are photo agency with strong backbone and solid foundation. We have changed a lot for a variety of reasons and circumstances. We have also accumulated large experience, set up a cohesive, reliable team.   Agency's team consists of experienced photographers who are always open to new ideas and experiences. At present, our main focus is on Latvian society, our cultural, leisure and sports activities, but we also document the socio-political, economic and other important events of Latvian current history.
Our strenght is our dynamic, the skill to accurately portray people, quick response in capturing developing situations without losing essential information and we are the most experienced Latvian sports' photographers.
Each agency photographer has wide range of interests and specific expertise in one area.
We have grown our know-how, we can be astute and polite, but we can also afford to look outside the box, to break stereotypes, ignore the labels and show our funny side to objectively show the public what is happening around and allow everyone to assess and find their own views.
We are a reliable partner not only in the media, but also in business. Highlighting the significant and the attractive. Our editor is flexible when coordinating the team's work and processing photographs thus allowing customers to rely on the Agency's support 24 hours a day and 7 days a week. Photo delivery to customers is done by IT software that has capacity for storing up to 2 million photos.
Currently, we have eight full-time photographers and we would like to offer our cooperation and support upon necessity.

Name: Drone360 Imagery
Description:
The advent of drone technology has allowed for the flourishing industry of aerial photography. Aerial drone photography and aerial drone services have become increasingly important in recent years in a variety of different industries. From construction and real estate to roofing and agriculture, the right aerial drone services can make your life easier. Today, we are going to introduce you to the different aerial drone services that our company can provide. By the end of our discussion, you will be ready to take to the skies for the footage and photography services that you need!


First and foremost, you have to ask yourself why you should consider drone photography. Here at Drone360 Imagery, we use state-of-the-art drone technology to provide our clients with unparalleled imagery. Our drones are capable of capturing photographs and video in HDR and 4K. What does this mean? Your aerial photography and drone videography services will provide you with a crystal-clear view of the world below. Whether you are scoping out a construction site or surveying for crop loss on your farm, you won't find a better view!


Second, there are many reasons to consider drone photography services versus traditional data surveying. Our drone services offer you access to reliable and precise data with little more than the click of a button. Our aerial views will reduce the time that would be taken for a traditional field survey, allowing you to save money as well as precious hours of your day. In addition to being faster than a traditional field survey, our aerial photography services are also safer! Instead of having an adjuster perform dangerous tasks for your survey, our drones can handle it without anyone in the field. Finally, our services are incredibly cost-effective as they require little if any resources on your behalf!


Now that we've introduced you to the benefits of professional drone services, what can our company help you with directly?

Name: Orbed Studios
Description:
Fashion photograpy influenced by day dreams and cinematic imagery. Very intuitive with a keen eye in seeing a persons photogenic potential. 

Fashion photography is a more challenging art form to me than say landscape or architectural photography; you can be as creative as possible with a camera and find the right location as long as you have the ideas! But with fashion photography working with models is a challenge when you are trying to get the right emotion from the subject as well as the clothing and location. Working with new faces or under-developed models is even more of a challenge.

As a former model, I have been in the industry for a while. I began to work a scout as I had a keen eye for hidden beauty. When I became an agent, I was able to help new faces develop their "look". As an agent I was unsatisfied with the prints that the new faces were bringing in from "someone I know who is a photographer". So instead of whining, I began to set up shoots in order to get the shot that would bring out what I saw in the models potential. So many people have potential but they do not receive the development that they need to have that look brought out through photography.

Ofrecemos servicios de fotografía de alta calidad para arquitectos, constructores, diseñadores y empresas de bienes raíces que desean destacar sus proyectos y propiedades de manera efectiva.

Nuestro equipo de fotógrafos expertos utiliza técnicas avanzadas de iluminación y composición para crear imágenes que capturen la esencia de cada proyecto. 
Desde edificios comerciales y residenciales hasta espacios públicos y obras de arte, nos aseguramos de que cada imagen transmita la visión y la intención detrás de cada proyecto.

Con esta innovadora tecnología, se pueden recorrer virtualmente los proyectos como si se estuviera allí en persona, lo que les permite tener una comprensión más completa y detallada del diseño.

Además de nuestros servicios de fotografía, también ofrecemos servicios adicionales, como postproducción y retoque de imágenes para garantizar que cada fotografía sea de la más alta calidad.

Trabajamos estrechamente con nuestros clientes para entender sus necesidades y objetivos, y entregamos resultados que superen sus expectativas.

Si está buscando una empresa de fotografía arquitectónica confiable y de alta calidad, no busque más allá de nosotros. 

Contáctenos hoy para discutir su proyecto y descubrir cómo podemos ayudarlo a destacar su trabajo.

Yes, we have day-to-day jobs in IT, but every other minute of our day is dedicated to our passion.

Name: Estudio Gris | Retratos PRO
Description:
Sabemos que eres auténtico, dilo en una foto.

Deshazte de la "foto corporativa" y crea algo que sí te represente con Estudio Gris.

Somos un estudio fotográfico especializado en retratos para perfil profesional y marca personal. Hacemos más que solo apretar un botón. Creamos retratos icónicos con propuestas diferentes y creativas 100% personalizadas que impulsen el crecimiento de tu marca personal o carrera profesional y consigan llamar la atención de tus clientes potenciales para que se animen a trabajar contigo.

La típica foto de CV tríada y aburrida no calan en la memoria de quien ha visto tu perfil.

Por muy formal que seas, eres movido por las emociones por eso hacemos retratos que hacen que la gente sienta algo. Algo que pueda recordar por mucho tiempo.

Sabemos que lo que haces es complejo, tu trabajo tiene títulos como "supervisor de cuentas especiales" o "investigador de seguridad" pero eso no significa que tu retrato tenga que ser aburrido.

Mereces un retrato que verdaderamente te represente, que te haga destacar ante los demás, que la gente con la que trabajas se sienta orgullosa de trabajar contigo. 

En Estudio Gris trabajamos desde el inicio para que tu retrato profesional marque la diferencia. Después de conocer tus necesidades y objetivos elaboramos una propuesta visual con elementos y referencias que van a potenciar el mensaje que quieres comunicar. No hacemos fotos a granel, nuestro objetivo es lograr un retrato que realce tu profesionalismo.

Creemos que la muerte al detalle ha hecho que las cosas pierdan su estilo propio, ahora todo es simple y sin nada especial. Por eso trabajamos en retratos personalizados. Ya seas el gerente de una multinacional o un egresado de la carrera de ingeniería de sistemas, todos tenemos algo especial y único que comunicar.

Un buen retrato le dice al mundo quién eres ¿Por qué arriesgarte verte cómo los demás?

¿Listo para impulsar tu vida profesional?

Hablemos.

 estudiogris.2@gmail.com
 (+51) 946-598-925

Nous avons acquis une solide expérience en mariant toujours créativité et savoir-faire technique, et en restant à l'écoute des tendances et des innovations du monde de la photographie culinaire. 

Notre travail nous a permis de collaborer avec un large éventail d'acteurs du monde de la food, et vous avez certainement déjà croisé notre travail lors de vos courses quotidiennes ou au restaurant. 

Nous considérons chaque collaboration comme une relation humaine avant tout. c'est ainsi que l'adaptabilité est notre force. La responsabilité environnementale est au coeur de nos démarches. 

Suivez-nous pour rester informé de nos réalisations et de notre approche de cet art en constante évolution ! Nous sommes présents pour donner vie à vos idées et vous accompagner dans la réussite de vos projets.

Description:
1.	Considering 13-years of providing online photo editing services, Fix The Photo, a New York based professional image post-production company, has gathered and analyzed requirements for modern digital photo. Nowadays, this firm is aiming to expand their picture retouching business to Canadian photographers from Vancouver, Montréal, Ottawa, and Québec, and is willing to collaborate with all provinces: Alberta, British Columbia, Manitoba, Newfoundland & Labrador, Nova Scotia, Prince Edward Island, and Saskatchewan including French speaking Quebec, Ontario, and New Brunswick. Their managers are multilingual. 
Manager of the Fix The Photo, Ann Young says, “Either professional or amateur shooters usually need simple or advanced image retouching services to enhance their photographs. We provide affordable prices and fast turnaround time. Our clients from the USA and Europe have already appreciated our work, and hope to satisfy all Canada based photographers’ requirements”. 
This professional photo post production service provides the team of experienced photo editors met all modern requirements of photo art. They use encrypted protocols to transfer the images that are absolutely secure and protected. This online image retouching firm deals with portrait and body photography retouching, color correction services, family and baby photo editing, photo restoration, and photo manipulations

Vi producerar både små och stora filmprojekt. Det kan handla om en företagsfilm, dokumentation av ett event eller innehåll till dina sociala medier. Vi skapar allt ifrån intervjubaserade filmer till drönarfotografering eller steadycamproduktioner. 

Foto
Högkvalitativa bilder genererar trovärdighet och trovärdighet genererar lojalitet. Vi erbjuder mångårig erfarenhet från produktfoto, porträtt, modefotografering och mycket mer.

Eller varför inte arbeta som etablerade varumärken; fota dina kollektioner i studio, på catwalk eller “on location” tillsammans med en lyhörd och erfaren fotograf. Vi erbjuder tillgång till en imponerande fotostudio i centrala Borås.

Podd
Det är inte längre komplicerat att skapa sin egen podd. Vi erbjuder utrustningen och erfarenheten som krävs för att skapa ett kraftfullt och relevant marknadsförings- eller informationsverktyg som dessutom kan avnjutas på språng.

Name: Classic Kids Photography
Description:
OUR STORY...

We were born from the vision of a tax attorney.

Huh?

Yes, a tax attorney.

Fifteen years ago, a bored international tax attorney who, instead of having her head properly buried in the tax code, dreamed of a job where she could play with children, color, go stocking footed and make crazy animal noises all day long. All in the process of making treasured black & white and hand-tinted portraits of her young friends.

Julie Floyd, our founder, followed her dream and has never looked back. 

Julie always says that her greatest talent is attracting incredibly talented people. First was business partner, great friend, fellow mommy and photographer in the San Francisco studio, Runa Magowan. Next came Lynn Natalie, Katie, Lisa J., Lisa V., Megan, Melissa, Michelle and Amasett. Each has trained extensively with Julie and many a late night latte has been shared where the proper "peek-a-boo" (you must hit the first syllable hard) or the subtleties of the most effective monkey call (always funny, never scary) have been debated. 

Classic Kids is a consortium of elite child photographers who share a common vision and uncommon style.

We are alike in our gratitude for the gift of spending our days working with children while creating treasured artwork for our clients' homes.

We work closely together as a group to perfect our art.

Name: Imaging People
Description:
Imaging People: laat zien wie je bent

Jij speelt de hoofdrol
Ondernemers in beeld brengen zoals ze echt zijn. Dat is mijn passie én bestaansrecht als fotograaf. Puur natuur heeft daarbij op mij een grote aantrekkingskracht. Professionals portretteren in hun natuurlijke (werk)omgeving vraagt om een betrokken en creatieve manier van kijken. Ook bij jou. Met mijn camera probeer ik de fonkeling in je ogen te vangen. Deze twee lichtpuntjes geven de emotie weer die jij wilt uitstralen. Trots, blijdschap of geluk, het maakt niet uit. Voor mijn camera speel jij als persoon de hoofdrol. En in mijn foto’s spreken jouw emoties tot de verbeelding.

Verhalen vertellen in beelden
Emoties vangen in een beeld met zeggingskracht vereist verdieping. Inzoomen en scherpstellen lukt niet zonder me in te leven in wat jou als ondernemer of mens drijft. Die drijfveren vertellen een verhaal. Zowel in woord als in beeld. Nieuwsgierigheid en verwondering zitten opgesloten in mijn DNA. Zo leer ik je beter kennen. Zo stel ik je op je gemak. En zo kom ik tot unieke, persoonlijke beelden die niet direct voor de hand liggen. Deze persoonlijke, betrokken manier van fotograferen pas ik toe bij iedereen die ik voor de lens krijg.

Conceptfotografie en beeldbewerking
Sommige beelden zijn zo krachtig dat ze op zichzelf een verhaal vertellen. Soms draait de boodschap om het concept of het verhaal achter de foto. Het is uitdagend als ik zo’n (zelfbedacht) concept mag uitwerken of bewerken in één beeld of een serie beelden. Van conceptfotografie gaat mijn creatieve hart sneller kloppen. Ik geniet ervan als licht, vorm, kleur en compositie in mijn creaties samensmelten tot een persoonlijk en herkenbaar beeld, dat tot de verbeelding spreekt.

Name: Regine Mahaux
Description:
Regine Mahaux is a Belgian born world-renowned photographer and film-director based out of Paris, France. Mahaux’s unique and grandiose creative style allows her to effortlessly translate the personalities of her models with efficacy. She has photographed and worked with some of the world’s most famous celebrities, politicians, businessmen, and royalties. She has portrayed personalities such as King Philippe and the Queen Mathilde of Belgium, Robert de Niro, Hilary Swank, Jean-Claude Van Damme and the Trump family, among many others. 

Regine’s works has been recognized by the Cannes Film Festival and has also received the Kodak award. Her art is permanently on display at the National Museum of American History and the National Portrait Gallery Museum (Washington, DC, USA), the Museum of Art and History (Belgium), and the Belfius Art Gallery (Brussels, Belgium). 

Regine has also been featured in some of the world’s top International publishers including Vanity Fair, Time magazine, People USA, Elle, Figaro France and Japan, Marie-Claire, L’Express, Harper’s bazaar, In Style, Paris Match and Hello magazine.

Additionally, Regine has been retained by some of the top global brands and advertising agencies  including Veuve Clicquot, IBM, Mercedes, Volvo, Nike, Ford, Johnson & Johnson, Deutsche Bank, Danone, Fiat, Reebok, Nina Ricci, Volkswagen, Audi, Nina Ricci, Dior, Vuitton, Davidoff, Sony, BBDO, DDB, Leo Burnett, Euro RSCG, Grey, Saatchi & Saatchi, TBWA and Young & Rubicam.

Name: Lizzie Melvin - Photographer for enhancing your business - products, people, food & drink
Description:
Do you need to attract more quality custom to your business? If so, quality photography is one major key to that.
I create natural looking, artistic images of people, products, food and drink to highlight your business's individuality and personality. 
Chat is free, so get in touch to see whether we would be a good match for each other liz@lizmelvin.com or 07735454476 or through social media. 


For people, I specialise in those who hate it! Those for whom the very thought of being in front of a camera makes their blood curdle! 
Before you even see a camera, I take the time to get to know you, chat to you, hear about your business and what you want to achieve through your images. I then help you to relax through undoing all the things that make you look tense in front of a camera. I light and pose to reduce the impact of those areas of yourself that you hate. I then add in your business story messages. Only then will the photography start.

So often people who were dreading it, say "that wasn't bad actually!"

Food and drink Images need to imply deliciousness, freshness and sizzle to encourage people to order. I have worked in catering for many years. That has given me a lot of good insight to bring to your shoot. 
Food needs to be thoughtfully arranged on a quality plate/platter,  with colours a key part. But looking "Just plated" is vital if customers are to believe this isn’t just food for a “shoot”, but a representation of what they will receive at your business. 

I offer a similar service for property. I cover interiors, exteriors and locations. I make the property look its best - but not markedly different from reality! I do add the likes of flowers to engage the viewer. 

I truly adore taking photographs and making people happy through them. For this reason, I also teach photography.

I was employed by Jessops to deliver day courses for them on wedding photography for many years. 
I also teach privately from total and absolute beginners upwards.

Name: Rijk in Beeld
Description:
DIT IS RIJK IN BEELD
Wij geloven in de kracht van beeld. Het gaat om de beleving, die vangen we zo intens mogelijk. Daarom laten we ons niet alleen leiden door hoe dingen eruit zien, maar vooral door hoe ze voelen.

DIT IS WIE WE ZIJN
Onze kracht is enthousiasme en creativiteit. Die weten we commercieel in te zetten, op heel veel verschillende manieren. Hoe, dat laten we van de opdracht afhangen. Met onze bevlogenheid en originaliteit doen we het graag anders dan anders. Rebels als het mag, out of the box waar het kan, maar wel altijd in lijn met het doel en de boodschap. Ideeën genoeg, we denken graag met u mee. We kennen de mogelijkheden van de camera als onze broekzak en weten hoe we daarmee kunnen spelen. En daar zijn we graag de beste in. Iedere keer weer.

DIT IS WAT WE DOEN
Fotografie is topsport. Soms krijg je maar één kans om iets vast te leggen en soms kun je stylen tot het perfect is. De ene dag leggen we een event vast en zijn we alert op alles wat daar gebeurt, de andere dag laten we al onze creativiteit de vrije loop bij het maken van campagnebeelden. Van concept tot uitvoering, we brengen knowhow en ervaring mee, stylen het hele plaatje of laten het zoals het is. Alles om het verschil te maken tussen gezien worden en opvallen. Dat doen we voor heel veel verschillende opdrachtgevers. Ook voor u.

Name: Paul Zizka Photography
Description:
Paul Zizka is an award-winning mountain landscape and adventure photographer based in Banff, Alberta. 

From the peaks of the Canadian Rockies to iceberg-laden seas off the coast of Greenland, Paul’s journey to capture the “under-documented” is a testament to his passion for exploration, his creative vision and fierce sense of determination. These qualities, combined with his keen eye for unique compositions, have resulted in an exhaustive portfolio of cutting-edge images.

Passionate about passing on his love for photography, in June 2016 he and fellow photographer Dave Brosha launched OFFBEAT, a new company that features an online community for photographers, as well as workshops in far-flung locations. He is also the Photo Editor for Crowfoot Media Inc., curating images each year for their premier publication, the Canadian Rockies Annual.

Paul’s images have been featured in a variety of publications, including Maclean’s, National Geographic Adventure, Alpinist, Huffington Post, The Guardian, Canadian Geographic, Islands, PhotoLife, Fodors.com and explore magazine. His client list includes leading national and global brands such as Apple, Dell, Arc’Teryx, lululemon athletica, Panasonic, MEC and Canon.

In the Canadian Rockies, Paul has hiked extensively in the backcountry and photographed from the summits of countless peaks. His adventures abroad include a 1400-km unsupported double-crossing of Iceland on foot (2004), which is believed to be the first of its kind, and a 1488-km solo crossing of the South Island of New Zealand (2007). Recent travels have taken him to Norway, Svalbard, Nepal, Baffin Island, Greenland, throughout the Caribbean, Hawaii, Niue and French Polynesia. The adventures continue with upcoming trips planned to Antarctica, Namibia, the Torngat Mountains and Faroe Islands.

His first book, Summits & Starlight: the Canadian Rockies, was published by Rocky Mountain Books in 2013.

Name: K2 Wirtualne Spacery

Zwiedzanie w formacie 360 z opcją VR pozwala na szczegółowe odwzorowane przestrzeni i zapewnia płynne poruszanie się po obiekcie zarówno w przeglądarce jak i za pomocą gogli VR.  Dzięki interaktywnemu i intuicyjnemu obrazowi można poruszać się po całej przestrzeni i zapoznać się z jej układem lub wystrojem, bez wychodzenia z domu.  

Ten efektywny, a przy tym nienachalny sposób na reklamę lokalu lub świadczonych usług pozwoli Ci zaskoczyć potencjalnych Klientów i nakłonić ich do odwiedzenia Twojego biznesu. Chcesz przekonać się jak to możliwe? Odwiedź stronę  https://K2wirtualnespacery.pl/ i przetestuj nasze realizacje.

Name: PIX'Elle Photographie
Description:
Bonjour, moi c'est Morgane et bienvenue dans l'Histoire de Pix'ELLE, l'aboutissement d'une passion, je vais vous raconter mon aventure.



Déjà petite, je me souviens que je vidais rapidement les pellicules des appareils photos jetables. Vous vous souvenez ? Le fameux KODAK jaune ! Puis en grandissant et rentrant dans l'adolescence, j'insiste auprès de mes parents pour avoir un appareil photo numérique, je filme et prends en photo tout ce que je vois, où je suis, avec qui... Mais aussi des paysages, des moments de joie, et petit à petit, je sens que cette capture de l'instant permet de figer dans le temps, des émotions, des moments uniques et de créer à jamais, un souvenir.



Puis, je demande mon premier REFLEX, ce n'est pas de la marque, ce n'est pas le dernier cri, mais je l'adore, et je l'emmène partout avec moi, et j'essaye plein de chose, plusieurs compositions, plusieurs sujets, plusieurs angles... Mais en mode automatique.



Enfin, j'ai THE opportunité, un ami me revend un PENTAX, avec des objectifs, un flash externe, un trépied, du vrai matériel ! Et je continue l'aventure, j'essaye de comprendre les différents programmes, les fonctionnalités, et j'adore !



Puis, après mes études en communication et événementiel, je me dis qu'il me manque une corde à mon arc. Et j'entame une vraie formation professionnalisante en Photographie, et j'obtiens enfin mon diplôme de photographe, la Passion est enfin devenue mon métier. 



Aujourd'hui, mon objectif est simple, que mon travail, ma passion et ma créativité rentre au service de vos besoins, vos demandes, vos attentes, vos envies et vos projets ! De vous permettre de graver dans le temps un souvenir, de vous donner confiance en vous en devenant modèle le temps d'un instant ou encore de mettre en avant un produit ou service que vous avez mis au point avec passion !



Chasseuse d'images, je saurai capturer vos instants !

L’entreprise Cécile Muzard Photographe se décline en 2 marques :

Vous pouvez faire appel à la société CM Studio pour :

- réaliser un portrait de vous en studio ou sur le lieu de votre choix, qui vous mette en lumière sur vos pages web, votre profil LinkedIn ou sur un article de presse (offres Le Box et Out Box)
- mettre en scène vos collaborateurs dans vos locaux, pour des photos dynamiques et en situation permettant d'illustrer votre site internet (offres Master Box ou Trombino'Box)
- ou pour capter les moments forts des événements de votre entreprise tels que des séminaires, soirées de fin d’année ou journées teambuilding (offres événements)

C’est avant de créer CM Studio que Cécile s’est découvert une passion pour la photographie de mariage, cette étape si importante dans la vie d’un couple. 
Discrète et bienveillante, Cécile propose de vivre une aventure avec les futurs mariés, pour que le photo-reportage ne s’arrête pas à la simple prise de vue du mariage.
La séance Engagement, notamment, permet de mieux se connaître et de réaliser des photos travaillées et hors du commun en dehors du stress du jour J. 

L’étape ultime de leur aventure, c’est l’album. Fini les photos sur clé usb ou CD ! Ce livre-photo prestigieux est le seul souvenir concret qu’ils garderont de leur mariage et pourront transmettre à leurs proches.

Description:

I also capture family and pet portraits and produce greeting cards, notebooks, calendars and canvases etc., supplying to numerous local shops.

My full time profession has mainly been as an Environment Officer, working for Cleveland Potash Ltd, a local mining company for 12 years, I then moved to Sirius Minerals (now Anglo American) as Environment Officer for 4 1/2 years on The Woodsmith Project.  Within this time I have continued to build my photography skills and portfolio and used my photography skills within my Environmental role, evidencing the flora and fauna found on site.  
I am now with Worley on a part-time basis as Environmental Permitting Advisor and continuing my photography in my spare time.

Our promise:
We make joy unforgettable. We bring people's favorite moments to life and make their world a little more beautiful. We inspire our customers to share and experience special memories through our unique photo products.

Name: Photo Video Digital Malaga
Description:
Con más de 50 años de experiencia, nuestra trayectoria profesional es un reflejo de evolución y compromiso con la calidad y la innovación en el mundo de la imagen y el video.

Nuestros inicios se remontan a noviembre de 1971, cuando abrimos nuestro primer comercio fotográfico en la Calle Moreno Monroy de Málaga bajo el nombre comercial de Photo Shop. Con el paso de los años, ampliamos nuestras actividades para abarcar la fotografía industrial y publicitaria, el laboratorio fotográfico y la impresión digital, adaptándonos siempre a las necesidades de nuestros clientes.

En 1991, dimos un paso más en nuestra evolución al incursionar en la producción audiovisual y televisiva con la creación de Video Sur Televisión, una rama dedicada a la producción de videos y programas televisivos que marcó un hito en nuestra historia.

Conscientes de los cambios en el mercado y para ofrecer una propuesta más completa integrando los servicios de impresión digital y video, desde enero de 2025, unificamos todas nuestras actividades bajo el nombre comercial de Photo Video Digital.

Esta nueva denominación refleja nuestro compromiso de proporcionar soluciones integrales y personalizadas para las necesidades multimedia de nuestros clientes. Desde servicios de imagen digital hasta producción audiovisual profesional, nuestro equipo está preparado para ofrecer la misma calidad y experiencia que nos ha distinguido durante más de cinco décadas.

En Photo Video Digital, unimos tradición e innovación para ser tu aliado en cualquier proyecto relacionado con fotografía y video.

We provide services catering to every discipline of Photo retouching, whether it is Photo Makeover, Restoration, Logo Removal, Clipping Path, Photo Masking, Photo Manipulation or Glamorization, special effects, and the like for our esteemed clients around the globe including Stock Agencies, Auction Houses, Fashion Photographers, Real Estates, Studios, Wedding Photographers, Media, Garment, Ad agencies, and especially “e-commerce websites”.

Name: SCALA ARCHIVES
Description:
Art and Culture Images.

Founded in 1953 and inspired by the famous art historian Roberto Longhi, Scala Archives is now the largest and most prestigious fine art image archive worldwide (with over 3 million images in high-res).

Scala Archives is either the outright owner or official agent for many of the most important art, fashion, photography & history collections worldwide. We represent exclusively worldwide The MoMA New York, Fundacion Museo Thyssen Bornemisza, the Whitney Museum of American Art, the Center for Creative Photography Tucson and are official agents exclusively in some regions and non exclusively in others for the Metropolitan museum, the MFA Boston, Art Resource and all its US museums, BPK and its German museums, the National Gallery of London, the British Museum and British Library, the Tate Images, the Victoria & Albert museum, the Wallace Collection, the Fitzwilliam Museum, Prado, the Gulbenkian Foundation, the National Trust Enterprises, ADAGP, Christie’s Images, as well as the most important Italian State and local Museums.  

Multi-languages website and staff (English, French, German, Spanish), expert picture researchers for free search service and in-house photographers and photo laboratory for new photo campaigns as well as the creation from originals of very high resolution and high quality digital files of the most minute details without loss of sharpness and accuracy.

Name: Associação de Fotógrafos Fototech
Description:
Somos uma Associação de Fotógrafos.
A Fototech surgiu como uma lista de discussão na Internet sobre técnicas fotográficas, formada por Clicio Barroso em 1998, aberta para convidados e indicados.
Assim, em 11 de novembro de 2006, nasce com pouco mais de 60 associados a Associação de Fotógrafos Fototech, em São Paulo.
Para ser membro da Associação de Fotógrafos Fototech são necessários alguns pré requisitos: Ser fotógrafo profissional, independente, ou amador, ser acadêmico ou pesquisador de fotografia, ser estudante de fotografia em instituição reconhecida, ser editor ou jornalista de publicação especializada, ou ser assistente fotográfico.
Para ser filiado, além de se enquadrar em uma das categorias acima, o pretendente não deve ter quaisquer tipo de pendências com outras associações de fotógrafos das quais participe ou que já tenha participado, tais como a Abrafoto, Arfoc, Afnatura e outras que, como a Fototech, lutam pelo fortalecimento da fotografia bralileira. Cumpridos tais requisitos, o interessado precisa preencher o formulário online, e aguardar a análise do pedido de  inscrição por parte da diretoria da associação. Esta diretoria não avalia o portfóllio dos interessados, mas confirma os dados presentes no formulário e o cumprimento dos pré-requisitos anteriormente  citados. Uma vez deferido o pedido, o associado será devidamente informado, pagará a taxa de associação  e passará a contribuir com a anuidade da mesma.
A Associação reúne um grupo nacional de fotógrafos, com interesses comuns. Entre os interesses estão o empenho pela  moralização do ofício do fotógrafo, o fomento e estímulo à fotografia como produto cultural, a criação e manutenção de um mercado digno para a negociação, compra e venda de fotografias, encontros periódicos para troca de informações, workshops, congressos e palestras, divulgação e exposição dos trabalhos fotográficos produzidos pelos associados.

Name: Cartacarbone
Description:
We are Cartacarbone: Gregorio Adezati and Francesco Marconcini, a duo of creative photographers.
Working in editorial and advertising since 2014, we blend artisanal care and visual exploration to create sophisticated and original images.
Our research and approach draw from the diverse worlds of art, cinema, and music. Our personal projects focus on the storytelling of fantastic worlds where portrayed people become fictional characters, and objects become symbols. We love working with natural elements and poor materials to stage surreal scenarios that allow us to play on set literally.
Cartacarbone means carbon paper. We like the concept of a thin layer hidden between two pieces of paper, allowing information to pass through from one to the other. We chose an Italian compound word since we are two friends who share ideas that result in a common output. A word made of two elements – paper and carbon – recalling the visual contrast between light and darkness.

We understand workplace safety intimately and have created site safety imagery, posters and associated material over many years for some of the worlds largest miners. 

Principal photographer, Christian Sprogoe is equally adept in a busy city CBD, remote and dusty desert, cargo ship, underground mine, factory or leaning 'harnessed' from the open door of a helicopter. 

At csfoto we say, "It is a rare and real pleasure to be given the opportunity to create art from circumstances and in places where art does not often rank as a priority. Working in remote areas undoubtedly has its challenges, however the privilege of access and the opportunity to collaborate with a client and their particular requirements to produce strong visual imagery is a big driving force and one that brings immense satisfaction."

Name: okkofoto - de organisatiefotograaf die organisatieverbetering ondersteunt met beeld
Description:
2015 is net begonnen én nu al een fantastisch jaar!
Mijn wereld is een beetje anders geworden. 
En daar zit iets heel positiefs bij, namelijk de start van 'okkofoto'!

Natuurlijk ik maakte al jaren foto's. Toch is er iets gewijzigd. 
Ik leer meer, beter en creatiever schrijven met licht! 
En nog wat, dat leren stopt in dit leven niet meer, want ik voel mij een lichtschrijver. Voor velen is dit meer bekend met de naam fotograaf ;-)
Natuurlijk, ondanks dat ik heel druk bezig ben met dat leren licht schrijven (zowel via de jaaropleiding van Fotoschool Keistad, die ik in juli 2015 goed doorstaan hoop te hebben, als in de praktijk) ben ik niet de perfecte fotograaf. 
Ik zal jullie een geheim vertellen, wie denkt dat wel te zijn stopt met leren, de perfecte fotograaf bestaat niet!
De foto's die je op de pagina 'okkofoto' kunt vinden zijn een voorbeeld van mijn kunnen, mijn creativiteit en mijn interesses.

En iedereen die dit leest en van mijn fotografische capaciteiten gebruik wil maken nodig ik van harte uit om met mij contact op te nemen via mail; info@okkofoto.nl.
Bij uitstek ook voor bedrijfs-, produkt-, en LinkedIn fotografie!

Hoor ik van jullie en allen die jullie bekend zijn? :-)

Name: Lippielust
Description:
From the beginning, Lippielust has never been ‘me’. I always see it as a community where people can show their interest in something that unites us: lipstick. The ‘Lippielust’ came from an idea how Indonesian lipstick addicts had their hard time picking up their signature shade of lipstick just because nobody would want to become a ‘swatcher‘, a person who are dedicated to do lip modelling on their very own lips. There was time where imported lipsticks invaded Indonesia but unfortunately we weren’t able to test the product directly right onto our lips. Finally, digitally-rendered swatches were our only option back then. Like throwing off the dice and see how it goes: pure gambling indeed.

I worked as a lifestyle journalist for one good year (2011-2012), learned graphic design and finally pursued another dream of mine to established a creative studio for more than 5 years until today. Last but not least, on 2014 I decided to create a brand that is a hybrid product of both worlds: Lippielust. I learned photography on the process, so don’t worry about that – I am not a professional photographer, not just yet.

Lippielust offers various digital-based services including lip-modelling for brands who are willing to create real, true-to-colors swatches for lip products, instagram and blog marketing, and other digital content creations. We have worked with many high-profile brands from across the world, including Wardah Cosmetics (ID), Make Over Cosmetics (ID), Kylie Cosmetics (US), Allegory Story (US), BH Cosmetics (US), NABLA Cosmetics (IT), Morphe Brushes (US), Beauty UK (UK), Breena Beauty (MY), Zhuco Cosmetics (MY), Model Rock Lashes (AU), etc. Visit the full list of our clients on the Project page.
