Name: AirWorks Aerial Photography
Description:
יצירה בטוחה מהאוויר | AirWorks צילום אווירי מקצועי
אנו מתמחים בצילום אווירי מקצועי באמצעות רחפנים ומספקת לעסקים מכל תחום כלי ויזואלי עוצמתי שמאפשר לבלוט, לשדר מקצועיות ולספר את הסיפור העסקי מזווית שונה ומרשימה. ההטסה מתבצעת בידי מטיסים מוסמכים בעלי רישוי וביטוח כחוק, עם ניסיון רב בביצוע משימות מורכבות ובצילום איכותי בכל סביבה. השילוב בין מקצועיות, טכנולוגיה מתקדמת וקבלת האישורים הנדרשים מבטיח ללקוח תהליך בטוח וחוקי ושקט נפשי מלא.

הערך שצילום אווירי מעניק לעסקים הוא רחב ומשמעותי:
נדל״ן – מציג נכסים, קרקעות ותכניות בנייה מזוויות שלא ניתן להשיג בצילום קרקעי, וממחיש ללקוחות את פוטנציאל ההשקעה.

תעשייה ומפעלים – מתעד תהליכי ייצור, בקרה ובטיחות, ומספק חומר מקצועי להצגה מול שותפים, ספקים או משקיעים.

תיירות ואירוח – מדגיש נופים, מתחמים ומתקנים בצורה חווייתית ומושכת לקוחות חדשים.

חקלאות – מאפשר מעקב אחרי שטחים, יבולים ותשתיות, ומספק כלי לניהול וייעול העבודה.

עסקים קטנים ובינוניים – יוצר סרטוני תדמית ותוכן שיווקי לרשתות החברתיות שמסייעים בהגדלת החשיפה וחיזוק המותג.

מוסדות ציבוריים וחינוך – מתעד פרויקטים, אירועים ותשתיות, ומספק חומרי תדמית ושקיפות מול קהל רחב.

מעבר לצילום עצמו, אנו ב-AirWorks מספקים גם עריכת סרטונים ותמונות מקצועית, כך שהלקוח מקבל מוצר מוגמר – סרטון שיווקי, סרט תדמית או חבילת תמונות ערוכות – שמוכן לשימוש מיידי ומשרת את מטרותיו העסקיות והשיווקיות.

החזון שלנו הוא לאפשר לכל עסק, בכל תחום, להציג את פעילותו מנקודת מבט חדשה ומדויקת. צילום מהאוויר אינו רק תיעוד, אלא כלי עסקי המעניק יתרון תחרותי, מעלה את ערך המותג, ומשדר ללקוחות קיימים וחדשים מסר ברור של חדשנות, מקצועיות ואמינות.

אנו מזמינים אתכם לגלות עולם חדש של אפשרויות צילום אווירי ולקבל הצעת מחיר מותאמת אישית לפרויקט שלכם.

Name: DACYA PHOTOGRAPHER
Description:
Dacya opened her eyes to the world on September 3, 1976 in Istanbul.
She is a Virgo.

She started taking pictures at the age of 11 with the camera his uncle gave him. She would run to the west end of the island every afternoon to photograph the sunset on Kınalıada island in Istanbul, Turkey.
She started his education life in the primary school of Pangaltı Armenian High School and completed it with Private Evrim High School. While she was studying at Bosphorous University, the camera was her biggest hobby. Continuing her business life in her family's business, Dacya started to work as a professional photographer by reorienting her career with a sudden decision after the training she received. She is a photographer, who loves to enjoy life and collects beautiful memories...
 
Dacya, who has been a professional photographer for 11 years; Currently, she serves his customers in his Studio, which she runs with his partner in Maslak, Istanbul, Turkey, mainly by shooting Fashion and Product shoots, Gastronomy, Lifestyle and Social media posts. And also she is making fashion shooting packages in Europe. 
Photography means to her ;an expression of freedom and eternity that you don't know how far you can go...

Name: Orms Cape Town School of Photography
Description:
Orms Cape Town School of Photography offers both full-time and part-time, online and on-campus, photographic and videography courses.

Founded in 2001, we are proud to share more than 20 years of experience teaching various foundational to niche visual storytelling genres. Orms Cape Town School of Photography is known for being a highly-specialized school where lecturers are passionate and committed to their students offering ample one-on-one, bespoke training.

Our vision is to be an incubator for technical brilliance and a nurturer of an innovative generation of authentic story-tellers in the photographic and videography fields.

The part-time courses include a wide variety of introductory and advanced photography and videography classes. Like the full-time course, classes are small for personalised training and emphasis is placed on individual participation and group interaction. Most of our part-time courses are between three and ten weeks long and are offered as either morning or evening sessions. We also offer short intensive courses, one-on-one personalised sessions and weekend workshops.

Je suis donc devenu photographe professionnel par passion et je vous certifie que vous aurez les photos que vous souhaitez. Je suis avant tout un chef d’entreprise, soucieux de la qualité de la prestation fournie.

La seule façon de faire du bon travail est d’aimer ce que vous faites et vous avez de la chance car j’aime réellement ce que je fais !

Un grand merci à vous de m’avoir lu :)

Name: Futura Press
Description:
Criada em 2000, a Futura Press é a maior agência independente de fotografia do Brasil. Com equipe e planejamento afinados, produz diariamente cerca de 70 pautas fotojornalísticas, publicando fotos das notícias mais importantes do dia em portais, jornais e revistas de todo o país. O material fotográfico produzido é distribuído também por duas agências parceiras, Agência Estado e Folha Press. 
A produção diária alimenta o Banco de Imagens Online, que também é abastecido com imagens de outros assuntos como natureza, turismo e agricultura para atender clientes que desenvolvem projetos didáticos, editoriais, institucionais e publicitários. 
Em 2010 foi criada a Futura Stock, braço da Futura Press focado em dois novos serviços: 
1) planejamento e realização de produções fotográficas em todo o país para uso didático, institucional e editorial. 
2) Cobertura fotográfica de eventos institucionais. 

Fotos: 

Ale Silva, Edmar Barros, Roberto Vazque, J Duran Machfee, Ulisses Job, Cris Andrade.

Name: LFMPRO
Description:
A LFMPRO detém o maior laboratório industrial de fotografia a nível nacional, com mais de 1200m2 e equipado com a mais alta tecnologia de impressão, sendo que assume a posição de líder de mercado do sector desde 2002. Um lugar que fomentou, em 2006, quando apresentou ao mercado mundial novas plataformas informáticas que revolucionaram a maneira de trabalhar com os laboratórios de fotografia.

A LFMPRO é hoje a maior referência dentro do sector da Distribuição/Produção no ramo da fotografia. Foi criada em 2010 em substituição da marca Citylab e Citylabpro. Uma mudança necessária para separar sector de retalho (B2C) do sector de Distribuição/Produção (B2C/Factoring). Assim sendo, a Citylab permaneceu em uso mas apenas para as lojas próprias do grupo LFM Corporate (Venda a Retalho), dando assim origem à marca LFMPRO para a área de Distribuição/Produção.

No sector da distribuição, a LFMPRO representa 15 Marcas (Metz, Sinar, Jobo, Foba, Tamron, Tamrac, JVC Pro, DTI, Bowens, Interfit, Ansmann, Mario Acerbonni, SLIK, Dreambooks, Crumpler, Hahnemuhle), e tem como parceiros na distribuição para o canal da fotografia marcas como Canon, Nikon, Epson, Kodak, Fujifilm, Transcend, GLG, Silicon Power e ultimamente a Apple.
Recentemente, a LFMPRO foi responsável pela criação de websites para algumas das marcas que representa, com vista a fornecer mais informação aos consumidores.

Eis alguns desses sites:

www.tamronportugal.com
www.metzportugal.com
www.jvcprofissional.com

Name: Lucie Logier Photographer
Description:
Photographe et intervenante artistique, je développe une pratique engagée autour de l’image, de la mémoire et de la transmission. J’anime des ateliers photo à destination de différents publics (seniors, jeunes, familles, entreprises), avec pour objectif de valoriser les récits de vie, renforcer la confiance en soi et stimuler le dialogue intergénérationnel.

Mon approche croise photographie documentaire, portrait et création artistique. J’utilise l’image comme un outil d’expression et de lien. En atelier, j’invite les participants à porter un regard sensible sur leur environnement et à construire des images qui racontent leur histoire, leur quotidien, leurs émotions. Je propose également des temps d’échange autour de la lecture d’image et de la mise en scène photographique, en privilégiant la bienveillance et l’écoute.

En parallèle, je développe une pratique artistique personnelle nourrie par des influences cinématographiques et plastiques. Mes projets explorent l’intime, les traces et les silences, avec une attention particulière portée aux techniques analogiques.

Basée à Lille, j’interviens en région Hauts-de-France et au-delà, en collaboration avec des structures culturelles, sociales et éducatives. J’aime co-construire des projets à impact humain et culturel, où la photographie devient un langage à part entière.

Name: Le Terrier Studio
Description:
O Le Terrier Studio é pioneiro em Fotografia Pet em Portugal, fundado por Amanda Teixeira, fotógrafa especializada desde 2015. O nosso propósito é criar imagens que unem emoção e estratégia, ajudando marcas e empresas a comunicar com impacto através dos animais.
Já colaborámos com marcas internacionais de referência como IKEA, Royal Canin e Trixie, além de projetos com Zara, H&M e Mini. Esta experiência permite-nos compreender as exigências de produções comerciais e publicitárias, entregando sempre qualidade premium.
No estúdio, em Lisboa, ou em produções externas, desenvolvemos projetos de fotografia para campanhas, editoriais, lifestyle e publicidade, sempre com atenção ao detalhe, ao bem-estar animal e à criatividade.
Acreditamos que os animais são mais do que protagonistas visuais: são gatilhos emocionais capazes de aproximar pessoas e marcas, tornando cada campanha mais autêntica e memorável.
 Procuramos parcerias com marcas internacionais, agências de publicidade e empresas do setor pet, que valorizam conteúdo visual de excelência para expandir a sua comunicação global.

Name: Wedding Photography by Bryan Farrell
Description: We are a friendly family company of wedding photographers based Churchtown, Southport and we work mainly but not exclusively in the North West. There is something truly exciting in sharing a beautiful wedding day and capturing those magical images. We believe our part is to photograph and document your day, allowing it to unfold naturally. Our photojournalistic approach to the day means we capture those special candid moments that we love and treasure. We make sure we capture the traditional images too and love to get a little creative and make images that will wow you as well as having some fun along the way. We enjoy traveling and are available to work throughout the UK & Europe. We offer destination packages within Europe and further if you need! Name: Greg Finck
Description:
Over the past 10 years, Greg Finck has specialized in documenting weddings and events across the globe for a high-end international clientele. Greg specializes in shooting medium-format film, as this provides an unrivaled quality and look to the images he produces. He loves the authenticity, elegance and uniqueness that film brings in a digital era.

Greg's work is elegant, natural, timeless, and captures the subjects under their most honest side. Strongly influenced by fashion and always challenging the status quo, Greg travels to some of the most beautiful places across the globe, with a true love for the South of France, Italy and California.

Greg has been named one of the Top Wedding Photographers in the World by Harper's Bazaar, and has been published in world-acclaimed magazines and blogs such as Vogue, Elle, Martha Stewart Weddings or Style Me Pretty.

Name: Youth And Kids Program
Description:
The Youth and Kids Program is an inspiring initiative dedicated to empowering children and youth through the art of photography. Designed to foster creativity, self-expression, and personal growth, this program offers a unique platform for young individuals to explore their potential and discover the world through a lens.

At the core of the Youth and Kids Program is the belief that every child deserves the opportunity to express themselves and share their unique perspectives. Through photography, participants are encouraged to view the world with a fresh lens, capturing moments, emotions, and stories that are meaningful to them. By providing them with the necessary tools, guidance, and support, the program helps unleash their creativity and allows their voices to be heard.

One of the key objectives of the initiative is to nurture essential life skills among children and youth. Through hands-on photography workshops, they develop critical thinking, observation, and problem-solving abilities. They learn to analyze their subjects, compose visually appealing images, and convey messages through their photographs. These skills transcend photography and can be applied to various aspects of their lives, enhancing their academic performance, communication skills, and overall personal development.

Moreover, the Youth and Kids Program promotes inclusivity and diversity. It creates a safe and welcoming environment where children and youth from all backgrounds, regardless of their abilities or challenges, can actively participate and thrive. The program recognizes and celebrates the unique strengths and talents of every individual, fostering a sense of belonging and empowerment.

The impact of the Youth and Kids Program extends beyond the realm of photography. Participants gain confidence in their abilities, discovering new passions and potential career paths.

Name: Intenational Mothers of Monaco - Valentina Selvaggia de Gaspari -
Description:
Italian, "globetrotter", and curious, Valentina de Gaspari speaks 5 languages: Italian, French, English, Spanish and PHOTOGRAPHY.
For Valentina, photography is a means of expression, exchange, it is a need ...

She spent the first 10 years of her professional life in advertising (Saatchi & Saatchi, DDB ...) and she got to the heart of the image by working for the Gucci Group at the time of the redesign of Yves Saint Laurent's image. Today she is the Vice-President of the Fashion Chamber of Monaco and express her talent with photography.


A new challenge melting communication and image.

Now living in Monte-Carlo, but still travelling around the world, Valentina makes portraits of people, both adults and children. She also works with fashion labels who want a strong visual identity. Particular attention is given to lighting and framing in order to let her photographs tell a story and convey an emotion.

Name: Arturo+Lauren
Description:
Arturo and Lauren Engel are photographers and cinematographers focusing their shared expertise on architecture, interior design, and hospitality. Together, they have more than 25 years of experience capturing various brand’s visual language and elevating their stories with compelling imagery. 

Engels are international professionals that are split between Los Angeles, New York, Hong Kong, and Spain. Arturo, having grown up in Mallorca, and Lauren in Hong Kong, both share a global nature and a distinctive understanding of how to holistically capture a location’s influences and surrounding context. 

To shed light on better understanding photographers’ inspirations and process, they manage and produce Shiftercom, where they feature and interview leading architectural and interior design photographers. Engel also conducts interviews with design experts in architecture, interior design, hospitality, and the marketing associates that complements those professions on their blog.

Name: Taslair
Description:
Wir sind ein Unternehmen aus Rostock, welches mittels einer Drohne Luftaufnahmen für Ihre private oder gewerbliche Nutzung professionell erstellt. Entdecken Sie mit uns neue Blickwinkel aus der Vogelperspektive und lassen Sie sich von hochauflösenden Luftbildern begeistern.

Bisher waren Fotos und Videos aus der Vogelperspektive stets mit erheblichem Aufwand verbunden. Mit unserer vom Boden aus gesteuerten Kamera-Drohne mit Livebild-Übertragung entscheiden Sie, was Sie sehen möchten. Die Ergebnisse unserer Arbeit sind völlig neue Blickwinkel und Eindrücke von Ihrer Umgebung. Präsentieren Sie Ihr Eigenheim, Hotel, Boot oder Ihre Familienfeier aus einem ganz neuen Winkel.

Name: TIRO Media
Description:
TIRO Media is a Belgian photography and media development company founded in 2021 by 3 friends from Limburg.

Our goal is to contribute to the professionalization of all kinds of sports clubs, schools and other organizations. The concept is based on free photo shoots of all your members or students.

With these portrait photos we will work to generate modern and personalized visuals. A personal web shop will be opened for everyone where the players, pupils, parents, family and friends will have the opportunity to order these visuals as a photo or printed on a gadget.

Last but not least, there is an earnings model built in which your club, school or organization earns a nice commission based on the total turnover from the webshops of all your members.

Name: Nomad Studio Art
Description:
Nomad Studio es, como su propio nombre indica, un estudio nómada. Un estudio que viaja mientras desarrolla su actividad profesional y creativa. Es un proyecto de Eli Garmendia y Carlos Pericás que sirve de contenedor de proyectos.

Para ello, la Bitxa es casa, estudio creativo, galería intinerante… Contenedor y facilitadora de mil y una aventuras. 

Actualmente el proyecto principal de Nomad Studio es "Retrato Nómada". Un archivo fotográfico de retratos de personas que viven en pueblos, comunidades o núcleos pequeños. Toda la información en: www.retratonomada.com

Name: House of Common Studio
Description:
House of Common is a photo + video production studio located in Ottawa, Ontario, Canada, and working all over North America.

HoC prides itself on its good instincts and detailed execution. Our team of award-winning content producers works closely with each of our clients to create the inspired visual content they need to best share their stories.

Name: Parwez K Photography | Design World Production
Description:
Welcome to the LinkedIn page of Parwez K., a Delhi-based fashion photographer and visual storyteller known for capturing emotions, memories, and timeless art. A Delhi University graduate with advanced training in animation and special effects from Maya Academy, Parwez has over a decade of expertise in fashion, wedding, and aerial photography.

Renowned for his creative vision and technical precision, Parwez has been awarded “Best Emerging Fashion Photographer in Delhi” by Bollywood’s Minissha Lamba at the India Lifestyle Awards 2015. His work has been featured in top publications like The Times of India and Hindustan Times, reflecting his innovative approach and artistic excellence.

As the founder of DESIGN WORLD and the online news portal FirstReport.in, Parwez combines his photography skills with entrepreneurial passion. His work goes beyond capturing images—it’s about telling stories, evoking emotions, and creating art that resonates.

Specializing in fashion, weddings, high-profile portraits, and real estate, Parwez’s images are visually stunning, technically flawless, and emotionally impactful. His ability to connect with subjects and deliver perfection makes him one of Delhi’s most trusted photographers.

Explore his portfolio, collaborate on projects, or connect for creative inspiration. Let’s create extraordinary visuals together!

Name: 500watt
Description:
500watt is a production company that specializes in high-end photography and video productions.

This usually concerns the development and implementation of campaign and / or image concepts for brands or agencies. In doing so, 500Watt takes care of all aspects of production. We did this for Opel Nederland, Feyenoord, Philips, TUI Netherlands, ING, the Municipality of Rotterdam, Alzheimer Nederland, KWF, Nyenorde Business University, Trek (cycling) and HUB Footwear. 500watt has a fully equipped photography - film studio in the center of Rotterdam (5min walk from CS) which is equipped with the latest, state-of-the-art photo, film and edit equipment. For the necessary input and output during brainstorming sessions and shoots, 500Watt has an extensive network of make-up artists, stylists, designers, models and art directors throughout the country.

Name: Cédric Jacquot Photography
Description:
After several years traveling the world, first in the snowboard and kitesurfing industries, I decided to fully dedicate myself to my passion: photography. Every morning, I wake up with an irresistible urge to create and play with light. What drives me is the diversity of photographic challenges, and I am convinced that a photographer must master several types of photography to excel. It is by exploring different approaches that I develop a deep understanding of light and its effects. For me, photography is an endless adventure, a constant opportunity for creativity.

My photography training began in Australia, where I built a solid foundation in 2013-2014. Since then, I have continually refined my skills on my own, closely following the technological advancements that constantly redefine our art. Understanding and mastering both equipment and software is crucial to staying at the forefront. I willingly embrace and integrate every new technology, convinced that it is essential to evolve with the times. I use the latest Canon cameras and lenses, as well as DJI technology for aerial photography. From the first email to the delivery of the photos, I invite each client to a unique creative experience, always placing collaboration and innovation at the heart of every project.

I offer my professional photography services in Nouméa and internationally. Specializing in B2B advertising photography, I showcase products, companies, and their teams. My expertise also includes aerial photography, underwater photography, event photography, photojournalism, architecture, and tourism. I strive to tell stories through every image, always seeking new creative challenges.

Name: Starboard & Port
Description: George and Chase are the photographers at the helm of Starboard & Port. Along with their support team, they shoot engaging campaigns across all genres, for clients in every industry. They’re skilled at telling full and compelling narratives for brands. From connected lifestyle moments and environmental portraits to still life, interiors and architectural hero shots, they are storytellers at heart with the image as their preferred delivery vessel.

Description:
Heroes Agency photo & film
With more than a decade of operation,  the diverse expertise of our staff allows us to specialize in a multitude of subjects, including, but not limited to architecture, food and drinks, still life, corporate, lifestyle and fashion. Our assignments are equally divided between studio and location shooting.
We provide visual answers to achieve success in your projects, campaigns and brands.
Our staff is capable of shooting and managing any size project, from simple product shots to multi-national location productions.
We provide high quality digital images as part of a complete creative strategy for our clients. We travel extensively throughout the world covering advertising or client direct assignments.


We believe each client is exclusive: We ensure to meet and exceed the expectations in each and every project.

We can help you stand out from the crowd. 
We are Heroes

By reducing fees and offering a more focused platform, with additional information about accurate gear values, photographers and videographers are able to get fair market value for their used equipment, allowing them to continue pursuing their passion while helping to reduce the financial strain.

Name: artem project
Description:
Artem Project is a Paris and London-based boutique talent agency founded by Anne-Gaël Senic.

During her 25 years in the fashion industry, Senic worked for a number of renowned agencies before creating her own production company, Lalaland and producing for Mert and Marcus exclusively for 10 years. Following that partnership, Senic developed, for 7 years, the European region of the talent agency, Lalaland Artists and in 2021, co-founded Maanifest – a consulting agency based between london, new york and los Angeles.

Artem is initiated as both an agency and an artist collective, emphasising creative freedom and collaboration at its core. Each of the represented artists are encouraged to flourish as an individual, with personal work being considered equally important to commissioned projects.
Partnering with some of the most exciting, rising names in the industry, the agency champions distinctive perspectives within the growing and dynamic field of image-making.

Description: At Abdallah Banna Photography, we’ve been capturing life’s most precious moments since 2013. With a passion for storytelling through the lens, we’ve dedicated ourselves to providing exceptional photography services that transform moments into timeless memories. Our journey has taken us across a diverse spectrum of events, from joyous parties to heartfelt weddings and engagements, creating a rich tapestry of experiences and memories for our clients.

Name: GunnarImages - Wildlife Photography by Gunnar Haug
Description:
All my life I have travelled a lot, to all corners of the world. I still love it. During the last ten years my main focus has been on portraying wildlife through photography. I sell my work, mainly as prints for wall decoration, in various sizes.

My photography end products can be prints on:
1) Aluminium/"Dibond" (a very durable sandwich board consisting of two 0.3mm outer layers of aluminium with a core of polyethylene) It is practically speaking non-reflective and my personal favourite.
2) Plexiglass (shiny/glossy "museum" quality, with a "wow"-factor).
3) Canvas stretched around the edges on a wooden frame, a classic.
4) Smaller prints on say A3 format premium photo paper, minimum 270 g/sqm. 

Frameless minimalistic prints are very popular. However, some clients want traditional framing to match their interior. Then I can ship the paper print only, while the clients arrange with the framing locally.

Do you wonder how my photo will look on your wall? Send an image of your wall to me (preferably taken in 90 degrees straight angle to the wall itself), and I can superimpose your preferred photograph on your wall, so you can imagine the end result.

Name: Eternidad Bodas y Eventos - Foto y Video Profesional

En Eternidad Bodas y Eventos convertimos momentos únicos en historias que perduran. Somos un equipo especializado en fotografía, video y producciones audiovisuales para bodas, eventos sociales, corporativos y proyectos profesionales.

Trabajamos con visión cinematográfica, tecnología de alto nivel y una sensibilidad que entiende lo esencial: cada historia merece ser contada con verdad, emoción y excelencia. Desde una boda íntima hasta un evento empresarial de gran escala, creamos piezas que conectan, inspiran y elevan la experiencia.

Bodas, eventos y producciones audiovisuales que transformamos en historias memorables.

Name: Pearl Studio
Description:
Welcome to Pearl Studio, where photography transcends into an art, and moments are woven into everlasting memories through the lens of our passionate photographers. Our story is one of relentless pursuit in capturing the essence of every occasion, transforming ordinary frames into extraordinary treasures that narrate tales of love, joy, and beauty.

At Pearl Studio, we believe that every photograph should evoke emotions and stand as a testament to life's most cherished moments. Our team of skilled photographers goes above and beyond to achieve this, employing a perfect blend of creativity, expertise, and cutting-edge technology.

With our specialized Image Enhancement service, we infuse new life into your photographs. Colors become more vibrant, details are enhanced, and an ethereal touch is added, elevating each shot to its fullest potential. Whether it's a heartwarming family portrait, a milestone celebration, or a breathtaking landscape, our Image Enhancement service ensures your memories are preserved in timeless brilliance.

As the sun gracefully sets and the day transitions into dusk, we seize the moment with our Day to Dusk service. Capturing the captivating allure of this golden hour, we create enchanting visuals that immerse you in the tranquility and warmth of those fleeting moments.

Our commitment to preserving the essence of your cherished memories extends to our Item Removal service. Say farewell to unwanted distractions in your photos as we skillfully eliminate any elements that may hinder the beauty of your captured moments.

Pearl Studio stands as a beacon of artistry and dedication, weaving visual tales that resonate with your soul and become cherished gems in your heart. With each photograph, we blend passion, creativity, and precision, aiming to exceed your expectations and create a timeless legacy of treasured memories. Trust us to be your storyteller, and together, we'll paint a tapestry of emotions that will be etched in your heart forever.

 Découvrez notre concept unique au monde : la Friz humaine ou l'art de rassembler des dizaines, des centaines voire des milliers de personnes sur un support photo ou vidéo.

 Nos animations photo et vidéo sont originales et exclusives. Grâce à notre approche unique et innovante, chaque animation devient un moment fort de votre événement, renforçant l’engagement et laissant une empreinte positive.

Name: The Independent Photographer
Description:
The Independent Photographer is a global photography network of artists, industry insiders and photography enthusiasts. Featuring a set of prize-winning monthly awards and a curated online magazine reached by more than two million people each year, the platform is dedicated to celebrating and promoting photography.

Since launching in 2016, The Independent Photographer has awarded over $150,000 in cash prizes; published 700 artists in annual photobooks, and exhibited the work of more than 500 photographers through a series of international exhibitions, while collaborating with leading figures and organisations such as Magnum Photos, Leica, National Geographic, Steidl, and The Guardian.

Featuring editorials, reviews, news, stories and interviews, The Independent Photographer Online Magazine, is one of the most comprehensive recourses on contemporary photography. From the iconic greats of yesteryear to the most exciting rising stars of today, classic reviews to new popular trends, it is a space to discover and explore the best the medium has to offer.

Name: Fahey/Klein Gallery
Description:
The Fahey/Klein Gallery is devoted to the enhancement of the public's appreciation of the medium of photography through the exhibition and sale of 19th and 20th century rare, vintage and contemporary fine art photography by some of the most notable figures in the history of photography.

Throughout its history, the gallery has presented to the public the finest master works of 20th century photography. The gallery is a leader in the field and enjoys an unparalleled position of respect among its clientele. This position of leadership is a result of our deep dedication to the medium of photography as well as the wide range of services, knowledge and assistance we can offer all clients - private, corporate, institutional, educational, including museums.

The gallery, with over 10,000 photographs in stock, deals specifically in photographs as works of art in all genres including portraiture, landscape, still-life, nudes, and reportage. The Fahey/Klein Gallery is a full service gallery for fine art photography. In addition to curating monthly exhibitions for its Los Angeles venue, the gallery personnel also annually curate and export as many as 35 fine art photography traveling exhibitions for other major gallery and museum venues worldwide.

The gallery is also responsible for packaging numerous books. The gallery has collaborated on or packaged over 40 fine art photography books in the past 20 years. We often coordinate the release of these publications in conjunction with the artists' related exhibitions.

The focus of our exhibitions program has always been about exposing fine art photography to the international art/photography community. The interest in collecting photography has increased dramatically within the last 15 years.

Name: Jordi Koalitic
Description:
Jordi.Koalitic is a creative photography project born from the creative mind of the brothers Jordi Puig ( @jordi.koalitic ) and Arnau Puig ( @arnaukoalitic ), two content creators who have created their own style and way of understanding photography  reaching millions of people around the world (35 million followers in his social networks) and being one of the most demanded profiles for global top brand companies & celebrities. 

After the creation of his Instagram profile in 2017, within two years of regular and exponential growth, in 2019 Jordi.koalitic‘s photographic style started becoming viral worldwide. Big media and creative social media accounts from around the world, give credit to this online phenomenon which has been able to break records and create a new online photographic trend. 

Nowadays, Jordi Koalitic has the 2th biggest photography account worldwide on Instagram (+7 million followers) being the number 1 in terms of engagement. He also has the 5th biggest TikTok Spanish account (+20,9 million followers), 1.3 million followers in Facebook and 4 million subscribers and more than 2 billion views in his Youtube Channel.

The last viral phenomenon has been his Bili bili Channel, which has accumulated more than 1 million subscribers in less than one year.

Since July 2019 Jordi has worked with companies such as Lamborghini, BMW, AMG, Mercedes, Cupra, Meta, Nikon, Xiaomi, Sony, LG, DJI, Adobe, Red Bull, Adidas, Nike, Pepsi and many others. He had the chance to collaborate and work with artists and celebrities such as Will Smith, Jared Leto, Steve Aoki, Machine Gun Kelly, Pepe & Angela Aguilar, the F1 driver Nico Hülkenberg, and the F.C BARCELONA football team. 

At the end of 2022, the prestigious Forbes magazine included Jordi Koalitic in its list of influencers of the year awarding him with the title “BEST INFLUENCER CREATIVITY 2022“, an award that reflects his outstanding artistic career and its undeniable impact on social networks.

Name: The Headshot Guys
Description:
THE HEADSHOT GUYS, LLC

Co-founders, Jonathan Watkins and Jeff Wegge formed The Headshot Guys, LLC to be the Twin Cities’ premiere business portrait destination. Great care and time is taken with each individual to produce a high-end image that conveys professionalism, self-confidence and builds rapport and trust with clients.

Jonathan and Jeff are Twin Cities, MN, based portrait and sports photographers with diverse backgrounds but a shared passion for helping clients strengthen their brand through photography.

The Headshot Guys have a combined 50-plus years of business experience, both in the corporate world and as entrepreneurs, with Jonathan running a successful technology company and Jeff as an Independent Financial Advisor. They incorporate their business skills into their headshot photography by getting to know their clients’ goals and objectives and collaborate on a game plan to accomplish it.

Unmatched preparation is what separates The Headshot Guys. Prior to any session, Jonathan and Jeff sit down with each client to go over their brand and explain how the right headshot can help them best convey the image, style and personality they want the world to see as part of an overall marketing strategy.

Jonathan Watkins

A staff photographer for Minnesota Hockey Magazine since 2015, Jonathan’s client list includes Vail Resorts, Rogers Sports Net-Canada, the Minnesota Wild NHL hockey club. Jonathan has photographed/covered the Stanley Cup playoffs, the USA women's Olympic hockey team, the NCAA Frozen Four Ice Hockey Championships and many other college and high school sports teams.

Jeff Wegge

Description:
Piper Studios is proud to celebrate 50 years as a family business!

At Piper Studios we give you the highest quality images and video Toronto has to offer. We are your link to the hottest Graphic Designers, and the most innovative Editors, we provide you with the latest in designer wedding albums and portraits, and most importantly the most reliable service you can ask for.

At Piper, we fuse creativity with dependability. Our 5000 square foot studio is always filled with friendly staff ready to work with you during every step of your wedding planning experience. From choosing a photographer and videographer to putting those final touches on your designer albums, invitations, DJ Entertainment and more, we are always here for you. This is how we’ve managed to remain Toronto’s Top Wedding Photography Studio for over 50 years; we are here for you and we bring you the best.

History
Back in the 1960’s there was the original and first photo studio in Toronto creating unforgettable wedding images. No pretense. No attitude. Just timeless photographs that captured the essence of a moment that deserved to be uniquely memorialized: the bride’s big day. Those were the humble roots of the now famous Piper Studios. For 50 years, Piper Studios has been capturing the true spirit of brides and their loved ones in an unforgettable way.

Every photographer takes a picture that you will see. Only Piper Studios creates images that you will truly feel. That’s the Piper Difference. So whether you are looking for candid, romantic, photo-journalistic, contemporary, or just plain cool, Piper Studios will deliver. We’ve been doing it for 50 years and we’re not about to stop now.

Name: Eight Seconds
Description:
The American Cowboy is an archetype. It lives in our collective conscious representing the love of the land, care for its creatures, and the hard work that affords freedom. It is a romanticized analog in our digital age. Today, the cowboy is a fluid figure represented by many races, cultures, and genders, presenting a more varied image than ever before.

By building strong relationships, being open and curious, we aim to tell the stories of these modern cowboys. We do this to permeate the American consciousness and transform the narratives we tell about each other.

Name: Meredith Marlay Curator & Art Consultant
Description:
Meredith Marlay is a Curator & Art Consultant specializing in photography and photo books. Her experience ranges from non-profit organizations to corporate clients including Turner Broadcasting System, Artspace, Google, Levi's, Ace Hotel, Savannah College of Art & Design, Month of Photography Los Angeles, Ashes & Snow: The Nomadic Museum, and TASCHEN Books.

The projects she works on can be seen in The New York Times Magazine, TIME, Esquire, New York Magazine, Numéro, Wallpaper, VICE, Wired, TASCHEN, PowerHouse Books, Nike, Anthropologie and Monocle as well as in permanent collections in Los Angeles, London, New York and Hawaii. 

Commercially, Meredith worked under Creative Director Barbara Griffin at TBS, Inc. as the Senior Photo Editor, directing a team of editors and collaborating with producers and retouchers. Her position was responsible for curating and managing photography for CNN, TBS, TNT, TCM, Cartoon Network, and Adult Swim.

In fine art, Meredith worked as an Artist Assistant to Gregory Colbert’s The Nomadic Museum: Ashes and Snow exhibition for Mexico City. The exhibition attracted over ten million visitors and has become one of the most visited art installations in history. 

In the beginning of her career, Meredith contributed to Joyce Tenneson’s fine art book Wise Women featured on Oprah, managed Artspace’s pop-up gallery on the West Coast, art directed photography for The Savannah College of Art & Design Inc., and worked with renowned runway photographers Dan and Corina Lecca for Mercedes Benz Fashion Week in New York City. 

Meredith received a bachelor of fine arts in photography and art history from the Savannah College of Art & Design. She has reviewed portfolios at the School of Visual Arts in New York and Month of Photography in Los Angeles, as well as contributing to numerous lectures and seminars.

Name: Studio Fotografico Dreaming Blue
Description:
"Un milione di parole in un 'immagine"
Questo è il pensiero portante che segue qualsiasi operazione fotografica e artistica che cerchi di immobilizzare e rendere eterna un'immagine.

Nel silenzio apparente di un'immagine, nel suo quieto e perenne riposo divampa l'incendio di tutte le idee, di tutte le tensioni, di tutte le parole.

La Dreaming Blue nasce nel 1998 come agenzia fotografica da un 'idea di Morgan Capasso. Lo studio si è occupato sin dall’ inizio di servizi fotografici tradizionali sia per le esigenze dei privati (ritratti, cerimonie, ecc.) che per le aziende (moda, pubblicità etc.) offrendo un servizio personalizzato e diversificato per ogni tipo di esigenza.

 Riteniamo che il punto di forza della Dreaming Blue sia la qualità che contraddistingue i suoi servizi nella disponibilità verso il cliente e nella sensibilità artistica che accompagna ogni intervento che si vuole proporre, ma soprattutto e non da meno la passione che negli anni ci ha aiutato a crescere in un settore altamente competivo e soprattuto sempre più specialistico.

Ogni volta che si vuole dare vita a un'immagine l'obiettivo è quello di renderla unica ed irrepetibile, sia a livello emotivo che della qualità. La nostra migliore ricompensa è la soddisfazione dei nostri clienti.

Con il tempo la Dreaming Blue ha cominciato ad occuparsi del settore espositivo ed artistico e da qui nasce la Fine Art Photography che vuole accogliere l'arte in tutte le sue forme, per dare forza espressiva a quel sentire che oggi si accantona , si allontana, si nasconde, si esprime laddove non si può veramente vedere e sentire.

La Fine Art Photography diventa luogo d'Arte, luogo di cultura, luogo di scambio di un'energia sempre meno utilizzata e compresa.
Lo studio fotografico Dreaming Blue
di Morgan Capasso a sede in:
Via Licinio Murena 39 00175 Roma

Name: www.theanshul.com
Description:
Anshul Srivastava is a seasoned photographer with a rich tapestry of experiences that spans over a decade. Beginning his journey in the bustling corporate world, Anshul cultivated his skills in sales and marketing, honing an acute understanding of client needs and the art of visual storytelling.

His path took a serendipitous turn when he crossed paths with Kodak, igniting his passion for photography. From capturing candid moments to orchestrating grand events, Anshul’s lens has chronicled the essence of life’s myriad celebrations.

In 2014, he ventured into the world of entrepreneurship, founding TheAnshul.com—a testament to his vision of encapsulating memories in frames that transcend time. Under his leadership, TheAnshul.com has flourished, becoming synonymous with excellence in photography.

Anshul’s portfolio speaks volumes, showcasing a diverse array of projects ranging from high-profile political gatherings to intimate weddings. His keen eye for detail coupled with a knack for capturing the essence of the moment has earned him accolades and admiration from clients and peers alike.

Beyond the confines of the studio, Anshul is a storyteller at heart, weaving narratives through his lens that resonate with authenticity and emotion. Whether it’s a candid portrait or a sweeping landscape, each photograph is imbued with his signature style—timeless, evocative, and filled with the warmth of human connection.

Anshul Srivastava’s journey as a photographer is not merely about freezing moments in time; it’s about creating legacies, preserving memories, and sharing in the joy of life’s most precious moments.

Name: The Wed Cafe
Description:
About Us:
Your wedding photographer should understand how important your wedding day is for you and your family. Only when they understand this, they can look out for the sweetest, most emotional moments and capture them beautifully in their camera. 
At The Wed Cafe, we do this every day. We know the significance of marriage rituals, and we capture those moments which happen on the sidelines of the wedding. We capture this raw emotion, package it into a beautiful picture for you, and give it to you to cherish forever.

Our in-house team of photographers, editors, and cinematographers is well-equipped, experienced, and talented. Our dedication to the art of Indian weddings shows at every wedding we cover. For each wedding we cover, we become a part of the family. We make sure that the bride, the groom, and their families are comfortable enough with us to let their guard down and give us wonderful candid moments to capture.
We started photographing Indian weddings in early 2011. Since then, as a testament to our work, requests have been pouring in and people have been kind enough to give us glowing reviews about our wedding photography and cinematography.

About Rajesh Luthra:
Rajesh Luthra started as a fashion photographer but found his true calling when he started doing wedding photography. He covered his first wedding in 2011 and is now known as one of the best candid wedding photographers in India. Initially, Rajesh Luthra started out on his own, but as wedding assignments started pouring in, he increased his team to include other experienced and talented photographers, editors, cinematographers, and more.
As a candid photographer, Rajesh Luthra’s favorite part of every wedding is the moments that come out when people aren’t aware of the camera’s presence. They let their guard down, and don’t worry about posing. That’s when, Rajesh Luthra says, we get the best photographs.

As a professional photographer, it is my responsibility to help you Cherish Your Dreams! with ORANGEDREAMS.

Name: From the Hip Photo
Description:
Dazzling photos + a stress-free experience.

The creative experts at From the Hip bring gushworthy, personal care to everything they do. Whether it's documenting conferences and large-scale events, photographing executive headshots, working with brands to tell their story, or collaborating with clients in sectors as far-reaching as fashion, food and beverage, hospitality, fitness, architecture and construction, real estate, product, retail, and the non-profit realm.

WHO WORKS WITH FROM THE HIP?

Individuals, start-ups, families, mom-and-pop operations, Fortune 500 businesses, and everyone in between. Some of our recent clients include Charles Schwab, North Face, Hermes, Zillow, Airbnb, Xero, Gusto, Heartland, Louis Vuitton, Marriott, Sage Hospitality, Bayer, AutoNation, Yelp, Stryker, JLL, Hilton, Cystic Fibrosis Foundation, SoFi. We partner with yoga studios in New York City, conventions in San Diego, strategy firms in Miami, and coffee shops in Denver.

WHAT DOES FROM THE HIP DO?

* Headshots and team photos
* Interior and exterior photography
* Event photography
* Social media strategy and content
* Food & product photography
* Brand identity work
* 360 degree photo/video
* Conference & convention coverage

DOES FROM THE HIP WORK WITH INDIVIDUALS?

Absolutely! In addition to our corporate photo/video services, we work with individuals, families, and couples for everything from newborn photography to weddings.

HOW DOES FROM THE HIP GIVE BACK?

Each year, we reinvest 20% of our sales back into the greater Denver community by providing pro-bono assistance to nonprofits, arts and culture groups, and organizations dedicated to providing a platform for storytelling by historically marginalized groups. Some of our partners include Brents Place, Childrens Hospital Colorado, Museum of Contemporary Art Denver, the Denver Art Museum's Culturehaus, Urban Peak, El Sistema, and Aurora Public Schools.

Description:
Food Visuals ist ein Fotostudio in Bern, spezialisiert auf Foodfotografie, Videografie und Reportagen. Mit über 35 Jahren Erfahrung setzen wir Food, Marken und Geschichten in Szene – authentisch und mit viel Liebe zum Detail. 

Unser grosses Studio im Felsenau-Quartier bietet alles, was für professionelle Foodproduktionen nötig ist: modernste Technik, über 16'000 Requisiten im Lager, rund 600 verschiedenen Hintergründe und eine voll ausgestattete Profi-Küche. Hier entstehen täglich Bilder und Videos, die Appetit machen. 

Wir sind ein eingespieltes Team aus erfahrenen Fotograf:innen und Kreativen, das Food liebt und versteht. Mit Hingabe und Präzision schaffen wir Inhalte für Kampagnen, Social Media, Editorials und Markenauftritte – vom ersten Konzept bis zum letzten Feinschliff. Ob Studioaufnahmen, Video-Content, Stop-Motion, Reportagen oder Editorials – wir holen das Beste aus jedem Gericht und jeder Geschichte heraus.

Unsere Kund:innen sind so vielfältig wie unsere Projekte: Von Arte Cucina Bern über Unilever Food Solutions und Gruyère bis zu Gastronom:innen, Produzent:innen und Agenturen in der ganzen Schweiz.

«Die Zusammenarbeit mit Jules Moser und seinem innovativen Team ist geprägt von grossem Können, viel Kreativität, von Empathie, Professionalität und Leidenschaft. Jules und sein Team verstehen es, auf die Kunden einzugehen und einzigartige Resultate zu erzielen. Selten haben wir so fröhlich und entspannt gekocht und unser Fleisch dabei so toll in Szene gesetzt. Wir sind grosse Fans und freuen uns auf weitere Tage im für uns feinsten Fotostudio.»
- Michèle Kobel, Kobel's Hof

I corsi attivi tutto l’anno, si rivolgono sia a principianti o fotoamatori che iniziano ad avvicinarsi alla fotografia, sia a fotografi che vogliono perfezionare il proprio modo di fotografare, o con workshop dedicati, approfondire specifici generi di fotografia.

Al fine di creare un pubblico sempre più competente, la Scuola di Fotografia di Torino organizza numerose attività culturali dedicate alla divulgazione dell’arte fotografica: eventi e letture portfolio, visite guidate alle mostre e presentazioni di libri e documentari, incontri con artisti e fotografi, concorsi e mostre per promuovere talenti e tendenze della fotografia contemporanea.

Description:
O IIF é um Instituto dedicado a Fotografia que oferece, há 10 anos, cursos de fotografia digital em São Paulo (SP) e hoje é uma das melhores escolas de fotografia do Brasil, oferecendo cursos e workshops presenciais de fotografia para profissionais e amadores e cursos a distância.

Além dos cursos para fotógrafos, a escola também possui um canal no Youtube com aulas, palestras e conteúdos gratuitos de fotografia.

Outro veículo de conteúdo gratuito do IIF é o Photomag, uma revista eletrônica que disponibiliza matérias, dicas gratuitas de fotografia e as novidades para os fotógrafos.

A escola também organiza congressos e eventos de fotografia, os principais: Newborn Photo Conference e Newborn Experience, dedicados à fotografia de recém-nascidos, e o Photo Meeting, voltado para gestão e marketing para fotógrafos.

Name: TomazouuuProd
Description:
Chez TomazouuuProd, chaque projet est une nouvelle aventure, une opportunité de transformer vos idées en images percutantes et inoubliables. Que vous soyez dans le secteur automobile, l’événementiel, le corporate ou tout autre domaine, mon objectif est de mettre mon expertise et ma créativité au service de votre vision. Fort d’une expérience solide en photographie et production audiovisuelle, je maîtrise l’art de capturer des moments qui racontent votre histoire avec authenticité et impact.

Dans le monde de l’automobile , je m’attache à révéler la beauté des lignes, la puissance des moteurs et l’adrénaline des moments partagés entre passionnés. De la capture des moindres détails d’une carrosserie à l’action en mouvement, chaque prise de vue est pensée pour exalter l’esprit de la route, la vitesse et le design.

Pour l’événementiel , mon rôle est de capter l’émotion de chaque instant. Que ce soit un concert, un salon, une cérémonie ou un festival, chaque événement mérite d’être immortalisé pour que son souvenir perdure. Je crée des visuels dynamiques et immersifs, où chaque cliché raconte l’histoire d’un moment unique, vivant et vibrant.

Dans le domaine corporate , je travaille avec les entreprises pour valoriser leur image de marque. Qu’il s’agisse de portraits professionnels, de reportages sur site, ou de campagnes promotionnelles, mes productions visuelles sont conçues pour transmettre vos valeurs et renforcer votre identité auprès de vos clients et partenaires.

En tant que photographe, vidéaste et pilote de drone , je dispose de tous les outils pour répondre aux besoins de projets variés. Les prises de vue aériennes apportent une perspective unique et saisissante, transformant chaque scène en une œuvre visuelle à couper le souffle. Grâce à mon savoir-faire et à mon attention aux détails, je suis en mesure de livrer des contenus de haute qualité, adaptés aux exigences et aux standards les plus élevés.

 Vous avez un projet en tête ? Parlons-en !

Name: W. Eugene Smith Memorial Fund
Description:
W. Eugene Smith learned the hard way that photography could be too easy, a matter of making expert images of interesting subjects. He set himself to learn the truth – about himself as well as his subjects. In the process, he produced a series of photographic essays, for LIFE and other publications, whose passionate involvement set a standard for what photography can be. Gene Smith was a loner, a driving and driven man, who bucked the system of which he was a part. Some say he sacrificed his career, and himself, on an altar of self-destructive idealism. When he died at the age of 59 in 1978, he had $18 in the bank. But his name had become synonymous with integrity. His work was his memorial.

Why, then, a memorial fund in his name? Those who knew Smith knew also that he needed friends at critical times. Many photographers today are working against the fashions and economics of modern publishing. The Fund was established in 1979 to seek out and encourage these independent voices. In the first thirty years of competition, from many thousands of proposals, the Fund selected 303 finalists who were seeking help in finishing major projects. Each was worthy of a grant. Between 1980 and 2009, thirty-two recipients from fourteen different countries were recognized.

In one way or another, a finalist must approach Gene Smith’s own high standards. “I am a compassionate cynic,” he wrote, “yet I believe I am one of the most affirmative photographers around. I have tried to let the truth be my prejudice. It has taken much sweat. It has been worth it.”

Inicios

Empresa fundada en Villa del Río en 1981.
Inicialmente fue sólo un estudio fotográfico orientado tanto a fotografía social como industrial. En ese primer momento tenía un personal de sólo dos trabajadores. Pronto la creciente industria del mueble de Villa del Río sirvió para desarrollar mucho más la parte del negocio dedicada a fotografía Industrial y publicitaria.
Se adquiere una nave industrial en el nuevo polígono industrial construido en la localidad. Aún hoy , después de distintas ampliaciones y remodelaciones sigue siendo esta nave su sede principal.

Servicios que ofrecemos

Albumes Digitales, impresion fotografica, albumes aficionado, tarjeteria offset, impresión directa sobre rigidos (Dibond, Forex, metacrilato)...

Diganos lo que esta buscando y lo haremos realidad.

Name: M.Buttigieg Photography & Design
Description:
At the age of 13, I decided to start a business venture. A business venture which had a risk like any other business, although I was lucky that my family had a small DSLR which I started using until I felt I should invest to take on the next leap.
 
In January 2016, I founded my own personal brand #MButtigiegPhotography and started taking some photos of nature, holiday trips and by time events. I never took any courses except the time I spent experimenting by myself until Summer 2020, when I decided to do a Photography and Photo Manipulation course at ICE Malta to improve on what I knew and to have a certificate which I could show if needed. Although I always kept this as a hobby and with the aim of some money-making, I feel proud to say that I have worked in various events and with some well-known brands across Malta and Gozo. In 2021, I was also given the opportunity to shoot at the major entrepreneurial event in Helsinki - #Slush.
 
Through photography, I have expanded my network and thus got out further of my comfort zone. My motto is to work hard to achieve that reward.

Get in touch for more information!

Williams' studio offers a comprehensive stock archive and Fine Art collectors benefit by his fine art collection.

Jimmy was most recently nominated 2012 ASMP Photographer of the Year. Other recent accolades include recognition by Communication Arts Photo, Design, & Advertising Annuals, The One Show, IPA, B&W Spider Awards, Luerzer’s Archive Magazine, PDN, Color Magazine, B&W Magazine, Graphis, and At Edge. Jimmy has been named Ad Week’s Photographer of the Year as well as received multiple Addy’s including Best of Show. Description:
In 2025 vieren we 750 jaar Amsterdam en daarom maken wij met jou een cadeau voor de stad.
“Nothing is impossible, the word itself says I’m possible” zei Audrey Hepburn.

Jij bent het begin van de volgende 750 jaar Amsterdam. I’mPossible 

Samen maken we een prachtig document, een vooruitblik op onze toekomst.
I’mPossible wordt een ode aan de hedendaagse Amsterdammers. We kijken niet terug maar vooruit.
Wat betekent Amsterdam voor jou?  Wat zijn jouw idealen? Wat brengt Amsterdam jou?
Jouw ideeën, wensen en dromen over Amsterdam laten wij terugkomen in een foto-serie. Wij portretteren jou in woord en beeld. Zo maken wij samen een uniek cadeau voor de stad en haar inwoners. 
Deelname is geheel kosteloos.
Kijk naar de voorbeelden en schrijf je in of geef ons een tip over iemand die echt in deze bijzondere publicatie thuis hoort.
In onze studio staat jouw stoel te wachten en is de koffie klaar.  Meld je snel aan en doe mee! www.impossible.amsterdam

To stand out in their market
To take their brand image to the next level

Based in Charlotte, NC, we travel all over the country to photograph creatives and wildly talented CEOs.

People connect with and purchase from brands that they know, trust, and regularly see. Imagery is an integral part of your online marketing strategy and building those connections with potential clients. Personal branding helps you communicate your true value, reach the right audience, and charge your worth. It’s not stock-style images of you sitting at your laptop or working with a client. Personal brand photography builds an intentional, personality-packed narrative to help you stand out in your market. 

We get to know your business and uncover the unique brand story you’ve been hiding in order to photograph your brand the right way. Your images will allow you to connect with clients on a whole new level. 

If you think your business doesn’t have a unique brand story, we are here to tell you that you’re wrong! No one can replicate you. You are the most unique and incredible thing about your business! It’s our job to translate these things about you into a collection of powerful images that will help you boldly communicate your true value.

Our services are value-packed and tailored to your business. 
Each client receives:
- A comprehensive guide to prepare for  your photoshoot
- Style guidance on what to wear for your brand photos
- Answers to all your questions about locations, lighting, shot lists, props
- Quality digital images that complement your brand story
- A strategy for how to effectively and intentionally use your images
- The confidence of having all the images you need for marketing

Name: North American Nature Photography Association (NANPA)
Description:
North American Nature Photography Association is a membership organization supporting nature photographers at all levels of experience. NANPA is a critical advocate for the rights of nature photographers on a wide range of issues, from intellectual property to public land access for nature photographers. Its focus on environmental issues and nature photographers' rights separates it from photo clubs.

Programs include a Nature Photography Summit in odd-numbered years that brings photographers together to be inspired by and learn from the world's top pros. The Nature Photography Celebration in even-numbered years and regional events held seasonally throughout the U.S. provide opportunities to get into the field with other photographers in pre-scouted locations led by professionals. 

NANPA members also enjoy discounts on equipment insurance, access to monthly webinars, participation in our annual Showcase competition, and other opportunities to share their work through our social media, blog, and other publishing channels.

Con la fotografia ho il piacere di catturare i momenti più belli trascorsi dalle persone durante un lieto evento e di immortalare gli attimi salienti di una cerimonia importante: per far ciò prediligo lo stile reportage, poichè mi lascia la possibilità di raccontare ciò che osservo in maniera discreta e naturale.
La possibilità di essere partecipe ed allo stesso tempo parte integrante di questi meravigliosi momenti mi rende orgoglioso del mio lavoro.

Name: Working Assumptions
Description:
We are Working Assumptions, a non-profit organization making art happen about work and family to challenge assumptions about everyday life and build compassion.

Through commissions, grants, and education programs, we encourage photographers, artists, students, and other creative people to amplify and encourage conversation about humanity’s daily routines — work, play, service, and family — and how these daily routines offer us the opportunity to connect with others, share common ground, and open up to transformative change. We intentionally seek broad and diverse audiences for our work, placing installations in unexpected and non-traditional venues, in addition to gallery settings. 

Our first exhibition, "Game Face: What Does a Female Athlete Look Like?" explored the tremendous impact sports and play have daily on the lives of girls and women, asking viewers to consider what girls and women look like, freed from traditional feminine constraints, using their bodies in joyful and empowering ways. The exhibition debuted at the Smithsonian in 2001, later traveling to 16 arts venues in major cities around the country. Our exhibition, "Showing: Pregnancy in the Workplace", captured visibly pregnant women at work in whatever situation their work prescribed: at home, in an office, in a classroom, in a store, in the field, or in an actual field. Our latest traveling installation, "Showing (work x family)" combines landmark commissioned photographs of pregnant women in the workplace with a curated selection of images by accomplished contemporary photographers and the photographs of high school students who are participating in our curriculum program, wrkxfmly. This multi-week assignment for high school photography students from diverse communities around the country challenges and supports young people to explore their unique and important perspectives on the intersection of work and family in their lives.

Name: The British Press Photographers' Association
Description:
The British Press Photographers’ Association was formed in 1984 by a small group of Fleet Street photographers to showcase the work that they were so passionate about. Over the next few years the Association grew staging a series of hugely influential exhibitions and publishing three volumes of  “Assignments” – collections of each year’s best work.

In 2003 we adopted a ‘mission statement':  "To promote and inspire the highest ethical, technical and creative standards from within the profession and raise awareness and appreciation of our industry outside it."

Later in the same year we staged an exhibition at a central London gallery called UNSEEN to showcase the large number of amazing photographs that, for a wide variety of reasons, never saw the light of day and were never published. We followed that up in 2005 with the seminal ‘Five Thousand Days’ – a book that sold well over 10,000 copies and showed press photography of the highest quality. Since then we have published two more books, had several web based projects and we have supported the Press Photographer’s Year competition since its inception.
In 2006 we became one of the ‘Gatekeepers’ for the United Kingdom Press Card Authority. As part of the UKPCA we have the ability to assess and potentially approve photographers as holders of the UK Press Card.

In 2011 we made a voluntary submission to the Leveson Inquiry into the Culture, Ethics and Standards of The Press when it became clear that news photographers were being singled out for criticism from many of the celebrity witnesses without any satisfactory replies. We made an appearance at the Inquiry in February 2012 after which Lord Justice Leveson made it clear that he saw The BPPA as part of the solution rather than the problem.

The BPPA continues to make its voice heard on a range of issues that face our profession including our current work around copyright and orphan works legislation.

Born in 1996 and raised in Lebanon, she pursued a major in Audio-Visual Arts: Cinema/TV and graduated with Distinction from the Holy Spirit University of Kaslik, Lebanon where she was ranked 1st in Cinema for 4 years.

Her short film "Weeping Willow" which she wrote, directed and edited in 2018, won both Audience Choice Awards for Best Short Film at the Lebanese Film Festival in Montreal, Canada in 2019 and at REVL Film Fest 2020 and was screened at several international film festivals. Krystel was also nominated for Best Student Female Director at the 4th International Short Film Festival Pune India 2019. 

In 2018, Krystel was one of the Lebanese filmmakers to represent Lebanon in Talents Beirut 2018, an intensive workshop dedicated to Young Arab Filmmakers, initiated by Metropolis Cinema in collaboration with Goethe Institute, Berlinale Talents and FID Marseille. 
She also won the Photography Competition of La Nuit Des Musées 2018 by the Lebanese Ministry of Culture.

She currently work as a freelance filmmaker, photographer and editor.

With over a decade of experience and thousands of successful activations, PhotoboothTO has supported national campaigns, product launches, premieres, and corporate events for brands including Under Armour, Ferrero Rocher, and Paradigm PR. Our technical team handles every step—from concept and design to on-site production—to ensure a seamless experience for both clients and guests.

We operate across the Greater Toronto Area and Canada, offering scalable solutions for both small events and large multi-day brand activations. Whether it’s a gala, conference, premiere, festival, or private function, our goal is to deliver memorable visual experiences that connect people to brands in real time.

• Photo booth rental (print + digital)

Name: CO Kids Early Years Photography
Description:
A children’s photography day at nursery if not done right can bring stress to children and nursery colleagues. At CO Kids Early Years Photography we have designed a new way of photographing and are fast becoming known as the most stress free nursery photography experience. 

We know historically some nursery colleagues dread knowing a photo day is coming up! Photographing around 10,000 children a year has given us the opportunity to design the best way of photographing so it feels like a normal nursery day for all concerned. 

CO Kids Early Years Photography has consulted with hundreds of nurseries across England. Nursery colleagues now regularly report that the CO Kids experience is much like a normal day at nursery but better!

“It was great! You just came in and got on with it ... the photos are beautiful! “ Westwood Day Nursery. 

“It’s so much better to photograph this way, the children are so much more relaxed!” Riverview Day Nursery Colleague 

CO Kids Early Years Photography is owned by Carrie Wilkes. Carrie was founder of the first CO Photography and Design Ltd Northamptonshire studio, and is now the driving force behind CO Kids Early Years Photography. Carrie has photographed in nurseries for the last decade, starting out taking marketing photographs for nurseries and now regularly visiting nurseries to photograph children for parents along with her dedicated team of professional photographers.

A photo day done badly adds stress to nursery colleagues and children. Cajoling many children to visit where the photographer is located on a day can mean upset all round and on top of that staged photographs that parents don’t enjoy seeing. Once you experience a CO Kids nursery day, where we do the running around and organisation, your parents express complete joy at seeing their child's natural relaxed children’s photography.

Since 2003, she has been working as a Communication Designer in several agencies, developing skills in branding, editorial design, advertising, and web design. In 2012, she started working as a freelance photographer at Farfetch, a pioneering company in the field of fashion e-commerce in Portugal. In 2014, she joined Sonae Fashion's new e-commerce team, where she took on the challenge of creating the company's first internal photo studio. Since then, she has not only worked as a photographer but also as a coordinator and team manager, taking responsibility for the entire process of production and image creation for the ZIPPY and MO online stores. This experience has made her a specialist in e-commerce photography.

In 2023, she embarked on her personal project, which she named Kanbina Studio, intending to combine design and photography services as complementary ways of communicating and helping brands achieve their goals and successes.

Name: Tom Gerards Fotografie
Description:
gespecialiseerd in productfotografie. Daarnaast kunt u bij mij terecht voor werk aan de muur woning en bedrijfsinrichtingen.

In 2014 kocht ik mijn eerste spiegelreflexcamera. Mijn dochter werd geboren en de momenten die zouden volgen wil je graag scherp vastleggen. Door veel te experimenteren met behulp van een goede vriend leerde ik de ins en outs van digitale fotografie kennen. Door mijn ervaring met veelal analoge fotografie had ik snel de smaak te pakken.

Mijn passie ligt in de Urban exploration ook wel urbex genoemd. Dit houdt in dat ik heel Europa doorrijd op zoek naar veelal verlaten en leegstaande huizen en panden waar nog veel historie te vinden is. Het begint vaak al met het zoeken naar locaties vanachter de computer en erachter zien te komen of de locatie nog bestaat en grotendeels intact is. De echte kick haal ik uit het betreden (vaak illegaal, maar soms ook legaal) van locaties. De kans om betrapt te worden door beheerders van locaties is altijd aanwezig. En daarnaast het perfecte plaatsje maken. Je leest het goed 'maken'....je neemt geen foto maar je maakt er één. Als fotograaf ben je altijd op zoek naar die perfecte compositie waarvan je zegt "ja, heel vet". En dan nog is het persoonlijk.  Het is net als kunst, of je vindt het verschrikkelijk of je vindt het verschrikkelijk mooi!

Daarnaast houdt ik mij veel bezig met product fotografie omdat je hier vele technieken op los kan laten.

Portretten doe ik veelal bedrijfsmatig en af en toe voor vrienden die graag een leuke foto aan de muur willen hebben. Ik ben hier wel selectief in want met fotografie kan je al snel teveel hooi op je vork nemen waardoor je verzand in allerlei specialisaties.

Veel van mijn werk is te zien via instagram of mijn Facebook onder de naam van Tom Gerards Fotografie.

Mijn website is nog in opbouw maar zal binnenkort online komen.

Mocht ik je interesse gewekt hebben en wil je meer weten. Mail of bel dan naar: mail@tomgerardsfotografie.nl
06 - 51026710

Name: michaels Camera Video Digital
Description:
michaels Camera Video & Digital has grown to become Australia’s largest photographic supplier with an impressive 2,200 m² of floor space over three levels in Melbourne CBD, employing more than 60 highly qualified, knowledgeable and experienced staff.

Established originally in 1916 by the great-grandfather of current Managing Director, Peter Michael, michaels first traded as a pawnbroker and gunsmith. In 1928, Peter's grandfather opened a pharmacy with limited stocks of photographic equipment. Peter's father, Alan, came on board in 1950 and his fascination for photography led to the expansion of the photo department in store. 

The Michael family moved to concentrate solely on photographics in 1976 and has since flourished, being awarded the prestigious "Australian Photographic Dealer of the Year" award in 1988 and again in 1997, while cementing its place as Melbourne's premier photographic outlet. The additions of the michaels Media School and World Famous Camera Museum have lead to michaels being the must visit destination for photographic enthusiasts and professionals, in additional to Melbourne tourists with an interest in the photographic field.

Although situated in one location, the business size is the equivalent of five or so specialty camera outlets. It has achieved this status primarily due to the enormous range and depth of stock kept and the depth of knowledge of employees and their attention to providing a very high level of customer service.

Name: Memorii
Description:
Memorii is a digital platform that connects users with photographers, making it easy to capture your moments. Whether it’s for travel photography, milestone celebrations, weddings, or personal portraits, Memorii offers a seamless, secure, and personalized booking experience.

Core Products and Services

1. Online Photographer Booking Platform

Memorii provides a user-friendly platform that allows customers to browse, compare, and book photographers. Users can filter based on location, photography style, price range, language, and service type. Each photographer’s portfolio, service details, and customer reviews are displayed for transparent decision-making.

2. Multilingual Support for Global Users

For international travelers and expats, Memorii offers multilingual support and prioritizes photographers who speak the user’s preferred language, making communication smooth and stress-free.

3. Secure Payment and Transaction Protection

Memorii ensures secure payments through a third-party escrow system. Payments are held until the service is completed and approved by the user, safeguarding both parties.

4. Instant Communication and Scheduling Management

With an integrated messaging system, users can easily communicate with photographers to discuss details and expectations. Photographers can manage their schedules directly on the platform, while users can instantly book available time slots, reducing back-and-forth coordination.

5. Empowering Photographers to Grow Their Business

Photographers on Memorii gain access to a professional online presence, complete with customizable portfolios and transparent pricing. Memorii also offers marketing support, and industry resources to help photographers expand their reach and grow their business.

Our Vision

Memorii is committed to making professional photography accessible to everyone. By bridging the gap between photographers and clients, we aim to help people capture their meaningful moments reliably and seamlessly.

Name: Gwendolyn Pieters - Documentaire Levensfotograaf
Description:
Afscheidsfotografie is vaak niet het eerste waar je aan denkt als je geconfronteerd wordt met afscheid moeten nemen van je dierbaren. Echter blijkt het maken van foto’s in de periode voor het afscheid, evenals tijdens het afscheid, ontzettend waardevol. Keer op keer krijg ik te horen dat men zo dankbaar is met zulke mooie foto's als herinneringen, dat het helpt bij de verwerking van het verlies. Maar ook gesprekken opent met dierbaren en steun biedt.

Mooie foto’s, gevuld met liefde blijken in de praktijk ontzettend troostend te zijn. Een afscheidsreportage is mogelijk op het moment dat je weet dat je afscheid gaat naderen en je nog graag het moment zoals het nu is wilt vastleggen voor je dierbaren later. Dit kan het dagelijks leven zijn maar ook een liefdevolle portretsessie waarbij het naast foto’s maken met name draait om een fijn moment samen, herinneringen ophalen en nieuwe herinneringen maken. Met als resultaat foto’s die voor altijd het fijne gevoel dat je tijdens de reportage had zullen terug halen. Maar ook als het moment van afscheid nemen daadwerkelijk is gekomen is een reportage mogelijk.

Ik maak een reportage van de uitvaart en zoek daarbij vooral naar de momenten die gevuld zijn met liefde, een troostende schouder, een liefdevolle blik en alle details waar je met zoveel liefde aandacht aan hebt besteed. Een uitvaartreportage kan naast de dienst ook bestaan uit alle momenten  daar om heen, denk daarbij aan het sluiten van de kist, de dienst, de condoleance of later de asverstrooiing of het bijzetten van een steen op het graf.

Wir sind davon überzeugt, dass die schönsten Kinderfotos in einer natürlichen Umgebung entstehen, in der sich das Kind wohlfühlen und entfalten kann. Bei unserer Kindergarten- & Schulfotografie darf das Kind Kind sein. 

Sie dürfen uns zeigen, was sie schon alles können, Konfetti werfen und im lockigen Haar verteilen, Seifenblasen hinterherjagen und kopfüber im Klettergerüst hängen oder gar nach einem Regenschauer mit Gummistiefeln in Pfützen springen.

Wir finden, dass man auf den Fotos sehen darf, dass es Kinder sind und möchten genau dieses ungezwungene Wesen in unseren Bildern festhalten. Wir freuen uns sehr, wenn wir Sie auf dieser Webseite von unserer Philosophie und unserem Konzept überzeugen können.

Name: Product Photo Canada
Description:
Why hire Professional Commercial Product and Corporate or Industrial Photographer?

There are both technical and aesthetic choices to make, including the decision to capture the feel of natural light, or to add light for a more dramatic look for advertising photography.

Lighting design is an art and science of its own. Adding and controlling light in a space is a skill that requires continual practice and experimentation. 

Capturing accurate color is one of the most challenging aspects in photography. There are instances when accurate color is not pleasing to the eye, which may require some artistic license when color correcting an image, for the purpose of adding warmth or creating a cooler palette.

Perspective correction is key in capturing accurate lines and minimizing spatial distortion, however it may sometimes be abandoned for the purpose of creating a dramatic visual effect. The choice of lens will further control how a space is represented by compressing or expanding the perspective, as well as the height and distance from the area that the camera is placed.

Also consider that for every hour a photographer is onsite actually photographing, there is generally 2 hours to few days of image preparation and post-production time spent, getting the images to a state suitable for proper viewing and printing.

We deliver high quality digital images, after post processing for sharpness, color correction and other high level complex digital image editing.

PIX est un projet génial et très prestigieux, porté par une petite équipe conviviale et fort sympathique !
