Name: Estudio Carme de Olazabal
Description:
Poso la meva càmera al servei de la teva marca.

Faig fotografia corporativa i de marca personal, tant per a professionals com per a empreses que volen mostrar-se amb coherència, professionalitat i emoció.

Com ho faig?
✓ Acompanyo des de la calma, amb empatia i escolta.
✓ Et faig sentir còmode davant la càmera (fins i tot si odies fer-te fotos).
✓ Triem junts/es l’entorn, l’estil, la llum i la roba per captar el teu caràcter i allò que vols transmetre.
✓ Capturo la teva essència amb mirada professional, sensibilitat i molta atenció al detall.
✓ T’entrego un banc d’imatges versàtil, cuidat i alineat amb el teu projecte.

Treballar la teva imatge no és una frivolitat. És estratègia. És comunicació. És confiança.

Quan tens unes bones fotografies:
 Projectes professionalitat i credibilitat.
 Destaques en un món saturat d’imatges sense ànima.
 Connectes emocionalment amb el teu públic.
 Et mostres amb autenticitat i guanyes coherència en tots els teus canals.

No faig “fotos boniques”. Faig fotos que expliquen històries reals. Cada sessió és una experiència de reconeixement i empoderament.

 Vols imatges que parlin de tu i del teu projecte com realment ets? Doncs parlem! Estaré encantada d’escoltar-te i construir plegats/es una sessió que sumi valor a la teva marca.

 649 29 58 23      info@carmedeolazabal.cat
Location: San Cugat del Vallés, Cataluña / Catalunya

Name: Puja Agarwal Photography
Description:
Puja Agarwal Photography is more than just a photography service; it is a celebration of the art of capturing life’s moments with elegance and emotion. Through a combination of artistic vision, technical expertise, and a personalized approach, Puja Agarwal has established herself as a leading name in the field of photography.

Her work is a testament to the power of visual storytelling, and her ability to create images that resonate deeply with clients is what sets her apart. Whether it’s a wedding, a portrait session, or a commercial project, Puja Agarwal Photography delivers a level of quality and service that is truly exceptional. In every photograph, there is a story waiting to be told, and with Puja Agarwal behind the lens, those stories are brought to life with unparalleled beauty and grace.
As a premier photography service, it stands out for its ability to capture moments that transcend mere images and evolve into cherished memories. 
The experience of working with Puja Agarwal Photography is characterized by professionalism, creativity, and a genuine commitment to client satisfaction. From the initial consultation to the final delivery of images, clients can expect a seamless and enjoyable process.

The initial consultation involves discussing the client’s vision, preferences, and any specific requirements. This is followed by a detailed planning phase, where Puja and her team ensure that all aspects of the photography session are well-organized. On the day of the shoot, Puja’s friendly and approachable demeanor helps to create a comfortable environment, allowing clients to relax and be themselves.

Post-shoot, the editing process begins, during which Puja carefully selects and enhances the images to ensure they meet her high standards. Clients are kept informed throughout this process, and feedback is welcomed to ensure that the final product aligns with their with their expectations.

Name: Wildnest Travel & Photography
Description:
Wildnest is about the idea of providing a nest, a temporary home, in the wild. We want people to have unforgettable experiences in the proximity of nature, and make them feel it as their own home. 

Wildnest team consists of nature lovers, photographers & naturalists. We specialize in wildlife photography tours throughout India, Our tours are well organized, competitively priced, environmentally responsible and fully customized. We focus on complete personalized one-on-one interaction from start to finish and personally take each tour as your expert guide and companion.

We enhance your wildlife experience by giving as much information as possible and recognize that different people have different needs to take from his/her experiences. Their interests may range from photography, birding, animals, local flora and fauna to local customs, environment protection, maintaining ecological balance etc. Together, we try to understand that need, develop it further by giving technical know-how, holding discussions among-st ourselves and with other experts in the field.

We also conduct photography workshop for kids between the age of 10 yrs-18 yrs in Delhi covering basics of photography including classroom session and field trips making it a fun-filled event for the kids.

Name: Outsider.i by Isabell Janssen
Description:
Outsider.i is the creative identity of photographer Isabell Janssen, whose work explores how people connect, to themselves, to each other, and to the world around them.

Having grown up surrounded by movement, constantly adjusting to new rhythms and places, Isabell’s camera became her way of grounding herself. It offered her a way to ask questions, to observe closely, and to find belonging. That same sense of curiosity and care shapes her work today.

Her imagery blends the honesty of documentary with the intention of editorial. Themes like identity, community, and representation are central, not just in concept, but in practice. She approaches every project as a collaboration, creating space for people to be seen as they are: complex, powerful, soft, joyful, real.

Clients include: Nike, Uber, KFC, HEMA, Albert Heijn, Footlocker, Reuma Nederland, Rijksmuseum, Scheepvaartmuseum, Stedelijk Museum, Gemeente Amsterdam, Rijksoverheid, Oxxio, V-TECH, De Correspondent, Hunkemöller, and Highsnobiety.

Based in Amsterdam, Isabell works with brands, institutions, and communities across both commercial and cultural contexts, always with a focus on human connection, visual clarity, and emotional depth.

 www.outsider-i.com
 isabelljanssen@gmail.com

Name: Studio Stine Albertsen
Description:
Studio Stine Albertsen er en lille virksomhed, der arbejder med visuelle fortællinger og udvikling af brand identitet. Arbejdet består blandt andet af at fortolke produkter og design igennem fotografering, 3D og digital storytelling. 

Både ved produktlanceringer eller større konceptuelle opgaver, bliver arbejdet altid udført i tæt samarbejde med kunden. Jeg kalder arbejdet i mit lille bureau for visuelt håndværk. Et håndværk som jeg tilbyder virksomheder der ønsker at optimere deres visuelle materiale til både online platforme og offline markedsføring. Rammen er altid at arbejde strategisk for kunderne, så resultatet bliver langtidsholdbart og skaber klarhed for det videre arbejde.
Jeg kan li hvad jeg laver og jeg engagerer mig i det jeg arbejder med. Det vil du opdage når du møder mig, jeg vil hurtigt begynde at tolke din fortælling og oversætte den i billeder og materiale som kan fungere på sociale medier, hjemmeside, præsentation og i det trykte materiale. Alt sammen med afsæt i den rette visuel branding for dig og din virksomhed.

Vores samarbejde skal give mening, vi skal ikke bare producere for at producere. Vi skal sammen finde den røde tråd og få skabt materiale du kan bruge over længere tid. Måske vi også skal lave et par justeringer i dit online univers for at ramme den helt rigtige strategi. Og måske du har brug for noget som jeg ikke kan levere. Men bare rolig, mit tætte netværk er godt pakket af journalister, indretningsarkitekter, visuelle håndværkere og produkter til styling.

Jeg kalder mit arbejde for visuelt håndværk. Og det er det du får, når du samarbejder med mig.

Name: Philadelphia Collections
Description:
This collection is a portrait of the people, places and things in Philadelphia throughout the 80s, 90s and 2000s. I photographed my experience: the neighborhoods that I was raised in and later frequented. These images are a view of the city from the perspective of the people that have lived it; a city made up of people, communities, businesses and culture. They are a look at the evolution of what has, and continues to, make this city what it is today. As a product of a Philadelphia neighborhood, I have documented my first hand experience of its ever changing and often overlooked greatness over time.  

 This collection includes the creation and demolition of buildings, skylines, intersections, row houses, boxers and business owners, all from a genuine, local view. The original images were mostly shot with large format Black & White negatives. They are intended to be viewed over time to document who we were then, who we are now, and celebrate the people and communities that got us here. Currently, this collection is housed in multiple public and private collections. Most notably would be the Special Collections Research Center in the Charles Library at Temple University and the Free Library’s Print and Picture Collection. The FLP houses almost 1400 images shot during that era.

Name: National Institute of Photography
Description: National Institute of Photography (NIP, est. 1983) was founded by Late. Prof. Manohar Desai with a view of spreading the knowledge of photography among the youth, who aspire to make career in photography and others, who like to pursue it as a hobby too. NIP is a renowned, popular and trustworthy training institute in the country and has been conducting Certificate and Diploma courses for many years. NIP has trained thousands of students in photography and videography, in a systematic and methodical way, since its inception in 1983. Many of the students have pursued successful careers in photography either as a free-lancer or running their independent studios, or as a wedding & event photographer, etc. NIP has students coming in from various parts of country as well as from abroad. NIP is an ISO 9001:2008 Certified Institute, the first photography institute in India to be ISO Certified. Our courses are defined in such a way that they lay basic foundation for various genres of photography viz. wild-life, bird photography, macro photography, nature, sports, and press and so on. They contain theory and practical sessions to provide in-depth knowledge of the subject.

Name: BECA Center of Visual Storytelling
Description:
BECA Center of Visual Storytelling is a unique institution that brings together an academy for photography, a foundation and a publishing house dedicated to creating photographic books. BECA is a pioneering initiative in Bulgaria, offering a comprehensive platform that encompasses both educational aspects and various supplementary activities. Through a range of courses and workshops, participants are equipped with the technical knowledge and creative insight necessary to excel in the world of visual storytelling. The center's commitment to fostering emerging talent extends beyond education, as it houses a publishing house dedicated to producing photographic books. These books are a tangible representation of the photographers' journeys, encapsulating their artistic perspectives and narratives developed during their training.

In addition to its educational and publishing initiatives, BECA plays a crucial role in promoting photography as an art form in Bulgaria. It hosts exhibitions that showcase the works of its students and other notable photographers, allowing the public to engage with a diverse range of visual stories. The center also organizes open lectures featuring acclaimed international photographers, providing a platform for knowledge exchange and inspiration. 

By seamlessly integrating education, publishing, exhibitions, and guest lectures, BECA not only elevates the skills and careers of young Bulgarian photographers but also enriches the country's cultural landscape. As a novel institution without parallel in Bulgaria, it stands as a pioneering force in nurturing the next generation of visual storytellers and fostering a vibrant photography community.

BECA serves as the epicenter of a comprehensive ecosystem, uniting education, publishing, exhibitions, and lectures to nurture and elevate Bulgarian photographers.

Name: PAHCREATIVE
Description:
PAHCREATIVE is a boutique creative agency built for bold brands.
We specialize in photography, videography, branding, web design, and content strategy—offering a full suite of marketing services under one roof. While we work across industries, we thrive in the fast-paced world of hospitality, bringing a sharp eye and elevated storytelling to every project.

From launching new concepts to revitalizing legacy brands, we partner with clients to create content that’s not only beautiful—but also drives results.

Name: Zeroseiphoto
Description: Zeroseiphoto è un’agenzia fotografica specializzata in diversi settori tra cui: corporate event, real estate, sport, spettacolo, cerimonie, food&beverage, education. Dispone di un ampio spettro di strumentazioni e tecnologie di ultima generazione che permettono di gestire anche i progetti più complessi. Postazioni con tecnologia touch e stampa immediata sono impiegate durante gare e competizioni sportive, nonché per iniziative aziendali e istituzionali. I photo booth con sistema operativo iOS garantiscono la produzione immediata nonché la condivisione istantanea delle foto con un frame personalizzato. I reportage esprimono con efficacia la mission e la vision delle aziende con cui collaboriamo in Italia e all’estero, rendendo visibili e accessibili i servizi e i prodotti offerti. Le riprese aree conferiscono dinamicità e prestigio ai video promozionali. Contenuti originali, pensati e costruiti insieme al cliente, impreziosiscono i servizi rendendoli esclusivi e custom tailored. Zeroseiphoto opera in Italia e all’estero con sede principale a Roma.

Name: Lanes Portraits
Description:
Lanes Portraits specializes in natural style photography. That includes family portraits, children, high school seniors, pets, and commercial photography. Whether a client is interested in a portrait on one of the beautiful beaches in the area or one of several other great locations, we are always willing and able to provide a great backdrop for their portrait.

We also have a wonderful fund raising program we utilize in conjunction with portrait photography. We have worked with many nonprofit groups in Massachusetts, Rhode Island, and Connecticut.

Name: Pixel Kollective [Pty] Ltd
Description:
Pixel Kollective is a photography, videography and content production agency founded by dynamic, culturally immersed and kreative entrepreneurs and is being spearheaded by Sivuyile Matsiliza and Kelly Leeuw.

Established in 2018, Pixel Kollective’s kreative ideology is rooted in bridging the void between photographers, videographers and consumers, as well as creating powerful and compelling content for brands and agencies across the country. 

Our commitment to kreative excellence, capturing memorable moments and imagery of the highest quality are drivers in our pursuit to become an internationally renowned agency.

Description: We create professional headshots and portraits for remarkable executives, entrepreneurs and small businesses looking to improve the personal branding of their team. Name: Vantage Point Global
Description:
Vantage Point Global, a full scale visual documentation and archival firm whose primary emphasis lies on large cap construction. We have executed construction and architectural visual documentation scope in the western hemisphere on more than 24 million sf of work to date. Our approach incorporates the integration of aerial & time-lapse photography, digital progress photography, video and cinematic documentaries, QA/QC video logs, PR campaigns, final finish imagery, and O&M training tools.

Established in 2006, VPG is a 100% Disadvantaged Business Enterprise (DBE) firm, as well as a 100% Woman Business Enterprise (WBE) certified firm, VPG is ranked with a 97% rating on the Dunn & Bradstreet.  Our documentation has positively affected the mitigation of constraint issues and schedule on every project we have executed to date.  We continue today, as a distinguished leader in the construction and architectural fields, with a tangible record of proving visual documentation’s importance in the workplace by enhancing risk management capabilities and creating ease in remote communication. Our proprietary web-based software has pioneered advanced means to index, store and time sequence electronic visual media with an advanced mapping software component. VPG has provided tangible, significant, proven return on investment for every project we have executed to date. Every 1st time client of VPG has returned to utilize our service.

Name: Lezzetli Kareler
Description:
Yeme içme - gıda sektöründeki markalara ve ajanslara, yemek fotoğrafçısı ve yemek stilisti takım arkadaşlarımızla birlikte reklam - tanıtım konularında içerik üretmekteyiz. Sektörün ihtiyaçlarına odaklı tecrübelerimiz ile görsel ve editoryal içerik üretme süreçlerinde daha efektif sonuçlar elde etmekteyiz.

Yemek fotoğrafçılığı, menü fotoğrafı çekimi, qr menü, video çekimi konularında markalarımıza hizmet vermekteyiz. Yemek fotoğrafçılığı konusunda profesyonel ekipmanlar kullanarak, yemeğin doğal görüntüsünü yansıtan, iştah açan noktaları öne çıkaran bir anlayışla lezzetli kareler yakalamaya devam ediyoruz. Markalarımıza sosyal medya hesapları için aylık olarak içerik üretmekteyiz, özellikle video etkileşiminin arttığı günümüzde TikTok, Instagram Reels ve Youtube Shorts mecraları için dikey formatta videolar çekmekteyiz. Yemek yapımındaki süreçlerin anlatımı ya da restoran ve kafelerin tanıtımı gibi konularda yaratıcı videolar hazırlamaktayız.

Name: LUMIDRONE
Description: LUMIDRONE est le spécialiste de la prise de vue aérienne nocturne avec la réalisation de photographies nocturne, de création de vidéos, mais également la réalisation d’orthophotographie de l’éclairage urbain et de modèle 3D par procédé de photogrammétrie. LUMIDRONE possède une grande expertise dans le milieu de l’éclairage urbain, il peut vous accompagner pour réaliser des diagnostiques ou des conseils l’éclairage urbain en général.

Name: The Personal Photography Project
Description:
We created The Personal Photography Project (TPPP for short) as a resource for discovering authentic passion projects by photographers.

You should use this site if: you are an Art Buyer, an Art Producer, a Photo Editor, a Director of Photography, an Art Director, an Art Gallerist, a Curator, or any other creative person (even "uncreative", but give yourself some credit) who hungers for new photography and photographers with a point of view.

People always tell photographers that they should shoot more personal work (sometimes called portfolio work, though TPPP is much more than that) to attract more satisfying, creative, professional work. And yet there’s not been a place to solely showcase and explore personal projects — and show them in full.

Until now.

Projects range from heavy-hitting photojournalism, to travel, to conceptual color excursions, to anything you can name.

Some projects may have begun as fine art, others as book ideas, and others borne from a personal experience that they just had to translate into a visual medium.

Name: Numérique s.r.l.
Description:
Numérique is a high-end digital photography and retouching studio that services the fashion and advertising industries. We are proud to count some of the worlds top photographers and advertising agencies among our clients. Work by numérique regularly appears on the covers and in the pages of major publications and advertising campaigns. Numérique clients value our personalized service. We elaborate color profiles for our photographers and also integrate special looks such as polaroid and old films into digital imaging. Our experts train and assist photographers who are making the shift from film to digital capturing. Our team is composed of lively people from different edges of the imaging industry, such as illustration, painting and photography. We are happy to put our broad image culture at your disposal. And we keep developing new ideas on how to give your pictures that very special edge.

Numérique è uno studio di produzione e ritocco fotografico digitale di alto livello per l’industria della moda e della pubblicità. collaboriamo con alcuni dei più importanti fotografi e agenzie di pubblicità del mondo. I nostri lavori compaiono regolarmente sulle copertine e nelle pagine delle principali pubblicazioni e campagne pubblicitarie internazionali. I servizi che forniamo sono personalizzati in base alle esigenze dei singoli clienti. Per i nostri fotografi elaboriamo in maniera creativa profili di colore e integriamo effetti analogici nelle moderne acquisizioni digitali, come pola ed effetti pellicola e cinematografici. Consigliamo e assistiamo i fotografi che stanno passando dalla pellicola al digitale. Il nostro team è composto da professionisti formatisi in diversi ambiti dell’industria dell’immagine come l’illustrazione, la pittura e la fotografia. La nostra passione per la cultura d’immagine è a vostra disposizione, e sviluppiamo sempre nuove idee per dare alle vostre immagini quel qualcosa in più.

Name: OSA Images
Description:
Depuis sa création en 2000, OSA est en constante évolution. Studio de photographie devenu depuis quelques années agence photographique, elle offre aujourd’hui l’expertise de photographes parmi les plus en demande de la scène montréalaise, permettant de proposer une étonnante combinaison de style et d’expériences diverses.

Son champ de spécialisation lui permet de réaliser des mandats corporatifs, publicitaires, culturels, architecturaux et éditoriaux, tant au niveau national qu’international. La force d’OSA réside dans la solidité de son équipe, son service, sa polyvalence et dans la haute qualité artistique de ses projets.

Si le nom d’OSA est respecté et de plus en plus reconnu dans le domaine de la photographie, c’est grâce à sa vision et à sa créativité!
